the always-on drone + synthetic auto-walk guarantee a sounding, harmonising glance with zero interaction).

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 550 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom](/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom)** вҖ” Choir Bloom: a 4-year-old conducts a choir by dragging singing blob-creatures up and down to PITCHES, and a voice-leading brain turns their little melody into real four-part harmony вҖ” glowing GPU metaballs that bloom brighter as the voices come into a chord рҹҺ¶рҹ«§рҹҢҲ. `demoable` В· Cycle 550 (kids 4+ / **touch pitch-drag** / **WebGPU metaballs**). **For**: kids (4+) / a warm, cozy, sing-together playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST CONDUCT-A-CHOIR-BY-PITCH PIECE вҖ” and the deliberate breaking of the "pitch held dumb" template the jury just banned.** This is a piece where **melody and harmony ARE the idea** (the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 provocation #2** вҖ” "make music from real pitch / voice-leading / a harmonic arc again; it must BE the idea, not the thing you apologise for omitting"). **touch pitch-drag INPUT** вҖ” drag the rose **soprano** blob up/down to set its pitch, snapped to a C-major diatonic scale (always in tune, but the child genuinely *chooses each note and hears a melody*); the blob is the вүҘ64px drag handle; inner voices are independently grabbable (gentle chord-tone re-snap on release). Touch is **0Г— in the last-10 audit** вҖ” the freshest input (off the jury-banned mic, off the recent tilt/camera/shake). **WebGPU/WGSL metaball OUTPUT** вҖ” `navigator.gpu` fragment pipeline evaluates a four-source metaball iso-field вҶ’ warm additive glow (soprano=rose, alto=amber, tenor=emerald, bass=violet) that **blooms brighter as the voices become consonant and close** (a `consonance()` measure drives it); WebGPU is **the scarcest GPU surface at 1Г—/10** вҖ” the directest answer to **jury provocation #1** ("ban three.js, push GPU work onto raw WebGPU compute"). **Voice-leading harmony ENGINE** (`voices.ts`) вҖ” the soprano's scale degree implies a diatonic triad (1вҶ’I, 2вҶ’ii, 3вҶ’iii, 4вҶ’IV, 5вҶ’V, 6вҶ’vi) and the bass/tenor/alto each glide (`setTargetAtTime` ~90вҖ“140ms) to the **nearest chord tone within their range** (Aldwell & Schachter's smooth voice-leading), bass nudged toward the root, inner voices kept off unisons вҖ” so **drawing a melody with the lead blob makes real chord changes emerge underneath, a harmonic arc you can hear**. **Formant source-filter "ahh" singing SYNTH** (`audio.ts`, NOT samples / NOT granular / NOT AI) вҖ” each voice is two slightly detuned band-limited sawtooth glottal sources with ~5Hz vibrato вҶ’ a parallel bank of 3вҖ“4 bandpass formant filters (warm /a/ вүҲ F1 700 / F2 1100 / F3 2600 Hz), brighter highs / darker bass per register, so the blobs read as a *singing* choir, not a synth. **Kids-safe chain:** sum вҶ’ `masterGain(0.26)` вҶ’ lowpass 6.5kHz вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)` вҶ’ destination; a harder/faster drag NEVER gets louder or harsher вҖ” only pitch changes; always-on (never silent). **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вҶ’ hand-written **raw WebGL2** fragment metaball render (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same field/bloom math, NOT three.js) вҶ’ if neither GPU path, a plain-DOM radial-gradient glow + `text-rose-300` notice keeps audio alive; вүҘ72px **Start** gesture-gates the AudioContext + GPU init (iOS); ~2s-idle **auto-demo** drifts the soprano through a calm diatonic tune so a hands-free glance both *sees the metaballs bloom* and *hears the choir + harmony* within ~1s; full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + `device.destroy()` / `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (NO mic, NO network, NO AI model вҖ” fully offline + private, exactly right for a kids app); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH В§550 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **16 cycles running** (535вҖ“550). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch pitch-drag conductor + diatonic voice-leading SATB engine + 4-voice formant source-filter synthesis + WebGPU metaball render w/ WebGL2 fallback = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Blob Opera / David Li, Google Arts & Culture 2020**; **Cantor / Chorus Digitalis** formant gesture-singing, IRCAM/LIMSI; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§550). #1 NOT claimed (formant source-filter synthesis has lab priors вҖ” 287-mirror-choir, 413-kids-mouth-mirror, ~61 README hits; ## (Cycle 549 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/939-aurora-harp](/dream/939-aurora-harp)** вҖ” Aurora Harp: hear space weather *right now* вҖ” the live solar wind streaming past Earth raises a shimmering aurora curtain and plays the magnetosphere's resonances; calm wind = slow ULF drones, a gust or southward Bz = flares, beating and crimson sky рҹҢҢрҹҢ рҹҹўрҹҹЈ. `demoable` В· Cycle 549 (adult / **live external data (NOAA SWPC)** / **raw WebGL2**). **For**: adult / nocturnal-cosmic-contemplative / desktop-or-iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST LIVE-PLANETARY-INSTRUMENT.** **live-external-data INPUT** вҖ” two NOAA **SWPC** real-time solar-wind products fetched browser-side and polled ~60s: `plasma-5-minute.json` (density, speed, temp) and `mag-5-minute.json` (Bx/By/**Bz_gsm**/Bt) from ACE/DSCOVR at the SunвҖ“Earth **L1** point (0Г— in the last-10 audit вҖ” the freshest possible input). **raw-WebGL2 fragment OUTPUT** (GPU, NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/SVG): a full-screen **aurora curtain** вҖ” fbm-folded vertical light sheets, greenвҶ’violetвҶ’crimson by activity, star field over a dark arctic horizon, folding faster with wind speed, reaching higher and shifting crimson-violet on southward Bz. **HARP-style space-weather sonification TECH** вҖ” after NASA **HARP (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas)**: a sustained drone bed on inharmonic resonance **bands**, each a **detuned oscillator pair** producing real *beating* whose rate tracks Bt/turbulence + southward Bz; density gates how many partials sing; gust swells retrigger faster as wind speed rises; a southward-Bz crossing (вүҲ вҲ’7 nT) fires a flare вҖ” sub-rumble + ripple of beating tones synced to an aurora flash. **Pitch held deliberately non-melodic** (drone + resonance bands, NO chord, NO scale вҖ” the *Sun* is the composer; music from data/resonance, the directest JURY 2026-06-24 #3 answer) and it deliberately **drops the consonant-mode safety crutch the jury BANNED** for external-data sonification (it audifies the actual resonances/beating, never an in-tune-by-construction chord). **Master compressor/limiter** for safety; always-on drone (never silent). **Degrades fully:** Start seeds an immediate **synthetic solar wind** so sound + a moving sky appear within ~0.6s before the live feed returns; any fetch failure (offline / CORS / feed gap) вҶ’ the synthetic generator (with periodic southward-Bz "substorm" gusts) takes over behind a calm **amber notice**; no WebGL2 вҶ’ audio-only + amber notice. A live readout (speed km/s, density p/cmВі, Bz nT, Bt nT) + a "what am I hearing" panel explain the mapping; pointer to look around. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (all client-side fetch, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2 + Web Audio). NOAA SWPC ACE/DSCOVR; OVATION] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§549). #1 NOT claimed (external-data sonification has a lab prior вҖ” 836/877/898 вҖ” but those are the jury-banned consonant-crutch template; the fresh axis is *HARP-style live-resonance audification that drops the consonant guarantee*). `diversity: banned=[three.js (4Г—/10), Canvas2D, SVG, touch (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt (2Г— consecutive + rejected-933 would 3-peat the concept)] В· picked=[live-external-data INPUT (0Г—), raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT, HARP space-weather-resonance sonification TECH (data/resonance not pitch), nocturnal-aurora/cosmic VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, after 3 consecutive DEEP cycles + a ban-heavy jury verdict). **Siblings banked (IDEAS В§549):** **`938-morphogenesis` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST** (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion on **WebGPU compute** вҖ” the scarcest GPU surface вҖ” вҶ’ granular texture) and **`937-cathedral-phase`** (Euclidean + Steve Reich phasing вҶ’ raymarched SDF cathedral, the cleanest rhythm-not-pitch build). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "939"/"aurora-harp"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT data/GPU/ear-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio confirmation in container вҖ” unverified: whether services.swpc.noaa.gov CORS resolves from the deploy edge [fully covered by the synthetic-wind fallback + amber notice], the beating-rateвҶ’turbulence + Bz-flare mappings on a real speaker, whether real-day quiet wind reads as too calm [synthetic generator injects gust energy for the demo]; - **[/dream/935-kids-shake-critters](/dream/935-kids-shake-critters)** вҖ” Shake the Critters!: a 4-year-old shakes the iPad like a rattle and a little band of glowing jelly-creatures comes alive вҖ” the rhythm you shake is caught into a loop the critters keep grooving рҹ«ЁрҹҹЎрҹ”өрҹҹЈрҹҹў. `demoable` В· Cycle 548 (kids 4+ / **devicemotion-shake** / **three.js GPU**). **For**: kids (4+) / a bright, playful, laugh-first playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST SHAKE-DRIVEN STOCHASTIC-SHAKER INSTRUMENT** вҖ” the rattle is **PhISEM (Physically-Informed Stochastic Event Modeling, Perry Cook 1997)**: a shaker is modeled as N virtual beans in a gourd, a per-frame *collision probability rises with shake energy*, and each collision is a short white-noise grain through a resonant bandpass at the shell frequency (~1.7вҖ“6 kHz) with a few-ms exponential decay; summing many grains = the characteristic rattle. **Shake energy вҶ’ grain RATE + resonance BRIGHTNESS, NEVER loudness** (harder shake = more+brighter grains, kids-safe). **devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT** (`acceleration` magnitude + jerk; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap вҖ” the one fresh 4yo-native channel left: camera was AUDIT-banned 4Г—/10, touch JURY-banned, mic 3Г— / tilt-orientation 2Г— recent; shake is distinct from the tilt-orientation 931/932 just used). **three.js GPU OUTPUT** (the *scarcer* GPU surface after 931+932 both shipped raw-WebGL2; NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): five blobby icosphere **critters** with a custom vertex-noise-displacement shader squash/stretch/jiggle on shake energy, collisions puff colored sparkle particles, a rim-glow/tonemap gives a bloom feel вҖ” bold primary critter colors on a warm bright daylight sky (the jury's "active joyful middle", not calm bedtime glow). **PhISEM-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH** вҖ” three voices (soft maraca / woody cabasa / bright shaker) + a low stomp on hard onsets sound like a small band over an always-on warm drone; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (single drone, NO chimes, NO melody, NO notes to miss вҖ” music from **timbre + rhythm**, the directest kids answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3, and the deliberate inversion of `866-rainstick-sky`'s calm pentatonic). **The groove loop:** a rolling ~3.2s buffer samples the shake-energy envelope; pause вҶ’ the window freezes into a **loop** the critters keep re-triggering, so a warm groove accretes (up to 3 stacked, oldest drops; рҹ§№ clears). **Kids-safe chain:** master-gain ceiling вҶ’ lowpass ~6 kHz вҶ’ soft compressor/limiter; always-on drone (never silent); full teardown (rAF + listeners + three.js dispose + audio nodes). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вҶ’ pointer/touch **drag** = shake (plays fully by mouse-swipe) + 3s idle auto-demo gently auto-shakes so a hands-free glance sees jiggle+sparkle and hears the rattle within ~0.6s; no WebGL вҶ’ friendly amber notice, audio keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three@0.182 already present + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH В§548 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **14 cycles running** (535вҖ“548). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [devicemotion-shake + three.js GPU critter render + PhISEM stochastic-shaker synth + shake-rhythm groove-loop engine = 4] В· #3 named ref [PhISEM / Perry Cook 1997] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§548). #1 NOT claimed (PhISM cited once before in `429-kids-texture-paint-tap`; the fresh axis is shake-driven shaker *instrument* + groove-loop). `diversity: banned=[camera (audit 4Г—/10), touch (JURY), Canvas2D/SVG (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt-orientation (2Г— recent), mic (3Г— recent), raw-WebGL2 (931+932 consecutive)] В· picked=[devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT, three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarcer surface), PhISEM-stochastic-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH (texture+rhythm not pitch), bright-playful daylight-critter-band VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (kids input palette too narrow for WIDE's distinct-input-per-brief rule вҶ’ 1 concept Г— 2 GPU approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS В§548):** **`936-kids-rattle-bloom`** (the same shakeвҶ’PhISEMвҶ’groove concept as a raw-WebGL2 **metaball** fragment shader вҖ” gooey candy-bright blobs that merge with energy; ## Cycle 547 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/932-tilt-orrery](/dream/932-tilt-orrery)** вҖ” Tilt Orrery: tilt your device and a little cosmos tips like a bowl; every body that swings through perihelion rings, and the music is the emergent polyrhythm of orbits рҹӘҗрҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 547 (adult / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGPU WGSL compute**). **For**: adult / cosmic-contemplative / iPad-or-desktop. **The whole N-body sim AND the perihelion detection run on the GPU** вҖ” an inline **WGSL compute shader** integrates 3000 bodies in double-buffered (ping-pong A/B) storage buffers (semi-implicit Euler, central inverse-square gravity + a tilt acceleration "tipped bowl"); perihelion is flagged on the GPU as a local max of 1/r and only a tiny per-frame flag buffer is read back **non-blocking** via `mapAsync` (last frame's flags, вүӨ24/readback, 90ms per-body gate) to fire Web Audio bells. **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap; tilt 1Г—/10 вҖ” fresh, off the over-used touch/mic). **raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest GPU surface вҖ” 0Г— in last-10, the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1 "swing to the scarce GPU surface"; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D/SVG). **gravitational perihelion-polyrhythm TECH** вҖ” bell timbre from radius+speed (close+fast = bright bell, far+slow = soft thud), **stereo pan from `cos(angle)`** so you hear the cosmos rotate, tilt-steepness вҶ’ pulse density; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (fixed pentatonic over a sub-bass drone, NO harmony engine вҖ” music from rhythm/space, JURY #3). **The soul / research enrichment:** seven amber bodies are seeded in the **TRAPPIST-1 mean-motion resonance chain** (adjacent period ratios вүҲ 8:5,5:3,3:2,3:2,4:3,3:2) on locked analytic orbits, so a steady hypnotic pulse **self-organizes inside** the chaotic violet field вҖ” Kepler's 1619 *Harmonices Mundi* "harmony of the spheres" made literal, after NASA / SYSTEM Sounds' 2017 TRAPPIST-1 sonification. **Render:** instanced additive glowing quads + a translucent indigo trail veil. **Audio chain:** master gain 0.26 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressorNode` limiter вҶ’ destination (dense bursts never clip). **Degrades fully:** `navigator.gpu` missing or any WebGPU init throw вҶ’ a 360-body **CPU N-body sim** runs identical physics + perihelion detection and renders additive glow on a 2D `<canvas>`, still sounding (calm amber notice, never a crash); no motion sensor вҶ’ auto-drift Lissajous + pointer-drag + tilt x/y sliders (sounding/moving glance within ~0.6s, zero hardware). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGPU + Web Audio). ## Cycle 546 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/931-kids-tide-pool](/dream/931-kids-tide-pool)** вҖ” Moonlit Tide Pool: tilt the iPad at bedtime and a glowing sea of light flows downhill, pools in the low corner, and every pool rings a soft bell рҹҢҠрҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 546 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGL2 all-GPU shallow-water**). **For**: kids (4+) / a calm bedtime playspace / iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST ALL-GPU SHALLOW-WATER SIM** вҖ” the *entire* physics state (water height + four per-cell pipe fluxes) lives in ping-pong **RGBA32F float textures** (256Г—256) and is advanced every frame by two fragment-shader passes, so a 4-year-old's tilt makes the light-water *genuinely* run downhill and **pool** (real conserved flux, not a faked damped membrane). **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma вҶ’ gravity uniform; iOS `requestPermission()` gated inside the Start tap; tilt 0вҖ“1Г— in last-10 kids вҖ” the freshest input, off the banned touch). **virtual-pipes shallow-water TECH** (Mei/Decaudin/Hu 2007): flux-update pass (neighbour height-diff + tilt-gravity, damped, outflow-scaled so depth never goes negative, closed no-flux walls) вҶ’ height-update pass (net inflow вҲ’ outflow + slow central trickle so it breathes). **Pooling rings the bells** вҖ” a handful of fixed "lily" probes read back cheaply (1Г—1 `gl.readPixels` from the sim FBO, throttled ~30ms) and on a depth rising-edge (0.22s cooldown) ring one warm pentatonic note {C4 D4 E4 G4 A4 C5 D5 E5} вҖ” **NO harmony/interval engine, pitch held deliberately dumb; the music lives in the RHYTHM of how the child tilts** (gentle rock = sparse drops, fast sway = a flurry). **raw-WebGL2 GPU OUTPUT** (the scarce surface JURY #1 wants вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): a shade pass renders the height field as a moonlit sea (deep = cool indigo, pooled = warm gold, additive glow + height-normal specular shimmer), lily nodes brighten the instant they ring so the rhythm reads sound-off. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1** (swing all-in to GPU вҖ” the *whole sim* is GPU) **and #3** (music from rhythm/space, NOT pitch theory). **Kids-safe envelope:** `masterGain(0.24) вҶ’ lowpass 6kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`, a hard tilt makes MORE soft bells never louder; always-on C2+G2 drone (never silent); bells вүҘ40ms attack, gentle decay. iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + listeners + all GL textures/FBOs/programs/buffers/VAOs + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вҶ’ pointer-drag tips the sea + idle auto-demo rocks the tide so a hands-free glance sees flow+pool and hears bells within ~0.6s; no WebGL2/float-texture вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, drone keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH В§546 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **12 cycles running** (535вҖ“546). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [tilt sensor + GPU virtual-pipes solver + bell scheduler + WebGL2 render = 4] В· #3 named ref [virtual-pipes / Mei, Decaudin & Hu 2007; lisyarus/webgpu-shallow-water 2025] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§546). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10 kids] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (freshest, 0вҖ“1Г—), raw-WebGL2 all-GPU-solve OUTPUT (scarcer than three.js), virtual-pipes flowвҶ’pooling-RHYTHM TECH (not pitch theory), serene moonlit tide-pool VIBE]`. **Mode = DEEP** (the вӯҗ standing kids resurrect-first concept Г— 2 approaches; AGENT.md: develop/resurrect the bench). **Sibling banked (IDEAS В§546):** **`930-kids-tilt-tide`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept solved on CPU [56Г—56] + rendered with three.js вҖ” the bulletproof no-float-texture render path). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 112s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS, zero warnings/refs in the 931 folder; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear/GPU-verified** (no tilt sensor / GPU / audio in container вҖ” unverified: the iOS DeviceOrientation permission flow, the RGBA32F float-texture path + `gl.readPixels` readback timing on a real iPad, whether the pooling tilt-feel reads as "I poured the light," the audio balance on a real speaker; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/flowing/pooling glance with zero hardware).

## (Cycle 541 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 second-model approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/915-resonant-cinema](/dream/915-resonant-cinema)** вҖ” Resonant Cinema: your playing dreams a short FILM of itself вҖ” your music distilled to a still, bloomed into a living video, then kept moving by your own live sound рҹҺ¬вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 541 (adult / **mic + synth bed** / **three.js + AI-image + AI-video**). **For**: anyone with a voice/instrument / immersive listening / a stage projection В· **THE LAB'S FIRST TRUE MULTI-MODEL AI PIPELINE CHAIN** (JURY 2026-06-24 #4, 0Г— after being named every jury; Karel's #1 directive "AI image generation INSIDE audio-visual experiments"). **mic/synth INPUT** (a generative ambient pad bed over ONE fixed A2 drone вҖ” pitch deliberately dumb; optional live mic swaps the analysis source, never routed to destination [anti-feedback]; AnalyserNode FFT-2048 вҶ’ energy/centroid/flux/hue every frame). **2-model FAL chain TECH**: audio mood вҶ’ poetic prompt вҶ’ **`fal-ai/flux/schnell`** (still seed, 16:9, 4 steps) вҶ’ **`fal-ai/ltx-video/image-to-video`** (blooms the still into a 5s clip). **three.js + AI-VIDEO OUTPUT** (0Г— output surface): the returned clip is a `THREE.VideoTexture` on a fullscreen quad, and the **live FFT runs a fragment-shader pass over it every frame** вҖ” ripple/displacementвҲқenergy, bloom/exposureвҲқcentroid (brightness), chromatic-aberration/RGB-splitвҲқflux. **The AI video is the SEED; the live audio is the ongoing ANIMATOR.** **What if you didn't prompt an AI to make a music video вҖ” what if you PLAYED, and the AI only dreamed the canvas your sound then keeps moving?** **Cinematic / Anadol latent-cinema VIBE.** **Cost-safe for public prod**: the paid chain (~$0.003 still + $0.02 video) fires **only on an explicit "Dream the film" click** (disabled in-flight, **zero timers**, never on load/idle); page-load / idle / "dreamingвҖҰ" / error / no-FAL_KEY all run a **synthesized GPU nebula** (domain-warped FBM cloud, audio-driven) so a hands-off glance is **always a living, sounding scene**. `api/route.ts` is **guarded** (`guard(req)` first, FAL_KEYвҶ’501, try/catchвҶ’500). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #4** (AI-pipeline-chain, 0Г—) **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") **and #3** (music from NOT pitch theory вҖ” one drone, the idea lives in image/chain). **Named ref:** **Refik Anadol's latent cinema (*Machine Hallucinations*)** вҖ” the AI-dreamed image as living projection. README cites **RESEARCH В§541 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **7 cycles running** (535вҖ“541). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#1 **never-used technique** вҖ” first true multi-model AI chain / first AI-video output [441 was a single audioвҶ’image model; this adds the video model in series] В· #2 вүҘ4 subsystems [synth+mic audio engine + feature/prompt extractor + 2-model FAL chain + three.js GPU compositor + synthesized fallback] В· #3 named ref В· #5 dated RESEARCH вҖ” honestly 4-of-5). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[mic/synth (non-touch), three.js + AI-image + AI-VIDEO output (all GPU/0Г—), audioвҶ’imageвҶ’video 2-model chain (pitch held to ONE drone), cinematic/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 massively-bigger concept, 3 second-model approaches; AGENT.md maps "jury calls for massively bigger" вҶ’ DEEP). **2 sibling chains banked (IDEAS В§541):** **`916-latent-loom`** вӯҗ (flux вҶ’ **flux-redux** img2img re-dream loop, GPU crossfade morph, cost-bounded вүӨ6 steps; **resurrect-first** on a desktop morph cycle) + **`917-the-telling`** (**any-llm** writes a prose-poem of the music вҶ’ flux paints it, kinetic typography, **text-not-voice**). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 36.3s`**, lint+type phase ran with **zero warnings/refs in the 915 folder**; the always-alive nebula + explicit-click gating guarantee a sounding/moving glance and zero idle cost regardless).

## (Cycle 540 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance](/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance)** вҖ” shadow dance: a 4-year-old DANCES and their whole body becomes a cloud of light + rhythm рҹ•әвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 540 (kids 4+ / **camera whole-body pose** / **three.js GPU particles**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad/phone / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *moving body*, not notes В· **camera POSE INPUT** (front camera вҶ’ **MediaPipe Pose** 33 whole-body landmarks via runtime CDN import, `webpackIgnore`, never bundled; video analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded; **zero pitch detection** вҖ” per frame we compute the three children's-sonification *movement qualities*: **energy** = mean landmark speed, **impulsivity** = high-passed jerk, **fluidity** = inverse speed-jitter; non-touch, full-body вҖ” fresh for kids vs 862 *hands* / 869 adult; no-camera вҶ’ synthetic ghost-dancer auto-demo) В· **three.js `THREE.Points` GPU OUTPUT** (~5,000 additive-blended particles, custom `ShaderMaterial`, indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm-gold; energyвҶ’density/brightness, impulsivityвҶ’outward burst shockwave, fluidityвҶ’swirl-vs-scatter; the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) В· **movement energy/fluidity/impulsivity вҶ’ granular-percussion TECHNIQUE** В· **luminous shadow-dance VIBE**. **What if a kid makes music by DANCING вҖ” their whole body's movement (not fingers, not voice, not any pitch) scatters a glowing cloud of light and grants rhythm + texture?** Energy вҶ’ warmth/brightness of an always-on granular texture bed; a sudden move (impulsivity) fires a soft *capped* percussive bloom + a particle burst вҖ” **the kid's sharp moves ARE the beat**; smooth motion (fluidity) brightens a shimmer pad and streams the particles. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** вҖ” one warm always-on drone (C2+G2+C3) + a few fixed safe accent tones; no scale, no chord, no melody the kid "plays." Kids-safe master chain `masterGain(0.26) вҶ’ lowpass(вүӨ6.5 kHz) вҶ’ Compressor(вҲ’10, 20:1)`, attacks вүҘ10ms, full teardown (rAF, mic tracks, `pose.close()`, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`, `audioCtx.close()`). **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space вҖ” NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this makes music from the *quality of a child's free movement*. **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace*** (full-body interactive, 1970s) В· the children's-movement-sonification model (energy/fluidity/impulsivity granular mapping, **Frontiers in Neuroscience, PMC5104747**) В· **"The Moving Mandala"** (2025 вҖ” rhythmic music + embodied movement вҶ’ child synchrony). README cites **RESEARCH В§540 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **6 cycles running** (535вҖ“540). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [pose tracking + energy/fluidity/impulsivity extractor + granular/percussion synth w/ dumb-drone + three.js GPU field + ghost auto-demo] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed вҖ” pose/granular/particle all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (last-10-kids + JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[camera whole-body pose (non-touch), three.js GPU particles (scarce), motionвҶ’granular-percussion (pitch held to ONE drone), luminous shadow-dance]`. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers on one "body-not-pitch" theme; deliberate alternation after 539 DEEP). **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§540):** **`913-kids-spin-galaxy`** вӯҗ (device **gyroscope** spin В· hand-written **WebGPU `@compute`** 40k-particle galaxy + WebGL2 fallback В· ring-crossing percussion вҖ” the purest JURY-#1 GPU answer; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window) + **`912-kids-wind-garden`** (mic-**breath/blow** via spectral flatness В· **three.js** grass field В· wind force + dandelion-seed chimes вҖ” calm dawn-meadow). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 56s`**, lint phase ran with **zero warnings in the 911 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/hand-verified** (no camera/audio/WebGL in container вҖ” whether MediaPipe Pose tracks a small child across lighting/angle, the motion-scaling constants, and whether the bloom reads as "I am the light" are unverified; the always-on drone + ~1s ghost-dancer auto-demo guarantee a sounding/blooming glance regardless).

## (Cycle 539 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 GPU-render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/909-resonant-field-volume](/dream/909-resonant-field-volume)** вҖ” Resonant Field: sing, and your voice blooms as a volume of light + grains placed in space by its **timbre, not its pitch** вҳҒпёҸрҹ”Ҡ. `demoable` В· Cycle 539 (adult / **mic** / **three.js raymarched volume**). **For**: anyone with a voice or instrument / immersive listening / headphones В· **mic INPUT** (non-touch вҖ” sing/hum/speak/play; **zero pitch detection** вҖ” a pitch-free extractor reads only RMS, spectral centroid [brightness], flatness [noisyвҶ”tonal], flux [change], and an 8-band silhouette; micвҶ’Analyser + a rolling ~3.5s capture ring, **never routed to destination** [anti-feedback]; no-mic вҶ’ synthetic auto-demo) В· **three.js fullscreen raymarched volumetric OUTPUT** (a fragment-shader nebula вҖ” 24-step domain-warped FBM whose density/turbulence/hue/altitude ARE the timbre, with a `uAge` **memory** accumulator that warms while you sound and slowly cools in silence so it evolves like a long-form cloud, not a VU meter; runs on **any WebGL** вҶ’ actually GPU-renders on a phone; Canvas2D glow fallback on no-WebGL) В· **timbre-features вҶ’ HRTF spatial-granular re-synth TECHNIQUE** В· **immersive / Anadol-volumetric VIBE**. **What if you composed by TIMBRE Г— SPACE instead of pitch вҖ” your own captured sound scattered back as a 3D cloud of grains, each placed around your head by how bright / noisy / loud it is, over a single dumb drone so harmony is held deliberately flat?** Each Hann-windowed grain reads from the rolling capture buffer and is panned through its **own HRTF `PannerNode`** at a 3D position dictated by timbre (brightnessвҶ’elevation/forward, flatnessвҶ’azimuth spread, RMSвҶ’grain density); grains keep the source's own pitch вҖ” we never repitch by any musical rule. A fixed 55 Hz + 82.5 Hz drone pins harmony flat so the piece **lives entirely in texture and placement**. Master chain `gain(вүӨ0.28) вҶ’ lowpass(7 kHz) вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ destination`; idle nebula breathes from load; ~1s auto-demo (synthetic evolving-noise + formant sweep through the identical pipeline) blooms + sounds on mic-deny or 2.5s silence; full teardown (rAF, oscillators, mic tracks, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, **timbre, texture or space** вҖ” NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") in one piece. **The inversion of a brand-new instrument:** Delta Sound Labs **XStream** (NAMM, 25 Jan 2026) is a *spatial live granular* synth where the **producer hand-dials** grain placement; this makes placement **automatic & timbre-driven** вҖ” played by sounding, not by tweaking. **Named refs:** Delta Sound Labs XStream (2026) В· **Curtis Roads *Microsound*** (2001) В· **Trevor Wishart *Audible Design*** (timbral morphology) В· Refik Anadol (volumetric light). README cites **RESEARCH В§539 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **5 cycles running** (535/536/537/538/539). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [pitch-free timbre extractor + HRTF spatial-granular engine + dumb drone + raymarched GPU volume w/ memory + auto-demo] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed вҖ” granular/spatial/WebGPU-compute all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[mic (non-touch), three.js raymarched-volume (GPU, scarce), timbreвҶ’spatial-granular (pitch held to ONE drone), immersive/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept, 3 GPU-render approaches; breaks a 3-WIDE adult streak). **2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS В§539):** **`908-resonant-field-compute`** вӯҗ (the frontier **WebGPU WGSL compute** version вҖ” 120k curl-noise particles; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window once WebGPU phone support clears + ScriptProcessorвҶ’AudioWorklet) + **`910-resonant-field-flow`** (**three.js GPGPU** ping-pong float-RT flow field вҖ” ~147k points "river of light"). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 52s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 909 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio/WebGL in container вҖ” whether the HRTF grain cloud reads as "my own sound around me," whether the raymarched volume reads as "my timbre's shape," and per-grain PannerNode CPU cost on a low-end phone are unverified; the breathing idle nebula + ~1s auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/909-resonant-field-volume/README.md`

## (Cycle 538 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden](/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden)** вҖ” stomp garden: clap a beat, grow a garden, it loops back рҹҢұрҹ‘ҸрҹҢё. `demoable` В· Cycle 538 (kids 4+ / **mic-rhythm** / **three.js**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *beat*, not notes В· **mic-ONSET INPUT** (claps / stomps / table-taps / "buh-tss" вҖ” a spectral-flux onset detector with adaptive threshold + 120ms refractory; **pitch is NEVER estimated**, the centroid is read only to pick a thump-vs-shaker *timbre*; mic used live, never recorded/stored; no-mic вҶ’ tap-the-garden fallback + auto-demo groove) В· **three.js (WebGL GPU) OUTPUT** (a procedural glowing garden вҖ” elastic-ease plants spring up per beat, always-on breathing, loop-pulse sway/glow, warm fog & lighting; deliberately the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) В· **onset-detect + quantize-and-loop-back + procedural-growth TECHNIQUE** В· **bright/warm/garden VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could CLAP, STOMP, or beat-box and their RHYTHM (no note, no tune) grew a glowing garden that then loops their beat back so they can dance along and lock into it?** Each detected beat grows a plant + plays a soft capped percussion hit (<50ms); after ~3 beats a rolling-window looper infers tempo (median IOI), lightly quantizes, and **replays the rhythm continuously** while the garden pulses in time вҖ” handing the child the steady external pulse the developmental literature says scaffolds the still-forming beat-synchronization skill. Steady clap вҶ’ orderly rows; wild rhythm вҶ’ a swaying jungle; the child keeps layering beats. Always alive (ambient pad + heartbeat + breathing from load; auto-demo groove with no mic). Kids-safe master chain `busIn вҶ’ Gain(0.26) вҶ’ lowpass(6 kHz) вҶ’ Compressor(вҲ’12, 12:1) вҶ’ destination`, 6-voice cap (oldest-steal) so even a loud clap can't blast, full teardown. **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space вҖ” NOT pitch theory"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this is its first true **rhythm-loop** piece. **Named refs:** the TR-808 / live loop-station "record your rhythm, it loops back" model В· spectral-flux onset detection (Bello et al., IEEE TASLP 2005). README cites **RESEARCH В§538 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” the developmental beat-synchronization anchor (*"Development of full-body rhythmic synchronization in middle childhood,"* Nature Sci Rep) вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **4 cycles running** (535/536/537/538). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [onset detect + tempo-infer/loop + procedural garden + percussion synth] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[mic-onset/rhythm, three.js (GPU, scarce), onset-loop-back, kids-garden]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§538):** **`905-kids-water-bowl`** вӯҗ (mic-hum В· **three.js** В· *Faraday* standing-wave water surface вҖ” the pattern you see is the sound you sing; **resurrect-first**, needs no motion sensor) + **`906-kids-tilt-fireflies`** (device-tilt В· **three.js** GPU particles В· gravity-herded firefly swarm whose density & flower-bumps drive a soft pulsing rhythm; ref Reynolds *Boids* 1986). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 85s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 907 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вҖ” whether the looped beat reads as lock-onto-able, onset sensitivity across real claps vs room noise, and small-iPad garden legibility are unverified; ambient bed + auto-demo groove guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/907-kids-stomp-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 537 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/902-harmonic-mirror](/dream/902-harmonic-mirror)** вҖ” harmonic mirror: your chord, completed in just intonation рҹҺ№вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 537 (adult / harmony / **Canvas2D**). **For**: pianists & composers (Karel's exact audience) / harmony-curious / playable with zero hardware В· **MIDI / on-screen-piano / computer-keyboard INPUT** (Web MIDI `requestMIDIAccess` + a clickable white/black one-octave piano + `a w s e d f t g y h u j k` map вҖ” all feed the identical pipeline; no-MIDI вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + the on-screen paths still play) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (a circle-of-fifths constellation вҖ” bright white held nodes, soft violet **mirror** halos joined to the root by luminous completion lines carrying ratio labels `5/4`/`3/2`, the inferred chord name at center, 60fps amplitude pulse; deliberately the JURY-scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/WebGPU/SVG**) В· **just-intonation chord-completion TECHNIQUE** (deterministic Riemann-template inference + JI retuning вҖ” fresh for the lab) В· **harmonic / luminous-clinical VIBE** (violet on near-black). **What if, as you play, your instrument completed the chord you imply вҖ” adding the 1вҖ“2 notes you DIDN'T play, tuned in pure JUST INTONATION to your root вҖ” so the harmony locks beat-lessly under your hands?** You play the keys you press in **equal temperament** (warm detuned saws); a **mirror** reduces your held notes to a pitch-class set, matches it against a small template bank (dom7 `0 4 7 10` В· maj `0 4 7` В· min `0 3 7` В· sus4 `0 5 7` В· bare-fifth `0 7`; anything else вҶ’ a **cluster** heuristic completed with a safe fifth), and synthesizes the **missing** template tones in **just intonation** (small-integer ratios 9/8 В· 6/5 В· 5/4 В· 4/3 В· 3/2 В· 5/3 В· 9/5 В· 15/8 over the inferred root's fundamental) so their partials align and the beating cancels вҖ” the just `5/4` third (~386Вў) locks where the ET third (400Вў) is restless. When the root shifts (C maj вҶ’ A min) the persisting mirror voices **glide-retune** over ~180 ms rather than re-attack. **The deterministic, zero-latency cousin of a predictive AI accompanist** (RESEARCH В§537 / **arXiv 2604.07612**, Apr 2026): it predicts nothing вҖ” it *finishes the chord you are already playing*. 2s-idle вҶ’ a gentle **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V** auto-demo arpeggiates through the identical path so a silent 06:30 glance is sounding + moving; first real note stops it. **Named refs:** Harry Partch & Ben Johnston (JI / small-integer ratios) В· Hugo Riemann (functional-harmony templates) В· arXiv 2604.07612. README cites **RESEARCH В§537 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**, now **3 cycles running** (535/536/537). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [MIDI/kbd input + chord-template inference + JI synth w/ glide-retune + Canvas2D constellation] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, dataвҶ’roughness/detune, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale, 3rd-renderer-pass-on-847/872] В· picked=[MIDI/keyboard, Canvas2D (scarce 2Г—), just-intonation-chord-completion, harmonic/clinical]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§537):** **`903-living-stave`** вӯҗ (mic В· **SVG** В· live NSDF pitch+onset detection inks a self-drawing engraved treble staff вҖ” owns the 0Г— SVG lane, **resurrect-first**) + **`904-tide-organ`** (live **NOAA** tide data В· **three.js** В· the sea decides which organ pipes enter/leave & the arc's form вҖ” dataвҶ’STRUCTURE, ref the Zadar Sea Organ). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 102s`**, lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 902 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вҖ” whether the JI completion *audibly* locks vs the ET played notes, the glide-retune feel, and constellation legibility are unverified; the zero-hardware on-screen piano + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/902-harmonic-mirror/README.md`

## (Cycle 536 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/899-kids-moire-beats](/dream/899-kids-moire-beats)** вҖ” moirГ© beats: roughness & calm гҖ°пёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 536 (kids 4+ / **touch** / **Canvas2D**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad / immediate-cause-and-effect / no-reading В· **touch-drag INPUT** (one finger, Pointer Events вҶ’ touch + mouse; ~280px swing covers the full range, huge & forgiving) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (two op-art grids вҖ” fixed concentric **rings** under twistable **stripes**, composited `multiply` so they physically interfere into a rolling moirГ© band; deliberately the JURY-reopened scarce Canvas2D surface, **no WebGL2/three.js/SVG**) В· **moirГ©-interference TECHNIQUE** (grep-verified **0Г— in the lab**) В· **op-art VIBE** (Bridget Riley cream/ink, fresh for the lab). **What if a 4-year-old could SEE and HEAR a sound's roughness at the same time вҖ” by sliding two striped patterns over each other so the moirГ© band they make IS the acoustic beating they hear?** A warm consonant **fifth drone (A2 + E3)** is always playing, each pitch built from two sine oscillators. The child's twist doesn't change the *pitch* вҖ” it changes the **detune** of the second oscillator (0вҶ’~9 Hz). Lined up: the moirГ© band slows to almost nothing AND the tones converge to **one clear calm tone** (a green ring shrinks to a dot); twisted apart: the band shimmers fast AND the sound throbs **WAH-WAH-WAH** (amber ring pulses). The coupling is literal вҖ” the visual band's roll speed and the audio beat rate are driven by the **same** `twist` value, so *moirГ© beat = acoustic beat*. **The clean template-break:** the child plays **roughnessвҶ”calm over a fixed consonant fifth вҖ” NOT a scale**, sidestepping the no-wrong-notes pentatonic crutch entirely; nothing can ever be "wrong." Kids-safe (master вүӨ 0.24, 6 kHz lowpass, soft fades, never silent), 2s-idle auto-demo drifts the layer so a hands-off 06:30 glance is moving + sounding within ~1s, `text-rose-600` notice + live visuals if Web Audio is unavailable, full teardown. **Named refs:** Gerald Oster *MoirГ© Patterns* (Scientific American, 1963) В· Bridget Riley op-art В· acoustic beating. README cites **RESEARCH В§536 (2026-06-24)** as the build hook вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) JURY flagged **0-for-15**, now 3 cycles running. **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique [moirГ© 0Г—] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2, three.js, dataвҶ’roughness, no-wrong-notes-safe-scale] В· picked=[touch, Canvas2D (scarce 2Г—), moirГ©-interference (0Г—), op-art]`. **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§536):** **`900-kids-rope-singer`** вӯҗ (touch В· **SVG** В· a *catenary* hanging-rope you hang beads on to sagвҶ’lower the pitch, pluck for a damped twang вҖ” owns the 0Г— SVG lane, resurrect-first) + **`901-kids-water-bowl`** (mic-hum В· **three.js** В· *Faraday* standing-wave patterns bloom on a vibrated water surface in time with the note you sing). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: lint phase ran [only runs post-compile] with **zero warnings in the 899 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вҖ” whether the band reads as "the same wobble I hear," small-iPad op-art readability, and the twist feel are unverified; always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/899-kids-moire-beats/README.md`

## (Cycle 535 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/898-tremor-score](/dream/898-tremor-score)** вҖ” tremor score рҹҢҚрҹҺј. `demoable` В· Cycle 535 (adult / data-sonification / **SVG**). **For**: adults / contemplative / data-curious В· **live external-data INPUT** (USGS `all_day.geojson` earthquake feed, fetched **client-side**, public + CORS, no key, no API route вҶ’ no guard needed; offline вҶ’ synthetic ~30-quake fallback + `text-rose-300` notice) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (an Ikeda-restrained data-score вҖ” time axis, per-quake register marks/circles, a sweeping violet playhead, a lon/lat epicentre dot-field; **no canvas, no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU, no three.js** вҖ” deliberately the scarce SVG surface, answering JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall") В· **data-driven event-scheduling TECHNIQUE** В· **geologic / clinical / Ikeda VIBE**. **What if a *live* planetary earthquake feed *composed* a piece вҖ” not by fouling the harmony, but by deciding who plays, when, and in what register?** The last 24 h of global seismicity is compressed onto ~90 s: each quake becomes a **new voice entering** вҖ” **magnitude**вҶ’register/loudness/duration (big = low/long/loud; small = brief high glint), **depth**вҶ’timbre brightness (shallow = bright/more partials, deep = dark via lowpass), **longitude**вҶ’stereo pan, **latitude**вҶ’scale-degree, **temporal clustering**вҶ’density (an aftershock swarm = a dense overlapping flurry; a quiet stretch = a sparse solo). All pitches snap to a fixed consonant **Bb pentatonic/Dorian** mode across 3 octave bands, so **the data decides FORM while the mode keeps it in tune вҖ” data вҶ’ structure, NEVER вҶ’ roughness/detune.** This is the **direct answer to JURY #3** ("the next data piece must sonify STRUCTURE; `842`вҶ’`864` already cloned the detune move вҖ” retire it"). Per-voice chain: `OscillatorNode(triangle + sine partials) вҶ’ Gain envelope вҶ’ lowpass Biquad вҶ’ StereoPanner вҶ’ master вҶ’ ConvolverNode(algorithmic IR) + dry вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor limiter вҶ’ destination` (shared `AudioContext` on the gesture; reverb IR synthesized in code; limiter keeps swarms un-clipped). README cites **RESEARCH В§535 / OpenSeisML, arXiv 2605.20539 (May 2026)** (seismic catalogues as *generative compositional input*) + Ryoji Ikeda *data.path*/*datamatics* + Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology* вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged **0-for-15 across five windows**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§535): **`899-harmonic-mirror`** вӯҗ (the lab's FIRST Web MIDI вҖ” a JI chord-completion partner) + **`900-flow-grains`** (the lab's FIRST optical-flow input вҖ” camera motion вҶ’ three.js particles + granular synth). **Clears 3/5 of the ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named reference В· #5 dated RESEARCH citation). `diversity: banned=[touch, raw-WebGL2] В· picked=[external-data, SVG, data-driven-event-scheduling, geologic/Ikeda]`. **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully` + lint/type passed); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio in container вҖ” the sound of a real USGS day + small-screen SVG crowding unverified; synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding/moving glance).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/898-tremor-score/README.md`

- **[/dream/896-tonnetz-loom](/dream/896-tonnetz-loom)** вҖ” tonnetz loom рҹҺөрҹӘЎ. `demoable` В· Cycle 533 (adult / geometric-music-theory / **SVG**). **For**: adults / music-theory-curious / contemplative-precise В· **touch/pointer INPUT** (tap a triangle to strike its triad; P/L/R buttons to move) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (a 7Г—5 Tonnetz patch вҖ” 48 tappable triangles, note-labeled nodes, glowing path ribbon вҖ” built with `createElementNS`/React SVG; **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js, no GPU at all** вҖ” the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-23 #1 "raw-WebGL2 is the new wall, go deliberately non-WebGL2"; SVG is a scarce surface) В· **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz + just-intonation TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) В· **geometric / music-theoretical VIBE**. **What if you could WALK the geometry of harmony?** The Euler/Riemann triangular pitch lattice rendered as crisp luminous SVG: every node a pitch class, every triangle a consonant triad, the three axes the perfect fifth (+7), major third (+4), minor third (+3). **Tap a triangle вҶ’ hear that triad in just intonation** (major 4:5:6, minor 10:12:15; two detuned triangle oscillators per voice вҶ’ envelope вҶ’ procedural-IR ConvolverNode reverb + limiter). **P / L / R** apply the three classic neo-Riemannian transforms вҖ” each glides exactly ONE voice while the two common tones hold, so you both *hear* and *see* smooth voice-leading as the highlight hops to the adjacent triangle. Your path weaves a glowing ribbon over the lattice and **exports as a standalone `.svg`** (scarce vector output). A **drift auto-walk** runs a gentle hands-free P-L-R-LвҖҰ loop so it sounds + moves on load with zero input (a guaranteed sounding 06:30 phone glance); touch-only, no mic/camera/network вҶ’ bulletproof unattended. README cites the **freshest anchor of the cycle вҖ” RESEARCH В§533 / arXiv 2606.11246** ("Nineteen to the Dozen: Embedding the Neo-Riemannian TonnetzвҖҰ", **June 2026**, last-30-days) plus Euler / Cohn / Lewin вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) that JURY flagged 0-for-15. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§533): an audio-only "room-raga" where the room's ambient pitch tunes a JI drone вӯҗ + a Canvas2D self-similarity-matrix "recurrence room" of Karel's piano. **Clears 4/5 of the ambition floor** (#1 never-used technique В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named reference В· #5 dated RESEARCH citation).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/896-tonnetz-loom/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 532 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path](/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path)** вҖ” sing a path рҹҺӨрҹӘ°. `demoable` В· Cycle 532 (kids / storybook-night / **SVG**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) В· **mic/voice INPUT** (`getUserMedia` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode`; real-time fundamental-frequency estimate via a normalized-square-difference / YIN-lite `trackPitch` + RMS loudness gate, so quiet = no draw) В· **animated SVG OUTPUT** (a scrolling glowing `<path>` extended point-by-point + a firefly riding the tip + trailing sparkles + gradient night sky/moon/stars, all driven by rAF mutating SVG attributes вҖ” **no canvas, no webgl, no three.js**; SVG is the freshest visual surface, 1Г—/10, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND Canvas2D's near-cap 3Г—) В· **real-time pitch-contour TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the lab) В· **warm storybook-night VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING and watch their own voice draw a glowing path a firefly flies along вҖ” and it always sounds beautiful because we follow the SHAPE of their voice, not whether they hit a "correct" note?** The key move (RESEARCH В§532 / **PESTO**, arXiv 2508.01488 вҖ” *transposition-equivariance*): the robust, meaningful quantity in a sung signal is the **contour** (relative up/down/hold motion), not absolute Hz. A `ContourEngine` maps the pitch stream to relative motion against a slow-drifting baseline (the child can wander up forever and stay on screen) вҶ’ path height; a **`HarmonyVoice`** sings a soft companion tone back, **quantized to C-major pentatonic** with portamento, over a gentle pad drone + sparkle twinkles, through a master limiter (kids-safe, never harsh). The result is a **no-wrong-notes piece that is NOT the banned snap-to-safe-scale template** вҖ” the visual follows the child's raw gesture (never "wrong"); only the audio is quantized. Hands-free auto-demo (~0.6s) drives the *same* pipeline so the page sings + animates with zero hardware; a giant рҹҺӨ Sing! button requests the mic; `text-rose-300` notices for demo/denied. README cites the dated **RESEARCH В§532 / PESTO**. 2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§532): a tilt+shake audio-led "listening jar" (the lab's first audio-only-led kids piece) вӯҗ + a three.js 3D glass-harmonica "glass rain" tank.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/891-kids-sing-a-path/README.md`

## Newest (Cycle 531 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/888-living-reverie](/dream/888-living-reverie)** вҖ” living reverie рҹҢҢ. `demoable` В· Cycle 531 (adult / cinematic / long-form / **three.js**). **For**: adults / deep listening / live-ambient В· **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano streamed from the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ` route, played quietly under the generative voices + chroma-folded to re-seed the melody; ~350ms non-zero analyser вҶ’ **emerald "playing Karel's piano"** else **amber "generative piano вҖ” live recording unavailable"**; zero-network generative fallback starts in ~1.5s) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (a single high-detail displaced membrane вҖ” vertex-shader FBM noise on an icosphere, additive glow shell + fog, drag-orbit; **non-particle on purpose**, dodging the `859-paths-compute-bloom` particle field; fresh three.js surface 2Г—/10 vs Canvas2D's near-cap 3Г—, and dodges the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 ban) В· **long-form generative state-machine-with-memory TECHNIQUE** (NEW to the rolling window) В· **cinematic / deep / ambient VIBE**. **What if Karel's own recorded piano became a 10-minute LIVING reverie вҖ” genuinely different at minute 8 than minute 1 вҖ” a generative engine with MEMORY that re-voices and re-orchestrates his motifs across an irreversible arc, never looping?** A **two-tier memory engine** (RESEARCH В§531 / *Fusing Memory and Attention*, arXiv 2603.21282): a **LOCAL** bank of recent scale-degree pitch-cells (transposed/varied/re-quantized so each minute sounds like the last вҖ” continuity), coupled to a **GLOBAL** monotonic irreversible `age` (0вҶ’1 over 600s) + a four-section state machine (**sparse вҶ’ blooming вҶ’ dense вҶ’ dissolving**) that owns density, note-rate, register spread, brightness and reverb depth, plus a **modal journey** (ionianвҶ’lydianвҶ’mixolydianвҶ’dorianвҶ’aeolian with a creeping tonic, every note quantized). The membrane IS the arc: flat/dark вҶ’ warm rising ridges вҶ’ turbulent folded terrain вҶ’ collapse to deep-violet stillness. FM-piano + detuned-saw pad + granular shimmer вҶ’ runtime-rendered ConvolverNode reverb вҶ’ compressor. README cites the dated **RESEARCH В§531** finding + **Brian Eno** (*Music for Airports*/*Reflection*). A **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 of N) вҖ” 2 sibling visual approaches banked (IDEAS В§531): a three.js volumetric raymarch twin + a Canvas2D ink-strata twin (the future WebGL-unavailable fallback).

## Newest (Cycle 530 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/886-kids-marble-music](/dream/886-kids-marble-music)** вҖ” marble music machine рҹҺў. `demoable` В· Cycle 530 (kids / playful / **Canvas2D**). **For**: kids (iPad/phone, 4yo-usable, no reading) В· **tap + tilt INPUT** (tap the top to drop a glowing marble / tap a stuck one to free it; device-orientation `gamma` tilt to steer, with **two big hold-to-tilt buttons** as a no-permission fallback вҖ” fully playable with zero sensors) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` вҖ” scarce 2Г—/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th GPU surface) В· **material-based modal impact synthesis TECHNIQUE** (fresh mapping; tilt-input is 0Г—/10) В· **warm playful self-playing-machine VIBE**. **What if a 4-year-old could conduct a self-playing music machine just by tilting вҖ” rolling glowing marbles through a track of materials where the SOUND of every collision is the object's MATERIAL (wood thuds, glass rings, metal shimmers, drums boom) and how hard it was hit?** Each of ~16 objects has a fixed pentatonic pitch + a material; a real **modal synthesizer** fires that material's bank of decaying sine partials per impact (slightly-stretched harmonics = wood, clean long partials = glass, inharmonic bar ratios 1/2.76/5.40/8.93 = metal, circular-membrane ratios 1/1.59/2.14/2.30 = drum), and **impact normal-speed scales both loudness AND brightness** so a soft graze and a hard slam on the same bell are audibly different. Self-contained 2D physics (circles + capsules, restitution + tangential friction, sub-stepped + clamped), motion trails, per-hit glow pulses, one gentle "sticky mud" stakes element (a trapped marble waits until the child taps it free). The machine never repeats вҖ” a generative instrument in the spirit of **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** + **Jem Finer's self-generative marble machine**. README cites the dated **RESEARCH В§530** finding. 2 sibling approaches banked (IDEAS В§530): a three.js 3D-gravity twin + a Canvas2D build-your-own machine.

## Newest (Cycle 529 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/883-negative-space](/dream/883-negative-space)** вҖ” negative space рҹӨ«. `demoable` В· Cycle 529 (adult / conceptual-critical / **Canvas2D**). **For**: adults В· **microphone INPUT** (analysis-only вҖ” connected to an AnalyserNode and nothing else; never routed to output, never recorded, never sent anywhere; **no API route**) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (`getContext("2d")` вҖ” scarce 1Г—/10 + jury-re-legitimized; **no WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js**, dodging the jury #1 raw-WebGL2 HARD-ban AND a 4th WebGPU) В· **silence-reward / negative-space generative bloom TECHNIQUE** В· **Cage-conceptual, meditative, critical VIBE**. **What if you played an instrument by being SILENT вҖ” a piece that blooms only in the GAPS of your sound, and ducks to nothing the instant you make noise, so you compose it by what you withhold?** The lab's **conceptual/critical** lane (a menu category the jury notes hadn't appeared in ~15 cycles) and the directest answer to Karel's "massively bigger concepts / surprise" ask: a true **inversion** вҖ” every mic instrument ever made maps loudвҶ’active; this one maps **silenceвҶ’music**, so the performer's instrument is *restraint*. Short-term RMS feeds a **stillness timer**: while you stay below threshold the timer grows and a warm additive chord-bloom rises one consonant voice at a time (rootвҶ’fifthвҶ’octaveвҶ’thirdвҶ’twelfthвҶ’high color) toward a full chord; any sound above threshold rushes a fast **duck** (reverse-sidechain) and **freezes** the bloom where it is вҖ” it **resumes building from there** when quiet returns (no reset). Signal chain voices вҶ’ master вҶ’ `ConvolverNode` synthesized-impulse reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination; an always-on near-silent root means it's never fully dead. **Visual:** Canvas2D вҖ” silence blooms a luminous field outward from center (monochromeвҶ’violet as the chord fills + faint concentric "voice" rings per lit partial); sound floods dark grain/static inward from the edges + a closing vignette and the light recedes; sized via `ResizeObserver`, animated by a single rAF that runs energyвҶ’stillnessвҶ’audioвҶ’draw in lockstep. iOS-safe: AudioContext + `getUserMedia` created inside the Begin tap. **Degrades fully:** mic denied/absent вҶ’ a scripted **synthetic** energy envelope (silenceвҶ’burstвҶ’silence) runs through the **identical** `stepStillness` pipeline so the inversion proves itself hands-free within ~1.5вҖ“4s + a `text-rose-300` "no mic вҖ” showing a demo" notice; a **"Make a sound"** button lets a no-mic reviewer trigger the duck/erode manually; live mic yields the demo the moment real audio arrives. Full teardown (cancel rAF, `track.stop()` the mic, stop/disconnect oscillators, `audioCtx.close()`, clear timers, remove listeners). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [mic RMS/stillness gate + silence-reward generative harmony engine + Canvas2D negative-space renderer + synthetic auto-demo = вүҘ4] В· #3 named refs [**John Cage *4вҖІ33вҖі*** вҖ” silence as the content В· **Pauline Oliveros "Deep Listening"**] В· **#5 вҖ” README cites the dated RESEARCH В§529 (2026-06-23)** cross-modal soundвҶ”perception thread, the jury's 0-for-15 criterion finally landed for the second straight cycle). **Source:** В§529 dive (cross-modal "It Sounds Squishy" DIS 2025 + JanГЎДҚek/Cage/Eno named anchors) вҶ’ AGENT.md path (a) implement a dive hook + Karel's "surprise / bigger concepts" вҶ’ adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 859,862,864,866,868,869,872,874,877,880)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (HARD jury вҖ” new 6-of-15 monoculture) В· a 4th WebGPU (would hit 4Г—) В· the "external-feedвҶ’roughness/detune" data mapping (jury #3) В· kids vibe (5Г—, n/a this adult cycle)]` В· `picked (winner 883)=[microphone INPUT В· Canvas2D OUTPUT (scarce 1Г— + jury-re-legit, dodges both GPU walls AND the back-to-back SVG repeat 880 would cause) В· silence-reward/negative-space-inversion TECH (lab-novel) В· Cage-conceptual VIBE (the cold conceptual/critical menu lane)]` вҖ” clears every active ban. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS В§529):** **`882-prosody-score`** вӯҗ (type a sentence вҶ’ a real functional-harmony phrase notated live in **inline SVG**: punctuation drives VвҶ’I cadences, keystroke timingвҶ’rhythm, word lengthвҶ’contour; keyboard input вүҲ0Г— + SVG = freshest surface/coldest input; **de-selected only because 880 was also SVG** вҖ” back-to-back surface repeat вҖ” NOT quality; JanГЎДҚek *nГЎpДӣvky mluvy* inverted) + **`884-living-reverie`** вӯҗвӯҗ (**TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST**: Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano вҶ’ a 10-min **three.js** long-form generative reverie with a memory bank + four-section state machine + irreversible `age`/modal journey so minute 8 вү  minute 1; the highest-ambition explorer at 3вҖ“4/5 [#2+#4+#3+#5] and executes TWO standing directives вҖ” the thin long-form-generative lane + "use his actual Paths music"; de-selected on a mild "too-similar" overlap with `859-paths-compute-bloom`'s additive-particle field + GPU/CORS runtime risk, NOT quality вҶ’ **ship it on a dedicated DEEP long-form adult cycle**) вҖ” both built complete + self-reported clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§529. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 37.8s` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; 883 grep-clean of the build log вҖ” every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; the one initial TS-lib error [`getFloatTimeDomainData` wants `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>`] fixed in the single allowed attempt by backing the analyser buffer with an explicit `ArrayBuffer`). **Env note:** fresh container `npm ci` aborted on `sharp`'s native libvips download (a `@capacitor/assets` transitive dep, unused by `next build`) вҶ’ installed with `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (CLI flag only; no package.json/lockfile/.npmrc edits). **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra; fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear/eye: whether the live-mic RMS threshold reads stillness cleanly on a real device, and whether the bloomвҶ”erode contrast lands perceptually; the synthetic auto-demo + "Make a sound" button guarantee a sounding, blooming, eroding glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/883-negative-space/README.md`

## (Cycle 528 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band](/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band)** вҖ” Rubber-Band Band рҹҺёрҹҢҲ. `demoable` В· Cycle 528 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / **SVG**). **For**: kids (4+) В· **drag-pluck + drag-the-tuning-peg INPUT** (pointer/touch; off the touch-only rut by being a *drag-to-pluck + drag-to-retune* gesture) В· **inline SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (animated `<path>`/`<rect>`/`<circle>` вҖ” **0Г— in the last 10 ships**, the single freshest surface, the jury's explicit "SVG and audio-only are 0Г—" target; clears the jury #1 WebGL2 HARD-ban вҖ” NOT canvas, NOT WebGL/WebGL2/WebGPU/three.js) В· **damped-spring SVG string physics + KarplusвҖ“Strong pluck + a latched detune/retune state machine** technique В· **warm playful colorful band-stage vibe**. **What if a kid's first instrument were a wall of stretchy glowing rubber-bands you pluck вҖ” and pulling one TOO FAR leaves it slack and out-of-tune until you earn the fix by turning its tuning peg?** **The third piece that breaks the always-consonant kids template (JURY 2026-06-23 #4** вҖ” "let the wrong choice *persist and matter* вҖ” no auto-resolve like 849 вҖ” the way 868 makes the child earn the calm; build the third one and the template is broken for good"). ~7 horizontal bands across a dark warm stage, each a color + a note in C major-pentatonic; **drag a band sideways and release** вҶ’ it twangs a **KarplusвҖ“Strong**-style plucked tone (noise burst вҶ’ tuned `DelayNode` feedback comb with in-loop low-pass) and visibly wobbles on an integrated **damped spring** (mid-point displacement, stiffness/damping scale with tension) before settling. Pluck gently вҶ’ a sweet in-tune note. **The stakes:** over-stretch a band and it **latches `detuned`** вҖ” sags, glow dies, twangs ~2 semitones flat/dull/sub-buzzy, an amber halo pulses on the loose peg вҖ” and it **STAYS that way** (no timeout, no auto-resolve). To fix it the child **drags the tuning-peg knob back up** until `taut` crosses the threshold and the band snaps true + glows again. The wrong choice is visible, audible, lasting; the child earns the fix вҖ” mapped onto a real-world intuition (tension sets pitch; you tune a string with a peg). Kids-safe chain `master 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 7.2kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, always-on soft warm pad (never silent), the out-of-tune note an **unmistakable LARGE contrast** but **never louder/harsher** (quieter decay, loop filter drops ~5.2вҶ’1.4kHz, soft sub-buzz вҖ” per the developmental finding that a 4yo registers dissonance only with a large contrast). Large hit areas (70px band strokes, 38вҖ“76px peg halos). iOS gesture-gated Start (AudioContext created/resumed inside the tap). **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, the SVG bands still play visually. **Auto-demo:** within ~1вҖ“2s of Start with no input, it plucks a couple of bands sweetly, over-stretches one into the slack/detuned state, then retunes it taut+true вҖ” a hands-free 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the full stakes arc; stops on first real touch. Full teardown (cancel RAF, stop/disconnect nodes, `ctx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [drag-pluck + drag-retune + damped-spring SVG string sim + KarplusвҖ“Strong synth + detune state machine = вүҘ4] В· #3 named refs [**Karplus & Strong (1983)** "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" В· the **monochord / rubber-band** as a child's first tunable string] В· touches #5 [README cites the dated RESEARCH В§528 consonance-contrast law]). **Source:** В§528 dive (the consonance-development design law вҖ” a 4yo registers dissonance only with a LARGE unmistakable contrast вҶ’ tunes the size of "wrong") вҶ’ AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + JURY #4 (break the kids template for good) вҶ’ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-23 #1 + audit, last 10 = 877,874,872,869,866,864,862,859,856,853)=[OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4Г—/10 (HARD jury вҖ” the new 6-of-15 monoculture) В· always-consonant no-wrong-note kids template (jury #4) В· auto-resolve-the-mistake (849 critique)]` В· `picked (winner 880)=[drag-pluck + drag-retune INPUT В· SVG/DOM OUTPUT (0Г—/10 вҖ” the single freshest surface, the jury's named SVG-is-0Г— target) В· latched-detune/retune-by-peg TECH (genuine persistent wrong, child earns the fix вҖ” NOT the banned always-consonant or auto-resolve) В· warm-playful band-stage vibe]` вҖ” clears every active ban; lands on the scarcest render surface in the lab. **WIDE forks (banked, IDEAS В§528):** **`879-kids-grumble-garden`** вӯҗ (tap a dark night-garden to plant C-pentatonic flowers; a clashing tap sprouts a **grumble-weed** that *spreads* via a Canvas2D diffusion growth sim and drones with **no auto-resolve** вҖ” the child "waters" it with consonant taps to re-bloom it; **another full template-break, de-selected on diversity** вҖ” Canvas2D was just shipped 877 + the garden/growth vibe is thick in the lab [248/322/799], NOT quality) + **`881-kids-thunder-marbles`** (TILT a glowing 3D **three.js** bowl to roll marbles that ring bells; a hard collision cracks a persistent **storm-marble** the child calms by rolling it slow into the center cradle вҖ” **love-aligned 169-kids-marble-runвқӨпёҸ + 83-kids-tilt-rainвқӨпёҸ**, de-selected on three.js 2Г— vs SVG 0Г— + WebGL/DeviceOrientation-permission failure surface for an unattended glance, NOT quality) вҖ” both built complete + self-reported tsc/eslint clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route), `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§528. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; `npx eslint src/app/dream/880-kids-rubber-band-band/` вҶ’ 0; 880 grep-clean of the build log вҖ” every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live SVG pluck-wobble feel, whether the out-of-tune contrast reads as "wrong" to a real 4yo, and the retune-the-peg gesture's discoverability; the always-on pad + the full pluckвҶ’detuneвҶ’retune auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.
