## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 477 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, ONE cross-device concept via 3 network substrates)

- **[/dream/741-piano-room-pulse](/dream/741-piano-room-pulse)** вҖ” Piano Room Pulse рҹҺ№рҹ”—. `demoable` В· Cycle 477. **For**: adult / **MIDI + computer-keyboard** (on-screen strip fallback) / **three.js** breathing pulse-ring (Canvas2D fallback) / **Supabase Realtime cross-device + NTP shared-clock ensemble-lock** / intimate connected duet. **What if you typed the same 4-letter room code on two phones, played Karel's piano together вҖ” and a shared NTP-style clock gently locked BOTH of you onto ONE drifting pulse so a real ensemble LOCK emerges across the room despite ~100ms of network latency?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #4** ("make ONE multi-user piece *actually* cross-device вҖ” retire the asterisk") AND the deepest answer to **#3** ("reward DEPTH, build the ceiling, stop banking and walking away"): the lab's one prior cross-device piece (`729-piano-portal-jam`) joined via a clunky manual SDP copy-paste; this joins by **typing a room code** (Supabase Realtime, frictionless) and adds the capability 729 never had вҖ” a **shared clock + ensemble lock**, the actual hard problem of networked music. Only tiny note-events travel (`{note,vel,who,beat,t}`) вҖ” never audio; both devices render through the same FM e-piano (you warm amber/rose panned-left, partner cool cyan/violet panned-right). The clock: ping/pong `offset = t1 вҲ’ (t0 + rtt/2)`, RTT-weighted slew, an emergent `beatPhase(now)` both derive identically from a shared epoch+BPM (68) вҖ” then each note is gently quantized to the nearest shared sub-beat (~11ms humanize) so two pianos *interlock* instead of smearing. **MIDI/keyboard INPUT** (a real pianist's keyboard вҖ” off banned touch-primary; on-screen strip only the fallback) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU-3Г—) В· **Supabase-Realtime relay + NTP shared-clock TECH** (a clock-sync *substrate*, NOT the banned step-sequencer loop-groove) В· **intimate-duet VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 3вҖ“4/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first Supabase-Realtime/WebSocket transport AND first networked shared-clock in the lab В· **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (NTP clock-sync + Realtime relay [note/ping/pong/presence] + multi-input + shared-grid-scheduled FM e-piano + three.js pulse-ring) В· **#3** named refs (**Ableton Link** В· NTP-over-WebSocket В· Chrome Music Lab **Shared Piano** В· JackTrip/Chris Chafe **SoundWIRE** В· George Lewis *Voyager*) В· **#4** multi-cycle (cycle-2 = Karel's real piano grains [JURY #5], >2 players, jitter buffering) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§477 same-day. **Bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7.5k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on breathing D-Dorian pulse bed; **ghost partner** (*Voyager*) auto-plays cool-panned phrases locked to the same grid after ~2.5s idle, hands-free, zero permission, steps aside when a real partner joins; lazy/env-guarded Supabase client вҶ’ any failure (missing env/offline/subscribe error) falls to solo + a calm `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no DB write** (Broadcast is ephemeral pub/sub вҖ” side-effect-free) В· **no API route вҶ’ no guard** (browser connects directly; the only key is the `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` anon key, client-public by design вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean) В· **no new npm dep** (`three` + `@supabase/supabase-js` already deps); AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D pulse-ring fallback for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listeners/MIDI/three.js dispose/AudioContext close/channel unsubscribe). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top; all browser-API/Supabase access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 477). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no two phones in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by play: whether the offset/RTT lock holds across two real networks, how "locked" the quantized duet feels by ear, MIDI on a real keyboard, iOS audio unlock; the ghost + Canvas2D + solo fallbacks guarantee a sounding, locked-feeling glance regardless. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-substrate fire; banked **`739-piano-room-relay`** вӯҗ (Supabase Realtime Broadcast direct вҖ” the reliability/frictionless sibling) + **`740-piano-room-portal`** вӯҗ (WebRTC P2P auto-signaled over Supabase вҖ” the low-latency cycle-2 of 729) as **IDEAS В§477**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/741-piano-room-pulse/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 476 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, ONE memory concept via 3 scarce-renderer approaches)

- **[/dream/738-kids-song-sprout](/dream/738-kids-song-sprout)** вҖ” Song Sprout рҹҢұ. `demoable` В· Cycle 476. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **three.js** glowing `Points` creature (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting compositional memory + grows-up / tender-companionship, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old had a single glowing creature that LISTENS, REMEMBERS the little songs they hum, and slowly GROWS UP вҖ” singing their own melodies back, recombined into something new?** The lab's **FIRST long-form / stateful KIDS piece** вҖ” every other kids prototype is instant causeвҶ’effect that *resets*; this one has **memory** and **evolves over minutes** (the sprout at minute 1 вҖ” a tiny baby-blue spark, thin voice вҖ” is genuinely different at minute 5 вҖ” a big warm-gold being with a fuller vibrato'd voice singing developed versions of what it was taught). The child hums short phrases; the creature leans toward the sound, brightens, and REMEMBERS the contours; on the child's silence it SINGS BACK a reply **recombined** from remembered fragments (transpose / reorder / reverse / contour-invert / rhythm-warp + a resolving tail as it matures вҖ” an answer, never a literal echo). As memories accumulate a saturating growth curve (`1вҲ’e^(вҲ’notes/26)`) drives everything: particles 600вҶ’2600, body scale up, colour baby-blueвҶ’violetвҶ’gold, voice gains an octave + FM warmth + vibrato + longer release, drone fills out, replies come more often вҖ” with a legible life-stage label ("a tiny spark" вҶ’ "a grown song-being"). The structural answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, build the accreting-memory ceiling, stop banking and walking away") вҖ” the adult-only long-form/evolving capability (689/704/734) brought DOWN to a kid as a *relationship*, not a toy. **mic voice/hum INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; camera-free vs the camera-heavy recent kids 727/731/724) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, 1Г— in window; off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU which is 3Г—) В· **accreting compositional-memory + call-and-response recombination TECH** (emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove) В· **tender/companionship/wonder VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #4`, arguably `#1/#5`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + memory store & saturating-growth engine + `composeReply` recombination + growth-aware FM voice synth + three.js growing-creature renderer = 5) В· **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle-1 = core memory+growth+reply; cycle-2 = richer life-stages/seasons, harmonic memory, a second sprout) В· arguably **#1** (first kids piece with *compositional* memory + a maturation arc вҖ” prior kids memory [298-kids-echo-friend] is literal call-response, not recombination+growth) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§476 same-day (long-form-evolving generative frontier is adult-only вҶ’ bring it to a kid). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass 7.5k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never routed to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums scale-shaped phrases, so the sprout listens/grows/sings hands-free on load with zero permission) on mic-deny/no-mic/idle; D-Dorian snap so it's never out of tune; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D fallback (`fallback.ts`) for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listener/three.js dispose/AudioContext close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (mic read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** (three.js is a project dep). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (the exact commit live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (verified: only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top, all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 476). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether the autocorrelation pitch tracks a small child's hum, whether the recombined replies read as *the sprout developing*, growth/reply-cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`736-kids-echo-grove`** вӯҗ (mic вҶ’ three.js accreting grove that re-sings older trees) + **`737-kids-memory-reef`** (mic вҶ’ raw WebGL2 GLSL reef that grows coral from the voice вҖ” the iOS-bulletproof sibling) as **IDEAS В§476**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/738-kids-song-sprout/README.md`

727 *deepens that loved lineage* (Canvas2D bells вҶ’ WebGPU chord bloom; playful вҶ’ wonder). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `gain(0.3)вҶ’lowpass(7.5k)вҶ’DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)вҶ’destination`; always-on ambient bed; ghost hue-wheel auto-demo on camera-deny/idle (zero permissions); camera analysis-only (96Г—72 offscreen center average вҖ” nothing recorded/sent); getUserMedia inside the Start tap (iOS); full teardown. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (camera read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE`); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 472). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (3 scarce renderers Г— 3 off-glass inputs Г— 3 non-silly vibes); banked **`726-kids-star-scoop`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe hands вҶ’ three.js 3D star-scoop, awe) + **`725-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt вҶ’ WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS В§472**. ## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 470 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers each on a SCARCE renderer)

- **[/dream/721-kids-piano-garden](/dream/721-kids-piano-garden)** вҖ” Papa's Piano Garden рҹҢұ. `demoable` В· Cycle 470. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-breath/hum** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle field (Canvas2D fallback) / concatenative grains of Karel's REAL piano / tender-luminous, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could grow a glowing garden of light by humming вҖ” and every petal is made from Karel's OWN recorded "Welcome Home" piano?** A near-dark field of luminous motes; breath ENERGY (RMS off an `AnalyserNode`) scatters more, brighter seeds + widens the bloom radius; voice PITCH (a cheap zero-crossing estimate) lifts blooms bright-and-high or settles them dark-and-low. Each bloom SOUNDS as **Hann-windowed concatenative grains of Karel's real recording**, selected by CataRT-style `selectNearest` over a (time Г— brightness) descriptor space вҖ” never a beat, never a loop, just a breathing texture. The literal fusion of **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("ban the 9Г— Canvas2D monoculture вҖ” port the WebGPU-compute stack *to a kids piece*; a kid deserves the scarce renderer too") **and #5** ("use Karel's real music вҖ” it's in only 1 of the last 15, all adult"). **mic-breath INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) В· **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer, 1Г—; off banned Canvas2D-primary + warming three.js) В· **concatenative-grain-resynthesis TECH** (CataRT вҖ” emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove, the jury's banned "new pentatonic") В· **tender/luminous VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (`#1 + #3 + #5`): **#1** first kids piece on Karel's real Paths recordings + first genuinely-iOS-shippable kids WebGPU-compute-primary (the iOS-Safari-26 WebGPU blocker just closed) В· **#3** named refs (Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* В· Refik Anadol В· WebGPU-on-iOS-26, in README) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§470 same-day (iOS-WebGPU-now-shippable IS the enabler). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** real 8192-particle WGSL compute+render (buffer-usage bits hardcoded вҶ’ zero `@webgpu/types` dep) with a first-class Canvas2D fallback reproducing the identical gather-and-bloom physics; ghost-breath auto-demo on mic-deny/idle; `grain bus вҶ’ master вҶ’ lowpass(7.5k) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on drone; the proven 720 loader copied verbatim with an offline-tone fallback so the corpus is never empty; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown. **Only network is the public `/api/audio/:id` GET (read-only) вҶ’ no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** at all. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, **508/508** static pages, `/dream/721-kids-piano-garden` static в—Ӣ 6.97 kB). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified: WGSL compute on a real iPad [Canvas2D fallback is the likely-reviewer path], whether grains read as *blooming from his piano* by ear, the ZCR pitch proxy, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D + offline-tone fallbacks guarantee a sounding glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (each on a scarce renderer); banked **`722-kids-star-scoop`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe hands вҶ’ three.js 3D starfield scoop, awe) + **`723-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt вҶ’ WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS В§470**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/721-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

---

## вӯҗ Newest (Cycle 462 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent laugh-first explorers)

- **[/dream/705-kids-silly-voice](/dream/705-kids-silly-voice)** вҖ” Silly Voice Monster рҹҺӨ. `demoable` В· Cycle 462. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic** (record + RMS, NOT pitch) / Canvas2D googly monster / pure comedy, zero scale. **What if a kid talks into the phone and a googly monster repeats it back in the silliest possible voice?** Press the giant рҹҺӨ to record ~1.8s of your own voice (`MediaRecorder`, auto-stops so kids never get stuck), then five big color-coded icon buttons replay it transformed: рҹҗҝпёҸ **chipmunk** (playbackRate 1.85) В· рҹ‘№ **monster** (0.62) В· рҹ”Ғ **backwards** (reversed Float32 buffer) В· рҹӨ– **robot** (~30Hz square ring-mod via gain modulation) В· рҹҢҠ **wobble** (6.5Hz LFO on a DelayNode). The monster's **mouth lip-syncs** to a real-time RMS envelope tapped off the master `AnalyserNode`; eyes googly-wiggle on every press; instant chipmunk auto-preview right after recording gives immediate payoff. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5 "MAKE A KID LAUGH"** + **#1** (comedy, never a harmonic event вҖ” the kids side's banned register): a pure pitch-free **voice-CHANGER**, a genuinely fresh kids register (179/244 sing *back in-key*; this snaps to no scale at all). **mic INPUT** (a wholly different *application* from the last-10's pitch-detection [669] + spectral [704]) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off banned WebGL2) В· **buffer playback-rate + reverse + ring-mod sample-manipulation TECH** (NOT a harmonic event/voice-leading [banned 8Г—, kids]) В· **silly/googly VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #3 + #5`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic record-pipeline + 5-mode transform DSP engine + RMS analyser-driven lip-sync viz + ambient pad) В· **#3** named refs (**Outfit7 "Talking Tom"**, **Toca Boca**, varispeed/granular nod, in README) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§462 same-day (2026 Toy Fair screen-free sound-toy register + ragdoll velocity-pitch comedy). **#1 NOT claimed** (varispeed buffer manipulation exists at 18-granular/172/227 вҖ” honest). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** master `gain 0.32 вҶ’ lowpass 7500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; ambient pad loops so it's never silent; AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); mic-denied вҶ’ friendly `text-rose-300` line + **5 pre-baked synth silly sounds** on the same big buttons so the toy still plays; no-canvas `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown (recorder/tracks/oscillators/rAF/AudioContext). **No network, no CDN, no camera, no API route вҶ’ no guard** (rules #6/#8 clean) вҖ” works instantly for any reviewer with a mic. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, 500/500 static pages). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether the transforms read as laugh-out-loud silly on a real device, lip-sync timing, and iOS mic unlock; the pre-baked fallback guarantees a sounding glance even with no mic). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`706-kids-tilt-bonk`** (tiltвҶ’bouncy-room bonkers, velocity-pitched SFX вҖ” the bulletproof no-permission sibling, вүҲ already-banked 703-boing-zoo) + **`707-kids-mega-mouth`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe face-puppet that eats falling snacks & burps вҖ” the most ambitious, most CDN-fragile) as **IDEAS В§462**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/705-kids-silly-voice/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 459 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one live-data concept via 3 renderer/metaphor approaches)

- **[/dream/699-world-forge](/dream/699-world-forge)** вҖ” World Forge рҹҢҚвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 459. **For**: adult / **live external data** (the global GitHub public-events firehose) / three.js rotating globe / planetary-awe ambient. **What if you could hear and see the whole planet making things right now вҖ” every code push, star, and merge on Earth as a spark of light and a grain of sound, blooming at its place on a slowly turning globe?** Extends **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("683's WebSocket engine could sonify a *non-market* live stream вҖ” transit, seismic, language-usage вҖ” for free") into a fresh, keyless, free stream: the lab had sonified the market (683), wiki (437), sky (618), seismic (613/233) but **never the live worldwide act of *making***. **The instrument:** the browser polls `https://api.github.com/events` вҖ” an unauthenticated, keyless, CORS-open read-only GET (no api route, no guard, no secret) вҖ” at most once per ~78s (60 req/hr limit), then **meters** each batch of recent events (PushEvent / WatchEvent=star / PullRequest / Issue / Fork / Create) out gently across the window. Each event is one grain: its **type** picks a timbre (push = soft mallet/bell, star = bright shimmer, PR = warm swell, issue = muted tom, fork/create = low bloom), a stable **repo-hash** picks a pitch in a drifting **D-Dorian** mode (same repo вҶ’ same note), and a rolling 12s **rate window** swells a generative drone's density/brightness + the planet's glow. A three.js auto-rotating dark Earth (procedural graticule + scattered land-ish dots, **no external textures**) blooms an additive light at each event's deterministic pseudo geo-location (hashed from repo+actor вҖ” texture, not GIS), panned by **longitude** via `StereoPannerNode`. **live-external-data INPUT** (off jury-banned touch-primary [5Г—]) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (renderer-coolest of the 3 candidates: 2Г— in rolling-10; off banned WebGL2 [4Г—] + banned audio-first-SVG [5Г—], off just-used WebGPU [683] + Canvas2D-warming [3Г—вҶ’would-be-4Г—]) В· **live-data sonification вҶ’ generative ambient drone + per-event voices TECH** (a living texture, emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/voice-leading cadence [banned 8Г—]) В· **planetary-awe VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (live-feed + synthetic-fallback engine + rolling-aggregate state + generative drone/event synth + three.js globe = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Hatnote "Listen to Wikipedia"** вҖ” LaPorte & Hashemi, the canonical live collaborative-creation firehose sonification; **github.audio**; **Brian Foo** *Data-Driven DJ*; **Refik Anadol** planetary data-as-light вҖ” all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (live-data sonification exists in the lab at 683/437/618 вҖ” honest). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH В§459, same-day, path a):** the dive selected the GitHub firehose as the unbuilt free stream + confirmed the Hatnote/Foo lineage + verified the keyless-CORS feasibility that makes the fire free + unattended-safe. **Bulletproof glance (critical for unattended 06:30 review):** a **synthetic event generator** (weighted realistic distribution вҖ” pushes common, stars frequent, PRs/issues/forks rarer) starts the instant you press Begin with **zero network**, so the planet sparks and the drone breathes immediately; it upgrades to **live** on the first successful poll (emerald) and falls back to synthetic on **any** error вҖ” 403/rate-limit/CORS/offline вҖ” with a `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no WebGL/three.js вҶ’ a Canvas2D starfield-with-blooms fallback** so the glance is never blank. **Ear-safe:** `event voices + drone вҶ’ masterGain вүӨ0.34 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; iOS AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin gesture. Full unmount teardown (feed stop, `renderer.dispose()`, audio close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client keyless public GET; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean). No new npm deps (`three` already a dep, dynamic-imported). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вҖ” unverified by eye/ear: whether WebGL renders the globe + blooms on Karel's device, whether GitHub's CORS behaves as documented at runtime, whether typeвҶ’timbre/repoвҶ’pitch reads as "the planet making things" on real speakers, and iOS audio unlock; the synthetic-first feed + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE live-firehose concept: banked **`701-living-coral`** вӯҗ (the world's creation **accreting** onto a luminous DLA reef, *fuller at minute 5 than minute 1* вҖ” long-form memory made visible; WebGPU/WGSL + Canvas2D fallback вҖ” the directest "reach for the ceiling," echoes 689) + **`700-commit-rain`** (the **Ikeda** austere take вҖ” events as falling data-rain grains + monospace labels; Canvas2D) as **IDEAS В§459**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/699-world-forge/README.md`

## (Cycle 458 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent silly/groove/off-glass explorers)

- **[/dream/696-kids-mouth-band](/dream/696-kids-mouth-band)** вҖ” Mouth Band рҹҺӨрҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 458. **For**: kids (4+) / mic vocal-percussion (analysis-only) / Canvas2D goofy creature / silly-comedy groove. **What if a 4-year-old could build a silly drum beat just by making MOUTH NOISES вҖ” boom, tss, pop, brrr вҖ” and a goofy creature caught each one, looped it, and bopped to it?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH вҖ” the silly/funny pole is now 0Г—, the kids side has gone uniformly solemn") and **#1** ("groove, not a cadence вҖ” the harmonic-event/voice-leading technique is the new pentatonic, banned on the kids side for a week"). **The instrument:** the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` (analysis only вҖ” never recorded/stored/sent); a per-frame **RMS energy-onset gate** (rise over recent average + noise floor + ~110ms refractory) catches each mouth-noise, then a **spectral-centroid + low/mid/high band-fraction** heuristic classifies it into 4 color-coded silly drum voices вҖ” **KICK/"boom"** (red), **SNARE/"pop"** (yellow, the safe catch-all), **HIHAT/"tss"** (cyan), **BRRR/raspberry** (purple). Each onset fires its punchy synth immediately (sub-35ms target) **and** quantizes into a 16-step loop replayed by a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler at 100 BPM вҖ” so a few mouth noises become a repeating beat. A big cartoon mouth-creature opens wide, bugs its eyes, squashes/bounces and flashes the voice color on every hit; a bottom step-strip shows the loop with a moving playhead. **mic / vocal-percussion INPUT** (off the jury-banned touch-primary [5Г—]; serves KIDS.md's explicit *vocalization* goal) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4Г—вҶ’2Г—, now a cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4Г—] + banned audio-first-SVG [5Г—]) В· **real-time vocal-percussion onset+spectral-classification вҶ’ looping groove TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8Г—, 6Г— on kids]) В· **silly/comedy/bright-primary VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]; the *subject is a joke and a beat*, not a cadence). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`, with a qualified #1): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic onset+centroid classifier + look-ahead loop/groove scheduler + comedy drum synth + Canvas2D creature = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Incredibox**; **Hazan & Stowell**, *Delayed Decision-making in Real-time Beatbox Percussion Classification*, JNMR 2010; the **AVP dataset**, Mehrabi et al., Audio Mostly 2019 вҖ” all in README); **#1 qualified** (first real-time vocal-percussion *classification into drum voices* in the lab вҖ” "spectral centroid" exists only in visualizers [246/285/19], not as a beatbox classifier). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH В§458, same-day, path a):** the dive surfaced Incredibox + the beatbox-onset-classification literature вҶ’ the recipe *is* this prototype's classifier. **Kid-safe chain:** `voices вҶ’ masterGain(0.28) вҶ’ lowpass(7.5kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-10, 20:1, fast attack вҖ” brick-wall limiter) вҶ’ destination`; always-on soft ambient bed so it never feels broken; the analyser is *not* wired to output (no echo of the child's voice). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** **mic denied/unavailable вҶ’ a ghost auto-beatboxes a silly groove** into the loop on its own (still funny + grooving) with a `text-rose-300` notice; mic-on-but-idle >2.5s вҶ’ an auto-demo lick; so a sensorless/silent glance is always alive and sounding. iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia both requested inside the START gesture (AGC/noise-suppression disabled to keep onsets crisp). Full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network call, no secret, no side effect). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 43s, вң“ Generating static pages (495/495)** [494 from cycle 457 + 696 = 495, confirming non-winners 697/698 absent], `/dream/696-kids-mouth-band 4.65 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static в—Ӣ). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether the 4-bucket classifier reliably tells a child's "boom" from "brrr" and "pop" from "tss" on real device mics [mitigated: wide thresholds + mid-burst SNARE default so misclassification still sounds musical, never "wrong"], onset-gate sensitivity per device mic gain, and iOS unlock; the ghost auto-beatbox + ambient bed guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). **Honest limit:** a heuristic spectral classifier on untrained 4-year-old mouth noises *will* misfire at the KICK/BRRR and SNARE/HIHAT boundaries вҖ” by design nothing reads as a failure (every hit is a drum, the beat keeps grooving). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three off-glass silly/groove machines, different embodied input Г— renderer Г— comedy mechanic): banked **`698-kids-dance-mirror`** вӯҗ (dance in front of the webcam вҶ’ a DOM/CSS character mirrors & exaggerates you + **freeze-dance comedy**; camera analysis-only вҖ” the directest "get off the glass," revives the jury-named abandoned 652 dance register, freshest DOM/CSS renderer) + **`697-kids-shake-circus`** (shake the tablet вҶ’ a three.js jelly clown squashes/boings + confetti POP; Pixar squash-&-stretch) as **IDEAS В§458**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/696-kids-mouth-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 457 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one multi-user groove-room concept via 3 interaction models)

- **[/dream/694-pulse-ring](/dream/694-pulse-ring)** вҖ” Pulse Ring вҸұпёҸрҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 457. **For**: adult (any) / **multi-user** (shared rotating ring, open a 2nd tab) / Canvas2D / hypnotic dance-floor groove. **What if several people shared one spinning clock вҖ” each dropping rhythmic hits onto a common ring at their own subdivision вҖ” so a groove emerges that no single player authored?** The lab's return to the single most-starved register the **JURY 2026-06-17** named вҖ” **MULTI-USER (0Г— across the entire last-15 window, "the genuinely unbuilt register")** вҖ” and a direct answer to its plea for **groove/rhythm/play over another tension-resolution cadence** (the banned new monoculture). **The piece:** a glowing playhead hand sweeps a circular ring once per ~2s bar; each participant is a colored percussion voice (low tom / woodblock / high bell / rim / shaker) and **taps beads** onto the ring at angular positions вҖ” as the hand crosses a bead, that voice fires. Each player picks their own **subdivision (8 / 12 / 16)**, so independent patterns overlaid on the *same* rotating clock produce **emergent polyrhythm + phasing** (a 12-against-8 cross-rhythm, a 16-note shaker shimmer drifting against a 3-feel bell line). An optional low-A drone adds body вҖ” but the subject is rhythm, not harmony. **multi-participant/shared-ring INPUT** (breaks the standing solo monoculture 0Г—вҶ’1; off jury-banned touch-primary) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4Г—вҶ’2Г—, now the cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4Г—] + banned audio-first-SVG [5Г—]) В· **shared-clock groove / emergent-polyrhythm TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8Г—]) В· **hypnotic dance-floor VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]). **Architecture (the 2026 collaborative-web-music principle, RESEARCH В§457):** *networked control, not networked audio* вҖ” only lightweight events (presence hello/present/bye, a shared beat-zero **epoch** in `performance.now` space, conflict-free last-write-wins bead add/remove keyed by `(voice,slot,subdivision)`, full-state-on-join) cross `BroadcastChannel("resonance-pulse-ring-694")`; every client **synthesizes its own audio locally** with a ~25ms look-ahead scheduler phase-locked to the shared epoch, so all tabs hear the same combined ensemble. **Ambition 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel control-sync + shared-epoch look-ahead scheduler + multi-voice Web-Audio percussion engine + Canvas2D ring renderer = 4) + **#3** named refs (Steve Reich *Clapping Music*/*Drumming* phasing; West-African *gankogui*/clave timeline вҖ” the default ghost bell uses the classic 12/8 timeline; The Hub lineage вҖ” all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (BroadcastChannel/multi-user already exists in 319/334/341 вҖ” honest). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** open alone вҶ’ after ~3s two **ghost players** join with complementary subdivisions (a 12/8 bell timeline + 8-feel pulse + 16-note shaker) so a lone visitor hears a living polyrhythm; presence badge flips amber "playing solo В· рҹӨ– ghost players" вҶ’ emerald "рҹ‘Ҙ N players on the ring" the instant a real peer is heard (ghosts retire); **~2.5s idle auto-demo** evolves beads on a loop; no `BroadcastChannel` вҶ’ fully solo-with-ghosts, never throws. **Ear-safe:** `gain (вүӨ0.4) вҶ’ lowpass(~9kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-18dB,4:1) вҶ’ destination`. iOS AudioContext created inside the Start gesture; one rAF loop mutating refs (React never re-renders per frame); full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, "bye" broadcast, channel close, AudioContext close, timers cleared). **No network call, no API route вҶ’ no guard needed** (same-origin BroadcastChannel only; no secret, no side effect). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 35.5s, 494/494 static pages**, `/dream/694-pulse-ring 4.95 kB / 108 kB` prerendered static в—Ӣ). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/multi-tab in sandbox вҖ” unverified: whether the cross-subdivision polyrhythm reads as a felt groove on real speakers, the two-tab presence flip + shared-epoch alignment, iOS unlock; the ghost players + breathing-ring auto-demo guarantee a live, sounding glance). **Honest limit:** `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin/same-browser (two tabs/windows) вҖ” true cross-device jamming would swap in WebRTC/WebSocket carrying the same control events. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE multi-user groove-room concept: banked **`693-ensemble-floor`** вӯҗ (5-lane Г— 16-step collaborative drum-machine "band room"; Tenori-on вҖ” the most legible/crowd-pleasing) + **`695-trade-fours`** (rotating-spotlight "trading fours" relay; captured riffs accumulate into a shared arrangement; loop-station, love-aligned to `172`вқӨпёҸ) as **IDEAS В§457**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/694-pulse-ring/README.md`

## (Cycle 456 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent harmonic-event explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/690-kids-weather-hands](/dream/690-kids-weather-hands)** вҖ” Weather in Your Hands вҳҖпёҸвӣҲпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 456. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass embodied (tilt + motion + mic energy) / audio-first / weather vibe. **What if a 4-year-old could change the *feeling* of music with their whole body вҖ” no touching the screen вҖ” and hear sunshine turn to storm and back?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #2** ("get off the glass вҖ” 13 of 15 render to a screen; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") *and* **#1** ("a real harmonic event, not the pentatonic crutch") at once. **The piece:** hold the tablet like a tray, eyes off the glass; three input subsystems вҖ” `DeviceOrientation` tilt + `DeviceMotion` acceleration + mic RMS вҖ” fuse into ONE "energy" axis (calm=0 вҶ’ wild=1). That axis drives a continuous **majorвҶ”minor mode-morph** in Web Audio: over a fixed root (A2) + perfect-fifth drone, the **third literally bends** (M3 +4 вҶ’ m3 +3, an *audible moving pitch*) and the **sixth crossfades** (M6 +9 вҶ’ m6 +8), a bright Lydian #11 sparkle fading out as a tense вҷӯ7 + filtered rain/wind fade in. Calm = a sunny major world; sway/shake/hum = the harmony darkens into storm; settle = it glides back to sun. The whole screen is one breathing sunвҶ”cloud glow (no buttons, no reading). **off-glass/embodied INPUT** (the scarcest вҖ” only 680/669 recently) В· **audio-first OUTPUT** (dodges jury-banned Canvas2D [4Г—]) В· **movement-energy вҶ’ mode-morph TECH** (a real harmonic event, emphatically NOT pentatonic scale-snap вҖ” no note quantization anywhere) В· **weather/dynamic VIBE** (dodges banned warm-cozy-kids [4Г—]). **Ambition 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (tilt + motion + mic energy fusion вҶ’ Web Audio mode-morph вҶ’ breathing canvas sky) + **#3** named refs (embodied music-cognition / Reggio Emilia "understanding through movement"; Brian Eno generative-ambient weather вҖ” both in README); #5 claimed only loosely (the embodied-perception literature is foundational, not <30-day). **Graceful degrade (never silent/dead):** no motion sensor вҶ’ mic energy alone; no mic вҶ’ gentle autonomous weather drift; before audio unlock вҶ’ the glow still animates; **~2.5s idle auto-demo** auto-cycles sunвҶ’cloudвҶ’sun so a sensorless 06:30 glance shows the sky breathing and morphing on its own. **Ear-safe:** soft attacks/releases, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master cap ~0.3 (safe near a sleeping sibling). iOS sensor + mic permission requested inside the single Begin gesture; mic is RMS-only, never connected to output, never recorded, **zero network calls** (no API route вҶ’ no guard needed). Full unmount teardown (rAF, listeners, AudioNodes, AudioContext). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 45s, 493/493 static pages**, `/dream/690-kids-weather-hands 5.15 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static в—Ӣ). **NOT browser-verified** (no sensors/mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified: per-device tilt sensitivity, whether calmвҶ”storm reads as a felt mode-flip on real speakers, iOS permission flow). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire: banked **`691-kids-sky-steps`** вӯҗ (on-glass Shepard-tempered circle-of-fifths modulation staircase, WebGL2) + **`692-kids-two-friends`** (two-player interval consonance + voice-leading resolution, three.js) as **IDEAS В§456**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/690-kids-weather-hands/README.md`

## (Cycle 455 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one AI-image-pipeline concept via 3 approaches)

- **[/dream/689-dream-chapters](/dream/689-dream-chapters)** вҖ” Dream Chapters рҹҢҢрҹҺҙ. `demoable` В· Cycle 455. **For**: adult / generative-autonomous (hands-off) / **AI-image pipeline** + three.js depth-field / oracular-Anadol vibe. **What if a long-form generative journey could *remember everything it has dreamed* вҖ” minting one AI-generated "chapter card" per movement, so the piece accumulates a navigable 3D gallery of its own past?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #4** ("build an AI-pipeline chain вҖ” STILL ZERO in the last 15; Karel explicitly wants AI image generation *inside* an AV piece") and Karel's standing care #4 (journey-engine alternatives). **The piece:** on Begin, a generative engine walks a named journey arc вҖ” **Threshold вҶ’ Drift вҶ’ Deepening вҶ’ Aurora вҶ’ Return** (~45вҖ“70s each, each its own modal color/voicing/density/tempo over a drifting **D-Dorian/Aeolian** centre; open fifths вҶ’ suspended/airy вҶ’ minor-7th depth вҶ’ bright maj7-add9 aurora вҶ’ warm return; NOT pentatonic, NOT a I-IV-V loop) вҖ” and at each phase boundary composes an evocative prompt for that mood, POSTs it to a guarded `fal-ai/flux/schnell` route, and floats the returned **chapter-card image** to the front of a **three.js** receding depth-field; every card it has ever dreamed recedes behind, parallaxing, while the camera auto-drifts through the corridor (a gentle drag glances around; touch is never primary). **Long-form memory made visible** вҖ” the gallery at minute 5 is visibly fuller than at minute 1; after Return it loops, memory persisting. **generative-autonomous INPUT** В· **AI-image OUTPUT** (the scarcest modality вҖ” ~0Г— in the rolling-10; three.js compositing substrate dodges the jury-banned Canvas2D [4Г—]) В· **latent/model-call + journey-arc TECH** (emphatically NOT the recent harmonic-event/voice-leading autopilot [~7Г— of last 10] nor touch input [4Г—]) В· **oracular / Anadol-*Machine-Memoirs* VIBE**. **Ambition 4/5** (`#1 + #2 + #3 + #5`): **#1** never-used-in-window technique (AI-image-pipeline chain, zero in last 15) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (generative journey engine + per-phase prompt-synthesis + flux image-gen route + three.js accumulating depth-field) + **#3** named refs (Refik Anadol *Machine Memoirs*; Brian Eno *Music for Airports*; TouchDesigner+StreamDiffusion cousin вҖ” all in README) + **#5** RESEARCH В§455 same-cycle (the StreamDiffusion audio-reactive-AI trend; Dream Chapters is its slow, long-form *inverse*). **Bulletproof fallback (runs forever, zero network/key):** any API error вҖ” no `FAL_KEY` (501), rate-limit/quota (429), 5xx, or image-load failure вҖ” routes to `drawProceduralCard()`, painting the phase's mood to an offscreen canvas (deterministic from the prompt hash) used as a `THREE.CanvasTexture`, with a readable `text-amber-300/95` "dreaming locally (no model key)" note вҖ” never a broken-image icon. Layered degradation: no-WebGL вҶ’ Canvas2D/HTML stacked-card gallery; full unmount teardown (geometry/materials/textures/renderer disposed, rAF cancelled, timers cleared, AudioContext closed). Guarded `flux/schnell` route (`guard()` first two lines of POST intact вҖ” origin + per-IP rate-limit + 40/day quota + FAL account budget backstop). `@fal-ai/client` + `three` already project deps; no new deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 46s**, `/dream/689-dream-chapters 5.92 kB / 297 kB` prerendered static в—Ӣ + `/api` Ж’ dynamic). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether the modal phase-changes read as a genuine journey on real speakers, the corridor's depth read, and live flux latency; Begin auto-start + procedural fallback guarantee a live glance with zero network). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire: banked **`687-latent-oracle`** вӯҗ (audioвҶ’imageвҶ’**audio** closed loop вҖ” image's color fed back into the synth; WebGL2 feedback dissolve) + **`688-spectral-seance`** (the *return trip* вҖ” image **re-sonified** as a playable instrument, Ikeda/UPIC/ANS) as **IDEAS В§455**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/689-dream-chapters/README.md`

- **[/dream/684-kids-every-note](/dream/684-kids-every-note)** вҖ” Every Note рҹҺЁрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 454. **For**: kids (4+) / chromatic touch / Canvas2D aurora / luminous-wonder. **What if a 4-year-old had the WHOLE chromatic palette вҖ” no "safe" pentatonic cage вҖ” and any note they touched was instantly embraced into beauty, because the HARMONY chases the note?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #1**'s spirit ("ban the pentatonic crutch вҖ” let a kid meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary"): instead of *restricting* the child to five safe pads, **Every Note** gives all **12 chromatic petals** and reharmonizes the chord under every tap, so a "wrong" note becomes the color of a freshly chosen chord вҖ” the pre-verbal lesson that **consonance is *contextual***, no note is wrong. **The instrument:** tap any of 12 big colored petals in a ring (each a generous вүҘ48px target, no reading, no mic). A soft bell plays the literal note while 3вҖ“4 sustained pad voices **glide** to a new chord and a Canvas2D aurora re-tints to its hue; borrowed/chromatic chords add a shimmer. **The harmony engine (`harmony.ts`) вҖ” a real-time reharmonizer built as a decomposed RETRIEVE вҶ’ EDIT вҶ’ RERANK pipeline**, directly implementing this cycle's research find (He/Li/Sun/Huang, arXiv:2605.07489, **May 2026**): the tapped pitch class is a hard constraint; **RETRIEVE** a lush ~10-chord palette in C (diatonic I/ii/iii/IV/V/vi `Cmaj9вҖҰAm9` **plus borrowed colors** вҷӯVI Aвҷӯmaj7, вҷӯVII Bвҷӯmaj9, V/V D7, chromatic-mediant Eвҷӯmaj7); **EDIT/score** by fit (`scoreFit`: chord-tone > 9/13 extension > a вҷӯ9-clash penalty); **RERANK** by greedy nearest-voice `voiceLeadingCost` + a stay-bias so re-taps don't churn. **chromatic-touch INPUT** В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the **coldest** renderer вҖ” Canvas2D 0Г— in the rolling-10; off the over-represented audio-first/SVG [4Г—: 666/669/671/680], off the hot WebGL2 [3Г—: 658/659/675], off the just-used WebGPU [683] + three.js [677]; **zero GPU-failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) В· **real-time reharmonization / chord-chasing TECH** (emphatically NOT a pentatonic scale-snap вҖ” the note never moves, the harmony moves under it) В· **luminous-wonder VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 3/5** (the only one of the 3 explorers to clear 3): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: chromatic touch ring + reharmonization engine + Canvas2D aurora + gliding pad/bell synth) + **#3** named refs (He et al. *Decomposed Retrieval-Edit-Rerank* arXiv:2605.07489; Sony CSL *FlowComposer* reharmonization; "consonance is contextual") + **#5** recent-research (the lead paper is a <30-day drop, 2026-05-08 вҖ” RESEARCH В§454, same-day chain visible). **Kid-safe chain** (`master вүӨ0.36 вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter вҶ’ destination`; rate-limited triggers, always-on C2+G2 drone bed so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the first gesture вҖ” iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** a scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** taps a phrase that *includes deliberately chromatic notes* (F#/D#/A#) and loops gently, so a silent 06:30 glance both looks alive (drifting field + blooms) and demonstrates the chord chasing a "wrong" note (stops on first real touch); Canvas2D-null вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + 12-key keyboard fallback (Z S X D C V G B H N J M), audio still plays; full unmount cleanup (rAF, timers, listeners, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero network/secret/permissions). No new npm deps, no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 35.1s, вң“ Generating static pages (490/490)** [489 from cycle 453 + 684 = 490, confirming non-winners 685/686 absent], `/dream/684-kids-every-note 6.09 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether the reharmonization reads as "the world embracing my wrong note" on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee a live visual glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-pentatonic harmonic events, each a different renderer dodging the banned tags): banked **`686-kids-wish-well`** вӯҗ (the most *fundamental* harmonic event вҖ” drag a wishing-star UP into a real **suspension/appoggiatura** over a drone, release вҶ’ it **resolves** down by step with a bloom; WebGPU particle field + real Canvas2D fallback вҖ” resurrect FIRST when a fresh-renderer slot opens, re-audit the now-warm WebGPU) + **`685-kids-two-moons`** (tilt a moon between a gold [MAJOR] and blue [MINOR] sun вҶ’ continuous majorвҶ”minor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js вҖ” the **6+/family-tier** flagship) as **IDEAS В§454**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/684-kids-every-note/README.md`

## (Cycle 453 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one concept [the live market firehose as a meditation], 3 renderer/aesthetic approaches)

- **[/dream/683-world-pulse](/dream/683-world-pulse)** вҖ” World Pulse рҹҢҢрҹ“Ҳ. `demoable` В· Cycle 453. **For**: adults / live-data meditation / WebGPU compute nebula / cosmic-transcendent. **What if the live, collective fear and greed of the world's markets вҖ” every buy and sell printing this second вҖ” were something you *witnessed* as a cosmic weather system instead of a trading screen?** The lab's **first-ever `WebSocket` input** (grep-clean across ~680 prototypes) and **first market sonification** вҖ” completing the real-world-data thread that already sonifies the sky (`618-solar`), earth (`233`/`613-seismic`), a chess game (`649`), and the Wikipedia firehose (`437`), but had never touched the purest real-time portrait of *collective human emotion*: the market. **The instrument:** a keyless browser WebSocket to Binance's public BTC trade firehose (`wss://stream.binance.comвҖҰ/btcusdt@trade`; READ-only, no API route, no secret) streams every executed trade вҖ” price, size, and crucially the *aggressor side* (buyer- vs seller-initiated) вҖ” tens of times a second. **Data вҶ’ sound/visual:** collective **buy-pressure** brightens the lowpass and lifts the chord toward a Lydian-warm consonance + tints the particle field warm (amber/rose); **sell-pressure** darkens toward a pensive tension *that still wants to resolve* + cools the field (cyan/indigo); **trade size** picks a bell's register (bigger = **lower & louder**); **volatility** raises the flow-field's curl/turbulence and the reverb/shimmer density; a slow **~22s harmonic drift** + accumulating state make it genuinely **long-form** (minute 5 вү  minute 0, not a loop). The body is an always-present **D-Dorian pad bed** so it's never silent between ticks. **live-WebSocket / market-firehose INPUT** (lab-first transport; off the screen-control reflex) В· **WebGPU 60k-particle compute nebula OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** GPU renderer вҖ” WebGPU 0Г— in the rolling-10 window; off the **banned** WebGL2 [658/659/675], off the just-used three.js [677] and the over-used audio-first/SVG [5Г—]; real **Canvas2D** fallback, not a placeholder) В· **live market-tick вҶ’ harmony/texture sonification TECH** (momentumвҶ’consonance/tension, volatilityвҶ’density) В· **cosmic / transcendent / Anadol data-nebula VIBE** (love-aligned with Karel's cosmic-particle cluster: `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ, `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (first `WebSocket` live-stream input, grep-verified) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: ws-feed + synthetic-fallback + rolling-state engine В· momentum/volatility mapping В· pad+bell synth В· WebGPU/Canvas2D renderer) + **#3** named refs (**Brian Foo** *Two Trains: Sonification of Income Inequality* В· **Ryoji Ikeda** *test pattern* В· **Refik Anadol** data-as-pigment). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH В§453 вҖ” the lab's data-sonification thread is lopsided; market + WebSocket are the gaps; path a). **Audio-safe chain** (buses вҶ’ lowpass safety вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вҶ’ master вүӨ0.34; chimes fade in, no startling transients; algorithmic reverb grows with volatility). **Graceful degradation / glance (bulletproof despite WebGPU + network):** on load a built-in **synthetic market generator** (geometric random walk + volatility bursts + realistic buy/sell stream) starts **instantly** so visuals run hands-off and audio plays on the one *Listen* tap вҖ” *before/without any connection*; the live socket is then attempted and hands over smoothly, else a readable **`text-amber-300/95`** notice ("Live feed unavailable вҖ” playing a simulated market") and it stays synthetic (re-degrades if a live socket later drops); if **WebGPU** is unavailable/init-fails it silently uses the same-state Canvas2D field. Full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, socket closed, oscillators stopped, `device.destroy()`). **No API route, no guard** (client-side WebSocket; read-only, no secret/side-effect вҖ” rule #6 clean). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 101s, вң“ Generating static pages (489/489)** [488 from cycle 452 + 683 = 489, confirming non-winners 684/685 absent], `/dream/683-world-pulse 8.39 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вҖ” unverified by eye/ear: the live Binance handover on Karel's device, the WebGPU draw path on iOS Safari [Safari 26 has WebGPU; the Canvas2D fallback covers any miss], and whether momentumвҶ’consonance reads as "the market breathing" on real speakers; the synthetic generator + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept, three renderers): banked **`684-market-tide`** вӯҗ (the same market as a slow **ocean tide** you sit on the shore and listen to вҖ” buy-pressure = tide *in*, sell = *out*; **Canvas2D** breathing sea, zero GPU surface вҖ” the **bulletproof / most-"Resonance"** resurrect) + **`685-ledger-lines`** (the **Ikeda** austere take вҖ” every trade a grain of sound + tick of light, one momentum-bent drone that *resolves* when the market calms; Canvas2D data-spectacle) as **IDEAS В§453**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/683-world-pulse/README.md`

## (Cycle 452 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/680-kids-night-boat](/dream/680-kids-night-boat)** вҖ” Night Boat рҹҢҷвӣө. `demoable` В· Cycle 452. **For**: kids (4+) / **off-glass, eyes-closed** / rock the tablet / minimal inline-SVG / nocturnal-lullaby. **What if a 4-year-old could FEEL a musical sentence finish вҖ” by rocking a tablet like a cradle, eyes off the screen, and hearing the music almost-end-wrong, then truly land home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's two loudest asks at once** вҖ” **#1** ("ban pentatonic on kids вҖ” let a child *hear* a real harmonic event") via a real functional **cadence** (NOT a scale-snap), and the never-moved standing **#2** ("get off the glass вҖ” 13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") via an **audio-first, eyes-closed** piece. Realizes the В§450-banked `676-kids-night-boat`. **The instrument:** rock the tablet gently (DeviceOrientation/Motion, iOS permission inside the Begin tap) вҖ” near-black screen, ONE soft inline-SVG boat on a moonlit sea that breathes/dips/blooms with the harmony; *all the meaning is in the ears*. **The harmonic event вҖ” deceptiveвҶ’authentic CADENCE (functional, NOT pentatonic):** a gentle F-major 6/8 barcarolle wanders real diatonic triads (I/ii/IV/V/vi, voice-led via `setTargetAtTime`); every phrase arrives on **V**, then resolves either **deceptively (VвҶ’vi** вҖ” "almost home but not quite": the boat dips, dims, bittersweet) or **authentically (VвҶ’I** вҖ” "home": warm bloom + sparkle, boat settles). Each deception and steady rocking raises a `homeBias`; **two deceptions force a home landing** вҖ” so the child rocks it "to sleep" and is rewarded by finally hearing the sentence *finish*, then a slow ~11-min lullaby fade. **device-motion INPUT** (rocking вҖ” embodied/sensorimotor; off the touch reflex) В· **audio-first / minimal inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, off the jury-banned Canvas2D, **zero GPU failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) В· **deceptiveвҶ’authentic cadence / functional-harmony TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic вҖ” the named local minimum; closure is the harmonic event a 4yo *can* perceive per RESEARCH В§448/В§450/В§452, unlike mode) В· **nocturnal sea-voyage / lullaby VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-meadow pole вҖ” dark, calm, drifting; and embodied/active, distinct from the hushed-*still* off-glass cluster 669/666/655). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: device-motion rocking analyzer + functional-cadence phrase state machine [deceptive/authentic branching, homeBias] + nocturne synth [3-voice detuned pad + sub + triangle melody + sparkle] + minimal-SVG breathing renderer) + **#3** named refs (the **deceptive cadence VвҖ“vi** + **authentic cadence VвҖ“I** of functional harmony; the **lullaby / barcarolle** rocking-6/8 tradition; Brahms' *Wiegenlied* as the archetypal child's cadence). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH В§452 вҖ” firm 4yo ground = cadence/closure; path a/c) and realizes the В§450 banked seed. **Kid-safe chain** (`master вүӨ0.34 вҶ’ lowpass 6.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; soft attacks, always-on pad so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the Begin gesture вҖ” iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** an **auto-demo self-rocks the boat through the full deceptiveвҶ’authentic arc hands-free** on load (silent 06:30 glance is alive once audio unlocks with one tap); no motion sensor / denied / no events in 1.5s вҶ’ **drag up-down** fallback with the reason in `text-rose-300`; full unmount cleanup (timers, rAF, listeners, audio nodes, AudioContext closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; zero network/secret/sensor-recording). No new npm deps, no three.js, no WebGL. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` вҶ’ `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.1 min, вң“ Generating static pages (488/488)** [confirming non-winners 681/682 absent], `/dream/680-kids-night-boat 3.61 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/motion in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: whether the VвҖ“vi vs VвҖ“I contrast reads as "withheld then granted" on real speakers, whether the rockingвҶ’homeBias pacing feels rewarding on a real iPad, and iOS AudioContext+motion-permission unlock; the auto-demo + audio-independent-of-sensor guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all non-pentatonic real-harmonic-events, off banned Canvas2D, one off-glass): banked **`681-kids-every-note`** вӯҗ (the freshest concept вҖ” touch **12 chromatic petals**, a real-time **reharmonization** engine chases your note so every note [all 12, no scale-snap] sounds lovely; the literal *inverse* of the pentatonic crutch, raw WebGL2 aurora вҖ” resurrect FIRST for an on-glass kids harmonic-event fire, re-audit the hot WebGL2 renderer) + **`682-kids-two-moons`** (tilt вҶ’ continuous majorвҶ”minor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js вҖ” the **6+/family-tier** flagship, since modeвҶ’emotion lands ~age 7) as **IDEAS В§452**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/680-kids-night-boat/README.md`

## (Cycle 450 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers)

- **[/dream/675-kids-deep](/dream/675-kids-deep)** вҖ” Deep Drum рҹҢҠрҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 450. **For**: kids (4+) / touch big stones / raw WebGL2 abyss / deep-oceanic mystery. **What if the ground under a kid's drumming slowly changed key вҖ” so the same beat felt brave, then mysterious, then home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** ("ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids side вҖ” let a child *hear* a real harmonic eventвҖҰ a **drone that shifts under them**") вҖ” and the freshest kids concept vs the recent stream (`662` covered tuning-bend, `669` covered closure off-glass; a **shifting-drone** kids piece was un-built). **The instrument:** six big glowing stones over a glowing deep abyss; **tap to strike** soft mallet tones at **fixed pitches** (A2 C3 E3 A3 C4 E4 вҖ” multi-touch; desktop keys A S D F G H). **The harmonic event вҖ” pedal/drone migration + functional recontextualization (NOT pentatonic-snap):** a sustained drone underneath **migrates its tonal center i вҶ’ вҷӯVI вҶ’ вҷӯVII вҶ’ i** (~18s/step, smoothstep glide, never a jump). Because the stones stay fixed while the root moves, **each stone's relationship to the drone changes over time** вҖ” a tap that sounded *home* (unison/fifth) drifts to *tense* (2nd/tritone) then *resolves*; the child hears harmony move under a **constant action**, and *sees* it (each stone tints tealвҶ’violet as its live tension rises; the abyss color migrates and warms to amber **only at the home resolution**). This is the same fixed note re-heard against a new root taking on a new *function* вҖ” emphatically NOT a scale-snap. **touch INPUT** В· **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00 fragment-shader abyss with bioluminescent motes/god-rays/glowing stones) OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4Г—) В· **pedal/drone-migration + functional-recontextualization TECH** (lab-first for kids; NOT pentatonic вҖ” the named local minimum) В· **deep-oceanic/cavernous-mystery VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: touch pads + iвҖ“вҷӯVIвҖ“вҷӯVIIвҖ“i pedal-migration harmony engine + migrating-drone/struck-mallet synth + raw-WebGL2 abyss) + **#3** named ref (Indian classical **tanpura** drone вҖ” a constant pedal over which every note gains meaning; here we move the drone instead of the melody / La Monte Young *Dream House*). Consumes the recent-research chain (RESEARCH В§450 sensory-safe envelope = the enabler of un-scary harmonic risk + В§448 `[foundational]` anchor: a 4yo perceives *the change itself / a moving drone* вҖ” exactly this вҖ” long before minorвҶ’sad). Realizes banked В§448 seed `670-drone-cave`. **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain вҶ’ lowpass 7.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’16/6/12, fast attack) вҶ’ destination`; capped gains, ~40ms global rate-limit; AudioContext resumed on the Start gesture вҖ” iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2s auto-demo taps a couple of stones on load so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice and the audio still works fully** (drone keeps migrating, stones still sound via touch + keys); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL program/buffers/VAO deleted + context lost, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 36.5s**, `/dream/675-kids-deep 6.92 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ, **486/486 static pages**; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: whether the migrating-drone recontextualization reads clearly over ~18s steps on real speakers, whether the abyss shader runs on iPad Safari [iOS has WebGL2], and iOS AudioContext unlock; auto-demo + audio-independent-of-GL guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`674-kids-two-moons`** (tilt вҶ’ continuous **mode-glide** majвҶ”min portamento, three.js crossfading sun-moonвҶ”ghost-moon вҖ” the most spectacular; flagged a **6+/family** piece since modeвҶ’emotion emerges ~age 7вҖ“8 per В§448) + **`676-kids-night-boat`** вӯҗ (the fire's **off-the-glass builder** вҖ” rock the tablet, an unseen choir runs a **deceptive VвҖ“vi вҶ’ authentic VвҖ“I cadence** you feel withheld then granted, audio-first/eyes-closed; **PRIORITY off-glass resurrect** once not adjacent to 669) as **IDEAS В§450**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/675-kids-deep/README.md`

## (Cycle 447 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one cycle-4 concept via 3 renderer/interaction approaches)

- **[/dream/666-piano-still](/dream/666-piano-still)** вҖ” Still Room рҹ•ҜпёҸрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 447. **For**: adult / **off-screen, eyes-closed** / audio-first / tender-intimate / tap-to-place. **What if Karel's solo piano вҖ” isolated down to its 12 pitch classes вҖ” became an AUDIO-FIRST instrument you sit inside: place a few of his notes into a slow loop, then close your eyes while it grows itself over minutes in his own timbre, quietly adding consonant notes and letting others fade?** The lab's **first genuine cycle-4** (`606 vivisection вҶ’ 630 refract вҶ’ 643 constellation вҶ’ 666 still`) вҖ” the multi-cycle deepening two juries say the lab banks and abandons, now pushed to a fourth turn вҖ” AND the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's Karel-facing line + provocation #2**: "get at least one builder off the glass screen (13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here)." Still Room is **audio-first** вҖ” the music is the whole point; the visual is one quiet **SVG** aura (a breathing center that brightens as more notes ring, markers for the notes in the loop, a slow phrase-position dot) designed to be glanced at then *ignored*. **What it does that 643 did NOT:** (1) **RECORD** вҖ” tap any of his 12 notes to *place* it into a ~16s looping phrase (8 slow slots); each pass re-fires that note's isolated material as a long tender grain of his real touch. (2) **EVOLVE over minutes** вҖ” genuine long-form state, not a loop: a continuous **decay** (presence half-life ~90s; un-refreshed notes fade and drop out, refreshed ones top up and stay) + a **generative growth** layer, so minute 5 вү  minute 0. **The growth rule вҖ” asymmetric consonance (the anti-pentatonic move):** every several seconds the room buds ONE new note, *chosen* not scale-snapped вҖ” `consonance.ts` scores all 12 pitch classes against the currently-ringing set by a harmonic-coincidence base (`1/log2(nВ·d+1)` over JI ratios: fifth 0.356 > 4th 0.270 > M3 0.228 > m2 0.126 > tritone 0.095) **plus a small directional asymmetry term** (CвҶ’G leans вҲ’0.016 vs CвҶ’F +0.016) so an interval and its inversion differ, then **softmax-samples from the top** (top ~2 at stillness вҶ’ top ~6 at growth). Anchored on **De Roure, "An Asymmetric Formula for Interval Consonance," arXiv:2606.16412 (2026)** вҖ” dated cycle-day (RESEARCH В§447). The one `stillness вҶ” growth` lever sets both bud rate (~14s вҶ’ ~5s) and sampling width; a **release** button halves everyone's presence to empty the room gracefully (the optional gathering вҶ’ presence вҶ’ release ritual arc). **no-sensor INPUT** (dead-simple 12-note tap row вҖ” deliberately calm) В· **audio-first / minimal SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer вҖ” off-glass, off the jury-banned **Canvas2D 4Г—**, and the lane the jury says is the lab's best) В· **asymmetric-consonance generative growth + grain-replay-of-Karel's-isolated-notes TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap вҖ” the named local minimum) В· **tender / intimate / Eno-ambient VIBE** (the un-built adult register the jury named in provocation #5). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** first looper / phrase-memory built from a *performer's own isolated pitch classes* + first asymmetric-consonance generative growth in the lab (grep-clean) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: HPSS+salience 12-pitch-class isolation [reused 643 engine] В· phrase-memory looper with continuous decay/refresh В· asymmetric-consonance growth chooser В· grain-replay synth + SVG aura) В· **#4** genuine cycle-4 (the deepest multi-cycle thread the lab has finished) В· **#5** binds RESEARCH В§447 (De Roure, arXiv:2606.16412, dated 2026-06-16 вҖ” researchвҶ’build chain is same-day). **#3** named refs that frame it (Brian Eno *Music for Airports* / *Discreet Music*; Гүliane Radigue; La Monte Young *The Well-Tuned Piano*). **Reused verbatim** (copied in, NOT cross-imported): `audio.ts`/`hpss.ts`/`chroma.ts` from 643 (Karel's *Welcome Home* recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ` route + synth fallback). New work: `consonance.ts` (the growth brain) + the looper/decay/SVG aura in `page.tsx`. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643/658 вҖ” no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` вҶ’ `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.0 min, вң“ Generating static pages (483/483)** [confirming both non-winners absent], `/dream/666-piano-still 7.44 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ; `.next/server/app/dream/666-piano-still.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether the grain timbre + decay/growth pacing read as tender over minutes on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-seed-on-load means a silent 06:30 glance hears the room evolving once unlocked with one tap). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-4 concept вҖ” "the piano remembers you" вҖ” via 3 renderer/interaction approaches): banked **`665-piano-loom`** (the same looper as a **raw WebGL2 scrolling phrase-tape** вҖ” the most legible "looper" visual; resurrect FIRST for the cycle-4 piano looper as an ON-glass immersive piece) + **`667-piano-tide`** (the same looper as a **three.js reflective ripple pool**; beautiful/immersive but closest to 643's own renderer family) as **IDEAS В§447**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/666-piano-still/README.md`

## (Cycle 446 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all attacking JURY #1 "ban the pentatonic crutch")

- **[/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend](/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend)** вҖ” Bronze Bend рҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 446. **For**: kids (4+) / touch-bend + big laras toggle / WebGL2 bronze field (Canvas2D fallback) / temple-dusk. **What if a 4-year-old could grab a glowing bar of bronze and BEND its pitch across a real Indonesian gamelan tuning вҖ” and discover that a note that sounds "wrong" can settle into something beautiful?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** вҖ” "ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids sideвҖҰ build a kids piece where a child *hears* a real harmonic event вҖ” a non-Western tuning (gamelan slendro, maqam) they can audibly bend; let them meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary." The lab has BP / JI / Lydian kids tuning toys (`288`/`286`/`280`) but **never gamelan, and never bend-into-and-out-of-tune as the core mechanic.** **The instrument:** five glowing bronze metallophone keys in a temple-dusk field; **touch a bar to strike it**; **drag up/down to bend its pitch continuously** (Вұ300 cents, NO scale-snap вҖ” a child slides a tone clearly past a neighbour and back); **release** and it springs slowly home toward its in-tune (*laras*) pitch. **The big sun/moon button** re-tunes the WHOLE instrument + the gong drone between two real gamelan tunings at once вҖ” вҳҖ **slendro** (`0,231,474,717,955` cents вҖ” open, floating) вҮ„ рҹҢҷ **pГ©log** (`0,120,270,540,670` вҖ” the ~120-cent half-step makes it tense). **The two real harmonic events (audible, not pentatonic-snap):** (1) the laras flip changes the instrument's whole *mood* by ear; (2) the bend lets the child meet a genuine out-of-tune note that **beats** against its neighbours вҖ” and as it settles home the metallic **shimmer slows** (in tune вүҲ0.6 Hz beating / fully bent вүҲ6 Hz), teaching consonanceвҶ”dissonance pre-verbally. **Core technique вҖ” inharmonic modal bronze synthesis (lab-first):** each key is additive sine partials at bar-mode-like STRETCHED ratios **1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93** (not integer harmonics), every partial rendered as two slightly-detuned voices so the pair beats вҖ” the signature struck-bronze shimmer; struck envelope (~6ms attack / ~3.4s ring); the low gong drone uses the same recipe an octave down and glides its upper partial on a laras flip so the re-tune is felt underneath. **touch-bend INPUT** (off the jury-banned glass-control reflex вҖ” the touch here is *expressive pitch-bending*, not button-poking) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a fullscreen fragment shader: bronze/teal ground, heat-haze shimmer, additive strike glow, in-tune gold "crown" rim, restless flicker out-of-tune вҖ” explicitly **OFF the jury-banned Canvas2D 4Г—**, which is fallback-only) В· **inharmonic-modal-bronze + gamelan-bend TECH** (never used in the lab; emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap вҖ” the named local minimum) В· **bronze/temple-dusk VIBE** (deliberately OFF the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole 4Г—). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (inharmonic modal bronze synthesis вҖ” grep-clean; the hardest criterion to claim) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: touch-bend physics with spring-back В· inharmonic additive synth with bend-driven beating В· the laras toggle re-tuning every key + drone В· WebGL2 shader renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (Ableton's **"Tune a Gamelan Yourself"** interactive Sundanese tuner вҖ” this cycle's research dive вҖ” + Javanese **slendro/pГ©log laras** + the inharmonic bar-mode acoustics of saron/gendГ©r). **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE; but a clean cycle-2 exists: add *maqam*/other laras, or a "tune the gamelan yourself" mode where the child sets each cent). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the gamelan tuner is a living reference resource, not a <30-day arXiv drop вҖ” path (a): researchвҶ’build, not a freshness claim). Born from **RESEARCH В§446** (same fire). **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain вҶ’ lowpass 7.2 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall вҶ’ destination`; ~6ms soft strike attack, no harsh transients; always-on gong drone faded in on unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** before audio, keys flicker so the field moves; once unlocked + untouched, a gentle scripted shimmer-strike auto-demo plays hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D fallback** that still shimmers + sings + bends, with a `text-rose-300` note; AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL disposed, nodes disconnected, context closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 37.9s, zero warnings**, `/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend 5.97 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: whether the bronze inharmonic timbre + bend-beating read as intended on real speakers, whether Вұ300-cent bend sensitivity + spring-back feel right for a real child, and iOS WebGL2 + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee it performs on a glance вҖ” note iOS has WebGL2 so the full shader runs on iPad). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`663-kids-two-suns`** (tilt a moon between two suns вҶ’ a continuous **majorвҶ”minor mode-morph** you hear bend, inline-SVG; the fast "mode-morph" resurrect) + **`664-kids-hum-answer`** вӯҗ (the fire's **off-the-glass builder**, JURY #2 вҖ” hum a note, an unseen choir answers with a **4вҖ“3 suspension that resolves**, audio-FIRST/eyes-closed; PRIORITY off-glass resurrect since the screen-monoculture metric still needs a SHIP) as **IDEAS В§446**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend/README.md`

## (Cycle 444 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, one concept via 2 interaction models)

- **[/dream/658-kids-piano-garden](/dream/658-kids-piano-garden)** вҖ” Papa's Piano Garden рҹҢұрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 444. **For**: kids (4+) / device tilt / luminous blooming-garden / play-with-Dad's-real-music. **What if a 4-year-old could play with PAPA'S actual recorded piano вҖ” tilt the tablet to roll a glowing seed across a dark garden, and wherever it rests his real piano BLOOMS into a singing flower of light that keeps singing?** The lab's **FIRST kids prototype built on Karel's REAL recorded piano** (grep-verified 0Г— вҖ” no prior kids piece touches `/api/audio`; even `645-kids-piano-creatures` is MIDI synth, not his recording), and the kids-first realization of his explicit standing directive ("incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths вҖҰ let his existing music be the input"). Brings the loved adult **`227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ** technique (granular resynthesis of his Paths) to the kids side for the first time. **Source:** his *Welcome Home* solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ` route (`audio.ts`, 4 s abort + JSON-or-bytes handling, copied verbatim from 630/643) вҶ’ **offline-synth fallback** so it's alive even if the fetch fails. **The granular engine (`granular.ts`):** overlapping 20вҖ“120 ms grains read from his buffer, each grain's `playbackRate` **hard-quantized to a Вұ2-octave C-major pentatonic** ratio set вҶ’ **no wrong notes, ever**; a вүӨ25-voice cap with oldest-steal; an always-on gentle pad grain-cloud (never silent); and the distinguishing layer вҖ” **persistent singing flowers**: each bloom registers a `SingingFlower` that keeps emitting its own sustained grain-cloud at its own pitch + read-position (probability-gated, вүӨ14 flowers, smooth fade-in on bloom / fade-out on steal) so the **garden is genuinely fuller at minute 3 than minute 0** (real long-form state/evolution, the exact quality the jury praised in the kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` вҖ” NOT a loop). **The seed (`page.tsx`):** `DeviceOrientation` вҶ’ a gravity vector (neutral-hold-zeroed, EMA-smoothed) drives **semi-implicit-Euler physics** (friction, clamped top speed, soft wall-bounce) rolling a glowing seed; its **x-position selects the granular read-position + pentatonic degree** (left = earlier/lower, right = later/higher) + stereo pan; a soft glowing trail follows; **dwell вүҘ~0.4 s** (with a 0.7 s cooldown) triggers a **bloom**. **Visual (`renderer.ts`, WebGL2):** a near-black garden rendered by a fullscreen-quad additive-glow fragment shader вҖ” the bright warm seed + fading trail + pulsing petal flowers вҖ” with soft tone-mapping so additive sums never clip; a **full Canvas2D twin** draws the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **device-tilt INPUT** (loved lane via `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ + `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ; off the camera-recency of 652 + mic-recency of 655; **NOT touch** вҖ” and note touch is now 0Г— in the rolling-10, the jury's 5Г— ban fully worked off) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** screen renderer вҖ” off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6Г—** AND off BOTH the rolling-hot **three.js 3Г— / Canvas2D 3Г—**; Canvas2D fallback only) В· **granular-resynthesis-of-Karel's-REAL-piano TECH** (0Г— for kids) В· **luminous / blooming-garden / tender-wonder VIBE** (the novelty axis here is MATERIAL вҖ” his real music вҖ” not vibe, so it sidesteps the kids-warm autopilot the jury flags). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids prototype built on Karel's real recorded piano + first kids granular resynthesis of his recording (grep-verified) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: real-recording loader/decoder + synth fallback В· pentatonic granular engine with persistent singing-flower clouds В· tilt-gravity seed physics + EMA + drag/key fallbacks В· WebGL2 additive-glow garden renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Curtis Roads вҖ” *Microsound*** [granular] В· **Iannis Xenakis** [granular origins] В· **Brian Eno** [generative/ambient] В· Karel's own *Welcome Home* album as the material). **#4 NOT formally claimed** (single cycle вҖ” but it is a natural cycle-1 of a his-music-for-kids spine; a real cycle-2 [onset/phrase structure gating where flowers bloom, or two-source granular blending two Paths tracks] is a clean kids-4/5 path). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the IMPS/Martin embodied-co-creative-ML dive is path-(a) grounding вҖ” the body shaping a living response from real material вҖ” foundational not <14-day; said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH В§444**: the dive's headline hook (cast-shadow/silhouette interaction) was **KILLED by a corpus grep** (`268-kids-shadow-theater` + `513-kids-shadow-still` + `617-kids-shadow-monster` + `463-terra-gamelan` already exist вҖ” the "grep before claiming 0Г—" discipline), which surfaced the genuinely-unmined axis: **his real music is 0Г— for kids**. **Kid-safe chain** (`padBus/flowerBus вҶ’ master gain (3.5 s fade-in, вүӨ0.5) вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; soft grain attacks, no harsh transients; ~13-min lullaby fade-down). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~2.5 s idle вҶ’ a synthetic-tilt auto-demo** rolls the seed, blooms flowers, and breathes the piano hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with **zero hardware**; DeviceOrientation denied/absent вҶ’ **drag-anywhere + Arrow keys** with a `text-rose-300` notice (fully playable on a laptop); audio fetch fail вҶ’ synth fallback (amber-free, transparent in the HUD). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643 вҖ” no network secret).
