No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` exit 0 вҶ’ `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.3 min, вң“ Generating static pages (480/480)** [479 from cycle 443 + 658, confirming the non-winner absent], `/dream/658-kids-piano-garden 7.38 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ; one non-blocking unused-eslint-disable Warning, tidied). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/tilt/GPU in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether grain density / dwell threshold / tilt sensitivity feel right for a real child on real hardware [runtime tuning, builder-flagged], the granular timbre + loudness of his piano through the kid-safe chain, and iOS DeviceOrientation + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + drag/key fallbacks guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one concept вҖ” his-real-piano garden вҖ” via 2 interaction models): beat **`657-kids-piano-garden`** (tilt = a **WIND** that scatters his piano into a swarm of singing fireflies in a WebGL2 point-field вҖ” a bulletproof, instantly-joyful *momentary* instrument, but no accumulating state where 658's flowers persist and grow the garden) вҖ” banked as **IDEAS В§444**, the fastest momentary-register resurrect. Design notes: `src/app/dream/658-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 443 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers across the jury's open adult lanes)

- **[/dream/655-breath-sanctuary](/dream/655-breath-sanctuary)** вҖ” Breath Sanctuary рҹҢ¬пёҸрҹ•ҜпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 443. **For**: adult / off-screen / eyes-closed / ritual-ceremonial / breath-steered. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED вҖ” a ceremonial sound-space you steer with your BREATH alone?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #3** ("Don't let 626 become the next 576 вҖ” build the THIRD embodied/non-screen piece NOW"), and the highest-leverage move against the lab's deepest structural problem the jury names: **14-of-15 recent prototypes render to a glass screen** вҖ” off-screen/audio-first was exactly 1Г— (626). This is the lab's **2nd-after-626 audio-FIRST piece** and a **ritual** journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for. **Input вҖ” BREATH via the mic (amplitude only, NO pitch):** `getUserMedia` вҶ’ lowpass ~1.2 kHz вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` вҶ’ time-domain RMS вҶ’ a slow attack/slower-release **envelope follower** tracking the swell (inhale) and ebb (exhale); a rising-then-falling envelope above threshold fires a **peak** (strike a bowl) and counts a **breath cycle** (drives the arc). Mic routes ONLY to the analyser вҖ” no output path, **no howl risk** even on speakers. **Sound (вүҘ3 subsystems вҶ’ 4):** (1) a **just-intonation overtone choir** вҖ” stacked sine partials at pure ratios `1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2` (beat-free), each with its own slow amplitude LFO so it shimmers; breath energy swells loudness + opens a brightness lowpass; upper partials gated by the arc's "openness"; (2) **struck singing-bowl resonators** вҖ” a damped modal model, a few *inharmonic* partials per bowl with long (~5.5вҖ“12 s) exponential decay, struck at the top of each breath, ringing into a feedback-delay tail; (3) a **breath-RMS envelope follower** (the input layer); (4) a **long-form ritual STATE MACHINE**. **The stateful arc (вүҘ5 min, NOT a loop):** four phases вҖ” **Gathering вҶ’ Invocation вҶ’ Presence вҶ’ Release** вҖ” each advanced only when BOTH a breath count AND a time gate are met, so minute 5 вү  minute 1: the **fundamental drifts down a fifth** (C2 вҶ’ ~43.6 Hz), **more overtones enter**, the **bowl set rotates**, the **tail lengthens**, and the halo's **hue drifts** violetвҶ’cyan. **Visual вҖ” minimal, audio-first (SVG, no WebGL):** a single faint breathing halo (radius + opacity follow the breath envelope, hue follows the phase) + sparse readable text (phase name В· instruction В· breath/time counter); everything else dark вҖ” the point is to look away. **mic-breath INPUT** (FRESH вҖ” mic 0Г— in the rolling-10; breath-as-control is a cross-modal sensor the lab hadn't used; off the jury-banned **touch 5Г—**) В· **audio-only/off-screen OUTPUT** with a faint SVG halo (the SCARCEST renderer вҖ” off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6Г—** AND the hot **three.js 3Г— / Canvas2D 3Г—**) В· **long-form JI ritual + breath-envelope TECH** (not sonification, not a sim, not the banned physical-feed template) В· **ritual/ceremonial VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles вҖ” sacred/spacious, neither the adult doom autopilot nor cozy). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4: breath-envelope follower В· JI overtone choir В· struck-bowl resonator bank В· ritual state machine) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Pauline Oliveros вҖ” *Deep Listening* / *Sonic Meditations*** [breath-based eyes-closed listening, the direct lineage] В· **La Monte Young / Theatre of Eternal Music** [JI sustained drone] В· Tibetan singing bowls В· the **Lyria RealTime / Live Music Models** continuous-steered-stream frame). **#1 SOFT** (additive JI drone + modal bowls are foundational; breath-as-the-steering-control + the off-screen ritual framing are fresh, not hard-claimed) В· **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE, no prior thread вҖ” the diurnal-arc-with-state is long-form *within* one piece, not a multi-cycle commitment, discounted not over-claimed) В· **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (Lyria 3 ~4 mo + server-side; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH В§443** (the 2026 frontier is the *continuous, live-steered, never-landing stream* вҖ” Lyria RealTime; here the steering control is the breath, the lab-feasible no-network ancestor). **Ear-safe chain** (`choir + bowl buses вҶ’ master gain вүӨ0.5 (5 s fade-in) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; delay feedback <0.8; AudioContext + mic both requested INSIDE the "Begin В· breathe" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** mic denied/unavailable вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + an **autonomous breath LFO** (~5.5 s/breath, asymmetric) drives the same params so it ALWAYS plays; **~2.5 s idle вҶ’ autonomous-breath auto-demo** (no permission prompt) so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the halo pulse and (once unlocked) HEARS the drone breathing with zero hardware; honest caveat вҖ” the idle auto-demo builds the context without a gesture so audio may stay suspended until the first click, the visual still animates. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вҖ” mic is local, no network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 38.3 s, вң“ Generating static pages (479/479)** [478 from cycle 442 + 655, confirming the two non-winners absent], `/dream/655-breath-sanctuary 4.73 kB / 108 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/breath: whether the RMS envelope reliably reads real breathing vs. room noise [headphones + a quiet space help; the amplitude detector can mis-read fans/speech], whether the phase transitions land emotionally, the JI/bowl timbres, and iOS mic+AudioContext unlock; the autonomous fallback + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (off-screen-ritual / ecstatic-lift / AI-chain), each bent toward the RESEARCH В§443 continuous-steered-stream paradigm; banked **`654-latent-chain`** (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline CHAIN вҖ” audioвҶ’FLUX-imageвҶ’Florence-2-captionвҶ’re-seed, Karel's most-wanted "AI image INSIDE an AV piece"; lost AGAIN on glance-verifiability + paid/network/uncertain-model-id risk for an unattended ship вҖ” resurrect when Karel's awake to exercise the chain with a confirmed prod `FAL_KEY`) + **`653-endless-lift`** (the **ecstatic** missing-middle вҖ” a gospel-house key-lift that Shepard-folds so it climbs forever and never drops; WebGL2; **tsc+eslint VERIFIED clean**, the fastest euphoric resurrect) as **IDEAS В§443**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/655-breath-sanctuary/README.md`

## (Cycle 440 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's "active-wonder middle")

- **[/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures](/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures)** вҖ” Piano Creatures рҹҺ№рҹҢұ. `demoable` В· Cycle 440. **For**: kids (4+) / Web MIDI + keyboard / active-wonder musical / play-an-instrument. **What if a 4-year-old could PLAY a real keyboard and instantly sound like a musician вҖ” every note blooms a living creature, and an invisible band plays along in real time so there are no wrong notes?** The lab's **FIRST kids MIDI piece** (grep-verified 0Г— вҖ” no prior kids prototype calls `requestMIDIAccess`), and the kids-register answer to the **JURY 2026-06-15** "missing middle" (the kids side is "warm-or-silly with nothing between" вҖ” this is the active-wonder *musical* register where the child PERFORMS). **Input (NON-touch primary):** **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()` in try/catch, `noteon`/`noteoff` on all inputs, `onstatechange` hot-plug) вҶ’ falls through to a **computer-keyboard** piano row (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` upper octave + `Z X C V B N M` lower, no auto-repeat) вҶ’ last-resort вүҘ64 px on-screen pads. **No-wrong-notes engine:** every incoming note `snapToPenta`'d to C-major pentatonic вҶ’ always consonant вҶ’ a soft two-partial bell/marimba voice. **The accompaniment "agent" (4 subsystems):** a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms horizon) driving (1) an **auto-harmony PAD** on an 8-bar diatonic progression that advances per bar, (2) a **walking root/fifth/octave BASS**, (3) a **groove bed** (kick + noise hats) that grows/thins with a decaying `energyRef` raised on each played note вҖ” so the more the child plays, the fuller the band, and the harmony evolves so minute 2 вү  minute 0; (4) the MIDI/keyboard input + snap layer. **Visual (three.js):** a garden of orbiting emissive **note-creatures** (color by pitch class, radius/height by register) that pulse on strike and breathe with band energy; DPR-aware, resize-handled, full geometry/material/renderer disposal on unmount. **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (the lab's FIRST kids MIDI вҖ” off the jury-banned **touch 5Г—**; love-adjacent via the kids-keyboard loves `82-kids-color-piano`вқӨпёҸ/`317-kids-color-bells`вқӨпёҸ) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (2Г—вҶ’3Г— in rolling-10, under the 4Г— ban line вҖ” off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6Г—** and the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D-at-3Г—) В· **rule-based real-time accompaniment-agent TECH** (a look-ahead scheduler that answers the player вҖ” grep-fresh) В· **active-wonder MUSICAL VIBE** (neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids MIDI (grep-verified 0Г—, the genuine never-used-technique claim the recent SOFT-#1 cruise lacked) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Toshio Iwai вҖ” *Electroplankton* / *TENORI-ON***; the live-co-performance frame **arXiv 2604.07612** *Real-Time HumanвҖ“AI Musical Co-Performance* + **arXiv 2602.05064** *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*). **#4 NOT claimed** (the advancing progression is long-form *state within one piece*, not a multi-cycle commitment вҖ” discounted rather than over-claimed, the "theater" the jury roasts); **#5 NOT claimed** (the 2026 co-performance papers are server-side + older than 30 days; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH В§440** (real-time co-performance = a look-ahead scheduler answering the performer a beat ahead вҶ’ implement the browser-feasible rule-based ancestor as a no-wrong-notes kids instrument). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain вүӨ0.55 вҶ’ lowpass 7500 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’18,6,12) вҶ’ destination`, a quiet never-silent drone; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** no MIDI вҶ’ `text-rose-300` "press letter keys to play!" + the keyboard path; WebGL fail вҶ’ rose notice while AUDIO keeps working; **~2.5 s idle вҶ’ a ghost player auto-plays an evolving melody** (creatures bloom, the band plays along) so a silent 06:30 glance with NO MIDI hardware SEES creatures bloom and (unmuted) HEARS a full song; first real note hands control to the child. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web MIDI + Web Audio + three.js вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already present). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 117 s, вң“ Generating static pages (476/476)**, `/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures 5.34 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI/WebGL/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: whether the rule-based accompaniment FEELS like a band answering the child vs. generic backing, the bell timbres + kid-safe loudness, Web MIDI hot-plug + iOS unlock, three.js visual tuning; the ghost-player auto-demo guarantees it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-register fire (PLAY/MOVE/PULSE); banked **`647-kids-clap-parade`** (the **PULSE/danceable** register вҖ” mic-RHYTHM/onset [NOT pitch] вҶ’ an inline-SVG marching parade that BUILDS with the beat; the directest fill of the jury's missing groove-middle + cleanest glance [SVG, zero GPU], the fastest kids-groove resurrect) + **`646-kids-sky-conductor`** (the **MOVE** register вҖ” webcam frame-differencing вҶ’ conduct a Canvas2D constellation orchestra; lowest ambition, camera/conducting trodden via 113/217/617) as **IDEAS В§440**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures/README.md`

## (Cycle 439 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, a TRUE cycle-3 of the `606`вҶ’`630` piano spine)

- **[/dream/643-piano-constellation](/dream/643-piano-constellation)** вҖ” Piano Constellation рҹҺ№вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 439. **For**: adult / audio-file (Karel's real piano) / clinical-analytical / make-an-instrument-of-his-own-touch. **What if Karel's solo piano could be taken apart down to its 12 individual notes вҖ” each pitch class isolated from the recording вҖ” and then PLAYED BACK as an instrument made of his own touch, where tapping a note re-fires that note's isolated material?** The lab's **first cycle-3** вҖ” the genuine continuation of the `606-piano-vivisection` вҶ’ `630-piano-refract` arc, claiming **ambition #4 (multi-cycle commitment) honestly** (the move the jury says is "theater вҖ” banked every DEEP cycle, claimed never," the reason the lab has **zero 4/5s in two juries**). 606 split the piano into HARMONIC (strings) vs PERCUSSIVE (hammers) via median-filter HPSS; 630 fanned the harmonic layer by NMF into **4 register bands**; 643 goes **finer than register bands** вҖ” it isolates the **12 PITCH CLASSES** (C, C#вҖҰB) of his playing **and makes them playable**. **The cycle-3 leap = a NEW interactive layer (REPLAY).** **Isolation method (salience-mask, 4 subsystems):** (1) the proven **HPSS ground** isolates a clean harmonic layer; (2) on the harmonic complex STFT, a **Klapuri salience** function scores each candidate fundamental as the summed harmonic-comb amplitude (ОЈ over 6 partials, weights decaying 0.78^(hвҲ’1)) so a real note lights its whole comb while spurious single bins don't; (3) each candidate's salience is splatted back onto its comb bins and **folded by octave into its pitch class** (Fujishima chroma) вҶ’ 12 dense per-bin support spectra вҶ’ **soft masks that form a partition of unity** (`M_c = S_c / ОЈ_j S_j`; the 12 masks sum to 1 at every bin, scaling re+im together вҶ’ phase preserved, exact reconstruction), each ISTFT'd вҶ’ **12 isolated pitch-class buffers + the Hammers buffer**; (4) a **three.js** constellation renderer. **The REPLAY layer (the distinguishing cycle-3 feature):** every isolated buffer also feeds a replay bus вҖ” tapping a note-orb or pressing a key (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` вҶ’ the 12 chromas, `X` вҶ’ hammers) plucks a **~0.34 s enveloped grain** from a salient region of that note's own material, with a tiny random playback-rate shimmer so layered taps don't phase-cancel; **multiple taps stack** вҶ’ you re-perform Karel's recording as chords and rhythms built from his own notes (granular per Roads). The 13 base voices always loop sample-aligned; solo/mute/gain are instant click-free gain ramps. **Visual:** 12+1 **orbiting star-constellations** (three.js) that brighten/expand with each note's live level and **FLARE** when you replay it; soloed pulled forward + glowing, muted dimmed; idle orbit on mount + a 2.5 s-idle auto-demo that cycles the soloed note **and replays it** (showing off the REPLAY layer); full geometry/material/renderer disposal. **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real recording вҖ” only 1Г— in the rolling-10; his explicit "use his actual music" directive) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (under-used, 1Г— in rolling-10 вҖ” off the jury-banned **WebGPU** and off the over-rep **Canvas2D 3Г—/WebGL2 3Г—**) В· **salience-chroma partition-of-unity isolation + granular-replay TECH** В· **clinical/analytical VIBE** (the register the jury PRAISED in 606 вҖ” "his own music, clinical not cozy" вҖ” neither the banned doom nor the banned warm). **Ambition honest 3/5, reaching for the lab's first 4/5:** **#4** real multi-cycle commitment (an honest cycle-3 of 606вҶ’630 вҖ” the rare criterion the jury says is claimed *never*) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (HPSS В· salience/chroma isolation В· granular replay engine В· three.js constellations = 4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Fujishima 1999** chroma/pitch-class profiles В· **Klapuri 2006** summed-harmonic-amplitude salience В· **Fitzgerald 2010** median-filter HPSS В· **Roads 2001** *Microsound* granular). **#1 SOFT** (granular exists in the lab via `227-paths-granular`; per-pitch-class partition-of-unity isolation is fresh but not hard-claimed), **#5 NOT claimed** (the backing restoration paper arXiv 2603.16926 is ~3 mo, not <14 days). Born from **RESEARCH В§439** (the 2026 source-separation frontier moved from *masking* вҶ’ *reconstruction*; 630's own README banked exactly this cycle-3, "supervised NMF вҶ’ true pitch classes, not register bands"). **Graceful degradation / glance:** scene orbits + core breathes immediately on mount so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive; idle auto-demo solos+replays notes with no input; recording fetch fail вҶ’ synthesized-piano fallback (amber notice); WebGL absent вҶ’ rose notice + **audio stays fully playable**; AudioContext built inside the "Begin В· isolate Karel's 12 notes" gesture (iOS-safe); heavy DSP chunked with `await` yields behind a single progress bar. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вҖ” no network beyond the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` recording fetch, no mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already in package.json). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 88 s, вң“ Generating static pages (475/475)**, `/dream/643-piano-constellation 8.78 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/WebGL in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear/hand: the actual separation quality of the comb masks on Karel's real recording, the grain envelope feel, three.js visual tuning, and iOS unlock; the auto-demo holds a second internal copy of the replay-grain logic to avoid a hook-dep cycle [intentional duplication, no code-health risk]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-3 concept, 3 technical approaches): beat **`642-piano-chroma`** (supervised harmonic-comb NMF вҶ’ SVG chroma wheel вҖ” the most *faithful* but incremental reading: 4вҶ’12 voices with no new interaction = a clean 3/5, not the 4/5 reach; self-reported a full build pass, banked as the safe-glance companion) and **`644-piano-respeak`** (maskedвҶ”additive-resynth PURITY lever вҶ’ Canvas2D вҖ” the boldest *reconstruction*, but **diversity-blocked**: Canvas2D would hit 4Г— in the rolling-10); both banked as strong **IDEAS В§439** seeds. Design notes: `src/app/dream/643-piano-constellation/README.md`

- **[/dream/640-kids-day-wind](/dream/640-kids-day-wind)** вҖ” A Day on the Wind рҹҢ¬пёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 438. **For**: kids (4+) / tilt / contemplative-wonder / long-form generative. **What if a 4-year-old TENDS a self-evolving day-meadow by TILTING the iPad вҖ” steering a glowing wind that PLANTS where it lingers AND PLAYS the garden like a wind-harp where it sweeps, with no touching at all?** The lab's **first honest cycle-2 on the kids side** вҖ” a genuine deepening of the jury-named kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` ("A Whole Day"), directly answering **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #1** ("finish a cycle-2 for once") while honoring **provocation #4's touch ban** (input swapped touchвҶ’**tilt**, pulled by Karel's loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ). **Engine (reimplemented compactly from 624, NOT imported вҖ” 4 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** вҖ” a ~9-min day (`DAY_SECONDS=540`) cross-faded through dawnвҶ’morningвҶ’middayвҶ’duskвҶ’night via soft circular smoothstep weights (scale, root, tempo, brightness, 3-stop sky gradient, sun/moon arc, star opacity all blended); (2) a **motif-memory bank** вҖ” every planted thing stores an abstract scale-degree motif that `voiceDegree()` **re-voices into the day's current scale** and `mutatedDegrees()` ages (transpose/ornament/thin) so minute 8 вү  minute 1; (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed + ostinato + every planted voice + the traveling-motif replay; (4) a painterly **Canvas2D** side-on meadow diorama. **The cycle-2 contribution:** `DeviceOrientation` `gamma`/`beta` (neutral-hold-zeroed, clamped, eased) steer a **luminous wind spirit**; **dwell-to-plant** (lingering ~0.75 s over empty ground grows a flower/bird/star вҖ” no tap); **sweep-to-play the wind-harp** (passing within ~46 px of a planted thing rings its motif's next note in passing order, rate-limited 120 ms/thing вҖ” the child draws glissandi by leaning); and a **traveling-motif memory** вҖ” the last ~8 brushes (degree + octave + inter-brush timing) are captured into a rolling buffer the scheduler **replays quietly, re-voiced into the current phase + transposed a step**, so a gesture swept at morning returns transformed at dusk. Everything scale-snapped вҶ’ no "wrong", no fail, no score, no reading. **tilt INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5Г—**; arrow-key fallback) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6Г—** and over-rep WebGL2; zero GPU failure surface) В· **embodied wind-harp + procedural-MMR TECH** over a generative diurnal arc В· **kids contemplative-wonder VIBE** (the active-wonder *middle* the jury says the kids side lacks вҖ” neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5** (a reach above the 2/5 kids norm): **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (a real cycle-2 of 624, the move two juries say the lab never finishes вҖ” claimed honestly) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (diurnal machine В· motif bank В· scheduler В· wind-harp sweep-play = 4); **#1** SOFT (the tilt-wind-harp "play your own garden" is grep-fresh but the diurnal/motif engine is 624's), **#5** NOT claimed (refs ~4вҖ“9 mo old, conceptual grounding only). Named refs that DRIVE it: **MusicWeaver вҖ” *Motif Memory Retrieval*** (arXiv **2509.21714**, 2026 вҖ” stores realized motifs + retrieves/re-voices with controllable variation, not looping/drifting; the traveling-motif replay is a procedural take) В· **Toshio Iwai, *Electroplankton*** (2005) В· **Brian Eno, *Bloom***. Born from **RESEARCH В§438** (2026 long-form-coherence literature independently converged on exactly 624's remembered-and-re-voiced-motif architecture вҶ’ deepen by making that memory *playable*). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain вүӨ0.55, 2.5 s fade-in вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7000 Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҲ’18/6/12 вҶ’ destination`; AudioContext created inside the "Begin the day вҳҖ" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2.5 s idle вҶ’ the wind drifts a Lissajous path, planting + brushing autonomously at **~13Г— accelerated day rate** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel, sky shift, creatures wake/sleep, and the wind sweep the garden with zero interaction or hardware; on first real tilt/key the rate eases to the full ~9-min day; iOS `requestPermission()` path with retry button; arrow-key fallback. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 81 s, вң“ Generating static pages (474/474)**, `/dream/640-kids-day-wind 7.89 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt sensor/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by hand: whether the tilt sensitivity [Вұ30В°вҶ’full deflection] and 46 px brush radius produce a satisfying easily-triggered sweep vs over-triggering on a real iPad [the two likely tuning knobs, no code-health risk]; the osc timbres by ear; iOS unlock). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one cycle-2 concept, 2 interaction models): beat **`641-kids-tilt-meadow`** (tilt-as-gravity-on-the-whole-scene + semi-implicit-Euler **seed physics** rolling into sculpted valleys to sprout) on kids-legibility (640's direct "steer the glowy wind" beats 641's indirect physics where the child can't plant where they intend), cleaner *deepening* of 624's recognizable plant-a-thing interaction, less overlap with the В§436-banked `634-kids-tilt-river`, and zero physics-jank surface; banked 641 as a strong **IDEAS В§438** seed (resurrect with its own "save a persistent valley" sculpting payoff). Design notes: `src/app/dream/640-kids-day-wind/README.md`

## (Cycle 437 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's named "missing middle")

- **[/dream/637-slow-burn](/dream/637-slow-burn)** вҖ” Slow Burn рҹ•ҜпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 437. **For**: adult / tender-sensual / after-hours / make-the-mechanism-legible. **What if Resonance could make the invisible *pocket* of a groove VISIBLE?** A ~72 BPM after-hours **neo-soul vamp** whose centerpiece is an **SVG grid-vs-actual onset plot**: it draws the 16th-note grid, and for every drum hit a hollow ring at the *grid* time + a connecting line out to where the hit **actually landed** + a glowing velocity-sized dot at the real onset. A single **FEEL / looseness lever** (slider + вҶҗ/вҶ’ or [/]) scales every voice's microtiming lean вҖ” kick dead-on, **snare laid-back (~+32 ms)**, **hats pushed early (~вҲ’11 ms)**, bass a touch behind вҖ” from `0` (robotic/quantized) through `~1.0` (in the pocket) to `1.8` (too loose); as you raise it you **watch the dots peel off the grid** and hear the beat start to breathe. The directest fill of the jury's (2026-06-15) single most-absent corner вҖ” the **tender/sensual** register (the adult side went 5Г— doom; warmth is all kids-side) вҖ” and the same "make an invisible musical mechanism legible" quality the jury praised in its TOP standout `606-piano-vivisection` (the grid-vs-actual plot is to *rhythm* what HPSS is to *timbre*). **Engine (4 subsystems):** (1) a **microtiming look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval` ~25 ms poll, notes ~120 ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`) applying each voice's per-hit timing deviation Г— FEEL + a hair of human jitter; (2) **from-scratch multi-voice synth** вҖ” sine kick, brushed bandpass-noise snare, lazy filtered-noise hats, gliding sine sub-bass, **FM Rhodes** (sine carrier + 1:1 modulator, decaying tine) over **Fm9 вҶ’ Bbm9 вҶ’ Eb13 вҶ’ Abmaj9**, with vinyl crackle + lowpass haze; (3) a **reharmonization state machine** drifting upper-extension voicings, walking-bass passing tones, and ghost-snare fills over "eras" (laps through the progression) so minute 3 вү  minute 0 (long-form, not a loop); (4) the **SVG grid-vs-actual renderer**. **keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5Г—**, off mic/real-data) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, 0Г— in the window вҖ” off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6Г—** AND the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D) В· **per-voice microtiming-deviation engine TECH** (grep-0Г— in the lab вҖ” not sonification, not a sim) В· **tender / sensual / after-hours VIBE** (the directest opposite of the jury-banned **5Г— doom autopilot**; distinct from banned kids-WARM by being lean/grown/dissonant). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems вҶ’ 4 + #3 named refs that DRIVE it: ***Does it Swing? Microtiming Deviations and Swing Feeling in Jazz*** Sci. Rep. 2019 / arXiv 1904.03442 В· **Dan Charnas, *Dilla Time*** 2022 В· grounded by **arXiv 2605.10281 *Drum Synthesis from Expressive Drum Grids via Neural Audio Codecs*** May 2026; **#1 SOFT** вҖ” the microtiming-deviation engine + grid-vs-actual plot are grep-0Г— but groove/scheduler infra exists (387/632) so discounted, NOT a faked 4/5; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 2605.10281 is server-ML, refs foundational). Born from **RESEARCH В§437** (groove humanization = measurable microtiming deviation; the "expressive drum grid" as interface). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~1.8 s idle auto-demo** self-starts the vamp and sweeps FEEL on a ~14 s breathing cycle, so a silent 06:30 glance with **no audio hardware** still SEES the dots peel off the grid; pure SVG = **zero GPU failure surface** (unlike the recent run of build-verified-not-browser-verified GPU ships). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 113 s, вң“ Generating static pages (473/473)**, `/dream/637-slow-burn 5.88 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox вҖ” whether the snare-late/hats-early magnitudes *feel* like the pocket, the FM-Rhodes timbre, and iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the SVG plot + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-register fire; banked **`638-gospel-lift`** (the **ecstatic/euphoric** corner вҖ” three.js ascending light column + gospel key-LIFT modulation +1 semitone/16 bars, NO drop, genuinely distinct from `387-drop-engine`) + **`639-afro-pulse`** (the **joyful/danceable** corner вҖ” Canvas2D afrobeat/highlife, bell-timeline + interlocking 7-vs-5 melodic ostinati; resurrect with a NON-ring viz, its rings overlap `632-polymeter-loom`) as IDEAS В§437. Design notes: `src/app/dream/637-slow-burn/README.md`

## (Cycle 433 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal **off-GPU / scarce-renderer** explorers)

- **[/dream/626-empty-room](/dream/626-empty-room)** вҖ” Empty Room рҹҺ§. `demoable` В· Cycle 433. **For**: adult / eyes-closed / off-screen / embodied-spatial. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED?** An **audio-FIRST, off-screen** piece: put on headphones, stand in an otherwise empty room, and **invisible presences drift around you in real 3D binaural sound**. Each is a soft sustained voice in a dark modal register (close, intimate, slightly haunted вҖ” an empty-cathedral feeling, *not* warm/cozy). **Turn to face a presence** (phone compass via `DeviceOrientationEvent`, or drag on desktop) and it brightens, opens, and sings more clearly while the others recede вҖ” **active listening is the whole game**. The lab's **FIRST audio-FIRST off-screen piece** вҖ” the screen is deliberately near-black, showing only an austere Canvas2D compass/radar as a glance-aid; the experience lives in the headphones. This finally gives the **off-screen / embodied-spatial lane its second real entry** beyond the screen-led `576-presence-room` вҖ” the 0Г— lane the jury has named "every fortnight." **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) true binaural spatialization вҖ” each of 5 presences is a Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`, `distanceModel:"inverse"`) in 3D world space; the `AudioListener` forward vector rotates as you turn (modern `forwardX/Z` AudioParams, feature-detected fallback to deprecated `setOrientation`); (2) a generative moving-presence engine вҖ” each voice has its own orbit `azimuth(t)`, a radius wobble that brings it close past your head, two detuned oscillators + a breath-tremolo LFO, and slow multi-minute pitch-detune drift so the room is genuinely different at minute 4 than minute 1 (it evolves, it doesn't loop); (3) a facing-reward layer вҖ” per-frame `cos(angle)` between heading and each presence (cubic-sharpened) swells gain and opens a brightness lowpass on the faced voice. Dark modal pitch set (G-Phrygian-ish over a drone with b2 + tritone tension); damped feedback-delay "empty-cathedral" tail (no IR file). **device-orientation INPUT** (off the glass; drag fallback) В· **audio-only OUTPUT** (Web Audio binaural вҖ” the *scarcest* renderer, 0Г— in the rolling-10; austere Canvas2D compass is a glance-aid only вҖ” off the diversity-banned **WebGPU 5Г— + WebGL2 4Г—**) В· **HRTF moving-source binaural TECH** В· **intimate / dark / unsettling VIBE** (edges, not cozy). **Graceful degradation:** no orientation sensor / declined вҶ’ drag-to-turn (rose notice); no HRTF panner вҶ’ equal-power `StereoPannerNode` (amber note); **~2.5 s idle вҶ’ heading auto-rotates** so a silent reviewer still HEARS presences sweep the stereo field and SEES the compass dots orbit, zero interaction. **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 distinct subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Janet Cardiff вҖ” *The Forty Part Motet* / *Her Long Black Hair***; **Pauline Oliveros вҖ” *Deep Listening***; HRTF background **ImmersiveFlow arXiv 2601.12950** + **ASAudio survey arXiv 2508.10924**]; **#1 SOFT, said plainly** вҖ” NOT lab-first binaural [`576-presence-room` did head-tracked binaural], the fresh axes are the **audio-FIRST / eyes-closed off-screen register** + the **facing-reward mechanic**). **Consumes the В§429-banked `620-empty-room` seed** (research-grounded, the perennially-0Г— off-screen lane) вҖ” a clean "build a queued research-bound idea" path. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 37.5s, вң“ Generating static pages (469/469)**, `/dream/626-empty-room 4.06 kB / 107 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no headphones/orientation sensor in sandbox вҖ” the HRTF localization + compass-heading reliability + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the auto-rotate + StereoPanner/drag fallbacks make it real and alive at a glance even on desktop with no sensor). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`627-latent-piano`** (Karel's piano вҶ’ AI image вҶ’ reactive Canvas2D warp вҖ” **flagged DUPLICATIVE of `441-latent-listening-room` + `448-piano-phrase-painter`**, resurrect only with a genuinely new twist) + **`628-data-matrix`** (a strobing **inline-SVG** Ikeda/Euclidean-rhythm score вҖ” the cleanest *edges* + scarcest-renderer swing, a near-instant resurrect for the next abrasive/clinical fire) as IDEAS В§433. Design notes: `src/app/dream/626-empty-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 432 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, ONE long-form concept Г— 3 non-GPU renderers)

- **[/dream/624-kids-day-meadow](/dream/624-kids-day-meadow)** вҖ” A Whole Day рҹҢ…. `demoable` В· Cycle 432. **For**: kids (4+) / long-form generative journey / calm-contemplative. **What if a kids music toy were a whole DAY?** A slow, self-evolving **~9-minute journey** through **dawn вҶ’ morning вҶ’ midday вҶ’ dusk вҶ’ night вҶ’ back to dawn** that is genuinely *different at minute 8 than at minute 1* вҖ” not a loop, not a one-shot. The piece **plays itself** and the child decorates it: **tap low** вҶ’ a **flower** (blooms by day, closes & sleeps at night), **tap mid** вҶ’ a **bird** (glides & sings in the morning, roosts at night), **tap the sky** вҶ’ a **star** (only twinkles & sings at night). The lab's **FIRST kids long-form generative journey-arc with state & memory** вҖ” a kids-register answer to Karel's standing "journey-engine alternatives" priority (a diurnal/cinematic arc, not the psychedelic 6-phase one), and the long-form-generative menu category the jury keeps flagging as thin. **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** вҖ” a continuous `phaseвҲҲ[0,1)` over `DAY_SECONDSвүҲ540` cross-fades 5 musical regions with soft circular-bump weights (no hard cuts): dawn = major-pentatonic/Lydian shimmer, slow, indigoвҶ’rose; morning = bright major, livelier, clear blue; midday = fullest playful major, brightest, sun at arc-top; dusk = warm Mixolydian, amberвҶ’violet, slowing; night = low glassy lullaby pentatonic + drone, near-black + stars + moon вҖ” phase also drives the sky gradient, the **sun/moon traveling a visible arc**, star opacity, brightness, cloud tint. (2) a **motif-memory bank** (the ambition вҖ” the "anchor" idea from **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation**): each planted creature stores an abstract **scale-degree** motif that `voiceDegree` re-projects into whatever scale the day is in *right now*, so everything stays in-key as the harmony moves, and `mutatedDegrees` slowly transposes/ornaments/thins it with age вҖ” coheres yet evolves. (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms pump, notes ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed (never silent) + an evolving ostinato + every planted voice; notes never scheduled from rAF. **touch-to-plant + watch INPUT** (off recent camera 617 / mic 603,609 / real-data 613,618) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the diversity-audit-banned **WebGPU 5Г— + WebGL2 4Г—** of the rolling-10 вҖ” the lab over-corrected INTO GPU, so Canvas2D at 1Г— is now the scarce renderer; the jury's 2026-06-14 Canvas2D ban is ~10 cycles stale + the data inverted) В· **diurnal generative state-machine + motif-memory re-voicer TECH** (distinct from recent CA/physics/sonification/segmentation) В· **calm / awe / journey VIBE** (deliberately OFF the kids **funny** autopilot вҖ” 603/609/617 went funny 3Г— in a row). **Renderer**: a single `<canvas>` 2D painterly **side-on landscape diorama** вҖ” full-height day-cycling sky gradient, a sun/moon traveling an arc, drifting tinted clouds, layered parallax hills, twinkling night stars, and **cut-paper creatures with simple friendly faces whose eyes close as they fall asleep**; DPR-aware, resize listener, rAF + scheduler + AudioContext torn down on unmount. Kid-safe master `gain (вүӨ0.55) вҶ’ lowpass (вүӨ7.5 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) вҶ’ destination`, 2.5 s master fade-in, AudioContext created inside the first gesture (iOS unlock). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first kids long-form generative journey-arc with state/memory [qualified вҖ” kids "evolving" toys are short loops/one-shots; this is a stateful multi-minute arc] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Brian Eno вҖ” *Music for Airports* / *Bloom***; **Gary Hustwit вҖ” *ENO* 2024**, the generative film that plays differently every time; **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation** вҖ” the motif-anchor]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** вҖ” the 2026 papers are heavy server-side DNNs, the engine implements their browser-feasible Eno-generative ancestor, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH В§432** (long-form coherence is the live 2026 cs.SD problem вҖ” ACG anchor-features + MusicWeaver plan-then-render). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved contemplative/persistent kids cluster (`133-kids-ripple-pond`вқӨпёҸ, `166-kids-lantern`вқӨпёҸ, `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ, `152-kids-star-paint`вқӨпёҸ; additive вҖ” the gates governed). **~2.5 s idle auto-demo**: a ghost hand plants a flower/bird/star and the day runs at an **accelerated ~14Г— preview** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel + sky shift through indigoвҶ’blueвҶ’amberвҶ’near-black + creatures wake/sleep AND HEARS the music evolve; on the first real tap it eases to the full ~9-min day. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 32.8s, вң“ Generating static pages (468/468)**, `/dream/624-kids-day-meadow 6.5 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/canvas in sandbox вҖ” the region scale-snap smoothness at cross-fade midpoints + the per-voice balance under a dense 24-creature garden are reasoned, gain-crossfaded + capped by the limiter; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer fire; banked **`623-kids-day-journey`** (the "massively bigger" **three.js** immersive 3D day-world + Canvas2D fallback вҖ” the bolder swing, resurrect when GPU renderers cool) + **`625-kids-day-paper`** (the calmest **inline-SVG** matte cut-paper storybook вҖ” resurrect for the explicit bedtime register / to give SVG a fresh entry) as IDEAS В§432. Design notes: `src/app/dream/624-kids-day-meadow/README.md`

## (Cycle 429 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D-or-off-screen / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/618-solar-organ](/dream/618-solar-organ)** вҖ” Solar Organ вҳҖпёҸрҹҢҢ. `demoable` В· Cycle 429. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / cosmic-geomagnetic. **What does the space weather hitting Earth right now sound like? вҖ” the live solar wind plays a magnetospheric organ while you watch the aurora that same data is driving.** The lab's **FIRST solar-wind / geomagnetic real-data sonification** вҖ” the natural non-duplicative next real-data lane after `613-seismic-choir`'s seismic, and a clean hit on TWO open **JURY 2026-06-14** lanes at once: **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean вҖ” mine UNMINED real-world data" (the jury literally named *aurora/Kp*; 613 took seismic, 618 takes the named-next вҖ” explicitly NOT the twice-occupied ocean) and **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6Г—)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback). **Data**: three **keyless, CORS-open NOAA SWPC** feeds fetched in parallel client-side (`AbortController` 6 s, header-row skip, NaN guards, resampled to a 240-bin/24h series) вҖ” planetary **K-index** (`вҖҰ/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json`), interplanetary **magnetic field** (`вҖҰ/solar-wind/mag-1-day.json`; **`bz_gsm` southward = the substorm trigger**), and **plasma** speed/density (`вҖҰ/solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json`) вҖ” with a built-in **synthetic geomagnetic-storm** fallback (a plausible 24h curve with a substorm spike) so it's fully alive with zero network. The last ~24h replays as an evolving ~75 s sweep, then loops. **Mapping (the magnetospheric organ вҖ” deliberately NOT a warm just-intonation drone; it has edges)**: a bank of **inharmonic** partials at non-just ratios `1, 2.04, 3.11, 4.33, 5.78, 7.19, 9.02Г—`; **wind speed вҶ’ base pitch** (вүҲ300вҶ’800 km/s lifts вүҲ70вҶ’165 Hz вҖ” higher, more urgent); **southward Bz вҶ’ the aurora opens** (a lowpass sweeps open + upper partials fade in = the substorm crescendo; northward Bz = quiet/closed); **Kp вҶ’ intensity AND dissonance** (high Kp detunes the partials up to ~38 cents + raises offset beating oscillators вҶ’ a tense slow alarm, not a hymn); **density вҶ’ granular noise texture**. Master `per-partial gain вҶ’ bus вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ masterGain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, `webkitAudioContext` fallback, gesture-unlock, ~2.5 s **autostart**. **Visual**: a fullscreen **WGSL** fragment shader builds vertical auroral curtains warped by a **curl of an fBm potential field** (divergence-free flow вҖ” Bridson's curl noise); `south`/`kp`/`speed`/`density` drive turbulence, height, flicker, drift, palette вҖ” quiet вҶ’ faint green `#7CFFB2` low on near-black, storm-south вҶ’ curtains rise + bleed **violet вҶ’ crimson** at the crown, Kp adds fast shimmer; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected вҶ’ a real **Canvas2D** aurora fallback sharing the same four uniforms, `WEBGPU/CANVAS2D` backend badge. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): live 3-feed fetch/parse/resample + synthetic fallback (`space-weather.ts`) В· inharmonic sonification engine (`audio.ts`) В· WGSL curl-noise aurora renderer (`aurora.ts`) В· Canvas2D fallback. **real-world-data (live NOAA solar wind/Kp/Bz) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4Г— / mic; never-sonified feed, explicitly NOT ocean, distinct from 613 seismic) В· **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6Г—) В· **geomagnetic-data sonification + inharmonic organ + curl-noise aurora TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) В· **cosmic / geomagnetic-storm / ominous-at-peak VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9Г—). Controls: Start (gesture-unlock), VOL/MUTE, autostart; HUD shows current UTC + live Kp + Bz. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first solar-wind/geomagnetic real-data sonification [grep-verified 0Г—; 613 seismic вү  solar wind] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Andrea Polli вҖ” *Sonic Antarctica* / atmospheric data sonification**; **auroral substorm physics вҖ” the Dungey cycle / southward-Bz reconnection**; **Robert Bridson вҖ” curl noise**]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” this cycle's June-2026 spatial-audio finding seeded the banked `620`, not the winner, and the curl-noise/sonification methods are foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH В§429** (NOAA SWPC verified keyless + CORS-open via two live `curl`s this cycle). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster вҖ” esp. `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ (which was *synthetic*; 618 is the REAL aurora driver), plus `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ/`323-latent-condensation`вқӨпёҸ/`130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ (additive вҖ” the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: any feed fails вҶ’ synthetic storm + a `text-rose-300` "using sample data" notice; no WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D + badge; ~2.5 s idle вҶ’ autostart so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the aurora curtains move AND HEARS the organ with zero interaction or network. **No API route, no guard** (pure client `fetch` of the public keyless NOAA feeds вҖ” GET, no key, no side effects, CORS `*`; no secret). No new npm deps (no CDN, no three.js). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates **exit 0** + all three prerendered static; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 113s, вң“ Generating static pages (465/465)**, `/dream/618-solar-organ 7.36 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вҖ” the live-wire NOAA parse was unexercised [only the synthetic-storm path ran]; the WGSL aurora + WebGPUвҶ’Canvas2D downgrade + the sonification feel are reasoned; the autostart + synthetic + Canvas2D fallbacks mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`619-combustion`** ("Combustion" вҖ” keyboard/tilt вҶ’ a procedural **PTR combustion-engine** instrument [pulse-train fired at `cyl/2Г—RPM/60` Hz вҶ’ recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators вҶ’ redline `tanh` scream + overrun backfire, self-contained Blob-URL **AudioWorklet**] on a **WGSL** tachometer; implements arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` and 618 is alive with real planetary data where the engine needs playing вҖ” **the strongest resurrect for the next edges fire, now built twice**) + **`620-empty-room`** ("empty room" вҖ” device-orientation/head-turn вҶ’ **HRTF binaural** "inharmonic presences move around you in the dark, hiding when faced + creeping closer when behind you," audio-FIRST off-screen with an austere near-black Canvas2D radar; refs Cardiff *Forty Part Motet* / Oliveros / Sonic4D arXiv 2506.15759; LOST: the boldest diversity swing at the perennially-0Г— off-screen lane, but the payoff lives entirely in headphones + eyes-closed head-turning [most unverifiable, weakest at a near-black glance] and overlaps `576-presence-room` вҖ” **the ready build-complete resurrect to finally give off-screen its 2nd entry**) as IDEAS В§429. Design notes: `src/app/dream/618-solar-organ/README.md`

## (Cycle 428 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-fingertip / off-Canvas2D / funny explorers)

- **[/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster](/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster)** вҖ” Shadow Monster Stage рҹ‘№рҹҺӯ. `demoable` В· Cycle 428. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / embodied-spatial. **Stand in front of the camera and your whole BODY becomes a giant glowing googly shadow-puppet monster on a lit stage вҖ” wave and the air WHOOSHES, jump and it BOINGs, get big (step in / arms wide) and it ROARs.** The directest KIDS-register answer to TWO standing **JURY 2026-06-14** provocations at once: **#2** ("commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js, 6Г—") вҖ” the primary renderer is **hand-written WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback; and **#5** ("embodied-spatial got exactly one entry [576] this window then went cold вҖ” don't let it be a singleton") вҖ” this is the whole-body, off-the-glass follow-through, in a 4-year-old's register. **INPUT вҖ” body SILHOUETTE mask**: the webcam frame вҶ’ **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter** (selfie/person segmentation, loaded dynamically from the jsDelivr CDN at runtime вҖ” **no npm dep**, wrapped in one `try/catch`), the filled body **mask** downsampled into an occupancy grid (deliberately the MASK, *not* pose/skeleton landmarks вҖ” grep-distinct from the lab's landmark vision pieces 234/419/568 hands+pose, 258/423/576 face). **Signals from the mask each frame** (`mask.ts`): frame-to-frame change (motion energy) вҶ’ **WHOOSH** intensity; centroid rising fast (a jump) вҶ’ **BOING**; mask area growing (steps toward camera / arms up) вҶ’ a swelling **ROAR**. **CREATURE**: the mask becomes a dark friendly puppet body with a glowing wobbling breathing outline (squash-and-stretch), a soft inner glow that pulses with the roar, whoosh streaks that smear with motion, and two procedural **googly eyes** placed near the top of the mask's bounding box with pupils rolling toward the body's motion. **OUTPUT вҖ” WGSL/WebGPU**: the mask uploads as an `r8unorm` texture вҶ’ a hand-written fragment shader renders the glowing creature field on a spotlit stage; a **full Canvas2D fallback** (`render2d.ts`) draws the same silhouette + glow + googly eyes, auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent or WebGPU init fails (live backend badge). **SOUND** (`audio.ts`): an always-on warm theatre bed (never silent), a continuous airy whoosh, a soft-attacked heavily-low-passed ROAR (a happy dinosaur, never a scary growl), and a comic spring boing вҖ” kid-safe master `gain (0.55) вҶ’ lowpass 7.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) вҶ’ out`, pre-created voices (<50 ms). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): camera capture + MediaPipe ImageSegmenter mask + WGSL/WebGPU stage renderer (+Canvas2D fallback) + motion-energy-driven foley synth. **camera/body-segmentation INPUT** (whole-body, off jury-banned touch 4Г— / mic; camera/vision was 0Г— in the rolling-10) В· **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6Г—) В· **silhouette-maskвҶ’creature + motion-energyвҶ’synth TECH** (grep-distinct from the lab's landmark/pose vision pieces; NOT warm-JI [banned], NOT onset/beat) В· **silly-friendly giant-shadow-monster-theater VIBE** (funny/edges вҖ” the kid-safe form of "off cozy"; NOT a warm drone). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**shadow-puppet / wayang-kulit theatre**; **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** вҖ” a viewer's silhouette materialised as a living reflection; **Tex Avery / Looney Tunes squash-and-stretch**; **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter**]; **soft #1 / #5 NOT hard-claimed** вҖ” segmentation-mask-as-creature is grep-distinct but body vision isn't lab-first, and the technique is foundational with no <30-day bind, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH В§428**. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved camera/body/mirror kids cluster (`217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ, `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вқӨпёҸ, `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ; additive вҖ” the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: the whole camera+MediaPipe init is in **one `try/catch`** вҖ” any failure (denied / blocked / CDN-WASM-model load error / unsupported) вҶ’ friendly `text-rose-300` notice + three вүҘ88px **ROAR / WHOOSH / BOING** buttons + keys **A/S/D**; no WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle вҶ’ a **ghost-silhouette auto-demo** drifts/waves/jumps/grows on a loop so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the monster move AND HEARS it with zero interaction. **No API route, no guard** (pure client camera + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вҖ” camera frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent; no network/secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe via CDN; three.js avoided). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 93s, вң“ Generating static pages (464/464)**, `/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster 9.36 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox вҖ” the segmentation-mask legibility + the whoosh/boing/roar mapping feel are reasoned; the idle ghost-silhouette demo + no-camera buttons mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`615-kids-face-monster`** ("Silly Face Monster" вҖ” camera/**FaceLandmarker blendshapes** вҶ’ WebGL2 SDF rubber-monster mirror: jawвҶ’roar, browsвҶ’boing, smileвҶ’giggle, puckerвҶ’toot; refs Tex Avery / Toca Boca / Blendshapes GHUM arXiv 2309.05782; LOST: charming + the most legible causeвҶ’effect, but renders WebGL2 not the demanded WebGPU, and face-puppet overlaps the lab's existing face cluster 258/423/576) + **`616-kids-tilt-zoo`** ("Tilt Zoo" вҖ” **device-tilt вҶ’ WGSL/WebGPU** instanced googly creatures rolling/bonking + cartoon foley, **camera-FREE**; refs Carl Stalling/Raymond Scott, Treg Brown, one-man-band; LOST: the most reliable at-a-glance + a full WebGPU spectacle, but a physics tray is a smaller concept than becoming a giant monster вҖ” **banked precisely as the camera-free WebGPU safety net if 617's camera path proves flaky on review**) as IDEAS В§428. Design notes: `src/app/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster/README.md`

## (Cycle 427 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/613-seismic-choir](/dream/613-seismic-choir)** вҖ” Seismic Choir рҹҢҚрҹҢӢ. `demoable` В· Cycle 427. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / ominous-geological. **What does the planet sound like right now? вҖ” the live global earthquake feed of the last 24 hours, turned into an ominous trembling sonification: every real quake on Earth becomes a deep resonant groan over a slowly rotating WGSL/WebGPU globe of tectonic light.** The lab's **FIRST seismic / this-class real-data piece** вҖ” and the only build this fortnight to hit **THREE JURY 2026-06-14 provocations at once**: **#1** build with EDGES, off cozy (deep inharmonic rock-rumbles + a tritone tectonic drone вҖ” the opposite of the banned warm chord); **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6Г—)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback); **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean вҖ” mine UNMINED real-world data" (live **seismic**, explicitly not the now-twice-occupied ocean). **Data**: USGS `summary/all_day.geojson` (every quake on Earth past 24h; no key, CORS, fetched client-side), with a bundled ~46-quake **synthetic fallback** across real fault zones (Honshu/Cascadia/Chile/Sumatra/Tonga/Nepal/Italy + a deep-Benioff subset + a late-day aftershock swarm) so it's fully alive with zero network вҖ” a `DATA: LIVE/SAMPLE` badge says which. **Mapping**: magnitude вҶ’ loudness + rumble duration + lower fundamental + sub-bass swell (вүҘ4.2); depth_km вҶ’ brightness (shallow = bright crack, deep = dull groan); longitude вҶ’ stereo pan; latitude вҶ’ resonance tilt. The 24h window replays in ~60s on a loop (speed-adjustable) so you hear the **day's seismic rhythm** вҖ” clusters, swarms, the silence between. **Synthesis**: each quake = a filtered-noise impact excitation through a bank of **low, slightly-inharmonic bandpass resonators** (ratios 1/1.94/2.41/3.77 over 32вҖ“120 Hz вҖ” inharmonic so it reads as *rock*, not a synth pitch), mag-scaled decay, sub-bass sine swell on the big ones; under it a continuous dark **tectonic drone** built on tension intervals (minor-2nd beat, tritone-ish, inharmonic) вҖ” explicitly NOT a warm JI chord. Ear-safe master `gain вҶ’ lowpass ~7k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter) вҶ’ Analyser вҶ’ out`, capped gains, soft sub attacks. **Visual**: a WGSL fragment shader raymarches a dark rotating globe of tectonic light; each quake blooms at its true (lon,lat) and ripples outward as an expanding geodesic ring, the whole field trembling in sympathy with the audio (uniforms driven by the `AnalyserNode`) вҖ” big quakes flare + shake the screen, shallow = magma-orange, deep = oxblood-red, over ash-grey ridges on black; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected вҶ’ a real **Canvas2D** globe fallback (same map/pulses/graticule), `RENDER: WebGPU/Canvas2D` badge. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 3 independent): live USGS fetch/parse (`quakes.ts`) + physical-modeling sonification engine (`audio.ts`) + WGSL WebGPU renderer (`gpu.ts`) + Canvas2D fallback (`render2d.ts`). **real-world-data (live seismic) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4Г— / mic; explicitly NOT ocean) В· **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6Г—) В· **data-sonification + inharmonic physical-model resonant-body rumble TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) В· **ominous/geological/tectonic VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9Г—). Controls: **Start** (audio gesture-unlock + `webkitAudioContext`), `Space` play/pause, `M` mute, `[`/`]` slow/speed the timeline; on-screen buttons mirror all (вүҘ44px); ~2.5s idle auto-start so a muted 06:30 glance already shows the globe pulsing. **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (#1 first seismic/this-class data in the lab [grep-verified; ocean вү  seismic] + #2 вүҘ3 distinct subsystems + #3 named ref [**Florian Dombois вҖ” *Earthquake Sounds* / auditory seismology**]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** вҖ” this cycle's bound research finding [arXiv 2603.09391 engine-synthesis] seeded the banked `614`, not the winner, said plainly). Honest weak spots (per builder): the WGSL globe is procedural (graticule, not real coastlines) and the per-quake resonator bank is a stylized physical model, not a literal seismogram convolution вҖ” so it's *Dombois-adjacent*, not a 1:1 seismogram-to-audio transform. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster (`323-latent-condensation`вқӨпёҸ/`321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ/`262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ; additive вҖ” the gates governed the pick). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`612-piano-larynx`** (LPC cross-synthesis "talking piano" on Karel's material вҖ” WebGL2 "spectral throat", refs Lansky *Six Fantasies* / Dodge *Speech Songs*; LOST: strong but `606` just mined the his-material vein, and its "his material" is diluted by a synthesized default modulator [file-drop is the real-piano path]) + **`614-combustion`** (procedural combustion-engine instrument вҖ” pulse-train fired at RPM вҶ’ recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators, AudioWorklet, off-glass keyboard+tilt, WebGPU; implements this cycle's research dive arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` two adult cycles ago) as IDEAS В§427. **No API route, no guard** (client-side `fetch` of the public USGS feed вҖ” GET, no key, no side effects; no secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0 after a `.next`-corruption clean [3 concurrent builder builds raced the shared `.next` вҶ’ ENOENT pages-manifest вҶ’ `rm -rf .next` rebuilt clean], `вң“ Compiled successfully in 38.6s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (464/464)`, `/dream/613-seismic-choir 8.9 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/network in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-start + sample dataset + Canvas2D fallback mean the globe pulses + groans on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel sees the real planet's last 24h at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/613-seismic-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 426 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal funny / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/609-kids-blow-parade](/dream/609-kids-blow-parade)** вҖ” Blow Parade рҹҺҲрҹ’Ё. `demoable` В· Cycle 426. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / loud. **BLOW into the mic and a parade of googly balloon-creatures puffs up bigger and bigger вҖ” then rips a whoopee-cushion RASPBERRY and zooms off when you stop.** A full hand-written **WGSL/WebGPU** spectacle (Canvas2D fallback) driven by **breath** вҖ” the directest KIDS-side hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #2**: "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6Г—)." Now that **Safari 26 (Sept 2025) put WebGPU on iPad/iOS** (RESEARCH В§426), a WGSL kids spectacle is an iPad-native path, not a desktop flex. Technique: a **breath-energy blow detector** (`detect.ts`: spectral **flatness** + **peakiness** + energy gate over ~120 HzвҖ“6 kHz, fast-attack/slow-release smoothing) fires only on loud-AND-noise-like-AND-non-tonal breath, so a yell or sung note is **rejected** вҖ” only true breath inflates; the active balloon's radius grows with sustained blow (rising stretched-neck squeak), and on release it enters a fly/tumble/deflate/recycle phase while a **whoopee raspberry** (detuned saw+square through a flutter-square-LFO'd moving lowpass + escaping-air noise, falling pitch) rips. **WGSL renderer**: one instanced quad per balloon, per-instance data (center/radius/hue/squash/spin/eye-look/blink/mouth) вҶ’ storage buffer each frame, the fragment shader draws the whole googly creature procedurally; a **Canvas2D fallback** draws the identical parade (auto-selected on no `navigator.gpu`, live backend badge). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): blow detector + inflation physics + raspberry synth + WGSL renderer + Canvas2D fallback. **mic-BLOW/breath INPUT** (non-fingertip вҖ” off jury-banned touch 4Г—; grep-distinct from yell/voice) В· **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6Г—; the spectacle lane the jury keeps begging to revive) В· **breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth TECH** (NOT a warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) В· **giggly-raspberry FUNNY VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9Г—; extends the lone 603 funny register so it isn't a singleton). Kid-safe: `masterGain (вүӨ0.55) вҶ’ lowpass 7.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (-18/6:1/12) вҶ’ out`, soft attacks, capped gains, pre-built nodes (<50 ms first blow), never-silent playful bed (NOT a warm drone), no fail states, вүҘ64px targets. Full graceful degrade: no mic вҶ’ big **рҹ’Ё hold-to-blow** button + **Space**; no WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle вҶ’ a **ghost-blow auto-demo** inflates + pops on a loop so the silent 06:30 glance still sees + hears it. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs that drive it [party-blower/whoopee-cushion foley; balloon inflateвҶ’release physics; Toca Boca]; **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” `95-kids-breath-bubbles` already did blow-via-loudness, so this is a *refinement* [flatness/peakiness blow-vs-voice gate], not a first-breath-input, said plainly; **#5 soft** вҖ” WebGPU-on-iPad is the enabling shift but ~9 mo old). Born from RESEARCH В§426; resurrects the В§424-banked seed `605` (research-grounded, cycle-424 soft-body-WebGPU dive). Love-aligned to Karel's playful kids cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`вқӨпёҸ/`169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ; additive). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`610-kids-stomp-band`** (device-motion shake/stomp вҶ’ three.js cartoon junk-pile foley; LOST: rides the relocated three.js monoculture + close to 566) + **`611-kids-face-monster`** (camera/MediaPipe face вҶ’ WebGL2 silly-monster mirror; the most novel вҖ” first comedic face-puppet вҖ” but the MediaPipe-CDN load is the riskiest 06:30 surface + camera was 3Г—) as IDEAS В§426. **No API route, no guard** (pure client mic + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вҖ” no network/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/609-kids-blow-parade` in `app-path-routes-manifest.json` + prerendered static `.html` 22.5 kB), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/mic in sandbox вҖ” blow-vs-voice thresholds + the raspberry timbre are reasoned/heuristic; the idle auto-demo + hold-to-blow fallback mean it puffs + pops on a glance with zero hardware). Design notes: `src/app/dream/609-kids-blow-parade/README.md`

## (Cycle 425 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, ONE concept on 3 decomposition techniques)

- **[/dream/606-piano-vivisection](/dream/606-piano-vivisection)** вҖ” Piano Vivisection рҹҺ№рҹ”¬. `demoable` В· Cycle 425. **For**: adult / his real music / clinical-dissective. **Take Karel's OWN recorded piano APART into the singing strings (harmonic) vs. the hammer/key noise (percussive) вҖ” and remix the two layers live.** The lab's **FIRST audio source-separation instrument** (grep-verified: NMF/HPSS/SMS/source-separation/stem-split all **0Г—** across 600+ prototypes) вҖ” and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #4**: "mine the vein that produced both 4/5s [557 splat, 583 musaicing] вҖ” a fresh analysis/resynthesis technique on *his own* material; do it again вҖ” neural source separation, NMF, DDSP." The jury named **583 as the gem to EXTEND** вҶ’ AGENT.md maps that to **DEEP**. Technique: **median-filter HPSS** (Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010) вҖ” his real solo piano is fetched, sliced (~9s mono @22kHz), STFT'd (Hann 1024/hop 256, complex bins kept), then a **time-median** filter (~17 frames/bin) isolates the sustained horizontal harmonic trails (strings) while a **freq-median** filter (~17 bins/frame) isolates the vertical transient strikes (hammers); soft power-2 Wiener masks вҶ’ phase-preserving ISTFT overlap-add вҶ’ two independently-mixable layers. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): STFT analysis + median-filter HPSS solver + phase-preserving mask resynthesis/ISTFT + WebGL2 vivisection render (harmonic = cyan/steel horizontal streaks, percussive = magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead, R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback) + off-glass keyboard/tilt control. **audio-file (his piano) + keyboard/tilt off-glass INPUT** (NOT a fingertip [jury-banned touch], NOT mic, NOT camera) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D [jury-banned 6Г—]) В· **median-filter HPSS source-separation TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [jury-banned], NOT onset/beat, NOT concatenative) В· **clinical/dissective "vivisection" VIBE** (REVEALS the machine inside his warm piano вҖ” the opposite of the cozy register the jury banned ~9Г—). Controls: keyboard `1`/`2` solo/mute strings/hammers, `вҶҗ/вҶ’` morph balance, `вҶ‘/вҶ“` gain, `space` play/pause; iOS-gated device-tilt morphs balance on mobile; secondary on-screen faders. ~2.5s idle auto-demo sweeps the balance so a silent 06:30 glance shows the field separating + (un-muted) hears the layers. Synthesized solo-piano fallback if the `/api/audio` fetch fails (emerald "Karel's piano" vs amber "fallback" badge) so it ALWAYS decomposes. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio + raw WebGL2). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first source separation in the lab [grep-verified 0Г—] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs [Fitzgerald DAFx 2010; the CataRT/musaicing lineage 583 extends]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the 2026 DNN source-separation papers [arXiv 2603.04032] are ~3 mo and the classical median-filter method is foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH В§425**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one "take his piano apart" concept on 3 techniques); banked **`607-piano-prism`** (NMF: factor his piano into 6 learned spectral components to solo/mute/re-mix вҖ” the most technically ambitious, the strongest cycle-2 deepening) + **`608-piano-sieve`** (SMS: sift tonal partials vs the stochastic residual, with freeze + stretch) as IDEAS В§425. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 101s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (461/461)`, `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean the field separates on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can morph his own piano apart at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md`

## (Cycle 420 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers off grep-verified *un-simulated physical instruments* in the 588-deep lab. Ships **`593-kids-sun-shadows`**: *a 4-year-old drags a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts SING вҖ” a sundial turned into a sequencer.* A few objects (tree/rock/crystal) throw long cast shadows that sweep the ground as you move the light (gnomon geometry `L = H/tan(altitude)`, swinging away from the sun); scattered glowing **chime stones** ring a warm note when a shadow's tip crosses them вҖ” so the music **emerges from where the shadows fall**, not from tapping a note. A slow sun-drag pulls every shadow across the ground in turn, ringing the spatially-ordered stones as a gentle assembling **arpeggio**; tap empty ground to plant another object = another moving playhead. The **lab's first shadow-as-playhead** (cast-shadow geometry as a musical sequencer вҖ” grep-verified 0Г— across 588 prototypes; sundial/gnomon/shadow-sequencer all NONE). Chime stones tuned to a **just-intonation** golden-hour set (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8 Lydian #4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2/1, 9/4`) over a low warm root вҖ” spatially ordered so you hear intervallic motion (a chord assembling), deliberately **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-ever-wrong" wash. The sky runs a **dawn rose/amber вҶ’ pale noon gold вҶ’ dusk violet** journey as the sun rises/sets, the ambient pad deepening at dusk; kids-safe master (`gain вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ out`), capped object count, soft attacks. The warmest + most surprising of the three explorers and the directest **kids-side** hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks: **#4 chase WARMTH, tension you FEEL not solve** (you drag light, nothing to decode) and the *spirit* of **#1 off the glass / spatial** (light is a movable spatial agent, not a finger-on-a-dot). **touch-drag-the-sun INPUT** (+ optional feature-detected DeviceOrientation tilt, pointer-drag guaranteed) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6Г—], NOT SVG [jury 5Г—], NOT the mic [jury 5Г—] вҖ” every ban dodged) В· **shadow-geometry-as-spatial-sequencer TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) В· **kids golden-hour contemplative-warm VIBE** (NOT a creature [jury froze the 549/569 spine], NOT the pentatonic-tap wash). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 shadow-as-playhead [grep-verified 0Г—] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [sun/gnomon model + per-object shadow-cast geometry + shadowвҶ”stone strike sequencer + JI chime synth + sky-color/time-of-day pad journey = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [the **sundial / gnomon** вҖ” a shadow as the measure of the sun's motion, here playing time instead of measuring it; **Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project*** (Tate Modern Turbine Hall, 2003) вҖ” the single room-filling artificial sun + golden-hour palette]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” foundational physical phenomenon newly simulated, no <14-day bind, soft RESEARCH В§420). Born from RESEARCH В§420 (in a 588-deep lab, grep for a real-world acoustic/physical phenomenon nobody has modeled yet вҶ’ three 0Г— gaps: Galton board, jal-tarang/glass-armonica friction resonator, sundial shadow-sequencer). **Resonates with Karel's loved contemplative-sky/water cluster** (`152-kids-star-paint`вқӨпёҸ, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вқӨпёҸ, `107-ocean-presence`вқӨпёҸ; additive). Degrades fully: no tilt вҶ’ drag only; no audio until the Tap-to-begin gate; idle ~2.5s вҶ’ the sun auto-drifts so the silent 06:30 glance sweeps shadows + sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D вҖ” no mic/camera/network/secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`592-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water" вҖ” **jal-tarang + glass-armonica**: tap to ring, **RUB to make it SING** via a friction-excited resonator [high-Q bandpass noise + shimmer partials, drive = drag speed]; the deepest fresh *audio primitive*; LOST: most technically novel but 593 is warmer at a glance вҖ” **strongest unshipped kids seed, ship next kids cycle**) + **`591-kids-plinko-bells`** ("Bell Drop" вҖ” a sonified **Galton/quincunx board (1894)**: balls cascade through pegs into 9 JI bins, the histogram blooms *as a warm major chord* "richest in the middle"; emergent/autonomous, love-aligned to 236/130/262; LOST: richest concept but cooler/STEM-first) banked IDEAS В§420. Build-verified (`npm run build` OK, `/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox вҖ” the shadowвҶ”stone feel, JI tuning by ear, and iOS audio-unlock follow proven patterns but are unexercised here). В· *(Cycle 419 shipped `588-tidal-organ`, adult WIDE вҖ” not separately re-blocked here; doc drift. Cycle 417 below.)*

- **[/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows](/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows)** вҖ” Move the Sun вҳҖпёҸрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 420. **For**: kids (4+). Drag a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts sing: each object throws a long cast shadow that sweeps the ground, and when a shadow's tip crosses a glowing chime stone it rings a warm note вҖ” a sundial turned into a sequencer. The lab's first shadow-as-playhead (grep-verified 0Г—). Touch-drag input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D (NOT three.js/SVG), just-intonation golden-hour chimes over a dawnвҶ’noonвҶ’dusk sky journey (NOT the pentatonic wash), no creature (the jury froze that spine). The warmest + most surprising of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire. Refs: the sundial/gnomon; Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project* (2003). No API route / no guard (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D).
