## (Cycle 417 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 technical approaches on one concept. Ships **`583-piano-mosaic-field`**: *reach INTO Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it вҖ” drag a luminous probe through a 2-D timbre field and the instrument answers with his own closest-matching grains, painting with his timbre in real time.* The lab's **first concatenative-musaicing / corpus-based resynthesis** вҖ” Karel's real Welcome-Home solo piano is decoded client-side and shattered into a corpus of ~120 ms Hann grains, each precomputed (per-grain FFT) with a **spectral centroid** (brightness вҶ’ field X), **RMS loudness**, and a **crude dominant pitch** (FFT peak + parabolic refine вҶ’ register, field Y). On a steady ~18 grains/sec tick a **CataRT-style matcher** scores the whole corpus by weighted distance to the cursor target in (brightness, pitch) space вҖ” plus a small loudness preference, a short repeat penalty (never machine-guns one grain), and a touch of jitter вҖ” launches the best grain, and overlaps ~4вҖ“8 through Hann envelopes so the stream glides and never clicks (warmth lowpass + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter). **This is target-driven grain SELECTION, not blind random granular scatter** вҖ” the cursor's position MEANS a timbre and his corpus answers with its nearest sound (the genuine distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ's blind scatter). Visual = one additive point per grain laid out in the timbre field, dim violet at rest вҶ’ blooming **warm ember** when voiced, a soft luminous probe + haze following the cursor; the field breathes while idle and a slow **Lissajous auto-demo** drives the cursor after 2.5 s idle so the silent 06:30 glance still sings. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks for the adult side: **extend the 4/5 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` model** ("a *fresh technique* in service of his own music") and **#4 chase WARMTH, not a puzzle** вҖ” you don't decode anything, you smear your hand through his own sound. **audio-file (Karel's piano) + pointer/touch-drag INPUT** (NOT camera [3Г— in the last 10: 568/576/582], NOT the mic [jury-banned 5Г—]) В· **WebGL2 additive particle-field OUTPUT** (WebGPU-detected, Canvas2D fallback вҖ” NOT three.js [jury 6Г—], NOT SVG [jury 5Г—]) В· **concatenative-musaicing / corpus grain-matching TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo extraction) В· **adult warm tactile-immersive VIBE** (NOT a cerebral tuning/time puzzle вҖ” the jury's named adult disease). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [piano fetch/decode + per-grain spectral-feature corpus build + CataRT matching/concatenation engine + WebGL2 particle render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Diemo Schwarz вҖ” CataRT real-time corpus-based concatenative synthesis (2006); Tralie & Berger вҖ” *The Concatenator* (arXiv:2411.04366, 2024) / MACataRT (arXiv:2502.00023, Feb 2026); Curtis Roads *Microsound*]; **soft #1** [first target-MATCHED concatenative resynthesis in the lab вҖ” distinct from blind granular scatter at 227; said honestly]; **#5 soft/NOT clean-claimed** вҖ” RESEARCH В§417 dive into the concatenative-musaicing wave, but the technique is foundational (Schwarz 2006), so a soft bind not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH В§417 (concatenative musaicing вҶ’ reach into his recording and re-voice it). **Pulled by Karel's loves**: the spectral/granular-piano cluster (`227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ, `243-spectral-cloud`вқӨпёҸ, `267-spectral-drift`вқӨпёҸ, `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ, `323-latent-condensation`вқӨпёҸ) + his "use my real Paths music" directive. Degrades fully: no WebGPU вҶ’ WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D; failed fetch вҶ’ a synthesized warm solo-piano fallback so it ALWAYS sounds and ALWAYS has a corpus (emerald **"Karel's piano"** vs amber **"synthesized fallback"** chip). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio вҖ” no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`584-piano-spectral-tide`** (a **phase-vocoder spectral FREEZE** of his piano вҖ” grab any moment and stretch it into an infinite warm harmonic tide you scrub through, additive top-48-bin resynthesis with a crispвҶ”veil depth axis, WebGL2 oceanic strata; Flanagan&Golden/Dolson + Radigue/Basinski; LOST: beautiful but overlaps his loved spectral cluster [243/267/321] вҖ” resurrect once that cluster is out of the 10-window) + **`585-piano-grain-orrery`** (his grains become **gravity-bound orbiting bodies** you stir with your hand, each voicing as it swings past the core/cursor/sounding-ring вҖ” n-body physicsвҶ’granular retrigger, WebGL2 feedback-trail orrery; Roads/Xenakis + Ventrella *Particle Life*; LOST: gorgeous but particle/n-body systems are heavy in the lab [`130`вқӨпёҸ/`236`вқӨпёҸ/`262`вқӨпёҸ] вҖ” resurrect for a physics-forward fire) banked IDEAS В§417. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вҖ” the real-audio fetch + GPU render paths follow the proven `557` patterns but are unexercised here). В· *(Cycle 416 shipped `582-kids-dance-sky`; below.)*

- **[/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field](/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field)** вҖ” Piano Mosaic Field рҹҺ№вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 417. **For**: adult / his real music / warm-tactile. Reach into Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it: his solo piano is shattered into a corpus of tiny grains laid out by timbre, and dragging a warm probe makes the instrument answer with his own closest-matching sound вҖ” concatenative musaicing in real time. Target-driven grain SELECTION (CataRT-style), not blind scatter вҖ” the distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`. Audio-file + touch-drag input (NOT camera, NOT the mic), WebGL2 additive particle field (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D + synth-piano fallbacks. The 557 model (a fresh technique in service of his own music) + the jury's "chase warmth not a puzzle." Refs: Diemo Schwarz CataRT; Tralie & Berger *The Concatenator*; Curtis Roads *Microsound*. No API route / no guard (public `/api/audio/[id]` fetch + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field/README.md`

## (Cycle 416 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`582-kids-dance-sky`**: *a 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir вҖ” they stand in front of the iPad and DANCE; raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens.* The lab's **first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument** (568 was hands only, 576 head only) and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s standing **#1** вҖ” "get off the glass; the lab still has zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds, and the mic is over-used 5Г—." The front camera tracks **33 body landmarks** (MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker**, loaded **at runtime from a CDN** via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ вҖҰ)` вҖ” byte-identical to the already-shipping `576-presence-room`, never added to `package.json`; the lighter `pose_landmarker_lite` model for fast load). Pose drives a warm choir + a **Canvas2D glowing skeleton with a blooming aura** (NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2): each **hand's height** вҶ’ a distinct warm voice (higher = brighter, left low / right bright); **body spread** (wrist distance) вҶ’ **chord openness** (narrow = close root+fifth; arms wide = an open shimmering add-6/9 voicing); **how high the arms are raised** вҶ’ master brightness (lowpass opens to 7.5 kHz) + aura glow; **feet / hip motion** вҶ’ a soft low bass swell. Harmony = a warm **just-intonation Lydian cluster** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 45/32, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 over a low A) atop a **constant root+fifth drone** вҖ” "no wrong notes" for kids but the expression lives in the *body pose*, **felt not solved**, explicitly **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic kids wash. Kids-safe master (`gain вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7600 вҶ’ compressor вҲ’10/20/6 вҶ’ out`); AudioContext born in the Start tap; all changes `setTargetAtTime`; a Chris-Wilson 25 ms look-ahead pump steadies the ramps; always-on soft drone so it is never silent. **whole-body camera/pose INPUT В· Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6Г—], NOT SVG [jury 5Г—], NOT WebGL2 [4Г— in the last 10], NOT the mic [jury 5Г—] вҖ” every ban dodged) В· **pose-keypoint вҶ’ harmony/brightness TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) В· **kids embodied-dance warm-modal VIBE** (NOT a creature, NOT a pentatonic-tap toy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [pose tracking + spreadвҶ’JI-chord-openness + arms-raisedвҶ’brightness + feetвҶ’bass + Canvas2D aura render = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974) вҖ” the original full-body responsive environment where your silhouette *is* the instrument; Daniel Rozin body-as-pixels lineage]; **soft #1** [first whole-figure motion instrument in the lab вҖ” hands/head don't count]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” PoseLandmarker is foundational/months-old, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH В§416 (whole-body video-keypoints вҶ’ real-time music + Krueger responsive-environment). **4-tier graceful degradation** keeps it alive on any device: pose works вҶ’ full skeleton; pose model fails вҶ’ Canvas2D frame-difference motion blob drives a simplified mapping; no camera вҶ’ finger-drag; no input ~3 s вҶ’ a synthetic dancing-skeleton **auto-demo** so the silent 06:30 glance still sings (cancels on real input, resumes after idle). Privacy: frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio вҖ” no network to our backend, no secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe is a runtime CDN load). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`581-kids-shadow-band`** (the same concept in **pure Canvas2D frame-differencing** вҖ” zero deps, no model download, bulletproof on any iPad; 6 zoned warm voices painted as glowing light-trails, the Krueger/Rozin "body as light"; LOST: a hair closer to the spatial-grid reflex than 582's semantic body mapping вҖ” resurrect as the no-download fallback if pose proves flaky on Karel's iPad) + **`583-kids-light-ribbons`** (**Canvas2D optical-flow** вҶ’ a *continuous* body-bowed warm choir, speed+upward motion gliding the voices via portamento, flowing light-ribbons advected along the flow; Ondes Martenot/Theremin lineage; the freshest *musical* idea of the three but conceptually adjacent to last week's `579-silk-choir` [another continuous-bent warm choir] вҖ” LOST on diversity THIS cycle only; resurrect once 579 is out of the 10-window) banked IDEAS В§416. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/582-kids-dance-sky` 5.84 kB / 112 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/pose/audio in sandbox вҖ” the one real risk is whether MediaPipe pose loads on Karel's actual iPad at 06:30). В· *(Cycle 415 shipped `580-tide-breath`; below.)*

- **[/dream/582-kids-dance-sky](/dream/582-kids-dance-sky)** вҖ” Sky Choir рҹ•әрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 416. **For**: kids (4+). A 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir вҖ” stand in front of the iPad and DANCE: raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens. The lab's first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (33 landmarks, runtime CDN load, no package.json change) вҶ’ a Canvas2D glowing skeleton + blooming aura; hand height вҶ’ warm voices, body spread вҶ’ chord openness, arms raised вҶ’ brightness, feet вҶ’ bass swell. Whole-body camera/pose input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D output (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2), warm just-intonation Lydian over a root+fifth drone (NOT the pentatonic wash). The directest answer to the jury's #1 "get off the glass / zero embodied-spatial." 4-tier fallback (pose вҶ’ frame-diff blob вҶ’ drag вҶ’ auto-demo). Refs: Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974); Daniel Rozin. No API route / no guard (pure client camera + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/582-kids-dance-sky/README.md`

## (Cycle 415 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all chasing the jury's WARMTH dare. Ships **`580-tide-breath`**: *the real ocean breathes a warm chord вҖ” a direct, keyless, client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone, over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13** on THREE axes at once: **#1** revive the starved WebGPU (1Г— across the last 15; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture) вҖ” 580 renders a WGSL fragment-shader water-surface with a Canvas2D hot-downgrade; **#2** real-world-data sonification (**0Г— the whole window**, named-starved every jury) вҖ” I curled the endpoint live (`marine-api.open-meteo.com/v1/marine`, no key, `access-control-allow-origin: *`, returned wave 1.28 m / swell 12.1 s); **#4** chase WARMTH, not a puzzle вҖ” no interaction after the play gesture, no melody, no beat, just a luminous sea and a chord the ocean is playing. On play: optional geolocation (3 s timeout вҶ’ silent Monterey-Bay default) вҶ’ keyless Open-Meteo Marine fetch (baked sample on offline/failure, shown amber **"Sample swell (feed offline)"** vs emerald **"Live В· Open-Meteo Marine В· {place}"**). Three live numbers drive the whole piece: **swell_wave_period** вҶ’ a sine breath LFO on master gain + lowpass (one inhale/exhale per swell cycle, ~6вҖ“18 s), **wave_height** вҶ’ breath depth, **sea_surface_temperature** вҶ’ timbre warmth. Sound = six detuned oscillator pairs tuned to a **D2 just-intonation chord** (1, 3/2, 2, 5/2, 3, 7/4) through a warm `gain вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ out`; **no note-tapping, no melody, no onset/beat вҖ” one continuous breathing chord.** Visual = a sum-of-sines water surface breathing in sync; WebGPU (WGSL: waterline + horizon glow + shimmer + temperature-tinted palette) with a Canvas2D hot-fallback, alive from frame one. **real-marine-data INPUT В· WebGPU OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вҖ” NOT three.js [jury 6Г—], NOT SVG [jury 5Г—], NOT the mic [jury 5Г—] вҖ” every ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) В· **tidal-data sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) В· **warm-oceanic-drone VIBE** (NOT a cerebral puzzle). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [marine fetch + marineвҶ’JI breath/harmony mapping + WebGPU/Canvas2D water render + breathing-drone synth = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Andrea Polli вҖ” ocean/climate-data sonification; Гүliane Radigue & La Monte Young вҖ” warm long-form just-intonation drone]; **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” real-data sonification broadly exists [`314-solar-wind` space-weather, `437-wiki-pulse`, `575-kids-sky-song` weather, `355` seismic], so a live-MARINE breathing-drone is a fresh source + breath structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” Open-Meteo Marine is infrastructure, not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH В§415 (NOAA space-weather is keyless+live BUT `314-solar-wind` already owns it вҶ’ grep saved a near-duplicate; the unmined warm real-data source is the OCEAN). **Resonates with Karel's loved ocean cluster** (`107-ocean-presence`вқӨпёҸ, `84-wave-fluid`вқӨпёҸ; additive). Degrades fully: no location вҶ’ Monterey Bay; no/failed network вҶ’ baked sample swell, always plays; no WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D; autonomous so the silent 06:30 glance always shows a breathing sea that sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (public read-only no-key client fetch вҖ” no secret; CSP allows `https:` connect-src). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`581-still-bloom`** (off the glass: device-motion *stillness* вҶ’ an audio-first warm Radigue/Oliveros drone that BLOOMS from silence only while you hold the phone still, motion scatters it; minimal Canvas2D bloom вҖ” the off-glass/audio-only/conceptual lane the jury keeps naming 0Г—; LOST: lowest ambition, no WebGPU, payoff needs a held-still device so a silent glance sees only the breathe-demo) + **`582-piano-aurora`** (a warm piano's *harmony* вҖ” 12-bin FFT chroma, NOT onset/beat вҖ” paints a WebGPU curl-noise aurora confined to a warm amberвҶ’roseвҶ’violet arc; built-in generative pad + drop-your-own file; Anadol/Akten/Bridson; LOST: a beautiful audio-reactive *visualizer* but the lab's flow-field/aurora lane is crowded [130вқӨпёҸ/262вқӨпёҸ/441] and it carries no real data вҖ” resurrect bound to Karel's actual `/api/audio/[id]` tracks) banked IDEAS В§415. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **451/451** pages, `/dream/580-tide-breath` 6.6 kB / 113 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio/geolocation/network in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 414 shipped `579-silk-choir`; below.)*

- **[/dream/580-tide-breath](/dream/580-tide-breath)** вҖ” Tide Breath рҹҢҠрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 415. **For**: adult / meditative / real-world-data. The real ocean breathes a warm chord: a keyless client-side fetch of your coast's LIVE marine conditions makes the actual swell the breath of a sustained just-intonation drone (swell period вҶ’ breath rate, wave height вҶ’ breath depth, sea-surface-temp вҶ’ timbre), over a WebGPU water-surface that rises and falls with the live tide. Real-marine-data input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG вҖ” revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback; autonomous, no puzzle. The directest answer to the jury's #1 (revive WebGPU) + #2 (real-world-data, 0Г— the window) + #4 (warmth). Refs: Andrea Polli; Гүliane Radigue; La Monte Young; Open-Meteo Marine. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/580-tide-breath/README.md`

## (Cycle 414 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`579-silk-choir`**: *grab a luminous sheet of silk and PULL it вҖ” the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall.* The pitch is **continuous and physical вҖ” you bend the chord with your hands, you never tap a discrete note** вҖ” the directest break from **JURY 2026-06-13**'s banned kids **pentatonic-tap-wash** (вүҲ6 of 7 kids pieces are "tap вҶ’ a discrete consonant note вҶ’ pretty viz"), on the **jury-starved WebGPU** renderer it explicitly wanted back (starved 1Г—; the lab fled into a three.js monoculture). The sheet is a 2-D grid of point masses (34Г—24) integrated with **verlet / position-based dynamics** (velocity implied by `position вҲ’ previousPosition`; relaxation passes satisfy structural + shear springs; top edge pinned so it hangs like a curtain). When `navigator.gpu` exists the whole solver runs in a **WebGPU compute shader (WGSL)** вҖ” integrate + relax passes over storage buffers, read back per frame вҖ” with a **runtime hot-downgrade** to a byte-equivalent CPU solver if WebGPU is absent/fails (so it looks + plays identically on an older iPad); both render the same glowing additive filaments (Canvas2D), violet at rest вҶ’ gold where pulled taut. Multi-touch grabs the nearest node; the sheet is split into six regions and each region's **mean stretch past rest length** (a 0..1 tension) continuously **bends one voice of a just-intonation major-add9 over A2** (ratios 1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 9/4) up to ~5 semitones via `setTargetAtTime` portamento, opening a per-voice lowpass as you pull вҖ” the chord physically warps under your hands and resolves home on release; **there is no note-tapping anywhere.** Kids-safe master (`gain вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ8 kHz вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ out`); AudioContext born in the first tap; the silk shimmers from frame one and a silent idle **auto-demo** sweeps a grab across it so the 06:30 phone glance sings with zero setup. **multi-touch-stretch INPUT В· WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2-at-edge, NOT the mic вҖ” every jury ban dodged + revives the starved renderer) В· **verlet-membrane tensionвҶ’continuous-pitch TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) В· **warm/silky/continuous-expressive-pitch VIBE** (NOT a pentatonic-tap toy, NOT a creature). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [verlet/PBD solver + multi-touch grab + tensionвҶ’continuous-bowed-chord synth + GPU/Canvas2D render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (GDC 2001) вҖ” the silk *is* a Jakobsen verlet cloth; Ondes Martenot / Theremin вҖ” the continuous-hand-bent-pitch lineage, the reason there are no discrete taps]; **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” verlet exists at `303-kids-wind-harp` as 1-D strings, so a 2-D grab-stretch *membrane* sounding continuous tensionвҶ’pitch is a fresh interaction + musical structure, not a fresh primitive; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” no <14-day bind, WebGPU-production-ready is a months-old 2026 trend, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH В§414 (WebGPU production-ready across all browsers in 2026 + verlet membrane вҶ’ a stretchable singing sheet). Degrades fully: no WebGPU вҶ’ CPU/Canvas2D; no touch вҶ’ mouse drag; failures in `text-rose-300`. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D вҖ” no network, no secrets). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`580-silk-veil`** (the same grab-stretch concept in pure **Canvas2D** вҖ” the bulletproof-iPad path; LOST: most reliable but Canvas2D-only so does NOT revive the jury-starved WebGPU; resurrect for a max-reliability fire) + **`581-silk-ripple`** (a different interaction вҖ” **flick/slap вҶ’ traveling waves** that bend the chord in ripples; WebGPU + Canvas2D; LOST: most fun for a 4yo + also revives WebGPU but a *variant* of the headline with a subtler bend; resurrect for a playful fire / fold in as 579's cycle-2 gesture) banked IDEAS В§414. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **450/450** pages, `/dream/579-silk-choir` 5.83 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/touch/audio in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 413 shipped `576-presence-room` вҖ” the lab's first head-tracked binaural, adult WIDE вҖ” not separately blocked in INDEX; doc drift. Cycle 412 below.)*

- **[/dream/579-silk-choir](/dream/579-silk-choir)** вҖ” Silk Choir рҹӘЎрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 414. **For**: kids (4+). Grab a luminous sheet of silk and pull it вҖ” the membrane's tension bends a warm choir/bowed-string chord, so pulling it taut makes the voices rise and brighten and letting it billow lets them sigh and fall; the pitch is continuous and physical, you bend the chord with your hands and never tap a note. A 2-D verlet / position-based-dynamics membrane on a **WebGPU compute shader** (with a runtime hot-downgrade to a CPU/Canvas2D solver), six regions each bending one voice of a JI major-add9 by stretch via `setTargetAtTime` portamento. Multi-touch stretch input (NOT the mic), WebGPU (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2 вҖ” revives the jury-starved renderer), Canvas2D fallback. The directest break from the banned kids pentatonic-tap-wash. Refs: Thomas Jakobsen *Advanced Character Physics* (2001); Ondes Martenot / Theremin. No API route / no guard (pure client). Design notes: `src/app/dream/579-silk-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 412 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`575-kids-sky-song`**: *today's REAL current weather writes a child a little song вҖ” and the child plays it.* The piece does a direct client-side fetch of the child's **live local weather** (Open-Meteo вҖ” free, no-key, no-auth, CORS; geolocation with a silent default-coordinate fallback, a baked "example sky" if offline) and lets the **real weather COMPOSE an evolving generative piece**: WMO `weather_code`+`is_day` pick the key/mode/instruments (clearвҶ’bright major celesta В· overcastвҶ’suspended pads В· rainвҶ’minor-pentatonic plucks В· snowвҶ’glassy maj7 bells В· fogвҶ’low drone В· thunderвҶ’hushed dorian В· nightвҶ’dropped an octave), `wind_speed`вҶ’tempo, `cloud_cover`вҶ’note density, `temperature`вҶ’timbral warmth, `precipitation`вҶ’an overlaid droplet voice. A Chris-Wilson **look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, notes scheduled ~120 ms ahead) plays an 8-step ostinato that **mutates + re-seeds over time** (Eno-style recombination) so it's a moving piece, not a loop; the child **touches a raw-WebGL2 aurora field** to add their own glowing voice, always snapped to today's key (no wrong note, no fail state). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13 #2** (real-world-data sonification вҖ” **0Г— the whole window**) + **#4** (chase warmth, not a puzzle), and a grep-verified **kids-first real-data sonification** (the lab's prior weather toys `115`/`120`/`83` are all *synthetic*/"Zero API"; the only real-data pieces `355`/`337` are adult, out of frame). **live-weather-data + touch INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 aurora OUTPUT** (Canvas2D fallback вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT the mic вҖ” every jury ban dodged) В· **real-data generative-sonification TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo *extraction* вҖ” this *generates*) В· **warm/dreamy/wonder VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified kids-first real-external-data sonification + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [live Open-Meteo fetch + weatherвҶ’generative-song engine + look-ahead Web Audio scheduler + WebGL2 aurora render = 4] + #3 named refs [Andrea Polli climate-data sonification; Natalie Miebach woven weather-scores; Brian Eno generative recombination]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the sonification lineage is foundational, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Degrades fully: WebGL2 absent вҶ’ Canvas2D field that still drifts + sings; geolocation denied вҶ’ silent default city; fetch failed вҶ’ baked example sky + `text-rose-300` note, always plays. **No API route, no `guard`** (Open-Meteo is a public read-only no-key client fetch вҖ” CSP-verified the enforced `connect-src вҖҰ https:` allows it; no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`573-kids-sky-window`** (raw-WebGL2 luminous GLSL sky вҖ” fbm clouds/sun/rain/lightning; the richest atmosphere renderer вҖ” LOST: 575's generative engine is the bigger concept leap; resurrect for an atmosphere-forward fire) + **`574-kids-weather-today`** (Canvas2D cut-paper diorama with a smiling sun + paper critter вҖ” the warmest, most 4yo-legible, most iPad-safe вҖ” LOST: closest in *form* to the lab's existing synthetic weather toys) banked IDEAS В§412. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, **448/448** pages, `/dream/575-kids-sky-song` 8.21 kB / 114 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no WebGL2/audio/geolocation in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 411 shipped `570-spoken-spell`; below.)*

- **[/dream/575-kids-sky-song](/dream/575-kids-sky-song)** вҖ” Sky Song рҹҢҰпёҸрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 412. **For**: kids (4+). Today's REAL local weather writes a little song and the child plays it: the live Open-Meteo conditions compose an evolving generative piece (key/mode/tempo/density/timbre all from the real sky), a look-ahead scheduler plays an ostinato that mutates + re-seeds over time (Eno-style), and the child touches a WebGL2 aurora field to add their own voice in today's key вҖ” no wrong note, no fail state. Live-weather + touch input (NOT the mic), WebGL2 aurora (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D fallback. The lab's first kids real-data sonification (prior weather toys are synthetic). Refs: Andrea Polli, Natalie Miebach, Brian Eno. No API route / no guard (public no-key client fetch). Design notes: `src/app/dream/575-kids-sky-song/README.md`

## Cycle 411 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers. Ships **`570-spoken-spell`**: *speak, and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation вҖ” Resonance hears your speech (real Web Speech API recognition), maps each word's letters to a D-pentatonic pitch, vowel-ratio to duration, and freezes finished phrases into looping ostinati, so the longer you speak the denser the canon and you can hear your own sentence inside it.* The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-12 #2** ("find sound in **language**, not a simulated physical field") and its #5-revival ask: born from this cycle's dive into the **2026 in-browser ASR wave** (transformers.js running Whisper/LiteASR/Cohere Transcribe fully client-side via ONNX/WASM вҖ” RESEARCH В§411). **live-speech-recognition INPUT** (voice вҖ” NOT the jury's 7Г— finger-on-glass default) **+ SVG word-river OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [rolling-10 4Г— вҶ’ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) В· **continuous-transcriptionвҶ’linguistic-musicвҶ’accretive-loop TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвҶ’drone вҖ” the banned meta-technique) В· **ritual/incantatory/cerebral VIBE**. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 qualified lab-first [first piece where *continuous* speech transcription drives the composition itself вҖ” distinct from `189-voice-scene`'s keyword-switch and `345-speech-melody`'s *typed* text] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [Web Speech ASR + deterministic phonemeвҶ’pitch engine + sample-accurate look-ahead scheduler + accretive loop-voice memory + SVG render = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Steve Reich *Different Trains*/*It's Gonna Rain* вҖ” speech-melody; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* вҖ” languageвҶ’resonance]; **#5 soft/honest** вҖ” the ASR-wave bind is ~3 months, not <14 days, so not claimed as a clean 5). Degrades fully: no Web Speech API (iOS/Firefox) вҶ’ typed-text fallback runs the same mapping; an auto-demo "speaks" a seeded incantation from frame one so the silent 06:30 glance always shows + hears the accreting canon. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG + Web Speech API вҖ” mic is analysis-only, no recording/upload/network, no secrets; imports the existing read-only `@/lib/browser/speech-recognition` util). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`571-the-withholding`** (music you can only hear by staying silent вҖ” mic as an *inverse* gate, a conceptual/critical piece on attention-as-cost; Cage *4'33"*/Christine Sun Kim вҖ” LOST: strongest pure concept but a quiet-room/"imagine the silence" demo is less glance-legible; resurrect to open the missing conceptual lane) + **`572-orrery-tunings`** (turn/tilt your phone to tune into a just-intonation harmonic sky вҖ” gyro вҶ’ raw WebGL2 aurora; La Monte Young *Dream House*/Oliveros вҖ” LOST: lowest ambition 2/5, adjacent to existing soundfield/tilt/JI rooms + flagged FBM frame-drops on iPad) banked IDEAS В§411. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 447/447 pages, `/dream/570-spoken-spell` 5.68 kB / 109 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no mic/audio in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 410 shipped `569-kids-ember-keeper`; below.)*

- **[/dream/570-spoken-spell](/dream/570-spoken-spell)** вҖ” Spoken Spell рҹ—ЈпёҸвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 411. **For**: adult / live-performance / language-as-music. Speak and your live words become a self-layering musical incantation вҖ” each word's letters map to a D-pentatonic pitch, finished phrases freeze into looping ostinati, so the canon thickens the longer you speak and you hear your own sentence inside it. Web Speech API (live ASR) вҶ’ deterministic phonemeвҶ’pitch + look-ahead scheduler вҶ’ SVG word-river that glows each word as it sounds. Voice input (NOT a finger), SVG (NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Typed-text fallback + seeded auto-demo for iOS/Firefox/silent glances. Refs: Steve Reich *Different Trains*; Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room*; the 2026 in-browser ASR wave. Design notes: `src/app/dream/570-spoken-spell/README.md`

## (Cycle 410 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`569-kids-ember-keeper`**: *a glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day a child comes back вҖ” and never resets to zero.* The lab's **FIRST cross-session persistent state** in 569 prototypes (grep-verified: no prior dream piece writes a creature/world to `localStorage` and reloads it across visits/days) вҖ” the directest answer to the **JURY 2026-06-12 #6**: *"518-living-ember is the one kids piece with memory that rewards return across days вҖ” extend THAT: a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow, instead of another 90-second glow toy."* The body is not stored as pixels or a model file вҖ” it is **regrown from a saved "genome"** (`genome.ts`, `localStorage` key `resonance.ember-keeper.v1`) every load. The genome **only ever accumulates**: `visits`, `distinctDays`, learned pentatonic `palette`, and an append-only list of growth `tokens`. **Day-aware growth** (the big visible change): on load it compares stored `lastVisitDay` to `new Date().toDateString()`; a new calendar day adds a big glowing **limb** placed on a golden-angle (phyllotaxis) spiral вҖ” so today's creature is visibly bigger than yesterday's. Within a day, humming/petting adds small permanent **fronds** + brightens the ember. **Deterministic regrowth**: each token seeds a `mulberry32` PRNG so the same genome always regrows the same body (limbs never jump between loads вҖ” D'Arcy Thompson made literal). **Voice feeding**: mic вҶ’ autocorrelation pitch detection (Chris Wilson method, `pitch.ts`) вҶ’ quantized to C-major pentatonic (nothing ever wrong) вҶ’ the degree is echoed back softly + saved to the palette; the **mic is analysis-only** (dead-end `AnalyserNode`, never recorded/stored/transmitted вҖ” only the derived integer degree persists). **three.js** render; kids-safe `gain вҶ’ lowpass(8 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10, 20:1) вҶ’ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext in the Wake gesture (iOS unlock). **For the 06:30 hands-free review** (the reviewer can't wait a real day): a fresh device with empty storage SEEDS a believable history вҖ” **5 visits across 4 days, a 5-note palette, 10 growth tokens (4 day-limbs + 6 fronds)** вҖ” so the glance always shows a rich, many-limbed creature breathing from frame one and singing on wake; and a clearly-secondary **рҹҢҷ next-day** button TIME-TRAVELS so Karel can watch a brand-new limb sparkle into place on demand, in seconds. **mic-voice + tap INPUT** (off-glass core вҖ” NOT the jury-flagged finger-on-glass default) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [3Г— in the rolling-10, nudging the ban], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) В· **cross-session-persistent procedural-morphology TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвҶ’drone вҖ” the banned meta-technique) В· **companion/relationship/growth VIBE** (NOT a calm-sensory 90-second glow toy вҖ” it rewards *returning*, the jury's exact #6 ask). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first-ever cross-session persistent state [grep-verified lab-first] + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch + accumulating-genome persistence engine + deterministic phyllotaxis morphology + three.js render + Web Audio = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Tamagotchi (Maita/Bandai 1996) вҖ” lives in the device & rewards returning; Steve Grand's *Creatures* (1996) вҖ” accumulating internal state drives outward form; D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form* (1917) вҖ” golden-angle limb placement taken directly] + #4 multi-cycle Ember spine cycle 1; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” no <14-day bind, cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly; the dive confirmed the live thread [Niantic Peridot generative-AI creatures, the rctAI "AI pets" wave]). Graceful degradation on both axes: mic-denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-to-pet still grows; WebGL-fail вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a DOM/CSS orb with one petal per token. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic + Web Audio + three.js вҖ” no network, no secrets). No new npm deps (three already installed). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вҖ” *a creature genuinely different each day you return* вҖ” via what evolves); siblings **`570-kids-ember-song`** (the song-memory take: hummed phrases append to a persistent library, woven into a longer/richer piece each return вҖ” WebGL2 luminous strands; LOST: payoff is audible/abstract, least glance-legible at a silent review вҖ” the biggest *concept*, resurrect for a music-forward fire) + **`571-kids-ember-nest`** (the accumulating-world take: each visit plants a persistent SVG cut-paper flower/star/friend вҶ’ a fuller world + denser additive chord; LOST: closest to the existing `116-kids-bloom-garden` self-seeding garden + another SVG nudges the 4Г— ban) banked IDEAS В§410. Extends Karel's loved companion/embodied lane (`234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ, `217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ). Build-verified (`npm run build`), not browser-verified (no audio/WebGL in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 409 shipped `568-conductor-hands`; below.)*

- **[/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper](/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper)** вҖ” Ember Keeper рҹ”ҘрҹҗЈ. `demoable` В· Cycle 410. **For**: kids (4+) / companion / cross-day memory. A glowing creature that lives in the device, remembers every visit, and grows a genuinely bigger, differently-shaped body each day you come back вҖ” and never resets. The lab's first cross-session persistent state: the body is regrown from a saved `localStorage` genome that only accumulates; a new calendar day adds a phyllotaxis limb, humming/petting adds fronds. Hum to feed it (analysis-only mic вҶ’ pentatonic), tap to pet, рҹҢҷ time-travel to watch it grow. three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU); off-glass voice input. The jury's #6 ("a creature genuinely changed tomorrow") answered literally. Refs: Tamagotchi (1996) / Steve Grand *Creatures* / D'Arcy Thompson *On Growth and Form*. Design notes: `src/app/dream/569-kids-ember-keeper/README.md`

## (Cycle 409 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`568-conductor-hands`**: *raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi вҖ” your **left hand beats one voice, right hand the other**; the system snaps the two tempi to the nearest irrational ratio (вҲҡ2, ПҶ, e/2, ПҖ/2) so the two consonant voices drift through every phase relationship and can **NEVER share a downbeat** вҖ” metric dissonance you feel in your own arms.* **Cycle 2 of the polytempo spine** (`514-polytempo-loom` = cycle 1, the autonomous 5-voice loom the **JURY 2026-06-12 #1 named: "take it to cycle 2 AND chase a 4/5"**, and #4: *"514 had no embodiment вҖ” build the SECOND time-tension piece where gestures set incommensurable tempi"*). Where 514 was set *for* you, 568 you *conduct*: **MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction** (`tracking.ts`) tracks each wrist's vertical motion, fires a downbeat at the bottom of each conducting stroke (velocity zero-crossing downвҶ’up, 150 ms debounce), and averages the last 3 inter-beat intervals вҶ’ that hand's tempo (clamped 37вҖ“300 BPM). The **incommensurability lock** (`snapToIrrational`): voice A = your gestured base period; voice B is forced to `periodA / ratio` where ratio is the irrational *nearest in log-space* to what you actually gestured вҖ” you choose roughly the spread, the math guarantees the pulses are non-periodic against each other. **Web Audio** (`audio.ts`): two warm pluck voices (triangle + octave sine, fast envelope) playing the same D-pentatonic cell (voice B up a perfect fifth вҖ” consonant, distinguishable), each on its OWN sample-accurate **"Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms pump, `start(t)` 120 ms ahead); master `gain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10 dB, 20:1) вҶ’ destination` limiter; AudioContext in the Start click (iOS unlock). **three.js** (`render.ts`): a Nancarrow **phase-space** вҖ” two emissive markers orbit their rings (one revolution per beat-period) tracing a **Lissajous ribbon that NEVER closes** because the ratio is irrational (the visible proof they never realign); each marker flashes on its scheduled beat; violet=voice A, amber=voice B, dark indigo field. **camera hand-tracking INPUT** (off-glass вҖ” the directest dodge of the jury's 7Г— finger-on-glass ban, and the freshest input vs the last 4 cycles: mic @406, audio-file @405/407, shake @408, tilt @404) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4Г— вҶ’ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) В· **conducting-gestureвҶ’tempoвҶ’polytempo-scheduler TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвҶ’drone вҖ” the banned meta-technique) В· **embodied/cerebral-rhythmic/Nancarrow VIBE** (the directest literal answer to jury #4 "two gestures set incommensurable tempi"). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [MediaPipe beat-extraction + irrational-lock + dual look-ahead schedulers + three.js phase-space = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Conlon Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* вҖ” the irrational-ratio canon IS the lock; Ligeti *Continuum/DГ©sordre*; Reich phase pieces вҖ” but the irrational lock means resolution is mathematically impossible, "Reich phasing that can never close"] + #4 spine cycle 2 вҖ” the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** вҖ” MediaPipe Hands exists [234/258/287/302/419/524] but *gestureвҶ’tempo* is a new cross-modal input, discounted honestly; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” no <14-day finding to bind, cs.SD still server-ML [the jury's own #5 call-out], said plainly). From frame one a silent auto-demo orbits two synthetic conductors at ПҶ, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the drift; camera-denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + two tap pads (fully playable). Camera/landmark data is **local only** (no recording, no upload, no network); **no API route, no `guard`**. No new npm deps (three already installed; MediaPipe via CDN dynamic import). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`569-conductor-batons`** (two-thumb tap-tempo вҶ’ WebGL2 scrolling Nancarrow piano-roll, the cleanest + most legible вҖ” LOST on finger-on-glass + least embodied) + **`570-conductor-baton-motion`** (DeviceMotion baton вҶ’ three.js вҖ” LOST: device-motion repeats cycle 408's input) banked IDEAS В§409. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 445/445 pages, `/dream/568-conductor-hands` 5.5 kB / 297 kB First Load [three.js + MediaPipe] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/audio/GPU in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 408 shipped `566-kids-shake-band`; below.)*

- **[/dream/568-conductor-hands](/dream/568-conductor-hands)** вҖ” Conductor's Hands рҹ«ұрҹҺј. `demoable` В· Cycle 409. **For**: adult / embodied / time-tension. Raise both hands to the camera and conduct two incommensurable tempi вҖ” left hand one voice, right hand another, each snapped to an irrational ratio so the two consonant pulses drift forever and never share a downbeat (metric dissonance in your own arms). Cycle 2 of the 514-polytempo-loom spine, made embodied. MediaPipe-Hands beat-extraction вҶ’ dual look-ahead schedulers вҶ’ three.js never-closing Lissajous. Off-glass camera input (NOT a finger), three.js (NOT the banned SVG/Canvas2D/WebGPU). Refs: Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* / Ligeti / Reich. ## (Cycle 408 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal off-glass explorers. Ships **`566-kids-shake-band`**: *shake the tablet like a maraca and a whole Brazilian **batucada** band dances and plays back in time вҖ” gentle jiggles ring the chocalho shimmer, big arm-swings bring in the surdo bass drum; five glowing 3D characters bounce + flash on a darkened stage, one per instrument.* The child's **whole arm is the instrument** вҖ” off-glass, embodied, joyful. **DeviceMotion shake-onset detection** (`accelerationIncludingGravity` magnitude вҶ’ adaptive threshold 1.4Г— rolling-avg, 3.5 m/sВІ floor, 80 ms refractory; iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) with intensity tiers (вүҲ3/9/18 m/sВІ) selecting which of **five from-scratch synth percussion voices** fires (surdo sine 130вҶ’42 Hz pitch-drop В· caixa bandpass-noise+triangle snap В· repique sine+transient В· agogГҙ three sine partials В· chocalho soft noise grain). A look-ahead **92-BPM groove bed** plays a real 16-step batucada pattern always-on so the child's shakes layer on a musical bed. **three.js stage** вҖ” five emissive `IcosahedronGeometry` characters with per-character `PointLight` flash + spring-physics bounce. Master `gain вҶ’ lowpass(7.5 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10 dB, 20:1) вҶ’ destination` brick-wall limiter so even a hard slam can't spike a child's ears. Zero-permission CSS auto-demo bounces the orbs from frame one (audio waits for Start); motion-denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer-drag-velocity fallback. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [DeviceMotion onset + percussion pool + groove scheduler + three.js stage + drag fallback = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Brazilian batucada bloco вҖ” shake-intensity tiers ARE the ensemble's dynamic hierarchy; also Evelyn Glennie's whole-body rhythm]; **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” accelerometer input [417/553] and synth percussion both exist; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the dive's bind was to the jury-flagged camera-body lane, deliberately avoided). **device-motion / shake INPUT** (off-glass вҖ” distinct from BOTH recent kids inputs: mic @406, tilt @404; the directest finger-reflex dodge) **+ three.js OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [rolling-10 4Г— вҶ’ BANNED], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-banned]) В· **accelerometer-onsetвҶ’percussion-pool TECH** (NOT a GPU-physicsвҶ’drone вҖ” the banned meta-technique) В· **energetic/celebratory/embodied VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вҖ” answers jury #6 directly). **Ideal for Karel's 06:30 mobile review вҖ” he can literally shake his phone to play.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`565-kids-sing-choir`** (mic-sing live pitch вҶ’ WebGL2 particle creatures вҶ’ Jacob Collier-style 4-voice live vocal harmonizer; the biggest *concept* вҖ” LOST on the diversity gate: mic repeats cycle 406's input) + **`567-kids-color-garden`** (rear-camera dominant-color вҶ’ WebGL2 instanced glowing plants вҶ’ Scriabin hueвҶ’pitch garden the real world grows; LOST: camera-color adjacent to `368-rainbow-quest` + the trodden camera lane + lighting-fragile) banked IDEAS В§408. Extends Karel's loved rhythm/device-play lane (`98-kids-drum-circle`вқӨпёҸ, `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ, `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ). Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 444/444 pages, `/dream/566-kids-shake-band` 5.07 kB / 293 kB First Load [three.js] prerendered static), not browser-verified (no accelerometer/audio/WebGL in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 407 shipped `564-piano-splat-cathedral`; below: cycle 405's `557-piano-splat-galaxy`.)*

- **[/dream/566-kids-shake-band](/dream/566-kids-shake-band)** вҖ” Kids Shake Band рҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 408. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass / embodied rhythm. Shake the tablet like a maraca вҶ’ a Brazilian batucada band of five glowing 3D characters dances and plays percussion in time; gentle jiggle = chocalho shimmer, hard swing = surdo bass drum. DeviceMotion shake-onset вҶ’ synth percussion pool + 92-BPM batucada groove bed; three.js stage; brick-wall limiter (safe sounds). ## (Cycle 405 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`557-piano-splat-galaxy`**: *every note Karel plays BIRTHS a bloom of glowing **Gaussian splats** вҖ” his real Welcome Home piano accretes into a living galaxy of light you orbit, where transients are bursts, sustained notes are slow drifting nebula, and pitch paints the color.* The lab's **FIRST Gaussian-splatting renderer** in 553 prototypes (grep-verified: the only prior "splat" is fluid-force injection in `119-poem-fluid`, a categorically different thing). Spectral-flux **onset detection** on his real piano (fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ`, with an always-on synth-piano fallback) fires bursts of 80вҖ“300 camera-facing billboard quads with a radial Gaussian falloff `exp(-4В·rВІ)`, additively blended (depth test off вҶ’ order-independent, no sort вҶ’ robust + glowing), spawned on a growing ring with outward shell velocities + curl-noise turbulence + galactic shear, so a ~13k-splat pool swirls into arms tracing the phrasing. **THE FIRST HONEST 4/5 IN ~8 JURIES** вҖ” `ambition: #1 never-used technique (Gaussian-splat / point-based radiance-field rasterization) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (real-audio fetch+FFT+onset/pitch detection / generative bloom particle system / WebGL2 additive splat rasterizer + orbit cam) + #3 named refs (Kerbl/Kopanas/LeimkГјhler/Drettakis "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering," SIGGRAPH 2023; the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol volumetric data sculptures) + #5 binds a genuinely <14-day finding (BrightCoding "Run Gaussian Splatting in Your Browser with WebGPU," 2026-06-05, 7 days old; corroborated by arxiv cs.GR June 8вҖ“12 point-based-radiance-field papers + the DNEГ—Gracia 4DGS Amy May musical performance)`. Directly serves Karel's directive to use his **real Welcome Home recordings**. **audio-file INPUT** (off-glass вҖ” dodges the jury's 7Г— finger-on-glass ban) **+ WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU вҖ” both banned at 4Г—; a wholly new rendering paradigm for the lab) В· **Gaussian-splat radiance-field TECH** (the sound is his RECORDED music driving a renderer вҖ” the exact inverse of the banned GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone move) В· **volumetric/immersive/Anadol VIBE**. Auto-rotates + auto-blooms hands-free pre-Begin, so the 06:30 glance shows a living galaxy with zero setup. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`556-piano-splat-spectrogram`** (3D scrolling spectrogram solid вҖ” the legible/analytical variant) + **`558-piano-splat-body`** (a breathing "body of light," tightest bind to the 4DGS Amy May piece вҖ” lost as conceptually adjacent to `283-piano-isosurface`) banked IDEAS В§405 as the alternate renderers for the new splat spine. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 441/441 pages, `/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy` 5.96 kB / 112 kB prerendered), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio in sandbox). В· *(Cycle 404 shipped `553-kids-tilt-fountain`; below: cycle 403's `552-dream-house`.)*

- **[/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy](/dream/557-piano-splat-galaxy)** вҖ” Piano Splat Galaxy рҹҢҢ. `demoable` В· Cycle 405. **For**: adult / immersive / his-real-piano. **The lab's first Gaussian-splatting renderer** вҖ” Karel's real piano accretes into a swirling galaxy of glowing Gaussian splats you orbit; onsets bloom, pitch colors, phrasing draws the arms. References: Kerbl et al. "3D Gaussian Splatting" (SIGGRAPH 2023); the 2026 in-browser-splatting wave; Refik Anadol. The first honest 4/5 in ~8 juries (#1+#2+#3+#5). ## (Cycle 403 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`552-dream-house`**: *the xenharmonic lattice comes ALIVE вҖ” a self-composing La Monte Young "Dream House" that slowly walks the just-intonation / BohlenвҖ“Pierce Tonnetz on its own, sustains a pure-ratio drone, drifts forever via the comma pump so it never returns home, and is audibly a different piece at minute 12 than minute 1.* **Cycle 2 of the Xenharmonic Drone spine** (`538-xenharmonic-lattice` = cycle 1, the static tap-a-Tonnetz piece the **JURY 2026-06-12 named: "make it a spine and it's the first 4"**). Where 538 was something you *tap*, 552 is a room you *leave running*: an autonomous walker steps the lattice every 4вҖ“8 s biased to unvisited nodes (the **syntonic comma 81/80** guarantees loops never reclose вҶ’ permanent drift), sustaining the nearest 2вҖ“6 nodes as a slow-crossfading **pure-ratio drone** (sine + odd partials + shimmer LFO, multi-second `setTargetAtTime` attacks). The headline is a genuine **long-form (~14-min) arc**: an 8-phase cycle smoothstep-interpolates **density** (2вҶ”6 voices), a **drifting master lowpass** (700вҶ”4800 Hz), a **Вұ0.4-octave register breath**, and a **4-stop tuning migration** (5-JIвҶ’BohlenвҖ“PierceвҶ’19-EDOвҶ’back). **SVG Tonnetz** with a glowing comet-trail + accumulating visited-ghost dots makes the pilgrimage visible; HUD shows elapsed/phase. **none/autonomous INPUT** (the purest dodge of the jury's 7Г— finger-on-glass ban, and its #3 "leave-it-running / off-the-glass" dare) **+ SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вҖ” both banned at 4Г—; NOT three.js which 545 just shipped) В· **JI-lattice-walkвҶ’pure-ratio-drone TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics sim вҖ” the banned meta-technique) В· **La-Monte-Young / hypnotic-cerebral VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids). Zero permission, runs itself вҖ” the strongest 06:30 glance-safety of any recent piece; tap = optional "exhale." **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [walker + crossfading drone synth + long-form arc engine + SVG render = 4] + #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Zazeela *Dream House* / Гүliane Radigue / Euler Tonnetz / BohlenвҖ“Pierce / Partch / syntonic comma] + #4 spine cycle 2 вҖ” the jury's exact ask; **#1 contestable** [first deliberate long-form >5min stateful piece, but 514/526 arguably already long-form вҖ” discounts honestly]; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” arxiv cs.SD June 5вҖ“12 had zero JI/microtonal papers, still server-ML; LIMITER arXiv 2507.08675 is July-2025, used as a *named ref* not a <14-day bind). Winner of a DEEP 3-steering fire; siblings **`550-xenharmonic-pilgrimage`** (voice-steered: autocorrelation pitch вҶ’ nearest-node pull вҖ” lost: detector flagged basic + less glance-robust) + **`551-tilt-pilgrimage`** (tilt-steered: iOS deviceorientation вҶ’ fifths/thirds drift bias + desktop tilt-pad вҖ” lost: needs permission + a real device) banked IDEAS В§403 as the cycle-3 grab-the-wheel layers. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 439/439 pages, `.next/.../552-dream-house/page.js` prerendered), not browser-verified (no audio device in sandbox). В· *(Cycles 402 & 401 shipped `549-kids-song-friend` and `545-motion-loom` вҖ” see entries below.)* В· Earlier header (Cycle 400 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept. Ships **`541-kids-liquid-light`**: *a 4-year-old finger-paints a dark pool of living liquid light, and the liquid SINGS as it swirls.* A **WebGPU stable-fluids** (Jos Stam, SIGGRAPH 1999) solver built as a **kids sensory instrument** вҖ” drag injects swirling dye into a real GPU fluid sim (192ВІ `rgba16float` grid, 28-iter Jacobi pressure solve, divergence-free projection), and swirl-speedвҶ’lowpass brightness + vertical-positionвҶ’**C-pentatonic** register (C3вҖ“C5) make it sing, nothing ever wrong. **touch/drag INPUT + WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0Г— in the kids rolling-10 вҶ’ the diversifying renderer; a Canvas2D curl-noise "lite fluid" fallback is baked in for WebGPU-absent iPads) В· **luminous / sensory / calm VIBE** вҖ” distinct from the recent joyful-awe (537) / prosocial (505) / aurora (500) / feeling-map (493) kids cluster. Extends Karel's loved fluid/particle/glow lane (`84-wave-fluid`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ). Always-on C2+G2 pad; kids-safe `gain вҶ’ lowpass(вүӨ8k) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’6 dB, 20:1) вҶ’ destination`; ghost-finger auto-demo swirls + sings from frame one. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems + #3 Stam 1999 / Dobryakov WebGL-Fluid lineage + #4 "Liquid Light" spine cycle 1; #1 NOT claimed вҖ” GPU fluid exists; #5 NOT claimed вҖ” cs.SD is server-ML). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; siblings **`542-kids-liquid-light-gl`** (WebGL2 ping-pong stable-fluids w/ vorticity confinement вҖ” lost: WebGL2 over-represented) + **`543-kids-liquid-light-flow`** (Canvas2D ~6500-particle advection вҖ” lost: redundant with the winner's own fallback) banked IDEAS В§400. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, 436/436 pages, `/dream/541-kids-liquid-light` 7.13 kB / 110 kB), not browser-verified (no WebGPU/audio in sandbox). В· *(Cycles 399 & 398 shipped `538-xenharmonic-lattice` and `537-kids-sky-murmuration` вҖ” see entries below.)* В· Earlier header (Cycle 397 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers. Ships **`532-vocoder-veil`**: *you sing or speak, and your words come out played by Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano вҖ” your voice as the shape, his recorded piano as the voice.* The lab's **FIRST channel vocoder** (grep-verified: `vocoder` 0Г— in built prototypes), a classic 16-band Homer-Dudley analysis/synthesis filterbank вҖ” the live mic (modulator) drives the per-band gains of Karel's actual piano recording (carrier, fetched read-only from `/api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ`), so the piano "talks" in your formants. **Directly serves Karel's standing directive to use his real Welcome Home recordings.** **mic-voice INPUT + WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 1Г—вҶ’2Г—) В· uncanny-intimate, responsive вҖ” dodges the rolling-10 banned "solitary-never-resolves" VIBE (the piano *responds* in real time) AND the 4Г— renderer trap (Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG all 3Г—; ships on WebGL2). A no-permission vowel auto-demo (ahвҶ’eeвҶ’ohвҶ’ooвҶ’mm) makes the piano sing + the 16-rung ladder animate from frame one; degrades to a synth carrier if the fetch fails and a Canvas2D ladder if no WebGL2. The three WIDE explorers spanned WebGL2/three.js/audio-first, none pushing a 3Г— renderer to 4Г—. 2 siblings banked IDEAS В§397: **`533-hollow`** (three.js comb-filter / phase-cancellation tension вҖ” "tension is *absence*", the jury-named untouched primitive; Lucier/Amacher) + **`534-third-ear`** (combination/difference *Tartini* tones вҖ” a melody that exists only inside your ear; audio-first; clean lab-first; Tartini/Amacher).
