## Earlier (Cycle 327 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/347-the-place](/dream/347-the-place)** вҖ” The Place Where You Go to Listen. `demoable`
  **A long-form adult drone scored by your REAL local sky вҖ” the actual clock hour, the sun's position, the moon's phase, the season вҖ” so the piece is genuinely different at 3am than at noon and slowly evolves as real time passes. Nothing repeats on a timer: the score IS the sky.** It auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if the browser blocks autoplay; alive at the 06:30 review with zero further interaction). It reads your device clock and вҖ” optionally, with a 3 s timeout вҖ” your geolocation, then computes **locally, with no network** where the sun and moon actually are (`astronomy.ts`: a NOAA-style solar-altitude/azimuth approximation + a synodic-month moon phase/illumination + season from day-of-year). The mapping (`audioEngine.ts`, just-intonation over a low root, master вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`): **solar altitude** вҶ’ register + brightness (deep night = a low warm cellar drone; civil twilight near the horizon = a slow blooming mid cluster; midday = bright high JI partials on top); **solar azimuth** вҶ’ slow stereo-pan drift of the lead voice across the day (sun eastвҶ’left, westвҶ’right; the moon shimmer pans gently opposite); **moon illumination** вҶ’ a high shimmering harmonic voice that waxes with the lit fraction (full moon present, new moon silent); **season** вҶ’ the JI scale color morphs (winter leans darker/minor + a lower root, summer brighter/major). Visual (`skyRenderer.ts`, **raw WebGL2** вҖ” hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, full-screen triangle, NOT three.js / NOT Canvas2D / NOT SVG): a horizon band + sun-disc glow tracking altitude & azimuth, a phase-shaded moon disc, and a star density that rises as the sun sets. Legible monospace readouts: local time, sun altitude (В°), sun azimuth (В°), moon (% lit), season, place. **The verifiability move that won curation: a two-axis TIME SCRUBBER** (hour-of-day + day-of-year sliders) that lets a reviewer hear the whole dawnвҶ’noonвҶ’duskвҶ’night arc and the winterвҶ”summer color shift **in a few seconds** without waiting; untouched, the piece tracks real wall-clock time, and **return to now** releases it back to live. Graceful: no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + the music keeps playing and tracking the sky; geolocation denied/slow вҶ’ a fixed high-latitude fallback (61.2, вҲ’149.9, a nod to Fairbanks) used silently; autoplay blocked вҶ’ one **Begin** tap. Full teardown (rAF cancel, GL dispose, audio nodes closed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” local-astronomy engine + JI drone/choir synth + long-form evolving state + raw-WebGL2 sky = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*, his Fairbanks installation that sonifies the local sun/moon/aurora/seismic in real time; + Brian Eno's generative-ambient lineage)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вҖ” genuinely different across the day and across the year, an evolving state machine, not a loop)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **clock+place (no-network) INPUT** (fresh; **NOT his-recording** вҖ” the jury-banned adult input) В· **raw-WebGL2 sky OUTPUT** (**NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG (audit-banned вүҘ5Г—), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)** вҖ” raw-WebGL2 is warm at 2Г— and cleared the floor; soft-flag that the next adult renderer should cool it) В· **local-astronomy sonification + long-form state TECHNIQUE** В· **place-based contemplative VIBE** (the jury's #1 ask вҖ” about *something real*, LEGIBLE via the readouts, NOT another "his-piano вҶ’ abstract luminous Anadol cloud he watches"). The most faithful adult answer to **jury provocation #1** (kill the forming his-pianoвҶ’nebula rut; if you sonify, make it legible and about something) and a clean re-entry on the long-form/state axis the jury celebrated (`308`/`314`/`322`/`325`). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`348-erosion`** (a Basinski-style tape that physically WEARS OUT as you listen + decays even while you're away вҖ” a grep-verified lab-FIRST generative-degradation piece, pure DOM/CSS, the strongest BANK; flagged for the next adult/conceptual cycle) + **`349-strange-attractor`** (Lorenz/RГ¶ssler/Chua as composer, scale-snapped + edge-of-chaos + a Lyapunov regime label вҖ” but honestly a deepening of the 9-yr-old `10-strange`, NOT a lab-first) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· WIDE В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: device clock + optional geolocation + Web Audio + raw WebGL2; no mic, no network fetch, no secrets) В· 7.43 kB (114 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§327. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вң“ 22.1 s, `в—Ӣ Static`), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: live audio playback + the WebGL render + the geolocation-timeout branch (headless sandbox, no GPU/audio); the solar/lunar math is an intentional contemplative approximation, not an ephemeris; whether the dayвҶ’night musical arc reads as expressive vs. monotonous over a real multi-hour listen (the scrubber is the in-sandbox proxy).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/347-the-place/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 326 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt](/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt)** вҖ” Sound Hunt. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-FIRST piece in 300+ prototypes: put on headphones, and TURN your phone or your body to *find* six singing animals hidden in the space around you, then collect them into a song. You play music with your EARS, not your eyes вҖ” the screen is just a dim compass.** Tap **в–ё Listen for the animals** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` and, on iOS 13+, requests `DeviceOrientationEvent` permission вҖ” both inside the same gesture, iOS-safe). Six animals вҖ” рҹҰү owl, рҹҗё frog, рҹҗҰ bird, рҹҗӢ whale, рҹҰ— cricket, вңЁ firefly вҖ” are placed at fixed azimuths/elevations all around you, each humming its own note in **D-Dorian** with its own synthesized timbre (owl = sine + slow tremolo; frog = triangle rhythmic AM; bird = warble; whale = slow-FM moan; cricket = fast square tremolo; firefly = pulse), over a quiet always-on **D2+A2** drone. **Turn** to sweep the spatial field past your ears вҖ” the animal you FACE gets louder and the compass glows brighter; **hold facing it ~1.2 s** (or **tap the glowing center dot**) and it **swoops in** with a chime, a sparkle, and a soft haptic. Collect all six вҶ’ a short D-Dorian melody plays from their voices, then they bloom together as a chord. No score, no timer, no fail, no reading. **HRTF spatial engine (`audio.ts`)**: each animal is its own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`; the listener's heading rotates the `AudioListener` forward vector each frame (`forwardX/Z` AudioParam with legacy `setOrientation` fallback); master вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (вҲ’6 dB, 20:1) so it can never blast. **Heading/collect state machine (`hunt.ts`)**: per-animal facing cone (Вұ24В° half-width вҶ’ 0вҖ“1 strength), dwell accumulator (1.2 s вҶ’ collect), fly-in animation (3.5 m вҶ’ 0.3 m over 600 ms). **Dim compass (`page.tsx`, DOM/CSS only вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO SVG, NO three.js)**: a `border-radius:50%` ring, animal dots positioned by azimuth, a rotating heading needle, and a conic-gradient dwell arc вҖ” the visual is intentionally secondary. **Graceful for the 06:30 phone review with NO sensor and NO headphones**: no `deviceorientation`/desktop вҶ’ **pointer-drag** turns the heading **and** a gentle **auto-demo** sweeps one full rotation per 24 s, auto-catching each animal through the IDENTICAL `applyHeading вҶ’ computeFacing вҶ’ collectAnimal` audio path (the whole findвҶ’collectвҶ’celebrate loop plays itself); iOS denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + drag/auto-demo continue; no headphones вҶ’ HRTF degrades to a softer stereo image (still spatially distinguishable); no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice. Full teardown (rAF cancel, audio nodes disconnect, `ctx.close()`, listeners removed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first KIDS piece; the only prior non-screen piece in 300+ is the ADULT `308-orbit-choir`, and every one of the lab's 108 kids prototypes is full-screen-viz-primary вҖ” grep-verified)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” device-orientation listener + 6-voice HRTF spatial bank w/ per-animal synthesis + drone + brick-wall limiter + DOM/CSS compass + dwell/collect state machine + auto-demo = 6+)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Janet Cardiff *audio walks* В· *Papa Sangre* / *Audio Defence* eyes-free audio games В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· this lab's `308-orbit-choir` HRTF lineage)** [+#5 RESEARCH В§326, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **device-orientation INPUT** (0Г— in the last 10 вҖ” the freshest modality; not touch, not voice, not his-recording) В· **HRTF-spatial-audio + dim-DOM/CSS-compass OUTPUT** (**NOT SVG вҖ” the renderer the audit bans at вүҘ5Г— вҖ” NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT three.js (warm), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)**) В· **HRTF-spatial-listening TECHNIQUE** В· listening-adventure VIBE (fresh; NOT another consonance-duet вҖ” `341` already shipped that, a 4th would be the monoculture the mandate exists to stop) В· **D-Dorian**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #2** ("build the SECOND non-screen piece вҖ” `308` found the freshest axis the lab owns and *nothing followed it*"), brought to the kids lane for the first time, and it varies the kids trick OFF persistence and OFF the consonance-duet rut. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (the lab's first non-screen / audio-first kids listening adventure, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`348-kids-song-catcher`** (turn toward each hidden note to catch a *known* D-Dorian melody in order, assembling a visible ribbon вҖ” the most jury-#1-legible model; **banked as the strong next-kids build**) + **`347-kids-echo-cave`** (call into the dark and creatures echo back from fixed 3-D addresses, building a spatial round; banked but flagged вҖ” the echo lane is jury-saturated and its own README concedes the differentiation is "real but subtle") build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: device-orientation + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) В· 6.01 kB (**109 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH В§326. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вң“ 26.1 s), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: real HRTF localization quality (generic KEMAR head model; front/back confusion is common without head movement, and a 4-year-old's small ears differ) вҖ” though the dim compass glow + the tap-the-center shortcut mean the loop completes *visually* even when HRTF perception is weak; real `deviceorientation` feel + the iOS permission branch on a physical phone; whether a real 4-year-old will "turn to find" something invisible; haptics no-op on iOS.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 325 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/345-speech-melody](/dream/345-speech-melody)** вҖ” Speech Melody. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST natural-language вҶ’ music piece: type a line вҖ” a poem, a memory вҖ” and Resonance compiles its SPEECH into a JanГЎДҚek-style "speech melody," then lights up your words one at a time as they sing, so you RECOGNIZE your own words being sung.** It auto-plays a gentle Welcome-Home line on load (alive at the 06:30 review with zero typing); type or paste your own into the box, or tap an example, and press **Play**. The mapping (`text-music.ts`, deterministic вҖ” same text вҶ’ same melody): each word is split into syllable-ish units by **vowel cluster**; each vowel class carries a **height** on a front/high вҶ’ back/low axis (EE/IH high & bright, OO/UH low & dark) that indexes a two-octave **D-Dorian** ladder, so vowel colour becomes pitch height (with a gentle downward drift across the phrase вҖ” JanГЎДҚek observed spoken lines tend to fall); **consonant clusters** become percussion (plosive `p t k`вҶ’bright click, voiced-stop `b d g`вҶ’thud, sibilant/fricativeвҶ’hiss, liquid/nasalвҶ’soft ring); **prosody** (word-initial syllables, capitalized words, the opening word) drives accent/duration; **punctuation** inserts rests + phrase breaks. Audio (`audio.ts`): a warm voice (sine + slightly-detuned triangle through a brightness-tracking lowpass + click-free ADSR) for vowels + filtered-noise bursts for consonants, over an always-on soft **D2 + A2** drone (breathing filter LFO), shared feedback delay + procedural-impulse reverb, master вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`. Visuals (`page.tsx`, **raw WebGL2** вҖ” hand-written GLSL ES 3.00): ~480 additive glow points draw the **pitch-contour ribbon** in a violetвҶ’amber palette keyed to brightness, with a moving **playhead** that brightens the contour as it passes; over the GL canvas a DOM word layer shows the words large (`text-xl`/`text-2xl`) and each word **lights amber + lifts** the instant it sounds вҖ” the legibility that won curation (you watch your words being sung even with the sound off). Legible readout: mode/key, the word now sounding, playback %. Graceful: no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + audio and word-highlights still play; iOS-safe (`AudioContext` created inside the first gesture; auto-play falls back to "tap Play to begin"). Full teardown (rAF cancel, GL program/VAO/buffer delete, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST natural-languageвҶ’music piece; grep-verified distinct from `22-code-score`, which is a note-DSL where you literally write pitch names, NOT language sonification)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” graphemeвҶ’phoneme-ish parser/prosody mapper + vowel-voice + consonant-percussion + drone/delay/reverb engine + raw-WebGL2 contour renderer + synced DOM word-highlight layer)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” LeoЕЎ JanГЎДҚek *nГЎpДӣvky mluvy* ("speech melodies") В· Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* В· Fluxus text/event scores В· Jaap Blonk sound poetry)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **keyboard-text INPUT** (0Г— in the lab's entire history вҖ” the freshest possible modality, and verifiable on a phone by typing) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (clean 1Г—; **NOT SVG вҖ” the renderer the audit bans at вүҘ5Г— вҖ” NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt), NOT three.js (warm 321+337)**) В· **natural-languageвҶ’speech-melody cross-modal TECHNIQUE** В· literary/Fluxus VIBE (fresh; NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT his-recording, NOT voiceвҶ’HRTFвҶ’sacred) В· **D-Dorian**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #1** ("make his music *legible* вҖ” let him recognize what he played, not another nebula"): 345 literally shows him his words being sung вҖ” the inverse of a glowing cloud he watches. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`343-live-accompanist`** (listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key and comps under your phrases вҖ” the BOLDEST swing + Karel's "jazz-responsive" wishlist + the вүҲ0Г— score-following axis; **lost a THIRD time on verifiability** вҖ” its headline needs a live instrument no sandbox can provide, so it's now flagged for a *dedicated real-instrument verification cycle*, not another fan-out slot) + **`344-slow-machine`** (a deterministic seeded 6-section long-form machine, "different at minute 5," Ikeda-minimal; reliable + fully verifiable, three.js, banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· WIDE В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: keyboard text вҶ’ deterministic compile вҶ’ Web Audio + raw WebGL2; no mic, no network) В· 6.4 kB (113 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§325. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вң“), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether a listener *recognizes* a specific sentence by ear (English spelling isn't phonetic вҖ” the syllable heuristic is approximate; the visual word-highlight carries legibility regardless); the wall-clock-rAF playhead may lead/lag sample-accurate audio under load; the glow-contour look on a real GPU; very long pastes may feel washy (fixed reverb/delay).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/345-speech-melody/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 324 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/341-kids-star-pair](/dream/341-kids-star-pair)** вҖ” Star Pair. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide (or hum) it up and down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light.** Tap **Play together в–ё** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` + asks for the mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вҖ” never recorded, stored, or transmitted). Your **violet star** sits on the left arc, your friend's **cyan star** on the right. **Drag** your star up/down (the reliable, 4yo-primary control) вҖ” or **hum**, and the mic moves your star to your pitch (it yields to drag, so drag always wins). The two stars define a musical **interval**; out of tune you **hear real acoustic beating** (the two voices physically interfere вҖ” we don't fake it) and **see** the stars jitter at the beat rate with only a faint dotted reach-line between them. Land within **Вұ35Вў** of a pure just-intonation ratio (`1:1, 6:5, 5:4, 4:3, 3:2, 5:3, 2:1`, folded into one octave over a **D2 вүҲ 73.42 Hz** drone, voices riding вүҲ D4вҶ’624 Hz) and the stars **LOCK**: a bright flowing **beam of light** links them, the jitter stops, the stars pulse together, a soft chime + shimmer plays, and ~60 **sparkles вңЁ burst** along the beam вҖ” one discrete, wordless, *silently-legible* "the two stars connected!" event (the heart of the toy, and the reason it won curation: the lock reads even with the sound off). **Fully demoable SOLO on one phone** (the 06:30 review case): if no second tab answers within ~3s, a gentle **robot рҹӨ–** drives the friend-star, drifting slowly and **pausing near consonances** so a lone child (or Karel) can chase and catch the beam вҖ” and because **drag is the primary control, the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no mic at all**. Badge flips violet **friend рҹ‘«** the instant a real second tab is heard vs amber **robot рҹӨ–** when solo; mic denied вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + drag still fully plays; no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + audio and the tuning loop keep running. Always-on warm **D** drone so it's never silent; master through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **`sync.ts`** вҖ” `BroadcastChannel("resonance-star-pair-341")` ~3 Hz pitch + presence (319-hub-score lineage); (2) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” D drone + two warm voices (sine + detuned triangle, lowpass) + lock chime/shimmer through the brick-wall limiter; (3) **`tuning.ts`** вҖ” pitchвҶ”arc-position mapping + JI consonance scoring (nearest ratio, cents, beat Hz, lock); (4) **`pitch.ts`** вҖ” analysis-only autocorrelation mic (`AnalyserNode` only, tracks stopped on teardown); (5) **`scene.ts`** вҖ” **raw WebGL2** renderer (two hand-written GLSL ES 3.00 programs: bg gradient/starfield/arc-tracks quad + additive glow-quads streamed into one dynamic VBO for the stars, beam, and sparkles). `page.tsx` runs ONE refs-driven rAF loop (the React tree never re-renders per frame); full teardown (rAF cancel, `bye` broadcast + channel close, mic stop, scene + audio dispose). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play; grep-verified distinct from the SOLO `272-kids-tune-purr` (one child, fixed drone) and the TURN-TAKING `334-kids-pass-the-song`)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” five)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Hermann von Helmholtz *On the Sensations of Tone* (consonance = absence of beating) В· this lab's `319-hub-score` BroadcastChannel lineage В· Reggio Emilia group-synchrony / joint-attention В· honest contrast w/ solo `272`)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **multi-user + drag/voice INPUT** (multi-user 1Г— in the last 10, jury-wanted) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (**NOT SVG вҖ” the renderer the audit bans at вүҘ5Г— вҖ” NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT three.js (warming 321+337), NOT WebGPU**) В· **real-time consonance/beating TECHNIQUE** В· collaborative-kids VIBE В· **D just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. Deepens **jury provocation #3** (multi-user for kids вҖ” varies the trick off `334`'s turn-taking and off the localStorage-persistence default the jury flagged). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (real-time two-child consonance duet, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`342-kids-whale-song`** (each child HUMS to bend their own whale's call until the two whales lock + swim together вҖ” the boldest/warmest swing, voice-forward, oceanic; **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build with a real-device hum pass** вҖ” it lost only on the unauditioned hum-primary headline) + **`340-kids-duet-bridge`** (the literal seeded shared-rope, balanced hum+drag, gold catenary lock; banked вҖ” its continuous lock reads less discretely than the beam) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client BroadcastChannel + Web Audio + analysis-only mic + WebGL2) В· 7.21 kB (113 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + raw WebGL2, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§324. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вң“), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: real two-tab co-play + the peer/robot badge flip on a second running tab; whether the autocorrelation tracker handles a real 4-year-old's hum; the exact look of the stars/beam/sparkles on a GPU; and the perceptual read of the lock for a non-reader. Honest limit: `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin/same-browser вҖ” true two-*device*-over-network play would need WebRTC/WebSocket (out of scope); the "two screens" promise is demoed as two tabs/windows.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/341-kids-star-pair/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 323 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/337-seismic-globe](/dream/337-seismic-globe)** вҖ” Seismic Globe. `demoable`
  **Hear the LIVING PLANET: every earthquake recorded on Earth in the last day becomes a sustained voice placed in 3-D space around you, while the quakes pulse on a slowly rotating three.js globe вҖ” so the ever-shifting chord you hear IS Earth's current seismic state.** The on-screen globe loads + auto-rotates immediately with sample or live quakes (visual alive hands-free); tap **в–¶ Listen to the planet** (creates/resumes the `AudioContext` inside the gesture, iOS-safe) and the spatial choir fades in. Each sounding quake owns ONE sustained voice through its **own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`**: **azimuth вҶҗ longitude, elevation вҶҗ latitude, distance/loudness вҶҗ magnitude**, pitch snapped to a **just-intonation** degree over **C2** (ratios `1, 9/8, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2`; bigger quakes drop a register), and **depth вҶ’ lowpass cutoff** вҖ” so what you SEE and what you HEAR share one geometry (depth drives both the point's hue *and* the voice's darkness; magnitude drives both the point's size *and* the pitch register/loudness). Live data comes from the public, CORS-open **USGS GeoJSON** feed (`{2.5_day|all_day|all_hour}`, no API key), re-polled every 60 s вҖ” new quakes fade in, aged-out ones fade away вҖ” with a one-tap feed switcher (larger feed = denser chord). An always-on quiet C1+C2 root drone keeps it from ever being silent; master вүӨ 0.42 вҶ’ procedural convolver reverb вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` so a dense seismic moment never clips. **Graceful for the 06:30 phone review:** any fetch failure or empty window loads **8 globe-spanning sample quakes** so the piece always surrounds you, with an honest provenance badge (emerald **в—Ҹ live USGS feed В· N quakes** vs amber **в—Ҹ sample quakes**); no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + the audio still plays; no HRTF вҶ’ `StereoPanner` fallback; a "loudest voices right now" list names the places currently sounding. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`quakes.ts`** вҖ” USGS fetch/normalize + sample fallback + `topByMagnitude` cap (24); (2) **`globe.ts`** вҖ” raw three.js (v0.182) dark wireframe Earth + occluding shell + graticule + halo, per-quake glowing points (sizeвҶҗmag, hueвҶҗdepth), per-frame pulse, full dispose; (3) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” the HRTF spatial JI engine + drone + reverb + compressor + StereoPanner fallback; (4) **`page.tsx`** вҖ” ONE rAF loop mutating refs (the React tree never re-renders per frame), full teardown (rAF cancel, three.js dispose, audio stop + ctx close, poll clear, fetch abort). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*; Dombois & Eckel "Audification" in *The Sonification Handbook*; the 2026 Data Sonification Award / DATASONICA live-data-as-evolving-texture wave)** + **recent-research(#5 вҖ” RESEARCH В§323, this fire)**. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **external-API INPUT** (0Г— in the last 10 вҖ” the freshest modality; not touch, not his-recording, not voice) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (clean ~1вҖ“2Г—; **NOT SVG вҖ” the renderer the audit bans at вүҘ5Г— вҖ” NOT Canvas2D, NOT a 3rd unrun WGSL**) В· **real-world-data-sonification TECHNIQUE** В· planetary/systems VIBE В· **C2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #3** (real-world-data вҖ” the thinnest adult shelf, which the jury praised `314-solar-wind` for filling and asked for MORE) вҖ” shipped as a real **3-D globe**, "massively bigger" than the banked SVG `328-seismic-choir` it supersedes, *and dodging the SVG ban that would have compromised 328*; it also pays the most respect to **verification debt (#5)** вҖ” no new unrun compute, and the sample fallback guarantees a live review regardless of network. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`338-live-accompanist`** (listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key and comps under your phrases вҖ” the BOLDEST swing + Karel's "jazz-responsive" wishlist; **re-flagged as the strong next-adult build, paired with a real-instrument verification pass** вҖ” it lost only on the unauditioned live-tracking headline) + **`339-slow-machine`** (a deterministic seeded 6-section long-form generative machine, Ikeda-minimal; reliable + fully verifiable, banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· WIDE В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only USGS GET) В· 5.32 kB (**293 kB First Load вҖ” three.js bundled, the deliberate cost of dodging the SVG ban with a real 3-D globe**). Born from RESEARCH В§323. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: live USGS reachability from the review device (sample fallback + honest badge cover a no); HRTF azimuth/elevation vividness (headphone- and listener-dependent); exact loudness during a dense `all_hour` swarm (24-voice cap + brick-wall compressor mitigate).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/337-seismic-globe/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 322 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 interaction-model approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song](/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song)** вҖ” Pass the Song. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST multi-user / turn-taking piece (jury provocation #3): two children on two tablets (or two browser tabs) in one room PASS a glowing creature back and forth and TAKE TURNS adding notes to build ONE shared song together.** Tap **в–¶ Start** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вҖ” never recorded, stored, or transmitted). When the creature is on **your** screen ("your turn!"), you give it a note вҖ” **hum/sing** (a live autocorrelation pitch detector snaps your voice to the **D-major** scale once it holds ~7 frames) or **tap** one of the big вүҘ64px glowing color-spots вҖ” then tap the big **вңЁ send to friend** button and the creature **flies off the screen edge** toward your friend over a `BroadcastChannel`. On the friend's tab it **arrives flying in from the opposite edge**, it's now their turn, and the growing **song-ribbon** (one colored bead per turn) shows **identically on both screens**; every few turns the whole ribbon **replays** as a little song the two kids built. **Fully demoable SOLO on one phone** (the 06:30 review case): if no second tab answers within ~4s, a cute **robot friend** takes the other side вҖ” receives the creature, adds a tasteful in-scale note after a "thinking" beat, and sends it back вҖ” so one person sees the entire pass-back-and-forth loop. A badge reads violet **"Playing with a friend рҹ‘«"** when a real second tab is present (presence handshake + rev-counter reconcile) vs amber **"Playing with the robot friend рҹӨ–"** in solo/demo mode; mic denied вҶ’ a readable `text-rose-300` notice + the tap fallback still plays. Always-on soft **D drone** so it's never silent; gentle bell voices through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears); the SVG creature is animated by mutating refs in **one rAF loop** (the React tree is never re-rendered per frame); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, `bye` broadcast, channel close, mic stop, AudioContext dispose). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) the **BroadcastChannel presence/turn-pass sync** (`sync.ts` вҖ” `resonance-pass-the-song-334`); (2) the **synthesized Web-Audio engine** (`audio.ts` вҖ” D drone, bell voices, `setTargetAtTime` glides, brick-wall limiter, whoosh, analysis-only autocorrelation pitch detector); (3) the **turn-relay state machine + rev-reconcile + robot-friend fallback + ribbon playback** (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF); (4) the **inline-SVG creature/ribbon renderer**. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST multi-user / turn-taking / networked-collaborative KIDS piece; verified by grep вҖ” BroadcastChannel exists only in the adult `319-hub-score`)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” this lab's `319-hub-score` serverless-BroadcastChannel lineage В· Reggio Emilia group-synchrony / joint-attention, KIDS.md's stated high-value goal В· call-and-response pedagogy)**. **Diversity** dodges the live bans: **multi-user / networked-BroadcastChannel INPUT** (0Г— ever for kids вҖ” the freshest possible modality; not touch-primary, not his-recording, not phone-motion) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вҖ” the banned renderer вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) В· **turn-taking / pass-the-creature TECHNIQUE** (lab-first for kids) В· collaborative/playground VIBE В· **D major** over a drone, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to **jury provocation #3** ("turn-taking / multi-user вҖ” 319's BroadcastChannel idea, but for two children вҖ” NOT another it-grows-while-you're-away; off touch") and it opens the lab's single most-unserved axis (multi-user, 1вҶ’2 of 300+) for kids. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on one concept (the lab's first two-child shared-music piece, explored via competing interaction models); siblings **`335-kids-duet-bridge`** (two kids co-play in REAL TIME on a shared glowing rope, tuning their ends into just-intonation consonance by ear вҖ” the gold "in-tune!" lock; the boldest/most-surprising swing, **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build with a real-device perceptual pass**) + **`336-kids-echo-relay`** (sing a phrase вҶ’ it flies to the friend's tablet вҶ’ their creature echoes it back + adds вҶ’ a networked kid-to-kid canon; banked, but its experience rhymes with the lab's saturated echo lane) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.36 kB (108 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§322. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL blind spot; the solo robot loop was traced end-to-end); the real unknowns are **two-live-tab on-device behavior** (presence handshake, arrival edges, `pass` rev-reconcile across two real tablets) and the **mic pitch thresholds / 7-frame sustain** on a real child's hum вҖ” neither auditionable in the sandbox.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/334-kids-pass-the-song/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 321 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 3 approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/331-voice-cathedral](/dream/331-voice-cathedral)** вҖ” Voice Cathedral. `demoable`
  **The lab's SECOND non-screen piece (jury provocation #2) вҖ” sing one note and it BLOOMS into a choir that surrounds you in 3-D HRTF space; sing again and again to stack a one-person overtone cathedral, with the chord you built printed by NAME so you recognize what you sang.** Spatial audio over headphones is the primary medium; the on-screen SVG radar is a minimal, legible companion. Tap **Start with my voice** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe; mic is analysis-only вҖ” never recorded, stored, or transmitted, and never routed to the speakers). Hold a single **steady** note: a YIN-style autocorrelation detector (`pitch.ts`) tracks your pitch, a 5-wide median tracker kills octave jumps, and a note only **commits** once it holds within ~0.6 semitones for ~120 ms вҖ” then a ~700 ms cooldown + a required breath-gap mean **one breath blooms exactly one voice**, not a stream. Each committed pitch **snaps to the nearest just-intonation degree of a D2 root** (ratios `1, 9/8, 6/5, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2`, octave-folded so any sung octave maps in), becomes a sustained additive voice, and is placed at a **golden-angle azimuth** on a gently **orbiting** ring through its own `PannerNode { panningModel:"HRTF" }`. An always-on JI **D2 drone** anchors the field; a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` + a procedural convolution reverb keep nine voices clip-free and cathedral-sized (a 10th commit fades out the oldest). **Legibility (jury #1):** the panel names the note you're **singing now**, the live **voice count**, and the **cathedral built so far** as named pitch-classes (e.g. `D В· A В· FвҷҜ В· CвҷҜ`) вҖ” and each radar dot carries its own label, so Karel *recognizes what he sang* rather than watching a nebula. **Fully demoable with no mic:** an **Auto-demo** programmatically "sings" a slow rising JI arpeggio into the spatial field; mic denied вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice + the demo. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) the **YIN pitch detector + median tracker** (`pitch.ts`); (2) the **commitment-gating + orbit + UI loop** (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF, no stale closures, full teardown вҖ” mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed); (3) the **HRTF spatial-voice engine** (`audio.ts` вҖ” JI snap, golden-angle orbiting panners, 9-voice cap, always-on drone, compressor, reverb send); (4) the **inline-SVG radar** (`scene.tsx` вҖ” breathing listener dot, color-by-degree voice dots, tethers, note labels). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· David Hykes & the Harmonic Choir В· La Monte Young's JI drones В· this lab's own `308-orbit-choir` HRTF lineage)** + **recent-research(#5 вҖ” RESEARCH В§321, this fire вҖ” the 2026 edge-AI-pitch вҶ’ browser-HRTF "spatial voice instrument" wave)**. (#1 not claimed вҖ” HRTF already exists at `308-orbit-choir`; the novelty is the *build-a-named-chord-in-space* interaction, not the technique.) **Diversity** dodges **every** tag the jury banned (touch В· his-recording В· Canvas2D В· kids В· Anadol-cloud): **live-voice INPUT** (not touch, not his-recording, not phone-motion) В· **HRTF-spatial-audio + inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вҖ” the banned renderer вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) В· **real-time pitchвҶ’JI-snapвҶ’spatial-voice-accumulation TECHNIQUE** В· reverent/drone/sacred VIBE (NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT kids) В· **D2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The most faithful answer to jury #2 (the second non-screen piece, in `308`'s crowned HRTF lineage) AND jury #1 (make his music *legible* вҖ” name the notes), and it discharges the **multi-cycle-deferred `voice-cathedral` standing pick** (queued В§320). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire on one concept (live-voice вҶ’ HRTF spatial choir, legible); siblings **`332-overtone-mirror`** (decompose your live voice into its harmonic series and spatialize EACH overtone as its own HRTF voice вҖ” your timbre exploded into a sphere; the boldest/most-surprising swing, **re-flagged as a strong next-adult build**) + **`333-antiphon`** (sing a phrase вҶ’ a stone cathedral re-emits it as a spatial CANON from rotating HRTF positions, layering into a round) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.72 kB (109 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§321. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL blind spot; pays down the jury's verification-debt note vs `323`/`327`); the real unknowns are **perceptual**: HRTF localization quality on headphones, and the pitch detector's behavior on real breathy/low voices + the "one breath = one voice" gating timings, which couldn't be auditioned in the sandbox (the Auto-demo exercises the full snap/orbit/drone/limiter chain mic-free).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/331-voice-cathedral/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 320 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 non-screen explorers)

- **[/dream/330-stillness](/dream/330-stillness)** вҖ” Stillness. `demoable`
  **An ANTI-instrument that inverts the lab's entire reactive paradigm: it sings only when you are QUIET. Sustained silence blooms a just-intonation drone and a field of light; the first real sound scatters it. John Cage's *4вҖІ33вҖі* turned inside out.** Tap **Begin вҖ” then be still** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe; tries the mic but never blocks on it). Then *stop making noise.* While the room's smoothed RMS stays **below `QUIET=0.045`**, a low **E2 (~82.41 Hz) just-intonation drone** integrates partial-by-partial (ratios `1, 2, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 8/5` вҖ” minor third / fourth / fifth / minor sixth, **not** C-major pentatonic), a lowpass opens, an additive SVG light-**bloom** grows at the center of a dark one-point-perspective wireframe room, ~46 motes brighten, and a **stillness streak** counts up. A **rising edge over `NOISE=0.12`** вҖ” a clap, a word, a bump вҖ” **STARTLES** the piece: bloom вҶ’ 0, streak вҶ’ 0, the motes scatter outward then settle, the lowpass collapses. The ambiguous band between the thresholds lets the bloom gently recede (you're not quiet *enough* to grow). The two named tuning constants sit at the top of `page.tsx`; a **live input meter** marks `QUIET`/`NOISE` so you can see why it blooms or breaks. **It's fully demoable with no mic**: a **Be quiet (press & hold)** control fully substitutes for silence (release = the startle), and a hands-free **breathing auto-demo** (on by default) blooms-and-rests on a ~20s cycle with occasional startle spikes so the room is alive on load. The **longest stillness streak** persists to `localStorage` ("longest stillness: Xs") so returning sessions have a goal. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) the **inverted-silence detector** with RMS hysteresis + mic/touch/auto input modes (`page.tsx`, refs-based rAF loop, no stale closures); (2) the **JI E2 drone engine** (`audio.ts` вҖ” staggered partial fade-in driven by a single `bloom` level, opening/collapsing lowpass, procedural noise-burst convolver reverb, master вүӨ 0.46 вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`, all `setTargetAtTime` glides вҖ” click-free); (3) the **inline-SVG bloom/mote renderer** (`scene.tsx` вҖ” radial-gradient core + halo under an `feGaussianBlur`/`feMerge` glow filter, scattering motes, live threshold meter); (4) the **longest-streak localStorage persistence**. Provenance badge: emerald **Listening рҹҺӨ** / amber **Touch mode вңӢ** / violet **Auto-demo (breathing)**; full teardown on unmount (mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **Ambition 2/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” John Cage *4вҖІ33вҖі* (inverted) В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· Гүliane Radigue)**. (#1 not claimed вҖ” the novelty is the *inverted interaction model*, not a new technique label.) **Diversity** dodges **every** tag the jury banned this cycle (touch В· his-recording В· Canvas2D В· kids В· Anadol-cloud): **mic-SILENCE (inverted) INPUT** (not touch, not his-recording, not phone-motion) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D вҖ” the banned renderer вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) В· **inverted silence-detection anti-instrument TECHNIQUE** (the lab's first reward-quiet inversion) В· contemplative/critical/Cage VIBE В· **E2 just intonation**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. The boldest answer to the jury's CORE "too similar / no-fail-noodle" critique вҖ” it doesn't swap a sensor, it *inverts the instrument* вҖ” and the **5-cycle-deferred standing flagged adult build** (315вҶ’319) finally shipped, resolving the В§319 open question. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire of **non-screen** directions; siblings **`329-voice-cathedral`** (sing one note вҶ’ an HRTF-spatialized overtone choir that orbits your head, with the notes named вҖ” the lab's *second non-screen piece*, jury provocation #2; **re-flagged as the TOP next-adult build**, needs its compass Canvas2DвҶ’SVG) + **`331-palm-pulse`** (a song you *feel* вҖ” `navigator.vibrate` as the lead voice over a 6-section generative timeline; banked, blocked by iOS's missing Vibration API) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· ROTATION OVERRIDDEN (jury bans kids vibe next cycle) В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· SVG (light). Born from RESEARCH В§320. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” fully verifiable in logic (no GPU/WGSL/vibration blind spot, paying down the jury's verification-debt note); the only real unknown is **RMS calibration vs a noisy review room** (`QUIET`/`NOISE` are tuned for a quiet space вҖ” a loud room may never dip below `QUIET`), *mitigated* by the press-&-hold control that fully substitutes for silence + the visible threshold meter; also unverified: SVG `feGaussianBlur`/`mix-blend` glow performance + per-frame `<Scene>` re-render with ~46 motes on a low-end device; iOS AudioContext + mic resume in the Begin gesture.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/330-stillness/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 319 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/327-physarum-choir](/dream/327-physarum-choir)** вҖ” Physarum Choir. `demoable`
  **You don't play notes вҖ” you plant *tones as food*, and a living slime-mold network decides, over seconds, which ones to connect. The chord you hear IS which food nodes the network has currently joined: the slime composes the harmony out of its own topology вҖ” and Karel's real piano plants the tones.** Tap **Plant the first tones** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + initializes WebGPU in the gesture, iOS/autoplay-safe): the app fetches one of Karel's real recordings from the public `/api/featured` вҶ’ `/api/audio/[id]` (the anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ/`163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ use), decodes it, runs a coarse onset+autocorrelation-pitch tap, and scatters the detected tones as **"food" nodes** (pitch вҶ’ position, snapped onto a D-rooted just-intonation modal set) across a dark field. Then **~1,048,576 Physarum agents** (Jones/Jenson model) run entirely in **WGSL `@compute` shaders**: each agent senses the trail field ahead-left/center/right, steers toward the strongest chemoattractant, and deposits as it moves (atomic fixed-point `atomicAdd`); the field **diffuses (3Г—3) + decays** every frame in a ping-pong pass, and each food node **injects a hot attractant** so veins grow toward the tones and **join them into a self-organizing network**. A fullscreen render pass paints the trail as a bioluminescent indigoвҶ’tealвҶ’gold glow. **The piece's idea lives in the connectivity read-out:** a reduce pass downsamples the field, async `mapAsync` reads it back, and `sampleConnections()` rings each food node (skipping its own hot core) to measure how strongly the slime has reached it вҶ’ that `[0,1]` per-node connection drives the harmony engine (`audio.ts`): each node owns ONE sustained JI voice whose **gain + brightness rise as the network connects it and fall as the vein dies back**, so the live chord *is* the live topology. Click anywhere to plant another tone. **Honest novelty:** physarum is NOT lab-first вҖ” `260-kids-slime-garden` is already a Jones/Jenson agent sim (in WebGL); what's new here is the **WebGPU *compute* implementation** + the **connectivity-graph вҶ’ just-intonation harmony mapping** (the slime as *composer*, not decoration). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`source.ts`** вҖ” real-stem fetch+decode (JSON-`{url}` or raw `arrayBuffer`) + onset/pitch tap вҶ’ JI seed tones, with an offline D-modal arpeggio + auto-seeded ring fallback so it's ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`gpu.ts`** вҖ” the WebGPU compute physarum sim (move/sense/deposit + diffuse/decay/food-inject + reduce-for-readback + render) **AND a full Canvas2D/CPU twin** at ~4k agents with the identical model + connectivity read-out, so a no-WebGPU review device still gets the real piece; (3) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” the connectivity-driven JI choir (per-node voice + sub partial + lowpass, always-on root drone, optional decoded bed, procedural convolver reverb, master 0.5 вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor`); (4) the **rAF sim/harmony loop** in `page.tsx`. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source badge reads emerald **"вҷӘ Karel's recording"** vs amber **"synth fallback"**; backend badge reads violet **"WebGPU compute В· ~1M agents"** vs amber **"Canvas2D/CPU fallback"**; full teardown (rAF cancel, GPU buffers/device destroyed, audio disposed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Andrew Adamatzky's *Physarum* sound-synthesis/biocomputing (arXiv 1212.1203); Sage Jenson (mxsage); Jeff Jones' agent model; *Simulacra Naturae* (arXiv 2509.02924, 2025))** + **recent-research(#5 вҖ” RESEARCH В§319, this fire вҖ” the 2026 WebGPU-compute physarum creative-coding wave)**. (**#1 explicitly NOT claimed** вҖ” physarum already exists at `260-kids-slime-garden`; verified by grep. The honest distinctions are the *compute* renderer and the *connectivityвҶ’harmony* mapping.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **touch-INPUT-at-вүҘ5Г— ban, the Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban, and the three.js cluster**: **audio-file (his real recording) INPUT** (not touch, not phone-motion) В· **WebGPU-compute trail-field OUTPUT** (1Г—вҶ’2Г— in the last 10 вҖ” not a cluster ban; NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT a raw-WebGL2 fragment shader) В· **Physarum-connectivity-as-composer TECHNIQUE** (never used as a harmony engine) В· systems/emergent/organic VIBE В· **D-rooted JI**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. Discharges the standing **"use his actual music"** directive in a never-reached form (his piano seeding an emergent agent network), and pulls hard from his most-loved systems/particle cluster: `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `243-spectral-cloud`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `326-stillness` (the Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence вҖ” SVG; **re-flagged as the top next-adult build**) + `328-seismic-choir` (the live USGS earthquake feed sung as an HRTF spatial JI chord around your head вҖ” jury #3 real-world-data) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only GETs) В· 9.71 kB (113 kB First Load вҖ” raw WebGPU, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§319. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” the standout unverified risk (shared with `323`): **I could not execute the WGSL on real GPU hardware in the sandbox**, so a runtime WGSL validation/perf problem on the actual review device is possible вҖ” *mitigated* by the genuinely full Canvas2D/CPU fallback (same model + same connectivity read-out вҶ’ the real experience, just fewer agents). Also unverified: whether the connectivityвҶ’voice swell reads as "the slime is choosing the chord" by eye/ear (connection thresholds are hand-tuned, time-smoothed); 1M-agent + readback frame rate on a phone GPU; the CPU fallback's per-frame 256ВІ diffuse + 4k-agent loop on a low-end device; iOS Safari WebGPU at review; whether `/api/featured` returns his album from prod (synth + auto-seeded ring covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/327-physarum-choir/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 318 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 approaches)

- **[/dream/325-kids-paper-boat](/dream/325-kids-paper-boat)** вҖ” Paper Boat. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST long-form, stateful, REMEMBERED kids JOURNEY: drag a glowing paper boat down an auto-scrolling night river from dusk to dawn; the music evolves through a real harmonic arc, and at the river's mouth the voyage sings your remembered path back.** Tap the big **в–¶ Begin the voyage** (creates/resumes the AudioContext inside the gesture, iOS-safe). The river **scrolls forward on its own** (3-layer SVG parallax вҖ” stars slowest, far hills medium, near reeds fastest вҖ” so you're always *traveling* toward dawn), and the child **drags the glowing paper boat** anywhere across the river. Steer **into the glowing lily-pad gates** and each one *sings* a note; **up/down** chooses which of four lanes you're in (low warm tones near the bottom вҶ’ bright bell tones near the top), **left/right** opens/closes the chord voicing under everything; drift toward a bank and the texture thins, stay mid-river and it's full. **No way to crash, nothing is ever "wrong"** вҖ” every note is quantized to the current mode. This is the lab's first kids piece that *travels and remembers*: every kids prototype in 150+ before it was a short loop toy. The music is **NOT** C-major pentatonic вҖ” it's a **D-rooted modal arc** that advances by act with elapsed time: **Departure** (dusk, Dm7, D **Dorian**, indigo) вҶ’ **River** (deep night, Fmaj7, F **Lydian**, night-blue) вҶ’ **Rapids** (before dawn, C7, C **Mixolydian**, magenta) вҶ’ **Home** (dawn, Dmaj7, D major, amber), so minute 6 sounds and looks genuinely different from minute 1 and the home chord *resolves* the journey. **It remembers:** every gate passed is recorded as a `MemoryNote{t,midi,lane,act}`; at the river's mouth **`playReplay()`** sings the last ~24 remembered notes back as a gentle lullaby over the resolving home chord вҖ” the voyage recounts the path *you* steered вҖ” and the whole `VoyageState` persists to `localStorage` on a 3s wall-clock interval + on unmount, so reopening offers **вҶ» Continue your river**. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) the **drag-steer pointer/lane tracker + auto-scrolling 3-layer-parallax SVG world** (`page.tsx`, single rAF loop mutating SVG attributes / one gate-layer `innerHTML` per frame вҖ” the React tree is never re-rendered per frame); (2) the **harmonic-arc audio engine** (`audio.ts` вҖ” per-act retuned chord pad + lane-voicing `steer`/`setAct`, scale-quantized gate chimes, always-on filtered-noise water/wind pad, synthesized convolver reverb, master 0.5 вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` for small ears); (3) the **voyage state machine + path memory/replay** (`voyage.ts`); (4) the **wall-clock localStorage persistence + act/hue/darkness interpolation** (`hueAtProgress`/`darknessAtProgress`: dusk вҶ’ deepest night near the middle вҶ’ warm dawn). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Joseph Campbell's monomyth departureвҶ’initiationвҶ’return + Resonance's own multi-phase journey engine, reimagined for a 4yo + the 2026 adaptive/generative game-music frontier)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вҖ” explicitly long-form/stateful/persistent; README specs a cycle-2 deepening: branching tributaries, a two-boat duet, tides/day-night by real clock)**. (#1 NOT claimed вҖ” auto-scroll/parallax isn't a lab-first *technique*; the honest novelty is the *first long-form remembered kids journey*, under #4.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban AND the emerging three.js-at-3Г— cluster** that together ruled the renderer: **inline-SVG-parallax OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT a raw fragment shader) В· **touch drag-to-steer INPUT** (not phone-motion, not mic) В· **long-form auto-scrolling voyage + harmonic-arc state machine + lane-voicing + path memory/replay + persistence TECHNIQUE** (NOT a no-fail trigger bed вҖ” it has memory/evolution/travel) В· duskвҶ’nightвҶ’dawn river VIBE В· **D-rooted modal arc**, NOT C-major-pentatonic. **Breaks the jury's kids no-fail-noodle FORM** with genuine long-form memory + harmonic evolution + a sense of travel, and is a clean break from the just-shipped voice-garden (which it was deliberately curated *against*). Pulls from Karel's loved drift/travel + paint/grow kids cluster (`166-kids-lantern`вқӨпёҸ, `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вқӨпёҸ, `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ, `152-kids-star-paint`вқӨпёҸ) + his *journeys/paths* lineage (`163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ, `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire; siblings `324-kids-firefly-journey` (the same journey via the simplest tap-to-drift control вҖ” strong, ready) + `326-kids-sing-home` (hum/sing a lost star home via autocorrelation pitch вҶ’ lane, with a full touch fallback + auto-demo вҖ” resurrect once voice cools) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· SVG (light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§318. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether the 6вҖ“12 min *felt* pacing stays engaging for a 4yo (act boundaries are proportional so a short demo still crosses real harmonic territory, but the middle minutes are untested); SVG parallax + per-frame gate `innerHTML` at 60fps on a low-end tablet as gates accumulate; iOS AudioContext resume; whether drag-the-boat reads as control vs. the auto-scroll; on resume the music/act/memory restore faithfully but the gate layout regenerates (not gate-for-gate); reverb/limiter loudness by ear.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/325-kids-paper-boat/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 317 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/323-latent-condensation](/dream/323-latent-condensation)** вҖ” Latent Condensation. `demoable`
  **Karel's own *Welcome Home* piano pulls 120,000 GPU particles out of turbulent chaos вҖ” condensing into a flowing form on each phrase, dissolving back into noise in the rests вҖ” the whole simulation running in a WebGPU compute shader.** Tap **Play Karel's piano** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + initializes WebGPU in the gesture, iOS/autoplay-safe): the app fetches one of his real recordings from the public `/api/featured` вҶ’ `/api/audio/[id]` (the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ/`163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ use), decodes it, taps an `AnalyserNode`, and runs **120k particles whose positions+velocities live entirely in a GPU storage buffer** through a **raw WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(256)` pass** every frame: a curl-of-value-noise flow field (divergence-free turbulence) blended against an attraction term that pulls each particle toward a slowly morphing target shape (sphere вҶ’ torus вҶ’ lissajous). A second WGSL **render pipeline** draws them as additive glowing billboards on near-black вҖ” a luminous, Anadol-like latent cloud. The chaosвҶ”order blend is a single `condensation` value produced by the audio: a **6-band FFT + RMS envelope** drives a phrase state machine (`chaos вҶ’ condense вҶ’ form вҶ’ release`); low bands widen the flow, treble adds sparkle, a phrase swell condenses, a rest dissolves. **Honest novelty:** WebGPU compute is NOT lab-first (`16-particle-life-gpu`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `75-houdini-particle-flock`, `55-webgpu-audio-fx` predate it) вҖ” the novelty is the **application**: a chaosвҶ”form *condensation dramaturgy* conditioned phrase-by-phrase by his **real recording**. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” real-stem fetch+decode (handles JSON-`{url}` and raw `arrayBuffer`) with an offline-rendered A-natural-minor Karplus-Strong fallback + explicit source label so it is ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`analysis.ts`** вҖ” the 6-band FFT + RMS phrase state machine producing the `condensation` coupling; (3) **`gpu.ts`** вҖ” raw WebGPU (no three.js, no TSL): seeded storage buffer, compute pass, additive render pass, full `destroy()`; (4) the **rAF transport loop** in `page.tsx`. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source badge reads emerald **"вҷӘ Welcome Home вҖ” Karel's recording"** vs amber **"synth fallback"**; **no WebGPU вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a live DOM level-meter that still pulses to the audio** (the screen is never blank, nothing throws); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, GPU buffers/device destroyed, source stopped, ctx closed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” nibi by monoton-music, a 2026 WebGPU/TSL compute particle music-video engine, github.com/monoton-music/nibi; + Refik Anadol latent-flow point clouds)** + **recent-research(#5 вҖ” RESEARCH В§317, this fire)**. (#1 explicitly NOT claimed вҖ” WebGPU compute already exists in the lab; verified by grep.) **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban** AND the **emerging three.js-at-3Г— cluster**: **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (0Г— in the last 10; neither Canvas2D, nor three.js-WebGL, nor a raw-WebGL2 fragment shader) В· **audio-file (his real recording) INPUT** (not touch [4Г— banned], not phone-motion) В· **GPU curl-noise particle-condensation conditioned by a phrase state machine TECHNIQUE** В· immersive/latent/Anadol VIBE В· his real recording / A-natural-minor fallback, **NOT C-major-pentatonic**. Discharges the standing **"use his actual music"** directive in a new (GPU-particle-dramaturgy) form, and pulls from his most-loved cluster: real music (`227`вқӨпёҸ/`163`вқӨпёҸ) + immersive/particle/systems (`243-spectral-cloud`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ, `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `324-stillness` (the Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence вҖ” SVG; re-flagged as the next adult build) + `325-seismic-choir` (the live USGS earthquake feed sung as an HRTF spatial just-intonation chord around your head) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only GETs) В· 8.62 kB (111 kB First Load вҖ” raw WebGPU, light, no three.js bundle). Born from RESEARCH В§317. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether the WGSL validates + runs on the actual review GPU (could not execute WGSL on hardware in the sandbox вҖ” the DOM-meter fallback covers a no, but the headline experience depends on it); whether the chaosвҶ”form condensation reads legibly as the *shape of his phrasing* by eye; 120k-particle frame rate on a phone GPU; iOS Safari WebGPU support at review; whether `/api/featured` returns his album from the prod origin (synth fallback covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/323-latent-condensation/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 316 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/322-kids-voice-garden](/dream/322-kids-voice-garden)** вҖ” Kids Voice Garden. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” GROW a living musical garden with your VOICE: sing or hum and glowing branches race toward the sound and bloom notes; the garden keeps its real age, so it's taller and a different color of music every visit.** Tap the big **в–¶ Start singing** (creates/resumes the AudioContext + mic inside the gesture, iOS-safe); a dusk SVG sky with a moon, stars and soil appears, and a first seedling sprouts. **Sing/hum and a glint of "light" (an attractor point) appears in the sky вҖ” higher pitch places it higher, louder voice grows faster вҖ” and the nearest plant's branches *climb toward it* and bloom a note** the instant a tip reaches the light. This is the lab's **FIRST space-colonization growth** in 320+ prototypes (our only prior botanical growth was a recursive L-system): branch tips compete for and *consume* nearby attractor points (influence-radius association вҶ’ grow one step toward the averaged attractor direction вҶ’ kill-radius consumption вҶ’ bloom), producing growth that looks genuinely *alive* and reaches for the child rather than unfolding deterministically. **It's long-form and it remembers:** plants are saved to `localStorage` every 5s with millisecond timestamps and **age by real wall-clock time** вҖ” a garden seeded last night runs capped offline-regrowth and greets the child *fuller this morning*; and the harmony **journeys** through a D-Lydian progression (a new chord ~every 40s, each with its own dusk hue) so blooms at minute 5 are a different *color of music* than minute 1. Audio = always-on detuned root drone (never silent) + per-bloom Karplus-Strong plucks on the current chord вҶ’ generated-impulse convolver reverb вҶ’ 0.5 master вҶ’ brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (safe for small ears even when dense); after ~13 min it drifts to a soft lullaby. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`voice.ts`** вҖ” analysis-only mic (smoothed RMS loudness + autocorrelation pitch; never recorded/stored/transmitted; tracks stopped on unmount); (2) **`garden.ts`** вҖ” the space-colonization sim + localStorage persistence/offline-growth; (3) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” the safe Web-Audio harmonic engine (drone + KS plucks + D-Lydian journey + reverb/limiter); (4) the **wall-clock persistence + harmonic-clock state machine** in `page.tsx`. Scale: **D Lydian** (D E FвҷҜ GвҷҜ A B CвҷҜ) over a low D drone вҖ” deliberately **NOT** C-major-pentatonic (banned this cycle). No-reading: pitch=height is the only "control," the sky IS the canvas; a hands-free **auto-demo** drifts light and grows a plant on load so it's alive at a glance. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: mic denied/unavailable вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a full **touch fallback** (tap the sky to plant a small cluster of light, full-screen вүҘ64px target) + provenance label emerald **"Listening рҹҺӨ"** vs amber **"Touch mode вңӢ"**; SVG mutated via one `innerHTML` write/frame through refs (the React tree is not re-rendered each frame); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, save-timer clear, mic stop, audio dispose, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” first space-colonization growth in 320+ prototypes; verified via grep вҖ” all prior plant growth was recursive L-system)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **multi-cycle/long-form(#4 вҖ” persists + ages across sessions, harmonic journey; README specs a cycle-2 duet/seasons/pollinator deepening)**. Named ref: **Runions, Lane & Prusinkiewicz (2007), "Modeling Trees with a Space Colonization Algorithm" (algorithmicbotany.org)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **touch-INPUT-at-5Г— ban AND the Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban** that both ruled this cycle: **voice/mic INPUT** (the freshest modality вҖ” 0Г— in the last 10, KIDS.md-endorsed; not touch, not phone-motion) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js [the emerging 3Г— cluster], NOT a raw fragment shader) В· **space-colonization voice-grown-garden TECHNIQUE** (not L-system, not a no-fail trigger bed вҖ” it has long-form memory) В· **D-Lydian** not C-major-pentatonic. **Breaks the kids-recipe critique** (the no-fail-modal-noodle) with genuine long-form persistence/evolution, and the touch+Canvas2D/three.js renderer monoculture with voice+SVG. Pulls from Karel's loved kids-paint/grow cluster (`140-kids-string-bridge`вқӨпёҸ, `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ, `152-kids-star-paint`вқӨпёҸ, `158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ) + systems/emergent (`236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach kids fire; the differential-growth sibling `323-kids-coral-bloom` (a bioluminescent voice-grown reef вҖ” self-avoiding ring + spatial-bucket-grid repulsion + node insertion buckling into coral folds, in three.js; gorgeous, near-ship) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 6.3 kB (109 kB First Load вҖ” SVG, light). Born from RESEARCH В§316. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether autocorrelation tracks a wobbly toddler hum steadily enough that "sing higher = grow higher" reads as *control*; SVG `innerHTML`-per-frame at 60fps as the canopy fills on a phone; iOS AudioContext + mic resume in the Start gesture; whether the colonization growth reads as "racing toward my voice" by eye; whether offline-regrowth feels magical vs. arbitrary; mic accuracy in a noisy room (touch fallback covers the no).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/322-kids-voice-garden/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 315 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/321-spectral-flight](/dream/321-spectral-flight)** вҖ” Spectral Flight. `demoable`
  **Fly through the INSIDE of Karel's own recording вҖ” his *Welcome Home* piano turned into a navigable 3D spectral landscape you pilot in sync with playback.** Tap **Fly through his recording** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe): the app fetches one of Karel's real recordings from the public `/api/featured` (finds the `/welcome|karel/i` album) вҶ’ `/api/audio/[id]` (the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ / `163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ use), decodes it, and runs the **whole track through a hand-written offline STFT** (radix-2 FFT, 2048/1024, Hann, mono mix) into a **340 Г— 128** time Г— log-frequency dB-normalized magnitude grid. That grid becomes a **three.js `THREE.Points` landscape** вҖ” x = time, y = log-frequency, height/brightness = magnitude, additive glow sprites colored violet (bass) вҶ’ cyan вҶ’ white (treble), with fog вҖ” and the **camera flies forward along the time axis locked to `currentTime/duration`** so the world can never drift from the music. **Drag (pointer) or arrow keys** bank the look (eased back to center when idle); **space** play/pauses; a transport shows `m:ss / total`. It's the standing **"use his actual music"** directive finally in the *immersive flythrough* form вҖ” where `308-orbit-choir` put his recording in the *spatial-audio* layer, this puts you *inside* its spectrogram as a place. Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” the real-stem fetch+decode pipeline (handles both JSON-`{url}` and raw `arrayBuffer`, `decodeAudioData`) with an **offline-rendered A-natural-minor arpeggio fallback** + explicit source labels so it is ALWAYS demoable; (2) **`fft.ts`** вҖ” the from-scratch CooleyвҖ“Tukey FFT + offline STFT that downsamples the whole track into the landscape grid; (3) **`scene.ts`** вҖ” the three.js additive point-cloud flythrough (camera locked to playback, smoothed yaw/pitch banking, full `dispose()`); (4) the **transport-sync loop** in `page.tsx` (AudioContext-time bookkeeping, looping source, iOS resume). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: source label reads violet **"Karel's recording вҖ” <title>"** vs `text-rose-300` **"demo (his album unreachable)"**; no WebGL вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, source stop/disconnect, scene dispose, ctx close). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Refik Anadol *Latent City* (BRUSK, 2026) + Ryoji Ikeda *data-verse* вҖ” inhabiting data as a navigable landscape)** + **multi-cycle(#4 вҖ” README specs a cycle-2 spatialized/branching-flight deepening)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban that ruled the renderer this cycle** (319,317,314,313 were all Canvas2D): three.js point-cloud OUTPUT (not Canvas2D, not a raw fragment shader) В· audio-file (his real recording) + drag/keyboard INPUT (not phone-motion, not mic, not camera) В· offline-STFT navigable-landscape TECHNIQUE (not a live-reactive cloud, not FFT-bar-viz) В· immersive/Anadol-Ikeda VIBE В· fallback in A-natural-minor, **NOT C-major-pentatonic**. Pulls squarely from Karel's **most-loved cluster**: his real music (`227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ, `163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ) + immersive/spectral (`243-spectral-cloud`вқӨпёҸ, `267-spectral-drift`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings `322-strange-attractor` (a Lorenz attractor synthesized at audio rate in a custom AudioWorklet вҖ” the sound IS the phase-space sculpture; on Karel's named wishlist) + `323-stillness` (a Cage anti-instrument that blooms only in mic-silence and collapses at the first sound вҖ” flagged as the next adult build) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only GETs) В· 6.06 kB (294 kB First Load вҖ” three.js). Born from RESEARCH В§315. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album from the prod origin at review (the labeled synth fallback covers the no); whether flying through the point-cloud reads as a coherent *place* vs. a fog of dots; STFT build time + frame rate for a multi-minute track on a phone; iOS AudioContext resume; whether the camera-locked-to-playback sync feels tight by eye.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/321-spectral-flight/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 314 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/320-kids-light-loom](/dream/320-kids-light-loom)** вҖ” Kids Light Loom. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST *bowed* string: drag across glowing strings of light to make them SING and sustain, instead of plucking them.** Tap the big **в–¶ Start Playing** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe); six luminous vertical strings stand on a dark three.js stage, each a bold color + pitch (lower = bigger). **Drag a finger along a string and it *bows*:** it lights up, ripples with a visible standing wave, and sings a **sustained** tone that swells in while the finger moves and gently fades when you stop or lift вҖ” completely different from every prior string in the lab, which were one-shot *plucks*. **Bow speed is the expression:** drag slowly for a soft, dark, breathy sound; drag fast for a bright, loud, singing tone (the characteristic stick-slip / Helmholtz feel вҖ” faster bow = more energy = purer, brighter Helmholtz motion). **Multi-touch:** two fingers (two kids, or two hands) bow two strings at once вҶ’ they harmonize. No wrong notes, no score, no timer. This is the lab's **first continuous-excitation bowed-string physical model** in 300+ prototypes вҖ” every prior string (105/108/140/152/184/311/321) is *plucked* Karplus-Strong (one noise burst вҶ’ decay); a bow keeps feeding energy in, so the string never decays while bowed. Audio = approach (b): per-string sawtooth + white-noise вҶ’ bow-gain (bow-speedвҶ’amplitude) вҶ’ HP+LP filters (bow-speedвҶ’brightness) вҶ’ swell envelope, through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (built in code, no files) вҶ’ a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вҶ’ 0.5 master, plus an always-on D2+A2 root+fifth drone so it's never silent вҖ” all `setTargetAtTime`-glided (no clicks), safe for small ears even when all six are mashed. Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) the **bowed-string synth engine** (`audio.ts`); (2) a **multi-touch bow-gesture tracker** (`bow.ts`) вҖ” per-pointer velocity EMA вҶ’ normalized bow-speed, simultaneous fingers, вүҘ72px hit bands; (3) a **raw three.js scene** (`scene.ts`) вҖ” emissive `THREE.Line` strings whose position buffer is rewritten every frame for a 1вҖ“3-mode standing wave (modes scale with bow energy), additive-blended glow planes, and sparkle `THREE.Points` at the bow contact, on a dark fog stage with full geometry/material disposal on unmount. Scale: **D-Dorian hexachord / just-intonation 5ths over a D root** (D2 A2 D3 G3 A3 D4) вҖ” deliberately **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned). No-reading: colors are the strings, the drag IS the instrument; an auto-demo gently bows string 0 on Start so it's alive at a phone-first glance. Degrades for the 06:30 review: no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вҶ’ non-fatal notice, the three.js strings still animate and respond to touch. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” first continuous-excitation/bowed string in 300+ prototypes; all prior strings are one-shot plucked Karplus-Strong)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” bowed synth + multi-touch bow tracker + three.js standing-wave scene)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Stefania Serafin & Christophe Vergez real-time violin friction model + Julius O. Smith digital-waveguide bowed strings, CCRMA + Helmholtz motion/stick-slip; nods to loved `140-kids-string-bridge`)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag вҖ” crucially the **Canvas2D-at-4Г— ban that ruled the renderer this cycle** (319,317,314,313 were all Canvas2D): three.js glowing-string OUTPUT (not Canvas2D, not a raw fragment shader, not a creature-with-pads) В· multi-touch-bow INPUT (not phone-motion, not camera, not solo-tap) В· continuous-bowed-string TECHNIQUE (not plucked KS, not a no-fail trigger bed) В· D-Dorian not C-major-pentatonic. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `321-kids-seed-garden` (a long-form generative garden that grows + sings + **persists to localStorage with real wall-clock age** while you're away вҖ” near-ship, a future DEEP/long-form candidate) + `322-kids-sing-up` (sing higher вҶ’ a paper bird climbs the sky; autocorrelation pitch-match, SVG cut-paper) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.14 kB (296 kB First Load вҖ” three.js). Born from RESEARCH В§314. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether the bowed timbre actually *sustains and sings* by ear (vs. buzzes) and whether bow-speedвҶ’brightness reads as expressive on a real touch device; standing-wave frame rate on a phone; two-finger bowing on a real iPad; `linewidth>1` is GPU-dependent (strings may render 1px thin on some devices вҖ” the glow plane mitigates); iOS AudioContext resume; whether a 4-year-old discovers "drag, don't tap" without a prompt.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/320-kids-light-loom/README.md`
