## Previously newest (Cycle 313 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/319-hub-score](/dream/319-hub-score)** вҖ” Hub Score. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST networked / multi-instance piece вҖ” every open browser tab is one sustained voice in a serverless, wall-clock-synced just-intonation ensemble, and any tab can take the baton to conduct the whole room's harmony.** Press **в–¶ Start / Join the room** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe): you become one voice holding a chord-tone of a slow D-rooted just-intonation drone, with two gentle "ghost" voices already holding the chord so a single tab sounds full. **Open the same URL in a 2nd/3rd tab** and each becomes another sustained voice вҖ” they all **breathe together** because the breath is the **wall clock**: `globalPhase(Date.now())` is a pure function returning a 0..1 phase over a ~30s cycle, so every same-origin tab evaluates the same swell at the same instant with **zero clock-sync handshake** (the shared clock IS the conductor's baton; the BroadcastChannel only carries *what* to play, never *when*). Tap a **degree** (1/1, 9/8, 6/5 вҖҰ) to choose which chord-tone you sing; press **Take the baton** to become conductor and `в—Җ chord / chord в–¶` steps the shared field through a slow modal progression while brighter/darker В· denser/sparser В· oct Вұ reshape the whole room вҖ” **every tab glides to match** (last tab to take the baton wins). Rendered as a **Canvas2D living graphic score**: a horizontal time-river, one lane per player on its JI-degree line, each lane's band breathing with its live gain; a vertical sweep marks the wall-clock phase, your lane glows, the conductor's carries a caret вҖ” Ikeda-restrained, thin lines on near-black, **deliberately no glow** (NOT a fragment shader, NOT three.js-bloom, NOT a creature-with-pads). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`sync.ts`** вҖ” the JI set + chord progression + wall-clock phase/breath envelope + identity/hue + the BroadcastChannel protocol (`hello`/`welcome`/`voice`/`field`/`conductor`/`heartbeat`/`leave`, ~5s prune, rev-counter reconciliation); (2) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” a continuous additive-voice drone ensemble (fundamental + 3 quiet partials вҶ’ per-voice lowpass(brightness) вҶ’ breathing-LFO gain вҶ’ shared synthesized convolver reverb вҶ’ master brick-wall limiter, all `setTargetAtTime`-glided); (3) **`score.ts`** вҖ” the Canvas2D living graphic score; (4) the **conductor harmony-field state machine** (take-the-baton, last-writer-wins, the shared `{chordIndex, octave, brightness, density}` field everyone glides to). Scale: **just intonation over a D root** вҖ” 1, 9/8, 6/5, 4/3, 3/2, 8/5, 9/5, 2 (D-Dorian colour as pure ratios), explicitly **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: fully playable SOLO (ghost chord + you can conduct the ghosts); no `BroadcastChannel` вҶ’ amber notice + solo voice; audio survives a missing 2D context. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” first networked/multi-instance/BroadcastChannel shared-state piece in 319 prototypes; the multi-user shelf was empty 15+ cycles)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” The Hub (Bischoff/Perkis, 1980s) + The League of Automatic Music Composers (1978) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Ryoji Ikeda)**. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (multi-tab-presence+baton INPUT not phone-motion/mic/camera В· Canvas2D-graphic-score OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not three.js-bloom В· serverless shared-state + wall-clock-breath + conductor TECHNIQUE not a no-fail trigger bed В· just-intonation-over-D not C-major-pentatonic) вҖ” and opens the **multi-user / networked axis** the lab had never shipped. Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; the rhythmic sibling `318-ensemble-room` (an editable 16Г—8 D-Dorian **step-sequencer** with a Chris-Wilson lookahead scheduler + a **three.js 3D orbital constellation** вҖ” the obvious WebRTC-cross-device next step) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.61 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§313. **Known scope limit:** `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin same-browser-profile only вҖ” "the room" is one machine's tabs, NOT cross-device (true cross-device needs WebRTC + signaling). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether 3 tabs feel genuinely synchronized on a real machine, whether the lone-tab ghost-chord + conductor experience reads at a phone-first review (the multi-tab payoff needs вүҘ2 tabs), JI drone timbre + reverb loudness by ear, the baton-handoff race under simultaneous claims, iOS AudioContext resume.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/319-hub-score/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 312 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/317-kids-color-bells](/dream/317-kids-color-bells)** вҖ” Kids Color Bells. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the room becomes your instrument: show the camera a colored object and a bell rings.** Tap the big **в–¶ Start** (resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe) and the rear camera opens; a "magic circle" reticle sits at the center of the live feed. Point the camera at something colorful вҖ” a red toy, a blue cup, a green leaf вҖ” and **hold it steady for ~0.5s** (a clockwise progress arc fills the reticle): that color's **bell rings**, a full-screen color wash flashes, and a **bead is added to a growing "song basket"** along the bottom. Tap **в–¶ Play song** to replay the collected colors as a little melody (each bead lights as it sounds); **рҹ§ә** empties the basket. No fail, no score, no timer вҖ” showing a new color just adds another bead. This is the lab's **first camera region-color sampling** technique: each frame the video is drawn to an offscreen canvas, the **average RGB inside the reticle box** is computed вҶ’ HSV, and (if saturated/bright enough) the **hue is mapped to one of 6 bins** вҶ’ a note вҖ” *no ML, no body/face tracking, no optical flow*, deliberately simple and robust for a 4-year-old. HueвҶ’note over the **D major hexachord** (red D3 В· orange E3 В· yellow FвҷҜ3 В· green G3 В· blue A3 В· violet B3 вҖ” warm colors low, cool colors ascending; **NOT** C-major-pentatonic, banned this cycle). Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) the **camera-color sampler** (`color.ts`) вҖ” offscreen `drawImage` вҶ’ `getImageData` center box вҶ’ average RGB вҶ’ RGBвҶ’HSV вҶ’ saturation/value gate вҶ’ 6-bin hue map + a cross-origin-taint guard; (2) an **FM bell audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” sine carrier + inharmonic modulator (ratio 2.756) + bright 2nd partial for a warm marimba/gamelan bell, through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вҶ’ 0.5 master, plus a barely-there D3+A3+D4 pad so it's never silent; (3) a **Canvas2D scene** (`scene.ts`) вҖ” live video feed, animated reticle with hold-progress arc, color splash, and the bead strand (explicitly **not** a raw full-screen fragment shader and **not** a creature-with-tappable-pads); (4) the **song-memory state machine** (collect вҶ’ cap at 24 beads вҶ’ replay/clear). Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: camera denied/unsupported вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a **touch fallback** of six big (вүҘ68px) color buttons you can tap to ring bells and build a song, plus a hands-free auto-demo that rings a few colors on load; provenance shown as emerald **"Camera on"** vs amber **"Touch mode."** Full cleanup (rAF cancel, camera `track.stop()`, AudioContext close on unmount). **Ambition 2/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” camera region-color sampling вҶ’ sound, a lab-first)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” four)**. Named refs in README: **Toshio Iwai *SimTunes* (1996)** + the color-organ / Castel *clavecin oculaire* / Len Lye / Oskar Fischinger visual-music lineage. **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (camera-color INPUT not phone-motion/touch В· Canvas2D-over-camera OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads В· hueвҶ’bell + collected-song-memory TECHNIQUE not the no-fail-noodle В· D-major-hexachord not C-major-pentatonic) вҖ” and brings a **fresh INPUT modality (camera)** the lab hadn't shipped in the recent window, where the last two kids ships were both touch+Canvas2D (311, 313). **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #2** (break the kids recipe with memory/consequence; break the creature-with-pads/full-screen-shader monoculture). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `316-kids-seed-garden` (a generative *Bloom*-garden that grows + sings + **persists with wall-clock age** while you're away вҖ” gorgeous, near-ship) + `315-kids-sing-up` (sing a pitch to climb a balloon, autocorrelation pitch-match) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.6 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§312. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: color-bin accuracy under real-room lighting (no white-balance; generous thresholds mitigate), iOS rear-camera `facingMode:environment` only on Safari (falls through to touch otherwise), FM bell timbre by ear, hold-to-confirm feel + frame rate on a real phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/317-kids-color-bells/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 311 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 2 approaches)

- **[/dream/314-solar-wind](/dream/314-solar-wind)** вҖ” Solar Wind. `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST live SPACE-weather sonification вҖ” a long-form drone scored, in real time, by the Sun.** Tap **Begin** (creates/resumes the AudioContext in the gesture, iOS-safe); a sustained just-intonation overtone drone over D2 (ratios 1, 3/2, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 вҖ” deliberately **not** C-major-pentatonic) starts, and a sky of layered **aurora curtains** glows over a star field. There are no plucks or triggers вҖ” the **live solar wind continuously glides the harmony and texture**: three keyless, CORS-open **NOAA SWPC** feeds (`solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json` speed+density В· `solar-wind/mag-1-day.json` `bz_gsm`+`bt` В· `json/planetary_k_index_1m.json` Kp) are fetched directly from the browser, merged on one timeline, and re-polled every ~60s. **Faster wind вҶ’ brighter/higher; denser plasma вҶ’ thicker texture + shimmer; southward Bz вҶ’ detunes the 5th partial into slow beating (storm tension), northward settles to a pure ratio; a high Kp вҶ’ storm climax + curtains turn magenta and turbulent.** A HUD shows the Sun's *actual numbers right now* (speed km/s В· density В· Bz nT В· Kp, with a STORM flag at KpвүҘ5). Two modes: **Live** (sonifies the present moment, slowly drifting вҖ” genuinely different after a few minutes) and **Replay 24h** (time-compresses the fetched day into ~3 min so you hear a whole day of the Sun, storm and all, as one arc, with a progress bar). It's the **sky *above* you**, where the loved-cluster-adjacent `279-tremor-score` sonified the Earth *beneath* you вҖ” a different external feed, taken because В§289 already filled the seismic shelf. Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) three NOAA feed pipelines with **defensive header-by-name column lookup** + bad-value (`null`/`""`/`-9999.9`) filtering + UTC merge + a bundled ~54-row synthetic-storm fallback so it plays/animates offline; (2) the fixed-bank just-intonation **overtone drone engine** (`setTargetAtTime` glides over ~4s, brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` + 0.42 master so a Kp-9 climax can never blast); (3) the Canvas2D **aurora-curtain renderer** (folded-sheet geometry, greenвҶ’magenta gradient, additive crossings, star field, storm-reactive horizon glow вҖ” explicitly **not** a single full-screen noise shader); (4) the live/replay-24h state machine. Graceful for the 06:30 phone review: provenance line states emerald **"Live В· NOAA SWPC"** vs amber **"Sample data (NOAA feed offline)"**, errors in `text-rose-300`. **Ambition 3/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Terry Riley & Kronos Quartet *Sun Rings* 2002**, built from Don Gurnett's real NASA plasma-wave recordings + NOAA SWPC + SeismoDome lineage) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH В§311). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (live-API INPUT not phone-motion/touch В· Canvas2D aurora-curtains OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads В· continuous-drone data-sonification TECHNIQUE not discrete triggers В· just-intonation overtones not C-major-pentatonic). **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #3** ("compose from the live planet вҖ” the empty real-world-data shelf"). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; the clinical Ikeda sibling `315-helios-stream` (granular cloud + inharmonic spectral comb + data.matrix field) build-explored and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only third-party GETs) В· 5.5 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§311. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: NOAA CORS reachability from the prod origin at review (sample fallback covers the no), whether live ranges feel as dramatic as the synthetic storm, whether the Bz beating reads as "tension" vs. mud, aurora frame rate + iOS AudioContext resume on a phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/314-solar-wind/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 310 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/313-kids-tone-tower](/dream/313-kids-tone-tower)** вҖ” Kids Tone Tower. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” consequence made PHYSICAL: a tower the child's *memory* builds.** Tap **Build it taller в–І** (resumes the AudioContext + a soft pad so it's never silent); a 2-block tower stands and **sings its song** (blocks light bottomвҶ’top, each playing its note вҖ” self-demos on Start). A clear *your turn* cue (pulsing green base + рҹ‘Ҷ, no reading). **Echo the melody** on the 4 big colored note-tiles (color = pitch): each **correct** note lights the matching block with a soft landing chime; **finishing the whole song** sends a shimmer up the tower, plays a rising arpeggio, and **grows it by one note** вҖ” a new glowing block drops and settles on top, so the tower is **taller and persists**. A **wrong** note makes the top block **wobble and topple off** with a gentle descending "aw" (NOT a buzzer, NOT game-over); the song shrinks by one and is re-sung from the bottom вҖ” **slower after 2 misses** вҖ” so a 4yo never gets stuck (never below the 2-block base). The tower at minute 3 is a visible record of how far the child's memory reached. This is the **right/wrong-consequence half** of the JURY's #2 provocation ("break the kids recipe вҖ” a piece with memory or consequence where the child can make something *wrong* and fix it"); cycle 308's `311-kids-music-box` took the *persistence* half, and `313` is the only one of this fire's three explorers that **breaks the over-represented Canvas2D-creature-with-pads form** (the consequence is architectural/spatial, not a creature reacting). Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) an **always-safe Web Audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” warm mallet/marimba voices (sine + bright triangle-octave partial), a soft landing thud, a topple "aw" (triangle gliding 330вҶ’160 Hz), a soft always-on G/D-fifth pad, a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (no files), all through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + modest 0.5 master so dense stacking stays safe for small ears; (2) a **Canvas2D `TowerScene`** (`tower.ts`) with a small block-physics model (settle / gravity / topple / sway / shimmer); (3) the **growing-sequence game state machine** (demo вҶ’ yourTurn вҶ’ celebrate) with per-tap match-detection and the generous miss/shorten/slow-re-sing logic. Scale: **G-major tetrachord GВ·AВ·BВ·D** (from the G-major hexachord; growth notes drawn only from the 4 playable tiles so every appended note is echoable) вҖ” deliberately **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). No-reading: color-tiles, a pointing-finger turn cue, a рҹ§ұ-count for the grown-up. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: sings its starting tower on Start hands-free; no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, the tower still builds and animates silently. **Ambition 3/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Simon** Milton Bradley 1978 + classic block/stacking toys + **JMIR Serious Games 2026** process-over-pass/fail) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH В§310). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (touch INPUT not phone-motion В· Canvas2D-block-TOWER OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader and not creature-with-pads В· memoryвҶ’persistent-stacking-with-topple-consequence FORM not the no-fail-noodle В· G-major-tetrachord not C-major-pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `312-kids-sing-back` (literal Simon-grows echo-singing, creature "Pip") + `314-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator/MIROR reflexive duet, the "it remembered!" motif-weave) build-explored and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 5.29 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§310. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: tap-to-sound latency on a real device, whether the settle/topple physics *feel* right at 60 fps on a phone, iOS/Android AudioContext resume, reverb loudness on real speakers.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/313-kids-tone-tower/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 309 вҖ” adult В· DEEP-continue, solo вҖ” multi-cycle thread #3 вҶ’ cycle 2)

- **[/dream/308-orbit-choir](/dream/308-orbit-choir)** вҖ” Orbit Choir **(cycle 2: now sung by Karel's own album)**. `demoable`
  **The spatial thread, deepened with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano вҖ” the first time the "use your actual music" directive has reached the lab's non-screen spatial layer.** Cycle 1 was a synthesised resolving chord; **cycle 2 replaces the seven synth voices with Karel's actual recordings**, fetched live from the public `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids) вҶ’ `/api/audio/[id]` (returns a signed URL per track) вҖ” the same anon, no-auth path the loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ / `163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ use. Each recording becomes one HRTF-panned voice scattered around your head, **detuned (`playbackRate` вүҲ ВұВҪ-semitone) and dark (low `lowpass` cutoff)** вҖ” a blurred, distant cluster of his own music; over the ~6-minute arc each one **orbits inward, sharpens (cutoff opens), and settles to true pitch (`playbackRate вҶ’ 1.0`)**: you literally gather his album into a clear room around your head, a head-tracked **spatial *Forty Part Motet*** of his own piano. **Two lab-firsts shipped alongside:** (1) **haptics** вҖ” `navigator.vibrate` pulses a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you are facing* locks home, and a triple-pulse when the whole room resolves (the lab's first haptic output in 300+ prototypes); (2) **persistence** вҖ” how far you'd gathered the room is saved to `localStorage`, so returning reads *"Return to the room В· your room was N% gathered"* and the arc **resumes where you left it** ("Begin again" deliberately re-scatters). Still wear **headphones** (binaural HRTF). Graceful fallback is load-bearing: if `/api/featured` is unreachable or no track decodes (offline / private preview / CDN block), it reverts to the **original synthesised resolving-chord choir** and the top label says which source is playing. Subsystems (вүҘ3): DeviceOrientation head-tracker + an N-voice HRTF panner scene of looping `AudioBufferSource`s + a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb + the 360 s azimuth/sharpen/playbackRate **convergence state machine** + the featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + localStorage room-memory. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” first haptic output + first real-stem source on the spatial layer) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3 вҖ” **Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* 2001**, on tour MIMOCA/NGC 2026; La Monte Young *Dream House*; Pauline Oliveros) + multi-cycle(#4 вҖ” thread #3, cycle 2). **Diversity**: stays on the non-screen adult-spatial axis (output is audio, screen a footnote) вҖ” dodges the JURY's banned raw-WebGL2-shader / phone-motion-noodle-kids / pentatonic tags. **Directly discharges JURY 2026-06-04 provocation #1** ("Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems вҖ” do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle вҖҰ the standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer"). Born from RESEARCH В§307/В§309. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (read-only GETs) В· 5.35 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether 7 simultaneous piano recordings, spatially separated + only-the-faced-one-bright, read as a coherent "listening room" vs. mush; whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album in prod (fallback covers the no); the haptic + resume feel on a real phone.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 308 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/311-kids-music-box](/dream/311-kids-music-box)** вҖ” Kids Music Box. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's first kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions.** A slowly-spinning 3D music-box **cylinder** the child studs with pins to *compose* a looping tune; a fixed glowing **comb** at the front plucks each pin as it rolls past. Tap a slot on the front face вҶ’ a colored pin pops up and sings on its next pass; tap again to remove it. The pattern **persists to `localStorage`**, so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and **the box remembers the tune even after you close and reopen it** вҖ” a little machine the child builds, not a momentary forgettable wash. This is the **direct answer to the JURY's #2 provocation** ("break the kids recipe вҖ” ship a piece with memory or consequence, where *what they did persists and grows*; five straight kids fires were a sensor wired to a no-fail modal noodle"). It also breaks the **Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pattern** its two WIDE siblings shared, and is the only candidate whose output is a **3D physical-object metaphor** (three.js) rather than a full-screen shader or a flat creature. Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) a **Karplus-Strong** plucked-string engine (`ks-audio.ts`) вҖ” one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch (filtered noise burst вҶ’ tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback вҶ’ attack/release envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + modest master gain (0.55) so dense patterns stay safe for small ears; (2) a **three.js / @react-three/fiber** 3D scene (`cylinder.tsx`) вҖ” rotating wooden barrel with brass caps, a color-coded comb, raised pin studs that "pop" + glow when plucked, and a front-face-only invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body via a shared rotation ref (back-face taps rejected by surface-normalВ·camera test); (3) a per-frame **step-sequencer clock** вҖ” the comb-step is sampled each frame and any pins at that step pluck; (4) **localStorage persistence** (`store.ts`) with try/catch degrade + a seed tune so the box is already singing at a glance. Scale: **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B вҖ” the raised-4th sparkle), bright + consonant, explicitly **NOT C-major-pentatonic** (banned this cycle). No-reading: colors are the notes, the studs the child taps ARE the melody, a tiny caption is for the grown-up. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: auto-spins a seeded tune on Start; no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вҶ’ notice, box still spins. The curating fire **fixed a real pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle was a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. **Ambition 3/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, **Swiss cylinder musical box** c.1796 Geneva + **Karplus-Strong** 1983) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH В§308 вҖ” reflexive interaction / Pachet *Continuator* + Addessi *MIROR*: carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed). **Diversity** dodges every banned tag (touch INPUT not phone-motion В· three.js 3D-object OUTPUT not raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader В· persistence/sequencer FORM not the no-fail-noodle В· D-Lydian not C-major-pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator/MIROR call-and-response duet) + `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows memory game with real-but-kind right/wrong) build-verified and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 4.74 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§308. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: KS timbre by ear (brightness/damping per row), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, and three.js disposal across an unmount in a live session.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/311-kids-music-box/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 307 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 2 approaches вҖ” Orbit Choir cycle 1, superseded above)

- **[/dream/308-orbit-choir](/dream/308-orbit-choir)** вҖ” Orbit Choir (cycle 1, synth voices). `demoable`
  **The lab's FIRST audio-first / non-screen spatial piece** вҖ” and its first HRTF spatial-audio output + first `DeviceOrientation`-as-listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes. **Wear headphones.** Near-black screen; tap *Begin the orbit* (one tap resumes the AudioContext + requests iOS motion permission). Seven sustained HRTF-panned voices start **scattered around your head and detuned into a soft cluster**; over a **6-minute** eased scheduler they **orbit inward to an even ring AND glide into a warm A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth chord** вҖ” so the spatial field and the harmony resolve *together* and the room is audibly different at minute 6 than minute 0 (long-form / stateful, not a loop). **Turn your phone (or your head):** `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener`; the voice you face swells **and** its personal resolution is nudged forward вҖ” so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace of the convergence. The core gesture is load-bearing science, not decoration: generic Web-Audio HRTF is notoriously front/back-ambiguous, and **active head movement is the known fix** (RESEARCH В§307 / arXiv:2510.09161) вҖ” turning is what makes the cheap generic HRTF legible. Three+ subsystems: (1) DeviceOrientation head-tracker (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); (2) a 7-voice HRTF panner scene вҖ” each voice 2-3 sine `OscillatorNode`s + breathing-LFO gain вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ its own `PannerNode panningModel="HRTF"`; (3) a synthesized `ConvolverNode` reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no audio files); (4) a 360s azimuth+pitch **convergence state machine**. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: no sensor / desktop вҶ’ pointer-drag + arrow-keys + a hands-free **auto-tour** that demos itself; no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice. Faint violet **orbital-map** canvas (listener at center, facing marker, dim voice-dots drifting together) + a thin progress ring with `M:SS вҖ” scatteredвҶ’drifting inвҶ’gatheringвҶ’almost homeвҶ’resolved` + a "Begin again" hold state вҖ” the screen is a footnote by design. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, first HRTF output + first DeviceOrientation listener-rotation) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3, La Monte Young *Dream House* В· Гүliane Radigue В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) + recent-research(#5, В§307/В§295). **Diversity** executes JURY #5 head-on вҖ” the FIRST build whose **output is not a screen visualizer** (pure spatial audio); dodges the banned kids-vibe / tilt-screen-object input / matte-canvas+three.js output / pentatonic tags. **Winner of a DEEP 2-approach fire**; the faithful fixed-room sibling `307-still-room` (Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*, 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn-to-tune-in) was build-verified and banked in IDEAS as the calmer companion. Directly discharges the JURY's standing provocations #3 ("ship the spatial breadth banked-but-never-shipped вҖ” ZERO of 3 spatial pieces had shipped") + #4 (build В§295's un-spent head-tracked shelf) + #5 (ban the audioвҶ’visual driver). Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 3.92 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§307. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, and the shepherding feel.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 306 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker](/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker)** вҖ” Rain-Shaker. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+).** Hold the phone and **shake it like a rainstick or maraca** вҖ” gentle shakes make a soft trickle of beads, bigger shakes tumble a warm rain down the screen and each strong shake-peak strikes a **D-Dorian** bell. An always-on pad keeps it alive; no fail, no timer, no score. This is the lab's **first `devicemotion`/accelerometer input** вҖ” distinct from the `deviceorientation` *tilt* (303) and *heading* (290): it reads shake-ENERGY, not orientation. Three subsystems: (1) `shake.ts` вҖ” `accelerationIncludingGravity` вҶ’ per-axis running-average **high-pass** (removes gravity) вҶ’ magnitude вҶ’ smoothed shake-energy envelope вҶ’ threshold "hit" events (~130 ms refractory); every input path (motion / pointer-shake / auto-demo) feeds the IDENTICAL detector; (2) `rain-audio.ts` вҖ” a soft D-Dorian pad + a rainstick trickle of filtered-noise bead grains (density вҲқ energy) + FM bell chimes struck on hits (panned, lowpassed), all through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so vigorous shaking can NEVER blast (matters more here than anywhere); (3) `rain-gl.ts` вҖ” raw WebGL2 (hand-written GLSL ES 3.00), a darkвҶ’dawn gradient that warms with energy + up-to-600 soft point-sprite rain beads in **matte premultiplied alpha-over** (the non-additive house style вҖ” switched from the builder's additive blend during curation to respect the JURY's anti-glow ban) + warm glow blooms on each bell. Degrades for the 06:30 phone review: iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` inside the Start tap; denied/no-sensor вҶ’ pointer-shake + a hands-free auto-demo that rains by itself; no WebGL2 вҶ’ rose notice, audio plays on. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, devicemotion shake-energy) + named-reference(#3, rainstick/maraca) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH В§306 вҖ” CHI 2026 movement-sonification). **Diversity** dodges every standing JURY ban: devicemotion INPUT (not touch), raw-WebGL2 matte OUTPUT (not three.js, not matte-Canvas2D, not additive), shake-energy TECHNIQUE (not pentatonic-poke), D-Dorian (not pentatonic). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `304-kids-clap-band` (clapвҶ’onset-detection layered groove, Steve Reich *Clapping Music*, D-Mixolydian) + `305-kids-blow-sail` (blowвҶ’Wiener-entropy breath sailing, C-Lydian) build-verified and re-banked in IDEAS. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 7 kB. Born from RESEARCH В§306. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: shake threshold/scale *feel* on a real phone, the auto-demo cadence, point-size across GPUs.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker/README.md`

## Older (Cycle 305 вҖ” adult build В· DEEPEN, Mirror-Canon cycle 2)

- **[/dream/302-mirror-canon-round](/dream/302-mirror-canon-round)** вҖ” Mirror Canon (Round вҮ„ Phase). `demoable`
  **Cycle 2 of the lab's Mirror-Canon thread (a deepening of the standout `287-mirror-choir`).** The piece is otherwise unchanged вҖ” conduct a four-voice round sung by past versions of yourself, in a matte wooden mirror вҖ” but it now has a **Round вҮ„ Phase mode toggle** that folds in the banked sibling `301-mirror-canon-phase`'s engine rather than shipping a separate piece. In **Round** mode every committed past-you enters offset on one locked bar grid (a true canon, no drift). Flip to **Phase** and each voice's loop is stretched by `(1 + nВ·0.012)`Г— the bar and clocked from its own commit time вҖ” **Steve Reich's *Piano Phase*** вҖ” so the past-yous gradually slip in and out of phase with one another and **the round literally never repeats** (genuinely different at minute 2 than at second 5). A live **drift HUD** shows each voice's loop position as a tinted marker: in Round they hold their fixed offsets, in Phase they slide apart. Both modes share the same record/commit, conduct (mute/solo), ghost-fallback (auto-commits two voices so it demos itself with no camera), and Rozin wooden-mirror render. This advances the lab's **2nd genuine multi-cycle thread** to its planned cycle 2 вҖ” the direct answer to the JURY's #1 standing provocation ("stop shipping orphans; pick ONE thing and deepen it over 2вҖ“3 cycles"). **Ambition 2/5**: multi-cycle-commitment(#4) + named-reference(#3: Steve Reich *Piano Phase*, atop 287's Rozin/round/Frippertronics lineage). **Diversity**: a deliberate **continue-a-multi-cycle-build** (the mandate's explicit carve-out); the NEW axis carrying the gate is the phasing TECHNIQUE, and INPUT (camera/body) В· VIBE (adult/embodied) still dodge the standing banned touch/three.js/pentatonic-poke. Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 7.51 kB (was 6.89). Born from cyc303's banked sibling + RESEARCH В§303. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: the *feel* of the drift rate (`PHASE_DRIFT` 0.012) on real hardware, whether the phase cloud reads as "my selves slipping apart" vs. a wash, and (carried) MediaPipe CDN reliability + formant intelligibility at 4 stacked voices.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/302-mirror-canon-round/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 304 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/303-kids-wind-harp](/dream/303-kids-wind-harp)** вҖ” Kids' Wind-Harp. `demoable`
  **Tip the world.** Hit one big button, then **tilt your phone or iPad** вҖ” gravity swings a row of seven glowing strings like a wind-harp, and any string that swings far enough **plucks itself and sings**. The child plays music by *tipping the world*, hands-free, no tapping, no reading, no way to lose. The lab's **first tilt-input piece since the loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`**, and a deliberate pull on three of Karel's loved prototypes (`83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ tilt, `105-pluck-field`вқӨпёҸ Karplus pluck, `140-kids-string-bridge`вқӨпёҸ playable strings). Two genuinely **fresh-for-this-lab techniques** coupled into one toy: (1) **Verlet-integration string physics** вҖ” each of the 7 strings is a 14-node mass-chain solved with Verlet + distance-constraint relaxation (3 passes/frame) on a **fixed 120 Hz step**; the device-tilt `deviceorientation` ОІ/Оі becomes a **gravity vector**, so tipping the tablet literally changes which way "down" is and the hanging strings swing and settle with believable physical motion; (2) **Karplus-Strong plucked-string synthesis** (Karplus & Strong, 1983) вҖ” when a string's midpoint swing crosses a threshold it plucks: a noise burst rendered offline through a tuned, lowpass-fed delay line into an `AudioBuffer`, bigger swing вҶ’ louder + brighter + longer, per-string refractory so it never machine-guns, stereo-panned lowвҶ’high across the row. Three subsystems вҶ’ one pipeline (physics + synth + a hand-written **raw WebGL2** ribbon renderer вҖ” matte alpha-over string curves expanded along their normals on a soft breathing dark gradient, a glow flash on each pluck, **no additive bloom, no three.js**). The 7 strings are tuned to a warm **D-Dorian** scale (D E F G A B C вҖ” explicitly **NOT** C-major-pentatonic), with an ambient D+A drone underneath and a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter so a fistful of simultaneous plucks can never blast. Degrades at every step so it's **fully playable on a desktop with no sensors**: iOS 13+ `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` is called inside the Start gesture (denial вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` note + auto-fallback); **pointer-drag** tilts the gravity vector on desktop; and a **2 s auto-sway** kicks in when no tilt events arrive so the harp **plays itself** and a 4-year-old (or Karel at 06:30) always sees causeвҶ’effect. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; the two siblings вҖ” `299-kids-clap-band` (clap вҶ’ HFC-onset-detection layered groove, Steve Reich *Clapping Music*) and `300-kids-blow-sail` (blow вҶ’ Wiener-entropy breath-envelope sailing) вҖ” are build-reviewed and re-banked in IDEAS.md. Chains from RESEARCH В§304 (*Rhythm in the Air*, arXiv:2511.00793, Nov 2025 вҖ” embodied motion вҶ’ scale-constrained musical output). **Ambition 2/5**: never-used-technique(#1: Verlet rope physics вҖ” 0 prior INDEX/README hits) + named-reference(#3: Aeolian harp; Karplus-Strong 1983). **Diversity** (dodges the standing banned touch/three.js/matte-Canvas2D/pentatonic-poke): INPUT=device tilt В· OUTPUT=raw-WebGL2 ribbons В· TECHNIQUE=Verlet physics + Karplus-Strong В· VIBE=kids/calm/modal. For kids 4+ В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: the deviceorientationвҶ’gravity *feel* and pluck threshold on a real tilting hand, the iOS permission branches, and the rendered look of the ribbon strips (no sensors/GPU in the sandbox).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/303-kids-wind-harp/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 300 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/295-kids-shadow-dance](/dream/295-kids-shadow-dance)** вҖ” Kids' Shadow Dance. `demoable`
  **Stand back, hit one big button, and *dance with your whole body* вҖ” wherever you move, a dusk meadow blooms, leaves glowing light-trails, and sings. Nothing to tap, no way to be wrong; the only instruction is *move*.** The lab's **first kids whole-body / camera piece** вҖ” it answers the 2026-06-03 jury's #2 provocation head-on ("ban touch for kids; make the child *move* or *sing*, not poke") and escapes the C-pentatonic rut Karel flagged (it's tuned to **G-Lydian**, not pentatonic). On **Start dancing** it requests the camera and runs **frame-difference optical-flow** with **zero dependencies, no MediaPipe, no skeleton**: each frame is drawn to a tiny **32Г—24** offscreen canvas, per-cell Rec.601 luminance is differenced against the previous frame (noise-gated + lightly smoothed) вҶ’ a **motion field** robust to a constantly-wiggling 4-year-old. That field is summarised to three numbers вҖ” `energy` (total motion), `heightY` (centre-of-motion height), `spawn` (hot-cell count) вҖ” and packed into an **RG8 texture** (R=motion, G=silhouette luma). Three subsystems feed one pipeline: (1) the motion-field analyser; (2) a **raw WebGL2 `#version 300 es`** two-pass renderer вҖ” a **ping-pong RGBA8 framebuffer trail-accumulation** pass (`newTrail = max(oldTrailВ·decay, freshMotion)`) so motion leaves glowing light-trails, then a dusk skyвҶ’meadow scene shader with blooms from hot cells, swaying grass, quiet stars, and a faint low-res **self-silhouette composite** (a cool glowing presence, never a hard cutout, mirror-flipped so it reads like a mirror); (3) a fully-synthesised **Web Audio** ensemble вҖ” a breathing pad always underneath plus triangle+octave bloom voices on a **three-octave G-Lydian** scale (Lydian's raised 4th = floaty dusk, every note consonant), with `energy` вҶ’ pad swell + lowpass opening + denser blooms + occasional stacked harmonies, `heightY` вҶ’ register, `spawn` вҶ’ bloom count, all through a soft lowpass + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter so it can **never** get harsh however wildly the child dances. Camera is **analysis-only** вҖ” frames are reduced to motion numbers and discarded, never recorded or sent (no network, no API route, no guard). Degrades at every step: **no camera / denied** вҶ’ a hand-authored **ghost dancer** (a soft blob that figure-eights, jumps, and flails) drives the *identical* motion-fieldвҶ’AV pipeline so it's fully demoable and never silent (amber notice); **no WebGL2** вҶ’ readable rose notice and the music keeps playing. WIDE winner over two banked siblings вҖ” `294-kids-voice-garden` (sing a garden into bloom, autocorrelation pitch-detection + sing-back memory) and `296-kids-firefly-tilt` (tilt a firefly to wake stars; the sky remembers your path and replays it as a lullaby) вҖ” both build-verified, full specs in IDEAS.md. Chains from RESEARCH В§300 (CHI 2026 movement-sonification workshop) + recent-research IDEAS seed. **Ambition 3/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems + named-reference + recent-research. **Diversity** (dodges the jury's banned touch/three.js/matte-Canvas2D + the pentatonic rut): INPUT=camera/whole-body В· OUTPUT=raw-WebGL2 trail-meadow В· TECHNIQUE=frame-difference optical-flow motion-field В· VIBE=kids/dusk/embodied. References: **Гүmile Jaques-Dalcroze, *Eurhythmics*** (music through whole-body movement); **Myron Krueger, *Videoplace*** (1985, foundational full-body video interaction); **Frid & Bresin**, interactive sonification of children's movement (*Frontiers in Neuroscience*, 2016). For kids 4+ В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 7.08 kB. Build-verified, not browser-verified.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/295-kids-shadow-dance/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 298 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers)

- **[/dream/293-kids-sky-band](/dream/293-kids-sky-band)** вҖ” Kids' Sky Band. `demoable`
  **A tiny band that plays the *real sky outside your window right now* вҖ” so it sounds a little different every day, because the weather is real.** The lab's **FIRST kids real-world-data piece** and **first weather source** (prior real-world pieces вҖ” 279 earthquakes, 288 aurora вҖ” were adult/cosmic). On Start it fetches live conditions from keyless, CORS-open **Open-Meteo** via `navigator.geolocation` (3s timeout вҶ’ San Francisco fallback вҶ’ bundled `SAMPLE_WEATHER` if offline), then drives a four-voice **C-major-pentatonic** ensemble (no wrong notes) through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter: **Sun** = warm bell (higher/brighter by day, from `temperature_2m`+`is_day`), **Cloud** = soft sine pad whose level+lowpass tracks `cloud_cover`, **Wind** = filtered-noise whoosh on an LFO from `wind_speed_10m`, **Rain** = gentle pentatonic plinks whose density follows `precipitation`; tempo nudged by temperature; a 12-min lullaby fade. The sky itself is a **single raw WebGL2 `#version 300 es` fragment shader** (one full-screen quad) fed the *same* live numbers: gradient dawn/day/dusk/night palette from `is_day`+temp, fbm clouds at `cloud_cover`, a sun/moon disc with a distance-field smiley face, rain streaks, wind-driven drift, twinkling night stars. **Plays fully hands-free** вҖ” the jury banned touch input for this kids cycle, so there's nothing to poke (tapping a sky-friend to solo it is an optional bonus). Starts instantly on the bundled sample, swaps to live data when it resolves, and degrades at every step (no geo вҶ’ SF В· no network вҶ’ sample + amber notice В· no WebGL2 вҶ’ audio-only + readable rose notice). WIDE winner over `294-kids-voice-garden` (singвҶ’bloom) + `295-kids-shadow-dance` (danceвҶ’bloom), both banked in IDEAS. Born from RESEARCH В§298 (DATASONICA 2026 award; RIT Weather Chimes Apr 2026). Ref: **John Luther Adams, *The Place Where You Go to Listen*** (Museum of the North, Fairbanks); Open-Meteo. For kids 4+ В· real-world-data input (hands-free) В· raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader output В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 7.73 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/293-kids-sky-band/README.md`

- **[/dream/286-kids-jelly-choir](/dream/286-kids-jelly-choir)** вҖ” Jelly Choir. `demoable`
  **Five wobbly candy-colored jellies with googly eyes sit in a row вҖ” poke one (or drag it) and it stretches, springs back, and *sings its own wobble*; poke two at once and they harmonize.** The lab's **first mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вҶ’ audio** instrument. Each jelly is a ring of 14 point-masses held in a circle by **radial** springs (each point вҶ’ center) and **structural** springs (each point вҶ’ its neighbors); poke a point and **Verlet integration** carries your velocity, so on release the blob overshoots and wobbles back вҖ” real soft-body physics, not a canned animation. **The sound *is* the wobble**: every frame we measure the jelly's *deformation energy* (mean stray of each surface point from its rest circle) and that one number drives the voice вҖ” **energyВІ вҶ’ loudness** (silent at rest), **energy вҶ’ low-pass brightness**, **energy вҶ’ vibrato depth + rate** вҖ” so the shimmer tracks the jiggle in real time. **Tuning = just intonation** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1 over a 196 Hz G3 root): consonant *pure* intervals, deliberately **not** C-major pentatonic, so poking two jellies rings out a clean justly-tuned interval with a soft glowing thread drawn between them. **Output = inline animated SVG** (Catmull-Rom blob bodies вҶ’ cubic BГ©ziers, Gaussian-blur candy glow, eyes as an HTML overlay, a mouth path that opens with energy) вҖ” **no `<canvas>` anywhere**, so it dodges the canvas2d 5Г— ban and is the lowest-risk render path for a 06:30 demo on any device. Multi-touch (two kids, two hands); always-on root+fifth drone so it's never silent; `AudioContext` created on first poke (mobile autoplay), and the jellies still wobble silently if audio can't start. **Resurrected from the cycle-292 WIDE physical-modeling fire** (it was the `kids-jelly-choir` sibling, build-verified then banked); born from RESEARCH В§292. References: **nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max, arXiv 2603.10240 (2026)**; **Provot, *Deformation Constraints in a Mass-Spring Model* (1995)**; **MГјller et al., *Position-Based Dynamics* (2007)**. For kids 4+ В· touch (poke/drag) input В· inline-SVG output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· no guard В· 3.57 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/286-kids-jelly-choir/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 293 вҖ” adult build В· solo)

- **[/dream/285-mosaic-listener](/dream/285-mosaic-listener)** вҖ” Mosaic Listener. `demoable`
  **Press Begin, then drag your finger across a glowing map of sounds вҖ” the piece is re-assembled in real time out of whichever grains sit nearest your finger, music made of shards and never the original recording.** The lab's **first concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece** in 280+ prototypes: where everything else reacts to or synthesizes sound, this one takes an existing recording, **shatters it into hundreds of ~165 ms grains**, tags each with three descriptors вҖ” **loudness** (RMS), **brightness** (spectral centroid via a 256-pt Hann DFT), and a rough **pitch** (zero-crossing, for hue) вҖ” and lays them out as a 2-D **descriptor atlas** (x = brightness, y = loudness, color = pitch class). A target wanders the atlas; you **drag** to place it (CataRT's "play the cloud by hand"), let it **auto-drift** along a slow Lissajous (the self-playing demo), or **hum into the mic** so your voice's live brightness+loudness becomes the target. A Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler fires ~6вҖ“9 grains/sec, finding the **kвүҲ6 nearest grains** and picking one at random (organic, not robotic), windowed (12 ms attack / 60 ms release) through lowpass вҶ’ feedback-delay wash вҶ’ limiter; the chosen grain lights up and a trail draws your path. **Corpus = Karel's real piano**: type a **Welcome Home** track ID and *Use Karel's piano as the corpus* вҶ’ read-only `fetch("/api/audio/:id")` (the loved `163`/`227` pattern), decode, re-slice вҖ” so the shards are literally his playing (non-pentatonic by source). **Output is matte WebGL2** (Canvas2D was banned this cycle at 5Г—; the 2026-06-02 jury hard-banned additive/glowing point clouds) вҖ” raw `GL_POINTS` with **normal premultiplied-alpha blending**, soft matte dots on near-black, recently-played grains brighten modestly with **no additive glow**. Degrades gracefully: a **procedural piano corpus** is synthesized on Begin so it always runs with no network/no key/no permission; track-load failure falls back with an amber notice; mic-block вҶ’ drag/drift with a rose notice; no-WebGL keeps the audio mosaic playing. **Born from this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH В§293). References: **Diemo Schwarz вҖ” CataRT** (interactive corpus-based concatenative synthesis, IRCAM); **"The Concatenator," arXiv 2411.04366 (2024)**; **Lee & Pasquier, "Musical Agent Systems: MACAT and MACataRT," arXiv 2502.00023 (2025)**; **FluCoMa** (live web audio mosaicing). Adult В· drag / mic / auto-drift input В· matte WebGL2 output В· reads `/api/audio` only В· no guard В· zero new deps В· 6.28 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/285-mosaic-listener/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 292 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/284-kids-thunder-drum](/dream/284-kids-thunder-drum)** вҖ” Thunder Drum. `demoable`
  **Strike a big drum *skin* anywhere with a finger вҖ” hit the center for a deep round boom, the rim for a bright slap, and hit it *hard* to hear the head's tension bend the pitch up before it settles (the "bwooOOWww" of a thunder-drum / tympani).** This is the lab's **first playable physical-modeling / non-linear modal-synthesis instrument** in 280+ prototypes. Every other kids toy plays a Karplus pluck, a triangle bell, or an additive sine locked to **C-major pentatonic**; here the pitches are **circular-membrane eigenmodes** вҖ” the Bessel-zero ratios `[1.0, 1.594, 2.136, 2.296, 2.653, 2.918, 3.156, 3.5] Г— f0`, inharmonic and **non-pentatonic by physics**, with higher modes decaying faster so it rings like a struck skin, not a glockenspiel. **The signature is the tension pitch-glide**: a hard/fast strike starts all partials up to **+6% sharp** then exponentially relaxes them to rest pitch over 120вҖ“260 ms via `setTargetAtTime` вҖ” the non-linear behavior straight from this cycle's research anchor. **Strike position is timbre**: a tap radius (0=center вҶ’ 1=rim) reweights the partial bank вҖ” center hits dark and round, edge hits bright and slappy. Four drum zones sit on a just-intonation spread (1/1В·4/3В·3/2В·2/1 over a 110 Hz root) so zones are consonant yet unmistakably not a pentatonic toy. **Visual = three.js** (hard non-canvas2d constraint this cycle): a tilted `CircleGeometry` skin whose vertices are displaced by a **travelling, rim-pinned radial standing-wave ripple** from each contact point (multi-strike = overlapping ripples), bold saturated color per zone, expanding glow rings, a soft always-on drone so it's never silent, multi-touch via Pointer Events; no WebGL вҶ’ a readable `text-rose-300` notice. **Born from this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH В§292) вҖ” real-time physical-modeling synthesis вҖ” and the deepest answer yet to the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate (it diversifies the *synthesis method*, not just the scale, going beyond the recent tuning-only breaks at `272`/`276`/`280`). References: **nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max, arXiv 2603.10240 (2026)**; **Lord Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound* (1877)** (circular-membrane Bessel modes); **Morrison & Rossing** (tympani tension nonlinearity). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-builder kids fire (three physical objects Г— three never-used synthesis methods Г— three non-canvas2d outputs, all non-pentatonic); siblings `285-kids-singing-bowl` (rub the rim вҶ’ **friction/stick-slip** sustain of inharmonic bell partials, three.js metallic bowl + cymatic water) + `286-kids-jelly-choir` (squish a **mass-spring/Verlet soft-body** blob вҶ’ it sings its own wobble in just intonation, inline SVG) are **build-verified** (all-three build, exit 0) and banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 4+ В· touch input В· three.js output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· no guard В· 3.69 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/284-kids-thunder-drum/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 291 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/283-piano-isosurface](/dream/283-piano-isosurface)** вҖ” Piano Isosurface. `demoable`
  **Tap Start and a glowing 3D form begins breathing to the music вҖ” drop an audio file, or paste a Welcome Home track id, and your real piano sculpts a living volume you can drag to orbit.** This is the lab's **first marching-cubes / volumetric isosurface** in 280+ prototypes: where every prior visual drew meshes, particles, shaders, or 2D canvas, this one **reconstructs a surface from a scalar field**. Audio вҶ’ one `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048) вҶ’ 5 frequency bands + RMS + a normalized spectral centroid вҶ’ a field of ~8 **metaballs** inside a three.js `MarchingCubes(48)` volume that re-polygonizes a single connected isosurface every frame: **bass** swells a central core, **mids** orbit it at mid radius, **highs** flick small fast flecks at the edges, overall **RMS** makes the whole form breathe (global scale/isolation), and the **spectral centroid** drives material hue (cool/deep when the sound is dark вҶ’ warm/bright when brilliant). Rendered with a `MeshStandardMaterial` emissive glow, two directional lights + ambient, fog, slow auto-rotation, and a hand-rolled pointer-drag orbit. **Four audio sources, never silent:** file-drop/picker (`decodeAudioData` вҶ’ looping buffer) В· **mic** (analysis-only, never routed to output, never recorded) В· **track id** вҶ’ read-only `fetch("/api/audio/<id>")` handling both JSON `{url}` and raw bytes (the loved `163-paths-visualizer` вқӨпёҸ pattern вҖ” Karel's path to feed his real Welcome Home piano) В· an always-on generative **D-dorian** synth pad (non-pentatonic) so the surface is alive from the first gesture even with no input. Degrades gracefully: no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice; mic denied / decode failure вҶ’ rose notice + the pad keeps sculpting. **Born from this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH В§291): GPU isosurface extraction is now *real-time in the browser*, which is exactly what makes a sound-driven, per-frame marching-cubes surface feasible live. References: **William Lorensen & Harvey Cline, "Marching Cubes: A High Resolution 3D Surface Construction Algorithm," SIGGRAPH 1987**; the 2024 WebGPU-marching-cubes lineage (Will Usher / Twinklebear); **Refik Anadol** (sound вҶ’ volumetric living form). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-builder adult fire (three orthogonal directions, none using the cycle's banned canvas2d output); siblings `281-midi-harmonograph` (a held chord draws itself as a Victorian harmonograph in raw WebGL2; JI-lock makes consonance a clean closed figure) + `282-ensemble-tabs` (open 2вҖ“3 tabs вҶ’ one serverless, tempo-locked ensemble on a `Date.now()` shared clock вҖ” the lab's first networked piece) are **build-verified** and banked in IDEAS.md. Adult В· audio-file/mic/track-id input В· three.js Marching Cubes output В· zero new deps В· reads `/api/audio` only В· no guard В· 9.97 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 288 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/276-kids-balloon-tritave](/dream/276-kids-balloon-tritave)** вҖ” Balloon Sky (Tritave). `demoable`
  **Tilt your tablet to drift a little paper cloud-bird through a dusk sky of cut-paper hot-air balloons вҖ” and every balloon it brushes sings in a tuning that has no octave.** This is the lab's **first non-octave / non-pentatonic tuning** in 280+ prototypes: instead of the major-pentatonic-in-12-TET that every "kid-safe" music toy leans on, the balloons are tuned to the **BohlenвҖ“Pierce scale**, whose repeat interval is the **tritave (3:1)** вҖ” a perfect twelfth вҖ” not the 2:1 octave. It's **equal-tempered BohlenвҖ“Pierce (13 equal divisions of the tritave)**: step ratio `3^(1/13) вүҲ 1.0882` (~146Вў each), `freq(k)=220В·3^(k/13)`. BP was engineered around **odd-harmonic** chords, so three balloons are deliberately seated on the signature **3:5:7 triad** (13-EDT degrees 0/6/10) вҖ” brush them together and the chord sounds *rooted*, not random; extra balloons (degrees 3/4/7 + the tritave) give melodic range. The voice is a **clarinet-like additive tone** (mostly ODD partials 1В·3В·5В·7В·9 вҖ” the clarinet's chalumeau spectrum is the natural BP timbre, and it overblows at the twelfth, not the octave) over a soft root+tritave **drone bed**, so it's consonant but genuinely *otherworldly* вҖ” "nothing sounds wrong" coming from a completely different harmonic universe. **Input = device TILT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS permission requested on the first tap) with a mouse/drag fallback so it's fully playable on a laptop at review вҖ” a gravity-drift you steer with your hands, not taps. **Output = inline SVG** cut-paper (matte, `feDropShadow` lift + `feTurbulence` grain, animated via rAF through refs вҖ” **no canvas, no WebGL, no three.js, no glow**), continuing the loved `268-kids-shadow-theater` cut-paper register. Brushing balloons in a row plays a melody; brushing two at once plays a chord; each brush leaves a paper-confetti puff. Always-on drone (never silent), no score, no "wrong", no fail, ~14-min lullaby fade. **Born from this cycle's research dive** into non-octave tuning (RESEARCH В§288). Reference: the **BohlenвҖ“Pierce scale** вҖ” independently discovered by **Heinz Bohlen (1972)** and **Max Mathews & John R. Pierce** (Bell Labs, ~1984); composer **Elaine Walker** (ZIA). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-builder kids fire (three unrelated non-pentatonic *sound worlds*, each dodging the cycle's banned tags вҖ” touch-input, canvas2d-output, three.js, C-pentatonic); siblings `277-kids-overtone-cave` (hum вҶ’ a raw-WebGL crystal grotto sings your **harmonic-series overtones** back, khoomei/Lucier) + `278-kids-dream-flock` (wave at the camera вҶ’ frame-diff motion steers a boids flock singing a **whole-tone / Debussy** dream cloud) are **build-verified** and banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 4+ В· tilt input В· SVG output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· no guard В· 4.07 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 287 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/275-memory-loom](/dream/275-memory-loom)** вҖ” Memory Loom. `demoable`
  **Play into your mic and the piece quietly records the phrases you play, then weaves them back as an endless, ever-changing Brian-Eno / Robert-Fripp tape-loop room built entirely from YOUR own sound вҖ” audibly different at minute 10 than at minute 1.** This is the **listen вҶ’ remember вҶ’ rewrite** piece the JURY asked for: it extends the loved `259-paths-generative` вқӨпёҸ (its exact incommensurate-loop engine) but instead of playing back a file, it **listens**. A muted mic tap fills an 8-second rolling ring buffer; a two-threshold RMS onset/release detector marks phrase boundaries and, on phrase-end, slices the most-recent audio out of the ring, peak-normalizes it, fades the ends for loopability, and banks it as a **verbatim tape loop** вҖ” keeping the *raw audio*, not extracted features, so the room is literally made of the sound you made. Up to **7 captured phrases** loop at mutually **incommensurate lengths/playheads** (never phase-align) each with a slow incommensurate gain-LFO, a consonant `playbackRate` transposition (octave/5th/4th/M3/unison), and a stereo pan, summed through a **procedural convolution reverb** + shared lowpass + a `DynamicsCompressor` master limiter (never clips, never silent). A **generative state machine** enters a new *movement* every 60вҖ“130 s that random-walks the active set (3вҖ“5 of the bank, multi-second crossfades), the transpositions, density, filter cutoff, and reverb wetness вҖ” and as new phrases arrive the **oldest memory decays out**, so the texture at minute 10 is genuinely unlike minute 1. It's **never silent**: a synthesized **D-dorian** pad (deliberately *not* C-major pentatonic, banned by the JURY) plays from the first instant and is gradually displaced by your own captured sound. Tri-modal source вҖ” **mic** (primary) В· **file-drop** В· **Welcome Home track-by-ID** вҶ’ read-only `/api/audio/:id` (JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes, the loved `163` pattern, so Karel can feed it his real piano) В· the synth demo fallback. Canvas2D **loom** makes the memory legible: each phrase is a horizontal lane with its waveform drawn in, a playhead sweeping at its own incommensurate rate, brightness = current gain, warm hue (your captures) vs amber (demo seeds), a `captured 2m ago` label, a capture-flash as a new phrase enters, and a HUD of elapsed / movement / active-voice count. **First live audio-capture looping piece in the lab** (loops existed at `172` вқӨпёҸ and granular at `227` вқӨпёҸ, but never *recording you in real time into the loop bank*) and the **first self-listening / Frippertronics architecture** in 270+ prototypes. **Born from this cycle's research dive** into self-listening musical agents (RESEARCH В§287). References: **Brian Eno & Robert Fripp** вҖ” *Frippertronics* / *(No Pussyfooting)* (1973) + Eno's *Music for Airports* (1978); **Pauline Oliveros** вҖ” *Deep Listening*. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-builder fire (one concept вҖ” "a piece that listens, remembers, and rewrites itself over 10 min" вҖ” three *memory representations*); siblings `mosaic-listener` (CataRT / MACataRT concatenative grain-corpus mosaicing вҖ” the lab's first concatenative synthesis) + `motif-memory` (autocorrelation pitch-transcription вҶ’ symbolic Markov re-performance, the Lewis *Voyager* / Rowe *Cypher* lineage) are **build-verified** and banked in IDEAS.md. Mic/audio-file input В· canvas2d output В· zero new deps В· zero server route (read-only `/api/audio` only) В· no guard В· 5.51 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/275-memory-loom/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 286 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/272-kids-tune-purr](/dream/272-kids-tune-purr)** вҖ” Tune Purr. `demoable`
  **Slide a sleepy, wobbling creature up and down until its shivering stops вҖ” and feel the exact moment two notes lock into tune.** A contemplative tuning toy a 4-year-old can run alone (touch-only, no reading): a warm **110 Hz drone** hums, and three round, matte "hummer" creatures each sing a tone that starts a few Hz *out of tune* with a pure interval against the drone вҖ” so you literally **hear and see the beating**: a rhythmic wobble, and the creature trembles in sync with it. Drag a creature and its pitch glides; as you approach the pure **just-intonation** ratio (unison 1:1, major third 5:4, perfect fifth 3:2) the wobble slows from a fast shimmer вҶ’ a slow sway вҶ’ nothing, and within Вұ6 cents it **snaps into tune**: the shivering stops, its eyes open, it smiles, and it begins a soft contented **purr**. Lock all three at once and they form a pure **4:5:6 just-intonation major triad** with a gentle matte ring-wave celebration. Drag one back out and the wobble returns вҖ” fully reversible, no score, no fail, infinite calm play. **The whole point is the SOUND**, and it is deliberately *not* the C-major pentatonic of every other kids-music toy: it's pure acoustic beating resolving into consonance вҖ” the first time audible **interference beating is the instrument itself** in 270+ prototypes (the child resolves roughnessвҶ’consonance *by ear*, pre-verbally). The visual is fully **non-luminous / matte** вҖ” deep-dusk brown background, dusty terracotta/sage/blue creatures with true `shadowBlur` drop-shadows, **zero additive blending, no glow, no three.js, no WebGL** вҖ” built to answer the JURY's "ban the glow, ban the pentatonic, audit the sound" cycle on both axes at once. Drone + creatures are alive on first touch; AudioContext unlocks on gesture; everything via `setTargetAtTime` (click-free, toddler-safe, nothing above 350 Hz); 116 px drag targets, Pointer Events + `setPointerCapture` + `touch-none`; degrades gracefully (no Web Audio вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice). **Born from this cycle's research dive** into the psychoacoustics of consonance вҖ” the three-term roughness model (harmonicity + dislike of fast beats + liking of slow beats). References: **Helmholtz**, *On the Sensations of Tone* (beats/roughness as the physical basis of dissonance) + **McBride 2025** roughness review (arXiv 2510.14159) + Parncutt & Hair. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-builder kids fire (three unrelated non-glow / non-pentatonic *sound worlds*); siblings `273-kids-raga-peacock` (tanpura drone + Raga Yaman in just intonation + meend glide, SVG cut-paper) + `274-kids-clay-clock` (interlocking 2:3:4 + 12/8 gankogui **polyrhythm** on a two-clock scheduler, matte clay, percussion-only) are build-verified and banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 3+ В· touch input В· canvas2d-matte output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· no permissions В· 3.93 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 284 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/268-kids-shadow-theater](/dream/268-kids-shadow-theater)** вҖ” Shadow Theater. `demoable`
  **Tap a paper animal and it walks onto a glowing lamp-lit stage and starts to sing вҖ” in the shimmering, deliberately-not-Western tuning of a Javanese gamelan.** A wayang-kulit (Indonesian shadow-puppet) theater a 4-year-old can run alone: five cut-paper animal silhouettes (bird, elephant, deer, fish, monkey) wait on a rack; tap one and it strolls onto the amberвҶ’indigo screen, sways/walks, and adds its voice; tap again and it ambles home, fading out. Several puppets at once = a tiny gamelan ensemble, all locked to a slow, calming **colotomic gong cycle** (a deep gong every 8 beats, a mid kempul every 4, footstep "kethuk" ticks) so the room is never silent and feels ceremonial. **The surprise is the sound.** The five pitches are NOT C-major pentatonic (the default of every kids-music toy) вҖ” they come from a **slendro-like set of stretched, non-equal-tempered ratios** (вүҲ 1.00, 1.16, 1.35, 1.52, 1.78 over 220 Hz); each metallophone voice is two slightly-detuned sine fundamentals (a few Hz apart вҶ’ the characteristic gamelan *beating*/shimmer) plus an inharmonic ~2.41Г— partial, fast attack + long bell decay (saron/bonang character). The gong is a ~70 Hz sine with a downward glide + filtered-noise thump. **The whole visual is inline SVG** вҖ” `<path>` cut-paper silhouettes, a radial-gradient lamp backdrop, a `feTurbulence` oil-lamp flicker вҖ” animated by `requestAnimationFrame` updating SVG transforms. **No `<canvas>`, no WebGL, no three.js.** **First SVG-rendered prototype in the lab** (260+ prototypes; `svg` grepped clean) and the **first non-Western / microtonal tuning** anywhere in the lab вҖ” built to directly answer the JURY's "ban the glow, ban the pentatonic" cycle: a non-luminous output in a non-pentatonic mode. Every combination sounds good (no wrong note, no fail state); always-on `DynamicsCompressor` limiter keeps it soft + toddler-safe; degrades gracefully (no Web Audio вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice, SVG still animates). References: Javanese **wayang kulit** + **gamelan slendro** (Colin McPhee) and **Lotte Reiniger**'s silhouette animation (*Prince Achmed*, 1926). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-builder kids fire (three unrelated non-glow / non-pentatonic directions); siblings `kids-paper-parade` (Eric-Carle torn-paper marching band вҖ” a rhythm-layer **groove** builder) + `kids-paper-score` (a Cardew-style **graphic score** a playhead reads вҖ” your drawing performs itself) are build-verified and banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 4+ В· touch input В· SVG output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· no permissions В· 4.6 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 283 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/267-spectral-drift](/dream/267-spectral-drift)** вҖ” Spectral Drift. `demoable`
  **Drop your own piano recording (or load a Resonance track) and your music becomes a flowing river of light you drift through вҖ” each frequency a stream of glowing particles that advects and braids forward through space as the song plays.** Not a frozen wall of spectrum bins: the spectral content *flows*. A single pool of **24,000 additive `THREE.Points`** (one `BufferGeometry` + custom soft-gaussian `ShaderMaterial`, allocated once) is emitted as a fresh "sheet" each frame at the far horizon вҖ” **bin вҶ’ lateral X + hue**, **bin energy вҶ’ brightness + point size + emission probability** (quiet bins emit nearly nothing, so silence reads as genuinely empty space ahead). Then every particle **advects**: it drifts forward toward the camera *and* meanders laterally through a cheap curl-like sinusoidal flow field with light damping, so the frequency streams **swirl and braid** as they travel rather than running on rigid rails. Each particle keeps the hue/energy it was born with, so you fly through a gently-deforming record of the song. **Spectral centroid** вҶ’ global hue temperature (bass-heavy = deep violet/indigo; bright = cyanвҶ’rose) + flow turbulence; **spectral-flux onsets** (adaptive mean+1.5В·std, 100 ms refractory) вҶ’ a burst of extra-bright particles + a forward speed surge + subtle camera shake, with a median-IOI **BPM** readout; `FogExp2` into near-black for depth. **This is the flowing-particle reading of the JURY's flagged richest vein, "fly through YOUR music,"** extending the loved `243-spectral-cloud` вқӨпёҸ (the only 5/5 floor build вҖ” a cloud you *orbit*; this is a river you fly *through*) in the loved glowing-points language of `130-tsl-particle-compute` вқӨпёҸ. **Born from this cycle's research dive**: it borrows the reframe from **NSTR вҖ” "Neural Spectral Transport Representation for Space-Varying Frequency Fields"** (arXiv 2511.18384, Nov 2025), that a spectrum is not a static stack but a *frequency field that transports through space* вҖ” embodied here aesthetically as the advection flow (honestly noted in the README as an artistic borrowing, not the neural model). Tri-modal source, never silent: **file drop** В· **"load a Resonance track by ID"** вҶ’ `fetch('/api/audio/:id')` (handles direct-audio *or* JSON `{url}`, so Karel can paste a real Welcome Home piano track вҖ” read-only, no route created) В· a synthesized pad+pentatonic **demo** that flows on Start with zero input. Degrades gracefully (no WebGL вҶ’ notice, audio keeps playing; decode/track-load error вҶ’ `text-rose-300`). **Input = audio-file В· output = three.js additive points** вҖ” dodges the over-represented `canvas2d` (4Г—) + `raw-WebGL` (4Г—) of the last 10. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-builder fire (one concept вҖ” "fly through YOUR music as a living 3D world" вҖ” three render readings); siblings `spectral-tunnel` (radial wormhole, rings freeze-on-spawn + translate in Z вҖ” the kinetic reading) + `spectral-canyon` (spectrogram-waterfall terrain with the Z-remap fix вҖ” the legible reading) are **build-verified** and banked in IDEAS.md, queued to make this vein a 4-piece body of work with `243`. Audio-file input В· three.js output В· zero new deps В· zero server route (read-only `/api/audio`) В· 4.9 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 282 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/264-kids-lenia-pond](/dream/264-kids-lenia-pond)** вҖ” Lenia Pond. `demoable`
  **Touch a dark pond and a glowing nebula creature blooms under your finger, then swims away on its own and drifts across the water, singing.** The creatures are **orbium gliders from Lenia** вҖ” Bert Chan's 2019 continuous-state cellular automaton, where a soft jellyfish-blob of "matter" self-organizes into a stable, *self-propelling* form (the Lenia equivalent of a Game-of-Life glider). A scalar field `A(x,y)` lives on a 150Г—150 toroidal grid (Float32 ping-pong, CPU): each step convolves with Chan's exact smooth `exp(4вҲ’1/(r(1вҲ’r)))` ring kernel (R=13) вҶ’ growth bell (mu=0.15, sigma=0.017) вҶ’ `A вҶҗ clamp(A+dtВ·G,0,1)`, dt=0.1. **Tap** stamps **Bert Chan's canonical 20Г—20 orbium matrix verbatim** (random quarter-turn rotation per tap so creatures head off in varied directions); one orbium is seeded dead-center on Start so the pond is alive immediately. The field packs to a WebGL2 **R8** texture (deliberately R8 вҖ” it's `LINEAR`-filterable on every device, where an R32F-linear path renders black on tablets lacking `OES_texture_float_linear`) rendered through a violetвҶ’cyanвҶ’rose nebula fragment shader with a white-hot bloom in the dense cores вҖ” luminous jellyfish-nebulae, no 2D canvas. **Audio**: 5 vertical bands вҶ’ 5 pentatonic voices (C3 E3 G3 A3 C4, no wrong notes), band massвҶ’gain + brightness, vertical centroidвҶ’Вұcents detune so the chord breathes as creatures drift; always-on C3+G3 pad; per-tap octave-up ping <50 ms; warm lowpass вҶ’ limiter (never loud/harsh). **First Lenia / continuous-CA piece in the lab** and the **2nd emergent-self-organization kids piece** вҖ” with Physarum `260-kids-slime-garden`, "emergent life that sings" is now a body of work, not a fluke (the JURY's standing ask). **The cycle-280 banked seed, finally resurrected and de-risked**: the one risk that lost it (does the orbium stay alive or dissolve/explode?) was settled by an **empirical 400-step Node simulation** вҖ” mass held steady ~75вҖ“76 while the centroid translated ~0.24 cells/step and wrapped toroidally вҖ” so it's a verified glider, not a guess. **Touch input + raw-WebGL output**, dodging the over-represented `mic` (4Г—) + `canvas2d` (4Г—) of the last 10. Extends the loved emergence vein of `236-particle-life-song` вқӨпёҸ and the cosmic-nebula palette of `130-tsl-particle-compute` вқӨпёҸ. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-builder fire (one concept вҖ” "breed glowing lifeforms that sing" вҖ” three Lenia formulations); siblings `kids-glow-lifeforms` (energy-based **Particle-Lenia** glowing particle swarm) + `kids-flow-pond` (mass-conserving **Flow-Lenia** spill-proof goo) are build-verified and banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 4+ В· touch input В· raw-WebGL output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· 4.85 kB.

## Previous (Cycle 281 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/262-aurora-particle](/dream/262-aurora-particle)** вҖ” Aurora Particle. `demoable`
  **The solar wind hitting Earth right now writes the score вҖ” a generative drone and a flowing aurora built from thousands of glowing particles.** Press Start: three live NOAA SWPC feeds (solar-wind plasma, the interplanetary magnetic field, and the planetary Kp index) are fetched client-side and re-polled every 60s, then EMA-smoothed so sound and light *glide* on each update. The Sun drives both at once вҖ” **wind speed** вҶ’ drone root pitch + bell-arp tempo + aurora hue (slow=green вҶ’ fast=violet); **plasma density** вҶ’ number of detuned drone partials (2вҖ“5); **Bz** (north-south IMF) вҶ’ majorвҶ”minor third *and* curtain height/agitation (negative Bz = storm coupling вҶ’ minor + taller, wilder curtains); **Bt** вҶ’ loudness + brightness; **Kp 0вҖ“9** вҶ’ the whole system steps from a couple of soft green sheets (CALM) to many towering red/violet curtains (STORM). The aurora is ~9,800 additive `THREE.Points` arranged into curtain sheets, each particle rising and swaying in a custom vertex shader, lit through `@react-three/postprocessing` Bloom over a deep night-sky + star field вҖ” the glowing-points-in-3D language of the loved `130-tsl-particle-compute` вқӨпёҸ, aimed at the sky. An always-on drone (detuned saw/tri вҶ’ Kp-driven lowpass вҶ’ feedback delay вҶ’ code-synthesized convolution reverb вҶ’ limiter) means it's never silent and never clips. **The 2nd real-world-data sonification in the lab** (after `233-earth-pulse`) вҖ” open it on two different days and it's a different piece because the Sun was. Degrades gracefully: any feed failure вҶ’ a bounded random-walk **simulated** solar wind with a readable rose notice; no WebGL вҶ’ drone-only. **Input = live external space-weather API В· output = three.js particle curtains + Bloom** вҖ” dodges the over-represented `mic` (4Г—) and `canvas2d` (4Г—) of the last 10. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-builder fire (one concept вҖ” "live solar wind = aurora + drone" вҖ” three render strategies); siblings `aurora-drone-field` (raw-WebGL2 GLSL sum-of-sines curtains) + `aurora-raymarch` (volumetric raymarch with real O-green/O-red/N-violet altitudeвҶ’emission-line physics) are build-verified and banked in IDEAS.md. Zero new deps В· zero API В· 5.6 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/262-aurora-particle/README.md`

## Previous (Cycle 280 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE orchestration, 3 explored)

- **[/dream/260-kids-slime-garden](/dream/260-kids-slime-garden)** вҖ” Slime Garden. `demoable`
  **Touch a dark screen and thousands of tiny glowing creatures crawl toward your finger, weaving living veins of light that sing as they connect.** A real *Physarum polycephalum* slime-mold simulation: ~3,500 typed-array agents on a 220Г—220 trail grid each sense the trail at three points (front-left / front / front-right), steer toward the brightest, deposit, and the field diffuses + decays вҖ” the canonical **Jones/Jenson transport-network algorithm** вҖ” plus a gentle pull toward the "food" nodes you tap, so the swarm physically *connects the points you touch*. The trail grid uploads each frame as a WebGL2 `R8` texture rendered through a bioluminescent goldвҶ’tealвҶ’magenta fragment shader over deep indigo (no 2D-canvas art). Up to **5 food nodes** each own a C-major-pentatonic voice (C3 E3 G3 A3 C4) whose gain + lowpass cutoff rise with the local glow вҖ” a well-connected node sings louder and brighter; an always-on C3+G3 pad + master limiter keep it calm and never silent. **First Physarum / agent-transport-network piece in the lab**, and a kids prototype rendered entirely through GPU shaders вҖ” **touch input + raw-WebGL output**, deliberately dodging the over-represented `three.js` + `canvas2d` of the last 10. Extends the loved emergence vein of `236-particle-life-song` вқӨпёҸ (music FROM self-organization). Winner of a WIDE 3-builder kids fire; siblings `kids-lenia-pond` (Bert Chan's **Lenia** continuous CA вҖ” glowing lifeforms that glide & sing) and `kids-light-cloth` (Jakobsen **Verlet** mass-spring cloth you strum) are banked in IDEAS.md. For kids 4+ В· touch input В· raw-WebGL output В· zero new deps В· zero API В· 4.74 kB.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/260-kids-slime-garden/README.md`
