### 387-drop-engine
**Status**: `demoable` В· **Cycle shipped**: 341 В· **Last touched**: 2026-06-07

Open `/dream/387-drop-engine`. **The lab's first EDM / club journey engine вҖ” a generative build-and-drop arc you can feel.** Tap **START** and a continuous club track composes itself through the canonical EDM tension structure вҖ” **GROOVE вҶ’ BUILD (riser + low-pass filter sweep + accelerating snare-roll + a high-pass "suck-out" right before the impact) вҶ’ DROP (a beat of silence, then the full kick+sub+supersaw hit at peak energy) вҶ’ RELEASE/breakdown вҶ’ loop** вҖ” 16 bars per phase at 126 BPM, re-seeding its variation each loop (riser type, lead-motif transposition, snare-fill pattern) so no two arcs are identical. **HOLD вҶ’ CHARGE** biases how hard the next drop hits; **DROP NOW** triggers the impact early during a build. It runs the whole arc hands-free after the Start tap, so the 06:30 phone reviewer hears a full build-and-drop without touching anything.

**Why it matters / what's new:** this directly answers Karel's standing **priority #4 вҖ” journey-engine alternatives** ("EDM build-and-drop, ritual, jazz responsive, cinematic narrativeвҖҰ as alternate arcs"), which the lab had **never** delivered: every prior adult piece is either ambient (pads, drones, granular textures) or analytical (DTW score-following, key/cadence analysis). A grep of every prior README confirms **no prior prototype is an EDM/club arc or a build-drop tension engine** вҖ” this is a genuinely new *vibe* and a new *engine*, the maximal-diversity break from the adult "too similar" monoculture (three slow JI-drones + five legible-analysis pieces) the jury flagged. The central idea is a **single tension scalar вҲҲ [0,1]** as a designer-accessible "knob" (the Procedural-Music-Generation pattern): during BUILD it ramps and *simultaneously* drives the riser pitch+gain, the bass low-pass cutoff sweep, the snare-roll note-spacing halving, the pre-impact high-pass suck-out, and every visual вҖ” so the arc is **legible in both sound and picture** (the jury's "feed the legible lane," applied to *form/energy* instead of harmonic analysis).

Four subsystems: (1) **`arc.ts`** вҖ” the clock-driven **state machine** (GROOVE/BUILD/DROP/RELEASE over bars, the tension computation, per-loop variation seeds, derived helpers `riserCutoff`/`suckoutHP`/`bassCutoff`/`snareRollSpacing`); (2) **`synth.ts`** вҖ” a **multi-layer Web-Audio synth+drum engine** (kick = pitch-enveloped sine + click; snare/clap = filtered noise burst; hat = high-passed noise; bass = saw + sub through a tension-swept low-pass; **supersaw lead** = 5 detuned oscillators on a D-minor/Dorian motif; the rising-noise/saw riser), everything summed through a master **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** (threshold вҲ’6 dB, ratio 12) + master gain so even the drop can never clip or blast; (3) **`scheduler.ts`** вҖ” a **look-ahead beat scheduler** (a 25 ms `setInterval` poll that schedules notes ~100 ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`, per-phase beat patterns, phase-entry hooks) for tight timing independent of rAF; (4) **`viz.ts`** вҖ” raw **WebGL2** (tension-arc ring, spring-physics frequency bars that pile up through the build, a **particle bloom on the DROP**, a soft beat-flash), additive blending, DPR/resize aware, soft radial glow rather than harsh full-white strobes (seizure-safe). Steering + HUD live in `page.tsx`: a phase label, a tension meter (the same scalar that drives the audio), the charge bar, and the two controls. Degrades cleanly: no WebGL2 вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice and the audio still runs; `AudioContext` created inside the Start pointer handler (autoplay-safe). No API route, no `guard` needed (Web Audio + WebGL2, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets). Zero new deps.

References: the canonical **EDM build/drop tension-and-release arrangement** (groove вҶ’ riser+filter sweep вҶ’ impact вҶ’ breakdown) formalised as a parametric state machine В· **Procedural Music Generation** (real-time, state-driven, non-repeating; an exposed "tension knob" steering multiple synthesis layers at once). Born from RESEARCH В§341. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire (three unrelated directions, each dodging every jury-banned tag вҖ” touch / mic-voice INPUT, inline-SVG OUTPUT, adult-JI-drone VIBE); siblings `386-aeolian-atlas` (live global wind via Open-Meteo вҶ’ **Strouhal aeolian-tone** synthesis вҶ’ Canvas2D wind atlas) + `388-flow-grains` (webcam **optical-flow** field вҶ’ **granular** cloud, AudioFlow / TouchDesigner Optical-Flow-TOP lineage) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§341. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, EDM build-drop generative arc / club journey engine вҖ” grep-verified lab-first) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, arc state-machine + multi-layer synth/drum + WebGL2 viz + steering) + named-reference(#3, EDM arrangement canon + PMG tension-knob) + multi-cycle-commitment(#4, an alternate journey engine вҖ” Karel priority #4; deepenable into ritual/jazz/cinematic arc presets + his own *Welcome Home* material as the lead source). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the buildвҶ’drop *feels* like real tension/release to actual ears (the whole point, and subjective), scheduler timing jitter under mobile CPU throttling, the limiter's punch/headroom on the DROP transient across browsers, whether the three riser waveform variants read as distinct, and iOS Safari's autoplay idiosyncrasies (no audio/GPU in this sandbox).

Design notes: `src/app/dream/387-drop-engine/README.md`

- **[/dream/390-kids-coral-tide](/dream/390-kids-coral-tide)** вҖ” Coral Tide рҹӘё. `demoable` В· Cycle 342.

  **For kids 4+ вҖ” GROW a singing coral reef by gently shaking the tablet, and HEAR it get bigger as it climbs.** Press the big **"Start the tide рҹҢҠ"** and shake (or drag a finger, or just watch): glowing plankton drift down through warm amber water and **stick** to a reef that accretes **upward from the seabed** via genuine **Diffusion-Limited Aggregation** (Witten & Sander, *Phys. Rev. Lett.* 47, 1981) with a downward settling bias. The hook is the **audio**: the reef is split into 6 horizontal depth bands and **each band that holds coral sustains one held voice of a D-Dorian chord** (D2 root вҶ’ A2 вҶ’ D3 вҶ’ E3 вҶ’ F3 вҶ’ A3) вҖ” so as the reef climbs, the chord **STACKS and thickens** from a bare root+fifth into a shimmering Dm11, and every locked branch rings a soft transient bell in its band's pitch. A legible **chord-stack indicator** ("N of 6 voices" + lit pips) makes the growth visible too. **The coral you grow IS the chord, and you can literally hear it get taller.**

  **Why it matters:** this **finally ships the DLA-coral seed the lab banked THREE times** (323/361/383) and never built вҖ” every prior curation note said "beautiful, but the wow is too gentle." The fix wasn't a new technique, it was a **legible payoff**: harmonic-band-stacking turns a pretty-but-passive blob into something with an instructional read (the jury's explicit #1 ask вҖ” *feed the legible/instructional lane*, the wins being 358/353/345/365). **DLA is grep-verified lab-first** (no shipped prototype implements it; prior coral seeds were only ever banked). Three subsystems: (1) **`dla.ts`** вҖ” `CoralSim`: settling-biased Brownian walkers, stick-radius freeze, **spatial-hash** bucket neighbour checks, per-particle depth-band index; `step(intensity)` returns `{locked, activeBands, height01}`; (2) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” `ReefAudio`: a sustained-voice **D-Dorian band-chord engine** (one gain-ramped voice per active band), per-lock triangle bells, always-on faint root, master gain вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so it can never blast small ears; (3) **`page.tsx`** вҖ” warm-amber Canvas2D renderer (DPR/resize aware, drifting sunbeams, sandy seabed glow, coralвҶ’goldвҶ’cream by band height), three input doors + the chord-stack indicator. Degrades cleanly: motion denied/absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + pointer-swish + 3s-idle breathing current (self-grows hands-free within ~2s of Start, so the 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears it fill in untouched); no Canvas2D вҶ’ readable notice. No API route / no `guard` (Web Audio + Canvas2D, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets). Zero new deps.

  References: **Witten & Sander, "Diffusion-Limited Aggregation, a Kinetic Critical Phenomenon"** (*Phys. Rev. Lett.* 47, 1981); settling-bias / directional-growth enhancement from **"Toward a Realistic Model of Diffusion-Limited Aggregation: Rotation, Size-Dependent Diffusivities, and Settling"** (ACS Omega). Born from RESEARCH В§342. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one concept вҖ” *a singing DLA coral reef grown by shaking* вҖ” three technical/aesthetic attacks); siblings `kids-coral-garden` (canonical directional-DLA, immersive teal full-screen) + `kids-reef-glow` (bioluminescent night swarm, size-dependent diffusivity) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§342. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, DLA вҖ” grep-verified lab-first) + named-reference(#3, Witten & Sander 1981) + recent-research(#5, RESEARCH В§342, this fire). **Diversity**: shake INPUT (fresh, non-banned) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT (dodges the over-represented WebGL2 output of 375/380/384/387) В· DLA-with-harmonic-band-stacking TECHNIQUE (lab-first) В· kids-warm-reef D-Dorian VIBE (warm amber dodges the cool-glow lineage). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the chord thickening *perceptually* reads as "the reef getting bigger" vs. just "more notes" (the central bet вҖ” voice levels/ramps/bell loudness are first-guess), the shake jerk-threshold + iOS permission flow on real hardware, DLA growth speed/density feel per screen size, and per-frame redraw perf as the particle count grows (no sensor/GPU/audio in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/390-kids-coral-tide/README.md`

- **[/dream/391-resilient-accompanist](/dream/391-resilient-accompanist)** вҖ” Resilient Accompanist. `demoable` В· Cycle 343.

  **The accompanist that survives your mistakes вҖ” cycle 3 of the Accompanist thread.** Cycle 1 (`375-tempo-canon`) followed your *tempo*; cycle 2 (`380-expressive-accompanist`) added *dynamics + articulation*; this cycle adds the third leg every honest score-following paper says matters most вҖ” **robustness**. A naive online-DTW follower derails the instant the soloist plays a wrong-note run; this one runs **two followers in parallel and a confidence supervisor that arbitrates between them**. Press nothing вҖ” a baked "Twinkle Twinkle" (C major, *not* D) auto-plays ~1.5s after load and **deliberately fumbles**: a clean opening вҶ’ a wrong-note run вҶ’ recovery вҶ’ a skip-ahead вҶ’ a hesitation/repeat вҶ’ a clean cadence вҖ” so a phone reviewer with no MIDI can *hear and see* the recovery hands-free in ~10s. Or play it live on home-row `a s d f g h j k` and fumble on purpose.

  **The lab-first mechanic вҖ” a dual DTWвҮ„HMM confidence supervisor:** (1) an **online DTW** follower (ported from cycles 1/2, Г  la Dixon's MATCH: forward-only, bounded window radius 5, path-slopeвҶ’tempo) that is smoothest when you're correct and reports an EMA **confidence** that a wrong-note run collapses; (2) an **error-aware HMM** (left-to-right, one state per score note, with explicit `self` / `skip+2,+3` / `backвҲ’1` transitions and a **non-zero emission floor** so a wrong note only *dents* a state rather than annihilating it вҖ” belief mass survives on the right neighbourhood and the MAP estimate snaps back, after Nakamura et al.); (3) a **hysteresis supervisor** (lo 0.42 / hi 0.70) that hands control to the robust HMM only when DTW confidence truly collapses and back to smooth DTW once it clearly recovers вҖ” with audible up/down handover blips. The accompaniment plays at the *trusted* follower's position and still carries the full cycle-2 expressive coupling (velocityвҶ’gain, IOI-ratioвҶ’envelope decay). **SVG** viz (the jury banned WebGL2/three.js this cycle): a score timeline with a green **DTW cursor** + dashed-violet **HMM cursor** (the trusted one glows), a faint **belief cloud**, a **confidence band** with threshold guides that visibly plunges on a fumble, and labeled **fumble markers**.

  **Why it matters:** the JURY (2026-06-07) named `380` the lab's only 4/5 and its one real multi-cycle thread, and explicitly told the lab to **extend it instead of opening a fresh explorer**. This is that extension вҖ” and it stacks the two *expensive* ambition criteria the jury said are nearly absent: **#4 multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 3 of a deliberate thread) + **#5 recent research** (RESEARCH В§343 this fire вҖ” Matchmaker 2025, Nakamura parallel-HMM, ACCompanion's "Reactivity/Robustness/Expressivity" framing). Also **#1 never-used-technique** (grep-verified: no prior lab prototype runs an HMM or a dual-follower) + **#3 named reference** (Nakamura et al.; Dixon MATCH 2005; ACCompanion IJCAI 2023, arXiv:2304.12939). **Diversity** (vs jury bans): tune in **C major** (dodges the banned D-Dorian/over-used-D center) В· **SVG** OUTPUT (dodges the banned raw-WebGL2/three.js) В· dual-follower-supervisor TECHNIQUE (lab-first). The acknowledged input caveat: the thread is inherently keyboard/MIDI (a jury-over-represented input) вҖ” but the jury *named this exact extension* as the priority, an explicit override of its own input ban for this thread. Three subsystems beyond audio (DTW + HMM + supervisor). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вҖ” *an accompanist that survives your mistakes* вҖ” three robustness algorithms); siblings `393-forgiving-accompanist` (particle-filter SMC swarm вҖ” gorgeous, banked as the cycle-4 candidate) + `392-anticipating-accompanist` (predictive-tempo + delayed-decision anticipation) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§343. No API route / no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; no mic, camera, network, or secrets). Zero new deps. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the DTWвҶ’HMM handover *perceptually* reads as "it caught my mistake" vs. just a cursor swap, the supervisor threshold/hysteresis feel on a real fumbling human (the lo/hi gates are first-guess), HMM skip/back transition tuning, and live-input latency on real hardware (no audio/keyboard in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/391-resilient-accompanist/README.md`

- **[/dream/423-kids-face-beat](/dream/423-kids-face-beat)** вҖ” Face Beat рҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 358.

  **For kids 4+ вҖ” make a BEAT with your FACE.** Press **"Start the face beat рҹҘҒ"** and look at the camera: **open your mouth рҹҳ® = a kick boom В· raise your eyebrows рҹӨЁ = a hi-hat tick В· big smile рҹҳҒ = a shaker sparkle В· puff your cheeks рҹҳ— = a tom В· wink рҹҳү = a rim tick.** This is **the lab's first faceвҶ’PERCUSSION mapping** вҖ” every prior face piece (`258-kids-mirror-pets` faceвҶ’pentatonic pitch, `413-kids-mouth-mirror`/`393-kids-vowel-color` mic-formantвҶ’color) mapped expression to *pitch/melody*; this one makes a **drum kit**, so the subject is **RHYTHM, not tuning** вҖ” no chord, no scale, no melody, pure percussion. It directly answers the **JURY 2026-06-08** two loudest still-open provocations in one fire: **#1** ("build pieces whose subject is rhythm/timbre/noise вҖ” not tuning вҖҰ the lab fled D-Dorian into a just-intonation monastery") and **#6** ("there is still no MediaPipe face-tracking piece in the window вҖ” the single biggest untouched first"). The kid-legibility move (mirrors `419-kids-body-band`): every detected hit is **quantized to the nearest 16th-note of a steady 100 BPM groove clock** via a look-ahead scheduler, so even a flailing toddler's random faces lock into a musical beat, and a soft always-on backbone (quiet kick/tom/hat) keeps the groove alive between faces.

  Four subsystems: (1) **`face.ts`** вҖ” `FaceDetector`: EMA-smooths (Оұ 0.25) the 52 MediaPipe FaceLandmarker blendshape scores, then **rising-edge + per-voice-cooldown (180вҖ“350 ms)** detection across five drum voices (blink threshold raised to 0.55 so normal blinking doesn't fire), plus a `ghostBlendshapes()` 2-bar (32-step) pre-programmed pattern feeding the *same* API; (2) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” pure Web-Audio percussion (kick 150вҶ’45 Hz pitch-env sine + click; hat >8 kHz noise burst; shaker double-bandpass noise; tom 100вҶ’55 Hz; rim bandpassed click) summed through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вҲ’8 dB / 12:1) вҶ’ master gain so it can never blast small ears, with a **look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval`, 100 ms ahead, 16th-grid quantizer вҖ” Chris Wilson "Two Clocks" pattern); (3) **raw WebGL2** (in `page.tsx`) вҖ” the mirrored webcam frame as a fullscreen-quad texture + additive radial-Gaussian glow bursts per hit (no Canvas2D, no SVG, no three.js вҖ” both screen renderers are over-represented this window; WebGL2 = 0Г— in the last-10), seizure-safe soft glows, DPR-aware; (4) HUD/steering in `page.tsx` (emoji legend, privacy notice, tappable вүҘ72px drum-pad fallback). Degrades cleanly: camera denied/absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + **ghost-face auto-demo within ~2s** (the reviewer always hears a beat hands-free); MediaPipe CDN fails вҶ’ ghost demo + tappable pads; detected-but-still face >4s вҶ’ ghost feeds the detector; no WebGL2 вҶ’ readable notice (audio + pads still work). Camera is **analysis-only** (piped to `detectForVideo()`, never recorded/stored/uploaded; inference runs in-browser WASM). No API route, no `guard` needed (Web Audio + WebGL2 + in-browser MediaPipe; the only network is the MediaPipe model/WASM CDN вҖ” no mic, no recording, no secrets, no FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps (MediaPipe via `webpackIgnore` CDN `import()`).

  References: **Expotion** (arXiv:2507.04955, 2025) вҖ” facial-expression + motion control for music generation, the key faceвҶ’music anchor В· **Ekman & Friesen, Facial Action Coding System (FACS)**, 1978 вҖ” the scientific basis blendshape naming descends from В· **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker** (Google, 2023; 52 blendshapes/frame) В· **Daniel Rozin** soft-mirror lineage (camera-as-instrument) В· **Chris Wilson**, "A Tale of Two Clocks" (Web-Audio look-ahead scheduling). Born from RESEARCH В§358. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one concept вҖ” *make a BEAT with your face, not a tune* вҖ” three technical attacks); siblings `424-kids-face-jam` (faceвҶ’continuous **noise/foley texture**, three.js point-cloud вҖ” the "go weird" timbre take) + `425-kids-face-loop` (faceвҶ’**looping step-sequencer with compositional memory**, Canvas2D) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§358. **Ambition 2/5** (stated plainly, no stretch): вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” detector + quantizing groove scheduler + percussion synth/limiter + WebGL2 render = 4) + named-reference(#3 вҖ” Expotion 2025 / Ekman-Friesen FACS / Rozin / Wilson). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вҖ” MediaPipe FaceLandmarker already shipped in `258-kids-mirror-pets`; the *fresh* move is faceвҶ’**percussion/rhythm** instead of faceвҶ’pitch (the same careful framing as `419`'s bodyвҶ’beat). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the named anchor (Expotion) is 2025, not <30 days; the dive's honest finding is the *asymmetry* (the 2026 faceвҶ”audio front is almost entirely audioвҶ’talking-face, the inverse). **Diversity**: camera/face INPUT (jury-requested #6; mic is banned) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the decisive dodge вҖ” Canvas2D & SVG are the over-represented screen renderers in the last-10; WebGL2 = 0Г—) В· face-blendshapeвҶ’quantized-percussion TECHNIQUE (lab-first mapping) В· kids silly/percussive **non-tuned** VIBE (the explicit answer to the consonance-resolving rut). Honest flag: camera INPUT now appears in **back-to-back kids ships** (`419` pose + `423` face) вҖ” but the jury *named* face-tracking the biggest untouched first, taste-authority over the count, and poseвү face (different tracker, different interaction). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the five expressions are *discriminable enough* on a real 4-year-old's face (blink-vs-smile cross-talk; thresholds are first-guess), whether quantized faces *feel* like "I'm playing a beat" vs. lag, the self-flagged builder limitation that **hit-glow bursts use fixed screen-region anchors rather than live landmark X/Y** (next-cycle deepening: pin bursts to real face geometry), iOS camera-permission + AudioContext-in-tap flow, and MediaPipe CDN load time on phone (no camera/GPU/audio in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/423-kids-face-beat/README.md`

- **[/dream/426-euclid-engine](/dream/426-euclid-engine)** вҖ” Euclid Engine. `demoable` В· Cycle 359.

  **An adult, interactive POLYRHYTHM machine вҖ” pure percussion, ZERO tuning.** Press **Start Engine** and four concentric rings of drums lock into an interlocking groove: each ring's hits are placed by the **Euclidean rhythm algorithm** (Bjorklund вҖ” spread K onsets as evenly as possible over N steps; E(3,8) = the Afro-Cuban tresillo, E(5,8) = cinquillo, E(7,16) / E(9,16) = jazz/West-African subdivisions), and because each ring runs at `BASE_BPM + a tiny driftBpm`, their downbeats slowly **slip against each other** the way the two pianists in Steve Reich's *Piano Phase* drift apart вҖ” an interference pattern that never exactly repeats within a listening session, then re-aligns and drifts again. Tap a ring to toggle it, Вұits K onsets / N steps, or nudge its phase; the whole thing is a living drum machine you sculpt. It seeds 3вҖ“4 interlocking rings and self-starts ~2s after load so a phone reviewer hears+sees a hypnotic polyrhythm hands-free. **The subject is RHYTHM and TIMBRE, not pitch** вҖ” no chord, no scale, no melody вҖ” the **adult** answer to the JURY 2026-06-08 #1 provocation ("build pieces whose subject is rhythm/timbre/noise вҖ” not tuning"), which until now was answered only for *kids* (`419-kids-body-band` poseвҶ’beat, `423-kids-face-beat` faceвҶ’beat); there was **no adult rhythm-not-tuning piece**.

  Three subsystems: (1) **Euclidean generator** вҖ” a Bresenham-form Bjorklund (`onset at step i iff вҢҠ(i+1)В·k/nвҢӢ вү  вҢҠiВ·k/nвҢӢ`, O(n), provably maximally-even for all valid k/n); (2) **phasing scheduler** вҖ” a Web-Audio **look-ahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval`, ~100 ms ahead, Chris Wilson "Two Clocks") where each ring advances on its own slightly-offset clock so the voices gradually phase; synthesized percussion (kick 150вҶ’45 Hz pitch-env sine + click, snare/clap filtered-noise burst, closed-hat short HF noise, clave/rim band-passed click, tom, shaker) through a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter вҶ’ master; (3) **three.js render** вҖ” concentric rotating rings of step-cells (lit = onset), per-ring orbiting playheads, particle/ripple bursts on each hit; perspective camera looking down the stack, DPR-capped, full geometry/material/renderer disposal + rAF/interval/AudioContext teardown on unmount. Degrades cleanly: no WebGL/three.js вҶ’ readable notice + DOM ring readout (audio still runs); AudioContext gesture-gated on mobile вҶ’ prominent "Tap to start". **No API route, no `guard` needed вҖ” no network at all** (Web Audio + three.js + touch; no mic, no camera, no fetch, no secrets, no FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps (three.js is an existing repo dep).

  References: **Godfried Toussaint, "The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms"** (BRIDGES 2005) вҖ” the paper that showed Euclidean distributions reproduce traditional world rhythms В· **Steve Reich**, *Piano Phase* (1967) / *Clapping Music* (1972) вҖ” the phase-music technique of identical patterns drifting out of sync В· **Chris Wilson**, "A Tale of Two Clocks" (Web-Audio look-ahead scheduling). Born from RESEARCH В§359. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire (*three ways to leave the consonant monastery* вҖ” three emotional registers, one per clean renderer lane); siblings `424-welcome-erosion` (Karel's real Welcome Home piano вҶ’ long-form 5-min granular **erosion**, a piece about forgetting вҖ” Basinski/Lucier вҖ” Canvas2D) + `425-test-signal` (clinical Ikeda/Alva-Noto **glitch-wall**, raw WebGL2 test-card вҖ” the purest *refuse-to-resolve* swing) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§359. **Ambition 2/5** (stated plainly): вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” Euclidean generator + phasing scheduler/percussion synth + three.js render) + named-reference(#3 вҖ” Toussaint 2005 / Reich / Wilson). **Diversity**: touch INPUT (mic + camera both rested/banned) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (the decisive dodge вҖ” 0Г— in the last-10; the freshest clean renderer lane, where WebGL2/Canvas2D/SVG are all recently used or jury-banned) В· Euclidean-rhythm + Reich-phasing TECHNIQUE В· hypnotic-percussive **zero-tuning** VIBE (the adult answer to the consonance-resolving rut). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the per-ring phase-drift *perceptually* reads as "the rings are slipping against each other" vs. just polyrhythm at a phone glance; the builder-flagged `setTimeout`-per-tick playhead churn on a throttled/backgrounded tab (harmless but a possible glitch source on low-end mobile); iOS AudioContext-in-tap + autostart path; three.js perf/DPR on a low-end phone; whether synthesized kick/snare/hat/clave read as a satisfying kit on phone speakers (no audio/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/426-euclid-engine/README.md`

- **[/dream/429-kids-texture-paint-tap](/dream/429-kids-texture-paint-tap)** вҖ” Texture Paint рҹҺЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 360.

  **For kids 4+ вҖ” finger-paint where each brush *sounds like what it looks like*, and the sound is pure TEXTURE, never a note.** Pick a brush by tapping a big emoji swatch вҖ” **рҹҢҝ Crunch В· рҹ«§ Pop В· рҹӘө Tap В· вҡЎ Scratch В· рҹ’§ Splash** вҖ” then dab or drag on the dark canvas: each touch stamps a matching textured mark AND fires a matching procedural-**foley** sound in the same frame. This is **the lab's first pure-NOISE/foley kids instrument played by touch** вҖ” every prior kids sound toy (and the loved paint lineage `100`вқӨпёҸ/`104`вқӨпёҸ/`158`вқӨпёҸ/`160`вқӨпёҸ/`152`вқӨпёҸ/`223`вқӨпёҸ, and the weather toys `293`/`115`/`306`) maps to **pentatonic PITCH**; this one has **zero notes, zero scale, zero melody** вҖ” the entire palette is shaped noise & timbre. It is the **adult-jury's #1 mandate** ("build pieces whose subject is rhythm/timbre/**NOISE** вҖ” not tuning") finally answered for **kids**, via a **non-camera, non-mic** route (the prior kids rhythm pieces `419`/`423` were both camera вҖ” this rests the camera and uses touch).

  Three subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **`audio.ts`** вҖ” an **impulse + resonator foley engine**: five voices, each a short noise excitation (white burst / click / friction sweep) through **randomized inharmonic bandpass/highpass resonators** so a material character emerges but **no pitch ever does** (centre frequencies are re-randomized across wide inharmonic ranges every hit, so repeated dabs never spell a tune) вҖ” Crunch = a cluster of 4вҖ“8 gravel crackles, Pop = a rounded band-filtered blip (bouba), Tap = a click through two offset damped resonances (dry knock), Scratch = a highpassed friction rasp (kiki), Splash = a burst + descending-LP drip tail; **per-voice cooldowns** (45вҖ“90 ms) stop rapid drags machine-gunning, everything sums through a **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** (вҲ’6 dB / 20:1) at master 0.22 so it can never blast small ears; a very quiet always-on **airy noise bed** (bandpassed, non-pitched) means it's never silent. (2) **`scene.ts`** вҖ” a **Canvas2D** textured-stamp renderer: five `draw*` functions (spiky star-clusters for Crunch, soft radial bubbles for Pop, angular wood grain for Tap, jagged scratch radiations, radial drip splatter) with a seeded LCG for organic per-stamp variation. (3) **input/auto-demo** in `page.tsx` вҖ” multi-touch via Pointer Events + `setPointerCapture`, a hands-free **auto-demo** at 1.8 s that dabs/drags through all five brushes (so a 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears it with no interaction), a **tap-to-start** overlay creating/resuming the `AudioContext` inside the gesture (iOS-safe), resize-preserving canvas, full teardown on unmount. Degrades cleanly (no Canvas вҶ’ notice; autoplay blocked вҶ’ tap prompt). Camera/mic: **none**. No API route, no `guard` needed вҖ” **no network at all** (no mic, camera, fetch, secrets, FAL_KEY). Zero new npm deps.

  References: **Wolfgang KГ¶hler** вҖ” bouba/kiki cross-modal sound-symbolism (1929; round shapes вҶ” soft sounds, spiky вҶ” sharp вҖ” the toy's mapping principle) В· **Andy Farnell**, *Designing Sound* (2010) вҖ” procedural-foley lineage В· **Perry Cook** вҖ” PhISM / physically-informed particle-foley. Born from RESEARCH В§360. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one concept вҖ” *paint where the brush's texture IS its sound, noise not notes* вҖ” three synthesis attacks); siblings `428-kids-texture-paint-morph` (subtractive noise-morph on a **raw WebGL2** painterly ping-pong-FBO canvas вҖ” the most beautiful take, the cycle-2 visual deepening) + `427-kids-texture-paint-grains` (granular-noise foley, Canvas2D) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§360. **Ambition 2/5** (stated plainly, no stretch): вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” foley synth engine + ambient bed + Canvas2D stamp renderer + pointer/auto-demo = 4) + named-reference(#3 вҖ” KГ¶hler 1929 В· Farnell 2010 В· Cook PhISM). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вҖ” noise/granular/modal synth all exist in the lab; the fresh move is the **all-noise-no-pitch framing + textureвҶ”timbre cross-modal mapping for kids**. **Diversity**: **touch INPUT** (the clean dodge of the over-represented/jury-banned mic; camera rested after back-to-back `419`/`423`) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (3Г— in last-10, allowed) В· impulse-resonator **NOISE-foley TECHNIQUE** В· kids non-tuned texture VIBE (the literal answer to the consonance rut). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the five voices read as distinctly "crunchy/poppy/scratchy" on phone speakers (resonator constants are first-guess), iOS AudioContext-resume-in-gesture + autoplay-blocked tap-prompt path, the self-flagged `alert()`-based design-notes link (functional but inelegant on mobile; left to avoid risking the build), and Canvas2D stamp + rapid multi-touch perf on a low-end tablet.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/429-kids-texture-paint-tap/README.md`

- **[/dream/437-wiki-pulse](/dream/437-wiki-pulse)** вҖ” Wiki-Pulse. `demoable` В· Cycle 363.

  **What does the entire planet's live editing of human knowledge SOUND like вҖ” right now, this second?** Tap once and the piece connects to the **Wikimedia EventStreams `recentchange` SSE firehose** (`stream.wikimedia.org/v2/stream/recentchange`) вҖ” a public, key-less, CORS-enabled Server-Sent-Events stream of *every edit to every Wikipedia/Wikidata/Commons in real time* вҖ” and sonifies it live: every glowing point in the 3D field is a real edit happening as you watch. This is **the lab's first sonification of a live human-activity stream** (grep-verified: prior data pieces are planetary/physical вҖ” `418-seismic-pulse`, `314-solar-wind`, `262-aurora-particle`, `233-earth-pulse` вҖ” never a *human* tide), resurrecting the banked `430-wiki-pulse` (cycle 361, never built). It answers **two** JURY 2026-06-08 provocations in one fire: **#4** ("real-world data sonification вҖ” music about something other than music вҖ” zero in 15 cycles") and **#2** ("build something that *refuses to resolve* вҖ” there is no Ikeda/Akten counter-piece") вҖ” an aperiodic firehose with no grid, no arc, no chord, that structurally cannot resolve.

  **The sonification (the bot/human tide is the idea):** five distinct voices through an 8-voice cap вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (вҲ’8 dB) вҶ’ master. **Bot edit = a dry, cold, high bandpassed-noise click** (you literally *hear* the machine layer under the human one); **human main-article edit = a warm triangle pluck with glide** вҖ” *addition* glides up (Hatnote "bell") / *removal* falls and softens (Hatnote "string"), magnitude вҶ’ register (small = high+quiet, big = low+loud); **new page = a brief two-osc stab**; **log = a low sine thud**; **categorize = a quiet ultra-high tick**. Pitches are equal-tempered (the JURY banned just-intonation-as-subject this cycle) and never voiced as a chord вҖ” arrivals are aperiodic, so it never resolves. **Visuals (three.js):** a 600-slot circular-buffer point field with a custom GLSL `ShaderMaterial` (per-point alpha, additive bloom) вҖ” **X = wiki/language** (enwiki left вҶ’ wikidata right), **Y = byte delta** (additions above, removals below), size вҲқ log|О”bytes|, color = cyan(human)/amber(bot)/magenta(new)/grey-green(log), ~3вҖ“4 s lifetime; gentle camera drift; full geometry/material/renderer + rAF disposal on unmount. Clinical glowing-point-on-black aesthetic (Ikeda *data-cosm* lineage). Live HUD: edits/sec, % bot, total, and an honest **live/demo status line**.

  **Graceful degradation (always demos hands-free):** if the SSE fails to deliver a message within 4 s (network block / CORS), a **synthetic generator** emits realistic fake `recentchange`-shaped events (weighted wiki distribution, ~12 % bot, realistic byte-delta tail, ~10/sec) through the *same* sonify+visualize path, with the status line honestly switching to `text-amber-300` "demo stream (live feed unavailable)"; if it was live and later errors, it bridges on demo and retries. Tap-to-start creates/resumes the `AudioContext` inside the gesture (iOS-safe) and kicks the connection. **No API route, no `guard` needed** вҖ” the SSE is consumed *client-side* by the browser's native `EventSource` directly from Wikimedia; there is no Next.js route, no mic, no camera, no secrets, no FAL_KEY. Zero new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **Hatnote, *Listen to Wikipedia*** (Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi, 2013 вҖ” bells for additions, strings for removals, pitch вҲқ edit size; the canonical prior art, honored and made colder/data-clinical here) В· **Ryoji Ikeda, *data-cosm [nВ°1]*** (180 Studios, on view through Feb 2026 вҖ” the clinical glowing-data-on-black visual language). Born from RESEARCH В§363. **Ambition 3/5** (honest): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (live SSE ingest/fallback controller + 5-voice sonification engine/limiter + three.js GLSL point-field) + **#3** named references (Hatnote / Ikeda) + **#5** recent research (RESEARCH В§363, this fire, <14 days). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” data sonification and three.js both exist in the lab; the *fresh* move is the **live human-activity stream** + the audible bot/human timbral split. **Diversity** (vs JURY bans): **live-SSE/API INPUT** (dodges the banned mic and the over-represented touch) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (dodges the banned SVG) В· **data-stream-sonification TECHNIQUE** (dodges the banned Kuramoto) В· **clinical refuse-to-resolve VIBE** (the literal answer to the consonant-resolving rut; equal-tempered, not just-intonation). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire (*three ways to refuse to resolve, via three distinct inputs*); siblings `436-flow-static` (camera optical-flow вҶ’ Ikeda data-noise, raw WebGL2) + `438-no-input` (no-input feedback-delay-network self-oscillator, Canvas2D scope) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§363. **Build-verified (exit 0), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the live feed actually connects from Karel's network (the synthetic fallback covers it either way), whether ~10 evts/sec sounds comfortable vs. cluttered on a phone speaker, whether 8 concurrent voices balance, and the three.js additive-bloom appearance on OLED vs LCD (no network/audio/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/437-wiki-pulse/README.md`

- **[/dream/440-kids-comet-gather](/dream/440-kids-comet-gather)** вҖ” Comet Gather. `demoable` В· Cycle 364.

  **For kids 4+ вҖ” hold your phone up like a window and physically turn/sweep it to look around a 3D night sky, scooping up drifting glowing motes into your own growing constellation вҖ” and every mote you gather adds a voice to a slowly evolving lullaby that is different at minute 5 than at minute 0.** No tapping, no reading: the instrument is the child *moving the phone through space*. A soft purple aura reticle sits at screen center; hold it over a drifting mote for a moment and it is scooped with a bell chime, flies to join a slowly-rotating cluster connected by faint glowing lines, and starts singing. This is the lab's **first gyro "magic-window" first-person kids piece** (all ~115 prior kids prototypes are touch/2D or tilt-to-roll `238`; this one is a 3D look-around portal) **and its first long-form *evolving* generative kids lullaby** (a piece with state/memory that transforms over minutes вҖ” the categorical-diversity-menu's long-form-generative slot, unfilled for kids). It deliberately **rests the over-represented touch input** (touch was 4Г— in the last-10 вҶ’ diversity-banned this cycle) and the **camera-body kids lane** (`419`/`423`/`234`), using **device-orientation** instead вҖ” embodied/sensorimotor, KIDS.md's core principle, and it gets the child physically turning to look around.

  Three+ subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **gyro magic-window camera** вҖ” `deviceorientation` Оұ/ОІ/Оі вҶ’ yaw/pitch, low-pass-smoothed (Оұ=0.12) onto the three.js camera (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` called inside the Begin tap; drag-to-look fallback on desktop/no-sensor with a readable note); (2) **three.js 3D scene** вҖ” ~30 Fibonacci-distributed drifting glowing motes (AdditiveBlending sprites) + ~1600-point background starfield surrounding the viewer on a sphere, constellation fly-to + slow-orbit cluster, glowing connector lines, full geometry/material/renderer disposal on unmount; (3) **long-form generative audio engine** вҖ” D-major-pentatonic (no wrong notes), each gathered mote a sustained/arpeggiated triangle+harmonic voice through a **`StereoPannerNode`** (spatial L/R by screen position вҖ” chosen over HRTF so it reads on phone speakers) вҶ’ **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** (safe for small ears); the evolution is real: the pad's root/fifth drift D2вҶ’E2вҶ’A2 on an ~8-min cycle, a ~4-min filter LFO breathes the texture, each voice's arpeggio rate grows with age + global time (busier/richer by minute 5), and a ~12-min "goodnight" fade for bedtime; (4) **input/auto-demo** вҖ” a hands-free auto-demo sweeps the camera in a figure-8 and auto-gathers the first ~4 motes so the lullaby self-builds within ~20s on a 06:30 phone open with no interaction; auto-pan resumes after idle. **No network at all** (no mic, camera, fetch, secrets, FAL_KEY); **no API route, no `guard` needed.** Zero new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **"magic window" gyro-stargazer interaction** вҖ” the 3-DoF device-orientation camera without a headset (Google Cardboard-era WebVR demos; W3C `DeviceOrientation` / Gyroscope spec, Candidate Recommendation Draft 2026-02-02) В· **Brian Eno generative-music lineage** (*Discreet Music* / *Music for Airports* вҖ” a system that sounds different at minute 1, 5, 12) В· **3-DoF head-tracked spatial audio** via `StereoPannerNode` (Web Audio, no HRTF вҖ” phone-speaker-friendly). Born from RESEARCH В§364. **Ambition 2/5** (honest, no stretch): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (gyro camera + three.js scene + long-form spatial-audio engine + auto-demo = 4) + **#3** named references (magic-window stargazer / Eno generative / 3-DoF spatial audio). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” gyro (`238`/`417`/`83`), 3D (`238`), and stereo-pan spatial audio (`99`/`238`) all exist in the lab; the *fresh* moves are the **first-person look-around magic window** + the **long-form evolving lullaby** for kids. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the dive's hard anchor (W3C Gyroscope CR, Feb 2026) is ~4 months old, not <14 days. **Diversity** (vs cycle bans): **device-orientation INPUT** (the clean dodge of the count-banned touch [4Г—] and the jury-banned mic) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (2Г— in last-10, allowed) В· **magic-window + long-form-generative TECHNIQUE** В· **kids-cosmic VIBE** (parity-exempt). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one concept вҖ” *turn the phone to look around a 3D singing night* вҖ” three technical attacks; alternating off three consecutive WIDE cycles 361/362/363); siblings `438-kids-star-window` (three.js *aim-to-wake* a fixed star-creature вҖ” the most immediate/kid-legible take, quaternion-slerp gyro) + `439-kids-star-night` (the same aim-to-wake on a **raw-WebGL2** GLSL additive-glow point-field вҖ” the atmospheric renderer attack) build-reviewed (tsc + ESLint clean, ~519/495 lines) and banked in IDEAS В§364. **Build-verified (exit 0, prerendered, zero warnings from the folder), NOT browser-verified** (no gyro/audio/GPU in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the 0.9s scoop dwell feels right vs. fiddly for a 4-year-old holding a moving phone on a drifting target, the iOS `requestPermission` + Оұ/ОІ/ОівҶ’yaw/pitch frame on real iOS/Android hardware (axis quirks across OEMs), whether the multi-minute root-drift/goodnight evolution reads at full length, `StereoPanner` on mobile Safari, and three.js AdditiveBlending bloom across mobile GPUs.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/440-kids-comet-gather/README.md`

- **[/dream/441-latent-listening-room](/dream/441-latent-listening-room)** вҖ” Latent Listening Room. `demoable` В· Cycle 365.

  **A generative ambient piece that continuously *dreams a picture of itself* вҖ” and the picture bends the music back.** Press **Begin** and a slowly-evolving pad+arpeggio starts (fully synthesized, expressive 12-TET, an 8-chord progression cycling every 15вҖ“25s). An `AnalyserNode` reads the live spectrum every frame and, every ~6 seconds, writes a text prompt from it вҖ” **brightness** (spectral centroid) вҶ’ palette words (deep indigo вҶ” luminous gold), **energy/RMS** вҶ’ density words (ethereal mist вҶ” swirling turbulence), **dominant pitch-class** вҶ’ a hue accent вҖ” over a fixed base style (*"abstract volumetric light, latent dreamscape, soft caustics, Refik-Anadol-like data-pigment, cinematic"*). The prompt POSTs to a **guarded** route that calls FAL `flux/schnell` (4 steps), and when the image returns it **cross-fades** over the previous one on a full-bleed canvas with a slow **Ken-Burns** drift, so the picture is always alive. Then the loop closes: the new image is sampled to an 8Г—6 offscreen canvas, its average color read, and the audio bent вҖ” **brighter image вҶ’ opens the master lowpass + adds a shimmer layer; warmer hue вҶ’ longer reverb tail**. Audio вҶ’ prompt вҶ’ image вҶ’ audio. This is the lab's **first *closed* audioвҶ”imageвҶ”audio loop** and the freshest hit on Karel's standing directive ("AI image generation INSIDE audio-visual experiments, where the image responds to or shapes the audio вҖ” the path that interests him most right now"); it rides the loved `323-latent-condensation`вқӨпёҸ latent-pigment aesthetic.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **Web-Audio generative synth + FFT analysis** вҖ” detuned saw/triangle/sine pad stacks with cross-fades on chord change, plucked-sine arpeggio, convolver reverb, shimmer highpass, slow LFO filter mod, everything through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master; FFT 2048 вҶ’ energy (8 log bands) / centroid / chromagram pitch-class. (2) **Guarded FAL image pipeline** вҖ” `api/route.ts` starts POST with `const blocked = await guard(req); if (blocked) return blocked;` (origin + 8/min + 40/day), returns 501 when `FAL_KEY` is absent, else `fal.subscribe("fal-ai/flux/schnell")`; client paces вүӨ1 request in flight, вүҘ7s apart; images preloaded with `crossOrigin="anonymous"`. (3) **Canvas compositor** вҖ” cross-fade (~2.5s) + Ken-Burns + vignette. (4) **ImageвҶ’audio loop-back** вҖ” `getImageData` average-color вҶ’ `linearRampToValueAtTime` on lowpass cutoff / shimmer gain / reverb wet (CORS-taint `try/catch` вҶ’ degrades to image-only, never crashes). **Graceful degradation (the actual in-build experience, since the sandbox has no FAL_KEY):** any failure (501 / 429 / network / load / taint) falls to a **locally-synthesized field** driven by the *same* spectral data вҖ” per-pixel sum-of-sines plasma, 3 orbiting radial-gradient blobs in pitch-class hues, ~220 curl-flow-field particles, Ken-Burns + vignette вҖ” with an honest status line (emerald `text-emerald-300/95` "dreaming live" when images arrive, amber `text-amber-300/95` "live image unavailable вҖ” showing synthesized field" in fallback). It is a complete, beautiful AV piece even with no key, and upgrades live when one is present.

  References: **Refik Anadol** вҖ” *Unsupervised* (MoMA, 2022) / *Machine Hallucinations* (latent-space pigment flows; the explicit visual target) В· **Memo Akten** вҖ” *Learning to See* (2017/2019; a network continuously re-describing live input вҖ” the conceptual ancestor of the audioвҶ’imageвҶ’audio feedback) В· **arXiv 2604.07612** (Apr 2026, *Towards Real-Time HumanвҖ“AI Musical Co-Performance: Accompaniment Generation with Latent Diffusion Models and MAX/MSP* вҖ” the audioвҶ”latent feedback framing, realized here browser-natively via a hosted fast model rather than a local diffusion model; cited as research context, ~2mo, not a <14d anchor). Born from RESEARCH В§365. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire (*three frontier-different adult directions*); siblings `442-body-orchestra` (adult full-body MediaPipe spatial conductor's room вҖ” jury #6's "single biggest untouched first") + `443-the-vanishing` (a 10-voice ensemble that permanently loses a voice every time you look away вҖ” attention-as-instrument, the jury's "go weird") build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§365. **Ambition 2/5** (honest): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (synth+FFT В· guarded FAL pipeline В· canvas compositor В· imageвҶ’audio loop-back) + **#3** named references (Anadol / Akten / 2604.07612). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” image-gen already exists in the lab (271/153/323); the fresh move is the *closed* audioвҶ”imageвҶ”audio loop + spectralвҶ’prompt mapping (application/framing novelty, not a new primitive). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the dive anchor is ~2 months, not <14 days. **Diversity** (vs cycle bans): **synthesized-audio/none INPUT** (dodges banned mic + over-leaned touch) В· **AI-IMAGE OUTPUT** (0Г— in last-10 вҖ” a genuinely fresh modality; dodges banned SVG + over-leaned three.js) В· **generative-model-call + spectral-conditioning + audio-loop-back TECHNIQUE** (dodges banned Kuramoto) В· **latent / Anadol-organic VIBE** (not JI-tuning-as-subject). **Build-verified (exit 0, prerendered, zero warnings from the folder; the guarded `/api` route is in the manifest), NOT browser-verified** (no FAL_KEY / no GPU / no audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the live FAL path connects from Karel's network + the FAL CDN's CORS policy for the `getImageData` loop-back (try/catch-guarded вҶ’ image-only if tainted), whether ~1 image/7s reads as "breathing with the music," whether the synthesized-field fallback holds as a standalone piece on a phone, and the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/441-latent-listening-room/README.md`

- **[/dream/454-piano-caption-loom](/dream/454-piano-caption-loom)** вҖ” Piano Caption Loom. `demoable` В· Cycle 369.

  **Cycle 2 of the "Latent Piano Room" spine вҖ” the caption a latent image is dreamed from is no longer written in one shot; you watch a council of agents critique and *refine* it across visible rounds, from Karel's real recorded piano.** Press **Play Karel's Piano** and his Ghost recording streams through a Web-Audio chain (or drop a *Welcome Home* track; or a warm CвҖ“AmвҖ“FвҖ“G7вҖ“Cmaj9 synth fallback that **resolves on purpose** if the recording can't load вҖ” never silent). A musically-aware analyser (FFT 2048) tracks RMS dynamics, a 12-bin chromagram вҶ’ dominant pitch-class + major/minor/consonance, spectral-flux onsets, phrase boundaries, and a smoothed **valence** (modality+consonance) Г— **arousal** (dynamics+onset-density) вҖ” the music's emotion target. At every phrase boundary / onset cluster the **Caption Loom** runs a 3-round refinement: **Round 0 вҖ” Draft** (four specialist proposers вҖ” Scene/Palette/Motion/Style вҖ” each emit a clause from the music); **Critic** scores the draft against the emotion target and writes concrete critiques ("palette too cool for this warm phrase", "motion too calm for high arousal"); **Revise** вҖ” proposers rewrite the flagged clauses; **Final** anchors the emotion tag. The HUD stacks all three rounds вҖ” round labels, **rising confidence bars**, the critic's amber notes, and the specific **changed words highlighted in violet** вҖ” so you watch the prompt *sharpen*. The final caption POSTs to a **guarded** route вҶ’ FAL `flux/schnell`; the returning image cross-fades as the backdrop and its average color **bends the real piano back** (brightness вҶ’ master lowpass + shimmer; warmth вҶ’ reverb tail). The loop: real piano вҶ’ analysis вҶ’ emotion-aligned iterative caption вҶ’ image вҶ’ piano.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 6): (1) **real-recorded-audio chain** вҖ” `<audio crossOrigin="anonymous">` default `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ` (Ghost recording) / file-drop / warm resolving synth fallback вҶ’ `createMediaElementSource` вҶ’ AnalyserNode вҶ’ reverbвҶ’compressorвҶ’master, with a 350ms all-zero CORS-taint check that auto-swaps to the synth. (2) **musically-aware analysis** (`analysis.ts`) вҖ” chromagram/modality/consonance + spectral-flux onset (Bello 2005) + phrase-boundary + valence-arousal. (3) **iterative multi-agent caption loom** (`loom.ts`) вҖ” proposeвҶ’critiqueвҶ’reviseвҶ’final, deterministic (no LLM calls), all rounds recorded for the HUD. (4) **guarded FAL image pipeline** вҖ” `api/route.ts` starts POST with `const blocked = await guard(req); if (blocked) return blocked;`, 501 when `FAL_KEY` absent. (5) **synthesized latent field** (`field.ts`) вҖ” plasma/particles driven by the same caption + features so the piece is complete with no key (amber "synthesized (no image key)" badge; the loom still runs all 3 rounds). (6) **imageвҶ’audio loopback** вҖ” `getImageData` avg color (try/catch CORS taint вҶ’ image-only) вҶ’ ramps on lowpass/shimmer/reverb on the live playback. iOS-safe (`AudioContext.resume()` inside the start tap). `@fal-ai/client` is an existing repo dep вҖ” **no new npm deps**.

  References: **arXiv 2507.20536** (*T2I-Copilot*) + **arXiv 2511.11483** (*ImAgent*) вҖ” training-free multi-agent **proposeвҶ’critiqueвҶ’refine** prompt loops (the loom's core mechanic; RESEARCH В§369) В· **arXiv 2512.23320** (*Multi-Agents Semantic Emotion Aligned Music to Image*, Dec 2025) вҖ” music-derived captions + **valence-arousal** emotion alignment В· **Russell (1980)** circumplex model of affect В· **Refik Anadol** *Machine Hallucinations* / **Memo Akten** *Learning to See* (latent-pigment aesthetic) В· **Bello et al. (2005)** spectral-flux onset detection. **Ambition 4/5** вҖ” directly answering the jury's "zero pieces at 4вҖ“5/5" regression: **#1** never-used technique (the lab's **first iterative self-critiquing prompt-refinement** subsystem вҖ” a Critic agent that scores a draft and triggers a revise loop; prior "multi-agent" in `327-physarum-choir` is an agent-*based particle sim*, a different sense) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (6, above) + **#3** named references (T2I-Copilot/ImAgent/2512.23320/Russell/Anadol/Akten/Bello) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the jury-mandated Latent Piano Room spine, the #4 axis the jury said died at 414). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the dive anchors are ~3вҖ“11 months, not <14 days. **Diversity** (jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· drum-machine-TECH В· refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE В· calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids): **real-recorded-audio INPUT** (sanctioned spine continuation) В· **AI-image OUTPUT** (the canvas only composites the AI image + HUD, not Canvas2D-as-the-piece вҖ” the same dodge as `441`/`448`, and the jury named this lineage the bright spot to extend) В· **iterative-caption-refinement TECHNIQUE** (not drum-machine) В· **warm/expressive/resolves-on-purpose VIBE** (the jury's explicit "missing middle"). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire (one concept вҖ” *a multi-agent caption pipeline composes the dream from the real piano* вҖ” three attacks); siblings `452-piano-agent-council` (the visible one-shot council + Russell dial вҖ” most legible, the cycle-3 VIZ candidate) + `453-piano-affect-atlas` (valence-arousal comet cartography) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§369. **Build-verified (exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 111s`, prerendered `/dream/454-piano-caption-loom 13.6 kB` + guarded `/api` in the manifest, `npx eslint` on the folder exit 0 / zero warnings), NOT browser-verified** (no FAL_KEY / no audio / no GPU in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ` resolves + Supabase signed-URL CORS lets the analyser read non-zero from Karel's network (all-zeroвҶ’synth fallback covers it); whether the critic's critiques *fire* and the caption visibly improves on real expressive piano (vs. trivially passing on round 0); whether ~1 image/phrase reads as "painting the music"; the FAL CDN's CORS for the loopback `getImageData` (try/catchвҶ’image-only if tainted); iOS AudioContext-in-tap.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/454-piano-caption-loom/README.md`

- **[/dream/460-kids-ball-pit](/dream/460-kids-ball-pit)** вҖ” Ball Pit. `demoable` В· Cycle 372. **For**: kids (4+).

  **The lab's FIRST many-body collision physics вҖ” tip the phone and pour ~900 glowing marbles that pile, slosh, and chime as they collide.** Gravity follows device tilt (gamma/beta), with a pointer-drag fallback when DeviceOrientation is denied/absent. Every ball-ball or ball-wall collision whose impact speed exceeds 60 px/s rings a soft bell pitched to a **D-major just-intonation hexachord** (D E FвҷҜ A B, ratios 1 : 9/8 : 5/4 : 3/2 : 5/3, two octaves), the pitch chosen by the ball's hue вҖ” so a cascade tumbling into a corner becomes a sparkling arpeggio and a gentle slosh is a few soft chimes. Tap to pour ~24 fresh balls (a little waterfall of 7 chimes); two-finger fast swipe scrambles the pile into a glittery sparkle-run. The instrument is gravity; the child is the composer; the sound comes from the collision, not a sequencer.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **uniform-grid spatial-hash collision solver** (`physics.ts`) вҖ” broad-phase buckets every ball by `floor(x/cell), floor(y/cell)` with cell = 2.2Г— max radius (O(nВІ)вҶ’~O(n)); narrow-phase computes penetration `minDist вҲ’ actualDist`, applies a mass-split positional correction (PBD constraint) + a restitution velocity impulse along the collision normal; stable `id`-packed pair-dedup (`lo*1048576+hi`, no `indexOf`). (2) **WebGL2 instanced-quad renderer** вҖ” one `drawArraysInstanced` per frame for all ~900вҖ“1400 balls; each instance carries position/radius/hue/flash; the fragment shader draws core + glow ring from `length(vUV)` with additive premultiplied-alpha blending over a deep `#090a12` ground. (3) **JI bell synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” sine fundamental + inharmonic partial Г—2.756 + 12 ms band-passed noise burst, 8 ms attack / ~1.1 s exp decay; soft D3вҖ“FвҷҜ3вҖ“A3 ambient pad (вүҲвҲ’35 dBFS, LFO tremolo) so it's **never silent**; everything through a DynamicsCompressor (вҲ’18 dB, 4:1) вҶ’ brick-wall limiter (вҲ’2 dB, 20:1) so no transient can pierce; an 8-events-per-step cap prevents chime-spam at high ball counts. (4) **tilt / pointer / tap input** вҖ” first-tap boots AudioContext + requests iOS DeviceOrientation permission; gravity from tilt or drag; tap-to-pour; two-finger scramble. **4-second hands-free auto-demo** gently rocks gravity so the pit self-demos at a 06:30 glance.

  References: **MГјller, Heidelberger, Hennix & Ratcliff (2007)** *Position Based Dynamics* (the positional-correction constraint + complementary velocity update for non-penetration) В· **"Party: A WebGPU Particle Physics Playground"** (webgpu.com, **Jan 23 2026** вҖ” thousands of GPU-collided particles as a musical instrument; the "collision-as-instrument" framing; RESEARCH В§372). This prototype uses CPU spatial-hash physics + WebGL2 rendering rather than WebGPU for broad mobile compatibility. **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (the lab's **first many-body collision / contact solver** вҖ” grep-verified clean at README level across 360+ prototypes; the lab has fluid `3`/`84`вқӨпёҸ/`433`, particle-life `8`/`16`/`236`, falling-sand `332`, ferrofluid `456`, soft-body `451`, but no contact solver) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named references (MГјller et al. PBD 2007 В· Party Jan 2026). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the Party anchor is ~4.5 months, not <14 days. **Diversity** (cycle bans: AI-image OUT [4Г— count] В· Canvas2D OUT [jury] В· drum-machine TECH [jury] В· refuse-to-resolve VIBE [jury] В· calm-pentatonic-lullaby kids template [jury]): **tilt/device-orientation INPUT** (the embodied dodge of touch) В· **raw-WebGL2 instanced OUTPUT** (zero Canvas2D anywhere вҖ” dodges both the jury Canvas2D ban and the AI-image count-ban) В· **spatial-hash COLLISION/contact-solver TECHNIQUE** (not drum-machine) В· **loud-playful-physical VIBE** (a glittery cascade вҖ” not refuse-to-resolve, not the pentatonic-lullaby template). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire (three unrelated fresh registers); siblings `461-kids-storm-conductor` (touch вҶ’ WebGL2 fractal-lightning that sings, random-midpoint-displacement bolts + per-tip JI bells) + `462-kids-gear-garden` (spin a gear-train where integer tooth-ratios ARE just-intonation intervals вҖ” Partch/Antikythera) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§372. Rides loved `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ (physics-toy) + `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ (tilt) + `84-wave-fluid`вқӨпёҸ (slosh) + `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ (glowing particles). **Build-verified (exit 0, prerendered `/dream/460-kids-ball-pit/page.js` in the manifest, `npx eslint` on the folder exit 0 / zero warnings), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU / sensor / audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether ~900вҖ“1400 balls hold 60 fps on a real low-end phone (unprofiled); whether the collision-chime cascade reads as a sparkling arpeggio vs. spam (the 8-events/step cap guards it); whether tilt-steering feels good without quaternion correction; the iOS DeviceOrientation-permission + AudioContext-in-tap path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/460-kids-ball-pit/README.md`

- **[/dream/463-terra-gamelan](/dream/463-terra-gamelan)** вҖ” Terra Gamelan. `demoable` В· Cycle 373.

  **Every earthquake on Earth, right now, ringing a bell tuned to a Javanese gamelan scale on a slowly turning globe of light.** Press **Begin** and the piece continuously fetches the **live USGS real-time earthquake feed** (`all_day.geojson`, CORS-public, no auth, no API route вҖ” fetched directly client-side) and turns each quake into a tuned bell on a rotating luminous three.js Earth. **depth вҶ’ pitch** (shallow rings high, deep rings low, quantized to **slendro** or **pelog**), **magnitude вҶ’ loudness + decay + flash brightness** (micro-quakes are soft ticks, M5+ are resonant gongs), **longitude вҶ’ stereo pan + position on the globe**. It is stateful and long-form: the last ~24h of quakes accumulate as glowing depth-colored embers (warm=shallow, cool=deep) on a Fibonacci dot-globe, and an ever-present **drone bed** brightens/thickens with rolling global seismic energy, so a seismically busy hour sounds fuller. The instrument is the planet; the score is the Earth's own trembling. This is **cycle 1 of the new "Living Earth" spine** вҖ” the jury's (2026-06-09) #1 ask realized: *restart a multi-cycle commitment* (nothing had since 414), and it breaks the recent adult **latent-image monoculture** (AI-image OUT was count-banned at 4Г—).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **live seismic ingest** (`seismic.ts`) вҖ” USGS GeoJSON fetch with abort+timeout, id-diff for new arrivals, a rolling-energy window, and a complete **synthetic fallback** (Gutenberg-Richter magnitudes + Poisson arrivals + a 24h backlog seeded around tectonic hotspots) so the piece is a full, beautiful instrument with **no network** (what the build check sees). (2) **gamelan bell synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” `GamelanEngine`: slendro `[0,231,474,717,955]` / pelog `[0,120,258,539,675,785,943]` cents over a low-D gong base; inharmonic bonang/gong partials (1 / 2.41 / 3.93) + a band-passed noise-burst mallet attack, fast attack / exponential decay; **everything вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (вҲ’18/4:1) вҶ’ brick-wall limiter (вҲ’2 dB/20:1)** so a swarm can never clip or hurt ears. (3) **evolving drone bed** вҖ” sustained mildly-inharmonic partials whose level + lowpass cutoff glide with rolling seismic energy; a baseline hum keeps it **never silent**. (4) **three.js globe** (`scene.ts`) вҖ” Fibonacci dot-sphere + faint wireframe + occluding core + additive atmosphere halo + 1400-star field; quake embers in a single additive **Points buffer with a custom soft-sprite size shader**, flash-pulse on ring, depth-color, 24h TTL + 500 cap with in-place compaction, inertial drag-to-spin, full geometry/material/renderer dispose on unmount. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (public CORS endpoint, read-only, no secrets). No new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **arXiv 2602.14560** (*Preliminary sonification of ENSO using traditional Javanese gamelan scales*, Feb 16 2026 вҖ” parameter-mapping onto pelog/slendro; this prototype applies the same culturally-situated tuning to seismic rather than climate data) В· **Seismic Sound Lab** / **Ben Holtzman & Anna Barth** (Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory вҖ” earthquake-data sonification lineage) В· **Ryoji Ikeda** (data-aesthetic, though the vibe here is warm/resonant, not cold-clinical). Born from RESEARCH В§373. **Ambition 3/5** (honest): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named references + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Living Earth spine). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” grep-verified: **slendro** tuning is already in `402-kids-steady-walk` and **pelog** in `408-kids-breath-grove`, and a live external-data stream already exists in `437-wiki-pulse`; the fresh moves are the **planetary/geophysical** data domain + the gamelan-tuned-globe synthesis (application novelty, not a new primitive). **Diversity** (vs cycle bans AI-image-OUT [4Г— count] В· Canvas2D-OUT В· drum-machine-TECH В· refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE В· calm-pentatonic-kids-template): **live-planetary-data INPUT** В· **three.js globe + additive shader OUTPUT** (zero Canvas2D, zero AI-image) В· **gamelan-tuned data-sonification TECHNIQUE** В· **warm planetary-observatory VIBE**. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-attack adult fire (one concept вҖ” *play the living Earth from a live planetary data stream, tuned to a non-Western system* вҖ” three attacks: data-source Г— musical-structure Г— renderer); siblings `464-helios-aurora` (NOAA space-weather вҶ’ EDM build-and-drop aurora, KpвүҘ5 = the drop) + `465-terra-pulse` (USGS seismic energy вҶ’ long-form EDM build-and-drop journey) are complete, **build-reviewed** real implementations (own folder, pure client-side public-CORS fetch, no API route, synthetic fallback, brick-wall limiter) and banked in IDEAS В§373 as the Living Earth spine's **cycle-2** candidates. **Build-verified (exit 0, prerendered `/dream/463-terra-gamelan/page.js` in the manifest, `npx eslint` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether USGS CORS + the 60s poll-diff flow from Karel's network, real-GPU rendering of the ember sprite shader across mobile GPUs, audible gamelan-bell + drone-evolution balance, and the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/463-terra-gamelan/README.md`

- **[/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute](/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute)** вҖ” Bottle Flute. `demoable` В· Cycle 374. **For**: kids (4+).

  **A row of glowing glass bottles you BLOW into вҖ” and they're real physically-modeled flutes that breathe, resonate, and overblow to the octave when you blow hard.** Press **Start**, then tap a bottle to pick its note and blow into the mic (or just blow вҖ” loudness = how hard you blow); no mic, just tap and a preset breath-puff plays the note. Big bottle = low, small = high (C D E G A, a warm C-Lydian pentatonic subset, so every combination is consonant). The sound is **not** a sample or a plain oscillator: it's a digital **waveguide flute** вҖ” a delay-line bore + one-pole reflection filter, excited by breath-noise through a soft-clip cubic *jet* nonlinearity, so it has a breathy attack, a resonant body, and a genuine overblow (the cubic term shifts the operating point at high pressure вҶ’ the octave emerges, same physics as a real flute). This is **the lab's first physically-modeled WIND instrument** вҖ” distinct from KarplusвҖ“Strong (`140`/`184`), which is the simplest *plucked-string* waveguide; this is a *breath-excited bore*, a different physical regime.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **`flute.ts` digital-waveguide DSP** вҖ” an **AudioWorklet** processor (source inlined as a string вҶ’ Blob URL, so no `public/` file is needed; a **ScriptProcessorNode** fallback runs the identical loop if `addModule` throws): circular delay line of length `N = round(sampleRate/freq)`, one-pole lowpass reflection, `jet = pressure + boreВ·0.4` soft-clipped by `x вҲ’ xВі/3`, feedback < 1 with a hard Вұ1.15 clamp + NaN guard so it can never screech. (2) **Breath input** вҖ” mic RMS envelope (AnalyserNode `getFloatTimeDomainData`, analysis-only, never recorded) drives the `breath` AudioParam; OR a pure-touch preset envelope when there's no mic. (3) **Reverb** вҖ” a 4-comb Schroeder + 2-allpass network (no deps). (4) **Always-on ambient pad** (C3 E3 G3 triangles + slow LFO) so it's never silent, all through a **DynamicsCompressor** brick-wall limiter (kids-safe). (5) **Inline-SVG visuals** вҖ” five graduated glowing bottles, `feGaussianBlur` glow + warm-glass `linearGradient`, a breath-shimmer ellipse + rising bubbles that grow with blow strength, animated by rAF DOM-attribute writes (no Canvas2D, no WebGL). Auto-demo blows a gentle 15-note tune hands-free ~3 s after load.

  References: **Julius O. Smith III**, *Physical Audio Signal Processing* (CCRMA вҖ” waveguide bore modeling, reflection filters) В· **Perry R. Cook**, *Real Sound Synthesis for Interactive Applications* (2002) + the **STK Flute** model (jet delay + breath-noise architecture) В· **McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse**, "On the oscillations of musical instruments" (JASA 1983 вҖ” the nonlinear-exciter + linear-resonator framing). Born from RESEARCH В§374 (the dive that bound this fire **off** the GPU-physics-sim kids monoculture toward embodied breath/voice). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (first **breath-excited bore waveguide / physically-modeled WIND** instrument in the lab вҖ” grep-verified: prior "waveguide" hits `140`/`184` are KarplusвҖ“Strong *plucked strings*, a different regime) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (waveguide DSP В· breath-mic envelope В· touch В· Schroeder reverb В· SVG render = 5) + **#3** named references (Smith В· Cook/STK В· McIntyre et al. 1983). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the refs are foundational, not <14-day. **Diversity** (vs the cycle's bans вҖ” AI-image OUT [4Г—] В· Canvas2D OUT [jury] В· **GPU-physics-sim TECH** [451/456/460 = 3 straight kids cycles] В· drum-machine TECH [jury] В· refuse-to-resolve & pentatonic-lullaby VIBE [jury]): **breath/mic-RMS + touch INPUT** (fresh вҖ” amplitude, not pitch, not tilt) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (dodges BOTH the jury-banned Canvas2D AND the 5Г— WebGL-render monoculture) В· **digital-waveguide physical-modeling TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new audio primitive вҖ” dodges both GPU-physics-sim and drum-machine) В· **warm breathy resolving Lydian VIBE** (not a pentatonic lullaby). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire fired deliberately off the GPU-physics rut; siblings `466-kids-sing-kite` (SING to fly a kite along a scrolling melody contour, YIN pitch-detect, SVG) + `467-kids-shadow-band` (WAVE your body вҖ” camera motion-energy conducts a 3-zone particle band, three.js) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§374. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, prerendered `/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute` 6.96 kB in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no mic / audio / real hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether a 4-year-old's breath drives the RMS envelope into the overblow regime (`envвүҲ0.75вҖ“0.85`) at real mic gain/distance; AudioWorklet Blob-URL loading on iOS Safari (the ScriptProcessor fallback + touch-only path cover it); whether the waveguide *feels* breathy/flute-like vs. buzzy on phone speakers behind the limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + getUserMedia-in-gesture. No API route, no network, no camera, no secrets вҶ’ no `guard` needed. Zero new npm deps.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/468-kids-bottle-flute/README.md`

- **[/dream/471-helios-orbit](/dream/471-helios-orbit)** вҖ” Helios вҖ” Orbit. `demoable` В· Cycle 375.

  **Watch a dark Earth from orbit while a live geomagnetic storm conducts an EDM build-and-drop вҖ” the auroral ovals igniting and the music resolving the instant the storm peaks.** Press **Begin** and three live **NOAA SWPC** feeds (solar-wind plasma, IMF Bz, planetary Kp) stream in client-side: **wind speed вҶ’ master filter brightness + tempo**, **density вҶ’ pad shimmer/thickness**, **Bz-negative вҶ’ harmonic tension** (the pad drifts A-major вҶ’ minor/suspended), **Kp вҶ’ the master anticipation** (a riser sweep + quickening 16th-note hi-hats build). At **Kp вүҘ 5 the DROP fires exactly once** (a `prevStormActive` one-shot): a sub-bass swell + a 4-on-the-floor kick at 128 BPM + the harmony **snaps minorвҶ’major вҖ” it resolves on purpose** + the **auroral ovals ignite** (colatitude expands ~25В°вҶ’40В° toward the equator, hue greensвҶ’magenta/red as in real oxygen/nitrogen storm physics) + the **magnetosphere blooms** (an additive halo surge). Then it eases back to a warm ambient bed. Stateful, hands-free, **never silent**; a scripted ~22-s storm auto-fires (and a **"Simulate storm now"** button forces it) so it has a guaranteed buildвҶ’drop payoff with no network. This is **cycle 2 of the "Living Earth" spine** (cycle 1 = `463-terra-gamelan`) вҖ” it keeps a multi-cycle commitment alive (jury 2026-06-09 #1) and carries forward `463`'s luminous Fibonacci-dot-globe visual language, while delivering Karel's explicitly-wanted **EDM build-and-drop journey-engine alternative** and the jury's missing **"warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose"** middle.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ ~4): (1) **live space-weather ingest** (`spaceweather.ts`) вҖ” three NOAA SWPC public-CORS JSON feeds, 60-s poll with `AbortController` + 8-s timeout, exponential glide (~0.92/s) so values breathe rather than step; a complete **synthetic random-walk + scripted-storm fallback** (quiet вҶ’ build вҶ’ KpвүҘ6.5 drop вҶ’ decay over ~66 s) so the piece is a full instrument with **no network** (what the build check sees); NaN-guarded parsing вҶ’ silent synthetic fallback on any fetch/CORS/schema failure. (2) **EDM build-and-drop audio engine** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” warm A-major pad bed, minor/suspended drift on Bz-negative, riser + hi-hat accumulator on the Kp build, sub-bass + 4-on-the-floor kick + major-chord resolve + aurora-bloom chord on the drop; everything вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ brick-wall limiter (20:1, вҲ’1 dBFS) so nothing clips or is silent. (3) **three.js orbital globe** (`scene.ts`) вҖ” dark Fibonacci dot-sphere + additive atmosphere halo (continuity with `463`); **auroral ovals** as 1,200-particle shimmer-rings around the IGRF magnetic poles (~80.7В°N/72В°W, ~64.5В°S/136В°E) whose colatitude/brightness/hue track Kp (70%) + Bz-southward (30%); a **magnetosphere bloom** shell (2.8Г— globe) + corona that `triggerBloom()` flashes then exp-decays on the drop; drag-to-rotate, slow auto-rotation, full geometry/material/renderer dispose on unmount; WebGL-absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + audio still runs. **No API route, no `guard`** (public CORS, read-only, no secrets). No new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **arXiv 2605.21874** (Alunno & Bientinesi, *Real-time, EDM-inspired sonification*, **May 21 2026** вҖ” EDM's build-tension-release as a continuous, fatigue-resistant monitoring sonification grammar; the basis for the build-and-drop arc; carried from RESEARCH В§373) В· **NASA HARP** (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas) + **NASA/Chandra aurora sonifications** (Mar 2026 вҖ” brightness/position/energy вҶ’ pitch/volume/timbre) В· **NOAA SWPC Aurora Dashboard (Experimental)** (live data + auroral-oval colatitude-expansion lineage) В· **IGRF** (magnetic-pole coordinates) В· **Refik Anadol** / **Ryoji Ikeda** (data-as-light, but warm). Born from RESEARCH В§375 (the dive bound the build via path (b)/(c) вҖ” continue a research-seeded multi-cycle spine). **Ambition 4/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (live ingest + EDM engine + orbital-globe-with-ovals) + **#3** named refs (above) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the Living Earth spine) + **#5** carried В§373 research within 14 days (arXiv 2605.21874, the EDM arc). **#1 NOT claimed вҖ” grep-honest:** a live-NOAA-space-weather aurora already exists (`262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ, the lab's 2nd real-world-data sonification); the fresh moves are the **EDM build-and-drop structural arc** (262 is an ambient drone), the **orbital-globe vantage** (262 is sky-facing curtains), and the **spine framing** вҖ” application novelty, not a new primitive. **Diversity** (cycle bans: AI-image OUT [4Г— count] В· Canvas2D OUT [jury] В· drum-machine TECH [jury] В· refuse-to-resolve & pentatonic-lullaby VIBE [jury]): **live-space-weather INPUT** В· **three.js orbital-globe + auroral-ovals OUTPUT** (zero Canvas2D, zero AI-image; the globe is **declared spine continuity with `463`**, not an unintentional rut вҖ” the one diversity caveat, accepted because a multi-cycle spine extending its own visual language is the #4 commitment the jury asked for) В· **EDM build-and-drop data-sonification TECHNIQUE** (warm, resolves вҖ” not drum-machine) В· **warm space-observatory-that-resolves VIBE** (the jury's missing middle). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-attack adult fire (one Helios concept вҖ” *NOAA space-weather вҶ’ EDM build-and-drop, storm = the drop* вҖ” three renderers: orbital globe vs. fbm sky-curtain vs. volumetric raymarch). **The grep-audit overturned the first instinct:** siblings `469-helios-aurora` (three.js fbm sky-curtain veil) + `470-helios-raymarch` (raw WebGL2 volumetric raymarch) were complete and real but **NOT banked** вҖ” both duplicate the register of the loved `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ (whose own banked siblings are literally `aurora-raymarch` + `aurora-drone-field`), so re-seeding them would re-seed the "too similar" rut; `471` won precisely because the orbital globe is the **one approach visually distinct from 262** AND the only one that continues the `463` spine. Rides loved `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ (here as a *caution*, not a pull) + `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ + `323-latent-condensation`вқӨпёҸ (luminous data-light). **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/471-helios-orbit` 8.96 kB prerendered as static in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no live network / GPU / audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: NOAA SWPC CORS + the assumed column indices (plasma `[t,density,speed,temp]`, mag Bz idx 3, Kp idx 1; all NaN-guarded вҶ’ synthetic fallback if wrong) from Karel's network; whether the auroral-oval colatitude rebuild (>1.5В° вҶ’ particle regen) shimmers on a fast synthetic ramp (only ~1Г—/min on real 60-s polling); the kick/sub/pad balance behind the limiter; the iOS AudioContext-in-tap path; whether the orbital globe reads as clearly distinct from `262` on a real GPU.
