[/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout) вҖ” **"Sing a Sprout": a 4-year-old HUMS or sings, and a glowing garden grows from their voice over minutes вҖ” every note plants a sprout on a sunflower-spiral, and the garden softly sings their earlier song back.** `demoable` В· Cycle 544 (kids, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-voice** input (synthetic humming-child fallback) / **three.js** GPU phyllotaxis garden / calm luminous bedtime. **The lab's FIRST long-form, STATEFUL kids piece** вҖ” the thin jury-valued depth lane (888's register) in the kids register, and the standing **resurrect-first вӯҗ** banked from В§542. The compositional logic is **the child's own voice accumulating into a remembered garden, NOT pitch theory** вҖ” each sung note snaps to a 3-octave C-pentatonic ladder (no "wrong" notes), plants a glowing sprout at the next **Vogel phyllotaxis** position (golden angle 137.5В°, so the garden fills outward like a sunflower head), and chimes immediately (cause-effect for the kid). **The long-form / memory engine (genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1):** a rolling **memory bank** of the child's sung notes is a *stigmergic trace* вҖ” it (a) **biases** where later sprouts land in pitch (new notes pull 30% toward the garden's accumulated average "scent") and (b) every ~14s the garden **re-sings a 4-note earlier phrase back** as soft bells AND plants memory-echo sprouts, so the garden grows from its own memory; sprouts bloom coolвҶ’warm over ~3 min and the camera slowly drifts outward as the garden fills, so a glance at minute 5 reads materially different (sprout count, spiral extent, warmth, distance). **Input:** `getUserMedia` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` RMS-gated **autocorrelation** pitch detector (clamped 120вҖ“900 Hz), loudnessвҶ’sprout size/brightness. **Mic-routing safety:** mic вҶ’ AnalyserNode ONLY, never to `destination` (no feedback). **Output:** **three.js** instanced glowing discs + bright cores (additive blend, HSL cool-violetвҶ’warm-amber by note + age), soft ground glow, fog, breathing. NOT Canvas2D/SVG. **Always-alive:** no mic / denied вҶ’ a synthetic **"humming child"** sings a slow rising-falling pentatonic melody that plants its first sprout at **~0.35s** and keeps growing the garden on its own; `text-rose-300` notice on mic failure. VIBE: calm luminous night garden, bedtime. **Named refs:** **H. Vogel's phyllotaxis model (1979, golden angle 137.5В°)** В· **Brian Eno** generative / long-form ambient В· the **children's-movement sonification** work (Frontiers, **PMC5104747**). **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [mic pitch detection + long-form stateful garden/memory engine + memory-echo bell synth w/ dumb drone + three.js instanced render] В· #3 three named refs В· #4 multi-cycle commitment [cycle-1 ships the growth+memory spine; cycle-2 longer-arc macro-form / seasons; cycle-3 polish] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§544 citation вҖ” **10 straight cycles** 535вҖ“544). #1 NOT claimed (mic-pitch + phyllotaxis + granular both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *the long-form stigmergic-memory garden*, not over-claimed as a clean #1). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§544 (MusicSwarm 2026 вҖ” long-form coherence from a *stigmergic* swarm where agents leave traces in a shared field; plant-growth sonification) вҶ’ the child's voice IS the stigmergic trace вҶ’ this kids **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (JURY 2026-06-24)]` В· `picked=[mic-voice INPUT (non-touch, 2 priors/10 вҖ” under cap), three.js GPU OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface the jury wants), long-form stateful phyllotaxis-growth + stigmergic-memory TECHNIQUE (melody sung back, NOT a pitch/interval engine), calm-garden/bedtime VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Kids-safe chain:** every voice вҶ’ `master gain 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-18/12:1) вҶ’ destination`; soft вүҘ20ms bell attacks, always-on C2+G2+C3 breathing drone (never silent); вүҘ64px primary tap target; no reading required; no "wrong" notes. **Degrades first-class:** no Web Audio вҶ’ never throws; no mic вҶ’ synthetic humming child keeps it sounding+growing; full teardown (rAF cancel; stop mic tracks; stop pad/lfo oscillators; dispose all three.js geo/mat; `audioCtx.close()`; remove resize listener). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three.js + Web Audio only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 112s`** вҶ’ lint/type passed вҶ’ grep-confirmed zero "924"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/mic-verified** (no audio/WebGL/mic in container вҖ” unverified: whether the autocorrelation reads a small child's wavery voice cleanly [octave errors possible], the multi-minute arc by wall-clock [reasoned-through, not observed], whether the bloom reads as "my song became a garden"; the synthetic humming-child fallback guarantees a sounding/blooming glance within ~0.35s regardless). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`925-kids-tilt-tide`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt В· three.js 40Г—40 height-field sea of light that tips & pools вҶ’ warm pentatonic bells in the rhythm of tilting; standing-wave shimmer; pointer-drag + idle auto-demo fallback) + **`926-kids-firefly-meadow`** (front-camera frame-difference **optical-flow** motion energy on a 64Г—48 sensor grid В· three.js firefly swarm gathers where you wave & chimes; synthetic "evening breeze" fallback вҖ” Krueger *Videoplace* lineage) as IDEAS В§544. Design notes: `src/app/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout/README.md`

[/dream/927-depth-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/927-depth-room) вҖ” **"Depth Room": your webcam becomes a depth camera, and distance is the instrument вҖ” a browser ML model reads how far every pixel is, so leaning in blooms a close granular foreground and pulling back thins to a low drone; music lives in proximity, space, and motion, never in pitch.** `demoable` В· Cycle 545 (adult, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **camera (webcam)** input / **WebGL2 fragment-shader** output / a softly-lit room. **The lab's FIRST depth-camera piece** вҖ” the single concept JURY has named in *every* verdict ("depth-camera STILL 0Г—"), always deferred for "needs a Kinect/RealSense." This dissolves that excuse: **real-time monocular depth estimation in the browser** turns an ordinary laptop cam into a per-pixel distance field with no special hardware. The compositional logic is **distance/space, NOT pitch theory** (JURY 2026-06-24 #3). **Input/technique:** `getUserMedia` вҶ’ frames drawn to a 256Г—192 offscreen canvas вҶ’ **Depth Anything V2** (`onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small`) run on **WebGPU via Transformers.js**, loaded **at runtime from a jsDelivr CDN** (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`) so **zero npm deps are added**; inference throttled to ~6fps, wrapped in try/catch. The depth map is averaged to a **16Г—12 grid** вҶ’ features: **near-zone energy** (how much of you is CLOSE), **histogram spread**, **centroid x/y** of the nearest region, **motion-in-depth** (frame-to-frame change). **Output (audio):** a bank of **HRTF-`PannerNode`-spatialized** granular/additive voices вҖ” NEAR energy blooms bright foreground pentatonic-shimmer + opens lowpass; FAR thins to a low **drone bed** (root A1 + fifth E2); centroid-x pans LвҶ”R; spread opens the shimmer stack; motion adds grain density + tremolo. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** вҖ” one fixed A-minor-pentatonic + drone, nothing can clash. Master gain вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ compressor. **Output (visual):** a fullscreen **WebGL2 fragment shader** (`scene.ts`) samples the depth grid as an `R32F` texture вҖ” near pixels glow warm amber/rose and bloom around your nearest region, far recede to cool indigo; quiet iso-depth contour bands + drifting volumetric haze react to near-zone energy; image mirrored so it reads like a room you stand in. NOT three.js/Canvas2D/SVG. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique [monocular depth estimation вҖ” grep-confirmed lab-first; depth-camera 0Г— every jury] В· #2 вүҘ4 subsystems [camera capture + browser ML depth model + WebGL2 depth-shader + HRTF spatial granular synth] В· #3 named ref [**Depth Anything V2**, Yang et al., **NeurIPS 2024**; Transformers.js-WebGPU `webgpu-realtime-depth-estimation` demo] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§545 citation вҖ” **11 straight cycles** 535вҖ“545). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§545 (a webcam is now a depth camera вҖ” monocular depth runs in-browser on WebGPU *now*) вҶ’ JURY's standing #2 (depth-camera 0Г—) + #3 (music from space not pitch) вҶ’ this adult **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[mic INPUT (5Г—/10), three.js OUTPUT (5Г—/10), Canvas2D, SVG (JURY 2026-06-24)]` В· `picked=[camera INPUT (1 prior/10 вҖ” under cap), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface, not three.js), monocular-depthвҶ’spatial-granular TECHNIQUE (space, not pitch theory), immersive contemplative adult VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Degrades first-class (always sounds + shows):** no camera/denied вҶ’ animated **synthetic procedural depth field** (slow breathing radial blob) drives the same audio+shader; no WebGPU / model-load fail вҶ’ same synthetic field; no WebGL2 вҶ’ minimal Canvas2D depth-grid view; a hands-off auto-start kicks a silent synthetic visual within **~0.45s**; audio only after the **"Enter the room"** tap (gesture-gated AudioContext). **Privacy:** camera processed entirely on-device, **live вҖ” never recorded or uploaded** (stated in UI in emerald). Full teardown (camera tracks stopped; AudioContext faded+closed; rAF cancel; GL program/shaders/texture/buffer/VAO disposed). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (all client-side, zero server, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Transformers.js is a runtime CDN import, not a package dep). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 81s`** вҶ’ lint/type passed; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/camera/GPU-verified** (no camera/WebGPU/audio in container вҖ” unverified: whether Transformers.js's `depth` output shape matches across versions [wrapped in try/catch вҶ’ synthetic fallback on any mismatch], real-GPU inference framerate, whether "lean in = bloom" reads as embodied; the synthetic-depth fallback guarantees a sounding, depth-shaded glance regardless). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`928-tilt-orrery`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt В· a real **WebGPU compute** WGSL N-body sim of ~1,400 orbiting bodies вҶ’ perihelion/collision-triggered granular percussion, timbre from radius/speed, pan from angular position, pitch a fixed drone; CPU N-body fallback вҶ’ Canvas2D; pointer/slider + auto-tilt demo вҖ” the orrery / GPU-N-body lineage) + **`929-cathedral-rhythm`** (MIDI/keyboard/pads В· a Bjorklund **Euclidean-rhythm + Reich-phasing** lookahead sequencer, several lanes of one fixed pitch through a procedural ~4.2s convolution-reverb cathedral, rendered as a **WebGL2 raymarched SDF nave** lit only by per-lane onset-flashes вҖ” *Piano Phase* 1967 / Toussaint 2005) as IDEAS В§545. Design notes: `src/app/dream/927-depth-room/README.md`

[/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy) вҖ” **"Maqam Calligraphy": a living Arabic _taqsim_ improvises itself in EXACT microtonal cents and writes itself as a luminous ink-and-gold calligraphic line вҖ” so you can SEE the quarter-tones sit between the piano's 12-TET cracks.** `demoable` В· Cycle 555 (adult, DEEP fire вҖ” winner of 2 Canvas2D approaches). **For**: adult / contemplative / **autonomous + light touch-steer** input / **Canvas2D** output / warm ink-and-gold illuminated-manuscript ritual. **The lab's FIRST non-Western melodic-modal lane** вҖ” Arabic **maqam**, distinct from the lab's prior microtonal work (538/414/404 are JI/Bohlen-Pierce _tuning-lattices_; this is the maqam _modal/ornament/improvisation_ tradition). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (make music from real PITCH/melody again) from a non-vertical direction: a single ornamented MELODIC line, no chords, no voice-leading engine. **Engine (`maqam.ts` + `sayr.ts` + `audio.ts`):** every pitch is an exact cents offset from a D tonic (`freq = 293.66*2^(cents/1200)`), quarter-tones (~150c, ~350c) **first-class, never snapped to 12-TET**. Eight **ajnas** (Rast `0/200/350/500`, Bayati `0/150/300/500`, Hijaz `0/100/400/500`, Nahawand `0/200/300/500`, Kurd `0/100/300/500`, Saba `0/150/300/400`, Ajam `0/200/400/500`, Sikah trichord `0/150/350`) compose five **maqamat** (lower jins on the tonic + upper jins on the **ghammaz** pivot). A **sayr state machine** drives a ~5.5-min **long-form, stateful** journey (qarar-low -> ascent -> ghammaz -> modulation/peak -> descent -> qarar-home), modulating to a related maqam via an adjacency map at the peak вҖ” genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1. A **free-meter** phrase generator (no fixed bar) targets characteristic/rest tones with stepwise approach, breaths between phrases, and ornaments: **portamento** slides through the microtonal space (`setTargetAtTime`), grace notes, trills, and "leaning" on the neutral half-flats. **Synth (NO granular вҖ” jury-banned):** a plucked **oud/qanun**-like voice (triangle+saw -> fast-decay lowpass pluck + sympathetic partial) over a sustained **tanbura** drone (tonic + fifth, slow beating); master `gain <=0.26 -> lowpass -> DynamicsCompressor -> destination`. **Visual (Canvas2D вҖ” the only non-banned renderer this window):** an illuminated-manuscript field where the melody draws an **ink-and-gold brushstroke** (y = exact cents, stroke weight = emphasis, portamento = curved sweeps, grace/trill = flourishes) against a dim dashed **12-TET ghost grid** + gold **active-jins guide-lines** labeled `qarar`/`ghammaz`/`<n>c` вҖ” the literal "quarter-tones between the cracks"; modulation washes a new tint, the tanbura glows at the tonic/fifth baselines. **UX:** pick a starting maqam -> "Begin taqsim" (gesture-gates AudioContext); plays hands-free; light steering nudges the next modulation or heads home; ~0.9s auto-demo runs a silent visual if no Begin; `text-rose-300` audio-fail notice; full teardown. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [first maqam / exact-cents non-Western modal + first sayr-driven long-form self-modulating taqsim; grep-0x] - #2 >=4 subsystems [ajnas-cents engine + sayr modulation FSM + free-meter ornament generator + oud/tanbura microtonal synth + Canvas2D calligraphic render] - #3 named refs [Arab maqam tradition; the **sayr** concept; **AMICOR 2026** (_Language Resources and Evaluation_); **1932 Cairo Congress of Arab Music**] - #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§555** вҖ” 20 straight cycles 535вҖ“555). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§555 (AMICOR 2026 names the gap вҖ” no maqam-native microtone synthesis, practice drifts to Western 12-TET) -> this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js (JURY 7x), mic-as-primary (JURY 4x), granular (JURY 4x), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10x), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), voice-leading/chordal-harmony-engine (lab-hardening 550/551/941/942/947)]` - `picked=[autonomous+touch-steer INPUT (non-mic), Canvas2D OUTPUT (only non-banned renderer, 0x/10), exact-cents maqam-sayr modulation TECH (melodic/modal вҖ” NOT voice-leading), warm ink-and-gold non-Western ritual VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route -> no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`Compiled successfully in 44s`** -> lint/type passed -> grep-confirmed zero "952"/"maqam"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in container). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`951-maqam-road`** (RESURRECT-FIRST: same engine, the sayr-as-a-road-through-a-dusk-landscape lens, Canvas2D, IDEAS В§555). Design notes: `src/app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy/README.md`

[/dream/960-cristal-friction](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/960-cristal-friction) вҖ” **"Cristal Friction": bow a row of glowing glass/metal rods with your cursor вҖ” the singing comes from a REAL elasto-plastic stick-slip friction physical model (Helmholtz motion), not a sampled or additive emulation.** `demoable` (build-checked + Node-DSP-tested; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 559 (adult, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal NON-harmony explorers). **For**: adult / **pointer-rub** input (cursor velocity = bow speed, vertical press = bow force) / raw-**WebGL2** glowing-rods shader (Canvas2D fallback) / warm-glass candle-lit ritual. **The lab's first friction EXCITER model** вҖ” prior "bowed/glass" pieces (355-kids-glass-armonica, 202-membrane-drum, 468-kids-bottle-flute) emulated the *resonator* with additive/FM; here a per-sample **elasto-plastic / LuGre bristle friction law** (stiction near zero relative velocity вҶ’ Stribeck drop into slip) runs in an **AudioWorkletProcessor**, feeding friction force back into a **Chamberlin modal resonator bank**'s contact velocity to *self-sustain* the bowed oscillation. Silent at rest; locks to the rod pitch under a steady bow; breaks into whistling **wolf-tones** when bowed fast/light (a feature). Six rods just-tuned to a pentatonic+octave drone on ~D3 so any combination is consonant вҖ” the **friction TIMBRE and the embodied bowing gesture are the idea, not a harmony engine** (deliberately breaking the 7-of-10 harmony monoculture the JURY 2026-06-25 monoculture-warning pointed at). Worklet loaded as a Blob URL (no public/ file); oscillator fallback if AudioWorklet absent. **Named refs:** McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse, *On the oscillations of musical instruments* (1983); the elasto-plastic bowed-string friction model (2025вҖ“26 physical-modeling revival, Frontiers in Signal Processing 2025); the **Cristal Baschet** + Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761). **RESEARCH В§559** chain (today's friction-synthesis dive вҶ’ today's build). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first friction stick-slip exciter В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named refs В· #5 В§559). Honest note: the model self-oscillates to a roughly constant limit-cycle amplitude (as a real Helmholtz-regime string does), so the loudness/brightness *envelope* is a deliberate gestural shaping layer on top of the physics; build-checked + the worklet was Node-tested for stability/self-oscillation/boundedness, but the WebGL2 shader and final sound were not rendered/heard in-container.
